**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01053))_

> Was this crown not to display all the colors of the world?!" It is said that Somska answered without changing the expression beneath his beard at all, "If you mix all colors together, you will only get black."

## Damage Recovery

- Damage dealt to a character's life force can be recovered in a variety of ways. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01058))_

## 4.11.1 Magical Recovery

- Life force that a character has lost due to damage is relatively easy to recover through the use of magic or items with magical powers. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01060))_
- The degree of this recovery can be found in the descriptions of each spell or magic item. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01061))_

## 4.11.2 First-Aid

- A character with 0 or negative life force will recover up to 1 (positive) point if given treatment by someone with the ranger skill, healer skill, or similar. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01063))_
- It can also instantly recover life force to 1 point, no matter how great the negative, but it cannot recover life force to 2 or more points. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01064))_

## 4.11.3 Natural Recovery

- If a character is conscious and at rest (full rest in a safe place), that character recovers 1 point of life force per day. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01066))_
- If a character is not at rest (e.g., traveling, fighting monsters in a labyrinth, not getting much sleep at night due to keeping watch), that character cannot recover any life force at all. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01068))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01067))_

> If someone with the healer skill is nursing them, that character can recover even more life force each day.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01069))_

> [Figure] (p.54)

## Basic Rules of Magic

## 5.1.1 Types of Magic

- In Sword World , there is a power called magic that can produce various mysterious effects by chanting words called runes and performing certain procedures at the same time. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01078))_
- The five runes are high ancient , silent spirit , holy prayer , daemon scream , and dragon roar . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01079))_
- This difference in runes is at the same time a difference in the type of magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01079))_
- There are five types of runes in the world of Sword World . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01079))_
- Each has a different source of magical power and a completely different procedure (although holy prayer and daemon scream are essentially the same power, the only difference being the nature of the magic). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01079))_
- Each has a different source of magical power and a completely different procedure (although holy prayer and daemon scream are essentially the same power, the only difference being the nature of the magic). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01079))_
- In addition to these runes, there are two others that, although weak, can still manifest magical power. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01080))_
- They are called common runes and spellsongs , respectively. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01080))_

## 5.1.2 Rune Masters and Rune Master Skills

- Rune masters are divided into five types according to the type of magic (runes) they use. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01083))_
- In Sword World , all those who use magic utilizing runes are called rune masters . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01083))_
- Sorcerer uses ancient magic Shaman uses spirit magic Priest uses holy magic Dark priest uses dark magic _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01084))_
- and dragon priest uses dragon roar magic . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01085))_
- Those with the sorcerer skill can use ancient magic and are called sorcerers . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01086))_
- Each corresponds to the skill for which it is named. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01086))_
- Some rune masters are fluent in multiple runes. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01087))_
- However, this also has some limitations. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01087))_
- However, this also has some limitations. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01087))_
- One, is that some races may not be able to learn some or all of the runes. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01088))_
- A character cannot hold more than one of these beliefs at the same time. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01089))_
- These types of magic are obtained through belief in gods , wicked gods , and dragons , respectively. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01089))_
- The other, is that you cannot have more than one each of holy, dark, and dragon roar magic at the same time. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01089))_

## 5.1.3 Learning Magic

- Magic is not omnipotent. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01092))_
- There are several types of spells, each with different effects. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01092))_
- It is only possible to achieve a defined and limited set of effects by weaving certain words (in runes), called spells . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01092))_
- Depending on the strength of their effects, spells are divided into levels from 1-10 . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01092))_
- 1st level spells are very rudimentary, while 10th level spells are very powerful. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01092))_
- It is only possible to achieve a defined and limited set of effects by weaving certain words (in runes), called spells . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01092))_
- However, working with higher level (i.e., more advanced) spells requires a high rune master skill. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01093))_
- For those who have acquired multiple rune master skills, consider the level of spells you can use for each type of magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01094))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01092))_

> Magic is not omnipotent. It is only possible to achieve a defined and limited set of effects by weaving certain words (in runes), called spells . There are several types of spells, each with different effects. Depending on the strength of their effects, spells are divided into levels from 1-10 . 1st level spells are very rudimentary, while 10th level spells are very powerful.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01093))_

> A rune master can use all magic up to their skill level, but cannot use magic of a higher level than their current skill.

## Example:

- This adventurer can use 1st level holy magic and 1st-2nd level spirit magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01096))_
- Suppose we have an adventurer with priest skill level 1 and shaman skill level 2. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01096))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01096))_

> He cannot use any ancient magic, nor any holy magic of 2nd level or higher, nor any spirit magic of 3rd level or higher.

## 5.1.4 How to Use Magic

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01099))_

> [Figure] (p.56)

## Magic Power

- First, adventurers who use magic are given a score called magic power . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01102))_
- If you've acquired multiple magic skills, consider the magic power of each separately . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01104))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01102))_

> First, adventurers who use magic are given a score called magic power .

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01103))_

> magic power = magic skill level + intelligence bonus

## Example:

- An adventurer with priest skill level 1, shaman skill level 2, and 13 intelligence (+2 bonus) would have a magic power of 3 in holy magic and a magic power of 4 in spirit magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01106))_

## Filling out the Character Sheet

- Characters with rune master skills must write their runes , skill level , and magic power in this field. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01108))_
- On the Character Sheet, there is a magic field. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01108))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01110))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01111))_

> [Figure] (p.57)

## Resisting

- Non-resistible magic can be effective regardless of what the target does. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01113))_
- There are two kinds of magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01113))_
- This distinction will be specified for each spell in the spell lists that follow. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01114))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01113))_

> Magic that is resistible can be rendered ineffective or less effective if the target chooses to resist .

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01114))_

> This distinction will be specified for each spell in the spell lists that follow.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01115))_

> [Figure] (p.57)

## Procedure for Casting Non-resistible Magic

- The game procedures for using resistible and non-resistible magic are quite different. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01117))_
- Declare which magic you're using, then roll 2D. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01119))_
- Declare which magic you're using, then roll 2D. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01119))_
- If it is double ones, then for some reason (the spell was inaccurate, etc.) the magic takes no effect at all. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01120))_
- If it is double ones, then for some reason (the spell was inaccurate, etc.) the magic takes no effect at all. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01120))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01119))_

> Declare which magic you're using, then roll 2D.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01120))_

> If the result is anything other than double ones, the magic takes effect.

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01119))_

> Declare which magic you're using, then roll 2D.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01121))_

> [Figure] (p.57)

## Procedure When an Adventurer Casts Resistible Magic on a Monster

- If the 2D roll comes up double ones , that means there was some mistake and the magic did not work. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01123))_
- If the resistance score is not met, the magic will not work or will only have a weak effect. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01123))_
- If 2D roll + magic power is greater than or equal to the monster's resistance score, the magic will be cast with its full effect. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01123))_
- Even if the magic doesn't normally lose its effect when resisted, in this case it is completely nullified. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01123))_
- Y ou must make a success roll using caster's magic power as the baseline score and the monster's mental point resistance as the target score. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01123))_
- If the resistance score is not met, the magic will not work or will only have a weak effect. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01123))_
- If the 2D roll comes up double ones , that means there was some mistake and the magic did not work. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01123))_
- In this case, there is no need to roll the dice, and the magic does not take effect). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01124))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01123))_

> When attempting to cast resistible magic on a monster, the caster must determine whether their opponent can resist it.

## Example:

- The baseline score is 4 (magic power) and the target score is 9 (goblin's mental point resistance). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01128))_
- In other words, if the 2D roll is 5 or mor e, Fire Bolt will take its full effect. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01128))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01126))_

> Consider an adventurer with shaman skill level 2 and a +2 intelligence bonus (magic power 4) who casts the Fire Bolt spell, which shoots a flaming bullet at the opponent, on a goblin (mental point resistance 9).

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01127))_

> Fire Bolt is resistible magic, so if it's resisted by the opponent, its effect will be reduced.

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01126))_

> Consider an adventurer with shaman skill level 2 and a +2 intelligence bonus (magic power 4) who casts the Fire Bolt spell, which shoots a flaming bullet at the opponent, on a goblin (mental point resistance 9).

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01128))_

> In this case, the adventurer (the player controlling them) must make a success roll.

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01130))_

> Roll of 5 or greater: Fire Bolt takes its full effect.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01131))_

> Roll of 3-4: Fire Bolt takes an incomplete effect.

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01132))_

> Roll of 2 (double ones): Fire Bolt does not work at all.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01133))_

> magic power + 2D ≥ monster's mental point resistance → magic takes

## full effect

- When a monster casts magic, the procedure is different from when an adventurer casts magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01140))_
- In the case of resistible magic, the issue is resolved from the perspective of whether the adventurer is able to resist the magic cast by the monster. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01141))_
- First, in the case of non-resistible magic, a monster can never fail. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01141))_
- There is no need to roll the dice, as the magic will definitely take its effect. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01141))_
- The target score is a score called the monster's magic intensity . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01141))_
- This is determined by a success roll using the character's mental power resistance , that is, a mental power resistance roll . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01141))_
- If the adventurer's final score is less than the monster's magic intensity, they will receive the full effect of the magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01142))_
- Also, since this is considered a success roll, it'll be an automatic failure if the 2D roll is double ones . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01143))_
- No matter how high the adventurer's mental power resistance or how low the monster's magic intensity, the magic will take its full effect. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01143))_
- Conversely, double sixes is an automatic success , so in this case, regardless of the adventurer's mental power resistance or the monster's magic intensity, that's a successful resist * and the magic will only take an incomplete effect. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01143))_
- Conversely, double sixes is an automatic success , so in this case, regardless of the adventurer's mental power resistance or the monster's magic intensity, that's a successful resist * and the magic will only take an incomplete effect. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01143))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01136))_

> When the 2D roll is double sixes , the magic will automatically take its full effect.

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01136))_

> When the 2D roll is double sixes , the magic will automatically take its full effect.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01137))_

> When the 2D roll is double ones , the magic unconditionally takes no effect at all.

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01137))_

> When the 2D roll is double ones , the magic unconditionally takes no effect at all.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01138))_

> [Figure] (p.58)

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01141))_

> First, in the case of non-resistible magic, a monster can never fail. There is no need to roll the dice, as the magic will definitely take its effect. In the case of resistible magic, the issue is resolved from the perspective of whether the adventurer is able to resist the magic cast by the monster. This is determined by a success roll using the character's mental power resistance , that is, a mental power resistance roll . The target score is a score called the monster's magic intensity .

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01142))_

> If the adventurer's final score ( mental power resistance + 2D ) is equal to or greater than the monster's magic intensity , the monster's magic will only take an incomplete effect (some magic will take no effect at all).

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01143))_

> Also, since this is considered a success roll, it'll be an automatic failure if the 2D roll is double ones . No matter how high the adventurer's mental power resistance or how low the monster's magic intensity, the magic will take its full effect. Conversely, double sixes is an automatic success , so in this case, regardless of the adventurer's mental power resistance or the monster's magic intensity, that's a successful resist * and the magic will only take an incomplete effect.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01144))_

> [Figure] (p.58)

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01143))_

> Also, since this is considered a success roll, it'll be an automatic failure if the 2D roll is double ones . No matter how high the adventurer's mental power resistance or how low the monster's magic intensity, the magic will take its full effect. Conversely, double sixes is an automatic success , so in this case, regardless of the adventurer's mental power resistance or the monster's magic intensity, that's a successful resist * and the magic will only take an incomplete effect.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01145))_

> *In this way, when making a resistible magic check, you can also call it a successful resist or failed resist from the perspective of the one being affected by the magic.

## Example:

- Ducard II (mental power resistance 4) is attacked by a dark elf during an adventure. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01147))_
- Dark elves have the ability to use spirit magic, with a magic intensity of 13. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01147))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01147))_

> If the dark elf casts a Fire Bolt on Ducard II, Ducard II must make a mental power resistance roll (baseline score 4, target score 13).

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01149))_

> Roll is 8 or less: failed resist. Fire Bolt takes its full effect.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01150))_

> mental power resistance + 2D ≥ monster's magic intensity → magic takes an incomplete effect (some take no effect at all)

## full effect

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01154))_

> When the 2D roll is double ones , the resist automatically fails

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01155))_

> [Figure] (p.59)

## Procedure When an Adventurer Casts Resistible Magic on an Adventurer

- Just like player characters, even those whose data was created for a character may appear as an enemy. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01157))_
- In other words, you compare the magic power + 2D score of the one casting the magic with the mental power resistance + 2D score of the one on whom the magic is being cast. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01158))_
- The resolution of double ones and double sixes is also the same as weapon combat. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01159))_
- In other words, if the resisting side rolls double sixes, the resist is an unconditional success , otherwise, if the side casting the magic rolls double sixes, the resist is a failure . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01159))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01157))_

> Just like player characters, even those whose data was created for a character may appear as an enemy. If such an enemy casts magic on an adventurer, or if an adventurer casts magic on such an enemy, both sides must roll dice to resolve the situation, just as in weapon combat between adventurers.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01158))_

> If the score of the one casting the magic is greater, the magic will take full effect, but if there is a tie or if the score of the one on whom the magic is being cast is greater, the magic is resisted and will only take an incomplete effect.

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01157))_

> Just like player characters, even those whose data was created for a character may appear as an enemy. If such an enemy casts magic on an adventurer, or if an adventurer casts magic on such an enemy, both sides must roll dice to resolve the situation, just as in weapon combat between adventurers.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01160))_

> When the one casting the magic rolls double ones , the magic takes no effect at all.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01161))_

> When the resisting side rolls double ones , the resist fails , unless the side casting the magic also rolls double ones.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01162))_

> [Figure] (p.59)

## Handling Resistible Magic and Multiple Targets

- This kind of magic can have multiple targets, and each target must make their own check to resist. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01165))_

## When an Adventurer Casts Magic on Monsters

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01167))_

> The player must roll the dice and make a check for each monster.

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01167))_

> The player must roll the dice and make a check for each monster.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01168))_

> [Figure] (p.59)

## Example:

- Lightning is a spell that shoots a bolt of lightning, dealing damage to everything in its path. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01170))_
- Suppose there are three goblins (each with a mental point resistance of 9) and one goblin lord (mental point resistance 12) in this space. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01171))_
- If the rolls against the three goblins were 6 , 3 , and 2 (double ones!), and the roll against the goblin lord was 6 , then the result would look like this: _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01172))_
- If the rolls against the three goblins were 6 , 3 , and 2 (double ones!), and the roll against the goblin lord was 6 , then the result would look like this: _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01172))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01172))_

> If the rolls against the three goblins were 6 , 3 , and 2 (double ones!), and the roll against the goblin lord was 6 , then the result would look like this:

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01170))_

> If there are multiple targets in the path of the lightning bolt, you must make a check for each one's attempt to resist.

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01170, source-range-de1806a5-01172))_

> Suppose an adventurer with sorcerer skill level 3 and a +2 intelligence bonus (magic power 5) casts the spell Lightning . Lightning is a spell that shoots a bolt of lightning, dealing damage to everything in its path. If there are multiple targets in the path of the lightning bolt, you must make a check for each one's attempt to resist. If the rolls against the three goblins were 6 , 3 , and 2 (double ones!), and the roll against the goblin lord was 6 , then the result would look like this:

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01171))_

> The player rolls the dice four times and for each one must determine whether the magic breaks through the resist and takes its full effect.

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01172, source-range-de1806a5-01175))_

> If the rolls against the three goblins were 6 , 3 , and 2 (double ones!), and the roll against the goblin lord was 6 , then the result would look like this: 3rd goblin: The result is double ones, so no effect

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01173))_

> 1st goblin: 5 (magic power) + 6 (roll) = 11 ≥ 9 (mental point resistance), full effect.

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01173, source-range-de1806a5-01175))_

## When a Monster Casts Magic on Adventurers

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01179))_

> Each player must make a resistance roll using monster's magic intensity as the target score.

## Example:

- The game master declares that its magic intensity is 13 . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01181))_
- This centaur has the ability to use ancient magic and unleashes Lightning . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01181))_
- Each of the three adventurers (the players in control) roll 2D to check if they resist, using their mental power resistance as the baseline score, and 13 (magic intensity) as the target score. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01182))_

## When an Adventurer Casts Magic on Adventurers

- The following procedure is used to make a check when data created for a character casts magic on adventurers, and vice versa. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01184))_
- The final score (magic power + 2D) must then be determined this one time only. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01185))_
- First, the side casting the magic rolls 2D. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01185))_
- The final score (magic power + 2D) must then be determined this one time only. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01185))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01184))_

> The following procedure is used to make a check when data created for a character casts magic on adventurers, and vice versa.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01185))_

> Each resisting side must then make a mental power resistance roll, using that determined final score as the target score.

## Example:

- If their rolls are each 2 (double ones!), 6 , and 9 , then only the last one is able to resist the Lightning . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01187))_
- First, Gorman rolls 2D and adds his own magic power. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01187))_
- If we assume his 2D roll is 8 , each of the three adventurers must make a mental power resistance roll, with a target score of 5 (magic power) + 8 (roll) = 13 . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01187))_
- Suppose that the baseline score of all three of their mental power resistance rolls is 4 . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01187))_
- If their rolls are each 2 (double ones!), 6 , and 9 , then only the last one is able to resist the Lightning . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01187))_
- Handling double ones and double sixes is no different from when there's only one target. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01188))_
- If the side casting the magic rolls double ones, the magic has no effect on any targets. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01188))_
- Handling double ones and double sixes is no different from when there's only one target. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01188))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01187))_

> The evil sorcerer Gorman (magic power 5) unleashes Lightning on the three adventurers. First, Gorman rolls 2D and adds his own magic power. If we assume his 2D roll is 8 , each of the three adventurers must make a mental power resistance roll, with a target score of 5 (magic power) + 8 (roll) = 13 . Suppose that the baseline score of all three of their mental power resistance rolls is 4 . If their rolls are each 2 (double ones!), 6 , and 9 , then only the last one is able to resist the Lightning

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01188))_

> If the side casting the magic rolls double sixes, no one can resist, except for those who also roll double sixes.

## When an Adventurer Casts Magic on a Mix of Adventurers and Monsters

- Casting magic on such a group is handled the same way as when an adventurer casts magic on (a group of) adventurers, as described above. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01190))_
- Sometimes enemies written in the same data format as a character may also be accompanied by monsters. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01190))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01190))_

> At this time, the monsters must also roll the dice to make resist checks.

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01190))_

> Sometimes enemies written in the same data format as a character may also be accompanied by monsters. For example, a sorcerer who leads undead monsters to attack villages. Casting magic on such a group is handled the same way as when an adventurer casts magic on (a group of) adventurers, as described above. At this time, the monsters must also roll the dice to make resist checks. Please use the optional rules under 17.1: Changes to Magic Procedure (see p. 273).

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01191))_

## If the Target Does Not Resist

- Some magic can also have secondary effects. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01193))_
- For example, the spirit magic Fanaticism increases attack power, but conversely decreases evasion speed. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01193))_
- With such magic, the one on whom it is cast can choose whether or not to resist. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01193))_
- For example, the spirit magic Fanaticism increases attack power, but conversely decreases evasion speed. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01193))_
- You're also allowed to choose to not resist magic like Fire Bolt , which will definitely result in a loss if it's cast on you....... _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01194))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01193))_

> Some magic can also have secondary effects. For example, the spirit magic Fanaticism increases attack power, but conversely decreases evasion speed. With such magic, the one on whom it is cast can choose whether or not to resist.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01194))_

> If the one on whom the magic is being cast chooses not to resist the magic, it will definitely take effect so long as the one casting the magic does not roll double ones.

## 5.1.5

## Consuming Mental Power

- When using magic, an adventurer must temporarily reduce their mental power. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01198))_
- This base mental power cost, divided by the corresponding rune master skill level _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01199))_
- Each magic has a score called base mental power cost . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01199))_
- (rounded up), equals the actual mental power consumed by the character. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01200))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01198))_

> Adventurers cannot use magic endlessly.

## Example:

- The base mental power cost for Fire Bolt is 5 . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01202))_
- A character with shaman skill level 2 uses the Fire Bolt spell. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01202))_
- The character must consume 5 ÷ 2 = 2.5, rounding up to 3 points of mental power. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01202))_
- For example, a character with 5 points of mental power remaining can use magic that costs 5 points of mental power, but cannot use magic that costs 6 or more points of mental power. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01203))_
- For example, a character with 5 points of mental power remaining can use magic that costs 5 points of mental power, but cannot use magic that costs 6 or more points of mental power. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01203))_
- The character cannot regain consciousness unless they recover their mental power to 1 point or more in some way. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01204))_
- The character cannot regain consciousness unless they recover their mental power to 1 point or more in some way. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01204))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01203))_

> A character can reduce their mental power to 0, but they cannot make it negative.

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01203))_

> A character can reduce their mental power to 0, but they cannot make it negative. For example, a character with 5 points of mental power remaining can use magic that costs 5 points of mental power, but cannot use magic that costs 6 or more points of mental power.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01204))_

> If a character's mental power reaches 0 , they will lose consciousness .

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01203))_

> A character can reduce their mental power to 0, but they cannot make it negative. For example, a character with 5 points of mental power remaining can use magic that costs 5 points of mental power, but cannot use magic that costs 6 or more points of mental power.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01205))_

> Even if magic fails , such as by rolling double ones or being resisted by the opponent, a character must still consume their mental power, same as if they had actually used the magic.

## 5.1.6 Recovering Mental

## Power

- Mental power reduced due to using magic, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01209))_

## 《 Magical Recovery 》

- There's magic and magical items that can recover a character's mental power, such as the holy magic Transfer Mental Power . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01211))_
- The amount recovered is explained under each magic and item. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01211))_
- There's magic and magical items that can recover a character's mental power, such as the holy magic Transfer Mental Power . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01211))_

## 《 Recovery via Sleep 》

- However, this method of recovery can only be done once a day. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01213))_
- If you awaken within 24 hours of your previous awakening (when your mental power was last recovered), your mental power will not be recovered. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01213))_
- If a character sleeps for at least 6 hours in a row, they will fully recover their mental power upon awakening. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01213))_
- If you awaken within 24 hours of your previous awakening (when your mental power was last recovered), your mental power will not be recovered. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01213))_
- However, this method of recovery can only be done once a day. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01213))_

## 5.1.7 Magic Expansion

- You can increase the effectiveness and certainty of magic by consuming extra mental power. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01216))_
- This is called magic expansion . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01216))_
- This is called magic expansion . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01216))_
- Instead, you divide the mental power by your skill level, rounded up , or in other words, the mental power you would consume when not expanding is doubled, tripled...... _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01217))_
- Magic expansion is done by doubling or tripling...... _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01217))_
- the amount of mental power consumed. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01217))_
- At this time, you do not double or triple the base mental power cost....... _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01217))_

## Example:

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01219))_

> Suppose a sorcerer with sorcerer skill level 2 doubles the range of his Energy Bolt spell and casts it on two enemies. The base mental power cost of Energy Bolt is 5 . For this reason, the mental power consumed without expansion is 5 ÷ 2, rounded up to 3 . Therefore, for a doubled expansion, the amount of mental power consumed would be 3 x 2 = 6 . Y ou would not calculate (5 x 2) ÷ 2 = 5.

## 5.1.7.1

## Expansion Types

- Magic expansion includes the following types. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01222))_

## 《 Targets Expansion 》

- the mental power consumed will also be doubled or tripled ....... _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01225))_
- For spells that can perform this expansion, targets is written in the expansion section of the magic details. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01227))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01224))_

> If you expand a spell that affects one enemy (or ally), it can instead affect multiple at the same time.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01226))_

> In this case, you must roll the dice separately for each target to determine if they resist the magic, and other effects such as damage must also be determined separately.

## 《 Area Expansion 》

- the mental power consumed will also be doubled or tripled ....... _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01230))_
- So for expansions such as x 1.5 and x 8/3 , the cost would be double and triple , respectively. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01230))_
- If the area is doubled or tripled ...... _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01230))_
- So for expansions such as x 1.5 and x 8/3 , the cost would be double and triple , respectively. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01230))_
- Since it's the area that gets expanded, the radius of a circle, a side of a square, etc., can only be increased by the square root of the expansion rate. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01231))_
- Since it's the area that gets expanded, the radius of a circle, a side of a square, etc., can only be increased by the square root of the expansion rate. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01231))_
- For spells that can perform this expansion, area is written in the expansion section of the magic details. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01232))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01229))_

> If you expand a spell that affects a specific area, it can affect a larger area than originally intended.

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01229))_

> If you expand a spell that affects a specific area, it can affect a larger area than originally intended.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01230))_

> You can also expand an area by a fraction (x1.5, x8/3, etc.), in which case the fraction is rounded up when determining the multiplier for mental power consumed.

## 《 Volume Expansion 》

- Rounding should be handled the same way you would for area expansion. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01234))_
- If the volume is expanded by two or three times...... _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01234))_
- Some spells that affect a space or object can have their volume expanded. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01234))_
- the mental power consumed will also be doubled or tripled ....... _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01234))_
- Since it' s the volume that gets expanded, the radius of a sphere, a side of a cube, etc., can only be increased by the cube root of the expansion rate. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01235))_
- Since it' s the volume that gets expanded, the radius of a sphere, a side of a cube, etc., can only be increased by the cube root of the expansion rate. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01235))_
- For spells that can perform this expansion, target volume is written in the expansion section of the magic details. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01236))_

## Table 5-1: Area and Size Expansion

- Note: On the table, expansion rate is the multiplier for mental power consumed. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01238))_
- For example, when you cast the ancient magic Light , whose area is A space with a 10 meter radius , by consuming double the mental power, the resulting area will be a spherical space with a radius of 10 x 1.3 = 13 meters . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01239))_
- When you cast a spell by consuming that multiplied amount of mental power, multiply the number in area expansion length or volume expansion length by the number (radius, side) that represents the spell's area of effect , and the result will be the spell's area . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01239))_
- For spells cast on a flat surface, use the number in the area expansion length column, and for spells cast into space, use the number in the volume expansion length column. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01239))_
- For example, when you cast the ancient magic Light , whose area is A space with a 10 meter radius , by consuming double the mental power, the resulting area will be a spherical space with a radius of 10 x 1.3 = 13 meters . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01239))_

- the mental power consumed will also be doubled or tripled ....... _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01241))_

- the mental power consumed will also be doubled or tripled ....... _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01244))_

## 《 Damage Expansion 》

- For spells that deal damage, expansion can increase the certainty of that damage. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01247))_
- The damage you will deal is equal to the greatest of all the strike rolls you made in this way ( not the total). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01247))_
- For spells that can perform this expansion, damage certainty is written in the expansion section of the magic details. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01248))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01247))_

> you can make a damage check (strike roll) twice or three times .

## 《 Final Score Increase 》

- This increase in final score may also take effect if a nullifying spell is cast later. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01250))_
- For spells that can perform this expansion, fi nal score is written in the expansion section of the magic details. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01252))_
- Therefore, it cannot be done infinitely. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01253))_
- Final score can only be increased up to a maximum of caster's rune master skill level ÷ 2 (rounded up) . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01253))_
- This expansion requires a deep proficiency in magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01253))_
- Therefore, it cannot be done infinitely. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01253))_
- Final score can only be increased up to a maximum of caster's rune master skill level ÷ 2 (rounded up) . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01253))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01250))_

> There's some magic whose effects are negated or reduced if they're resisted by the target, but will also let you increase the magic's final score (resist target score) in order to prevent this.

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01253))_

> This expansion requires a deep proficiency in magic. Therefore, it cannot be done infinitely. Final score can only be increased up to a maximum of caster's rune master skill level ÷ 2 (rounded up) . That's up to +1 (double) for 1st~2nd level, +2 (triple) for 3rd~4th level, and +5 (sextuple) for 9th~10th level.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01251))_

> you can add a +1 or +2 bonus to your final score.

## 5.1.7.2 Combined Expansion

- However, at this time, the amount of mental power consumed will become extremely large. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01257))_
- Some magic allows for multiple expansion types. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01257))_
- In these cases, you can perform multiple expansions at the same time. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01257))_

## Example:

- In this case, the multiplied rate of mental power consumed is 3 x 2 x 4 = 24! _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01259))_
- Suppose a sorcerer casts an Energy Bolt on three enemies ( x 3 expansion) with a +1 to his final score ( x 2 expansion) and he makes 4 damage checks for each ( x 4 expansion). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01259))_

## 5.1.8 Magic Contraction

- However, this does not reduce the amount of mental power consumed. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01262))_
- Magic can also be contracted as opposed to expanded. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01262))_

## Contraction Types

## 《 Area Contraction 》

- You also cannot cast it in such a way that it hits the enemy directly in the eyes. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01268))_
- The shape (usually a circle) cannot be changed. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01268))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01268))_

> You can make the area of effect narrower than originally intended.

## 《 Volume Contraction 》

- Again, the shape cannot be changed, and you cannot directly aim it at the enemy's eyes. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01270))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01270))_

> Similar to area contraction, you can also reduce the volume of the targeted object or space.

## 《 Duration Contraction 》

- You must also decide how long you want the magic to last before you cast it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01272))_
- You may only set it to wear off at the end of a round. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01272))_
- Magic with a duration can be optionally shortened. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01272))_
- Magic that's already been cast cannot be canceled at will. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01272))_
- You may only set it to wear off at the end of a round. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01272))_
- You must also decide how long you want the magic to last before you cast it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01272))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01272))_

> However, you cannot set a time that causes the effect to wear off in the middle of a round.

## 《 Magic Power Decrease 》

- You must declare how many points you'll reduce before you roll the dice. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01274))_
- If used on multiple targets, you must reduce it by the same amount for all of them. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01274))_
- Also, if the side casting the magic rolls double sixes, the resisting side will also need double sixes, no matter how much magic power was declared to be decreased (if it's a monster, it cannot resist). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01274))_
- Magic power can be optionally reduced. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01274))_
- You must declare how many points you'll reduce before you roll the dice. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01274))_

> This will reduce the final score and, if it's damage magic, also reduce bonus damage (it's not possible to only reduce the final score or only reduce bonus damage).

## 《 Effect Contraction 》

- All magic that can expand their effects can also contract their effects. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01276))_

## Combined Expansion and Contraction

- These characteristics are presented here as magic types . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01282))_

> Although it's not often done, it's possible to perform magic expansion and contraction at the same time. For example, you could extend the area of effect while reducing magic power. The mental power required at this time is decided by expansion . It cannot be reduced by contraction. For example, if you double the area and reduce magic power by -4 , the mental power consumed will still be double .

## 《 Target Score 》

- Some magic can nullify the effects of other magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01290))_
- Most magic is automatically nullified if a nullifying spell is used, but there are some that are not. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01291))_
- This is magic that has a target score . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01291))_

- If this final score is greater than or equal to the target score originally set for that first magic that was cast, then that first magic can be nullified. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01293))_
- If this final score is greater than or equal to the target score originally set for that first magic that was cast, then that first magic can be nullified. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01293))_

- Therefore, when an adventurer uses magic that has a target score , that player should note down that score and remember it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01294))_

> When casting any magic, no matter what kind of magic it is, you must roll 2D to check whether an automatic failure (double ones) will occur or not. If you're trying to nullify magic that has a target score with another spell, you must use that other spell's 2D roll to determine your final score. This final score equals magic power + 2D roll (similar to a final score for other success rolls).

## 《 Mind 》

- This kind of magic can only take effect on one target at a time. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01317))_
- This is magic that affects the target's mental state. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01317))_
- If magic of the mind type is cast on a target, and other magic also of the mind type is cast on that target, the new magic will take effect, and the prior magic will be nullified . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01317))_
- This kind of magic can only take effect on one target at a time. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01317))_
- Note that many are resistible magic, and some have target scores . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01318))_

## 《 Physical Ability 》

- Magic of this type can only take effect on humans , fae , and youma . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01320))_
- This is magic that affects the target's physical abilities (strength, etc.). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01320))_
- Magic of this type can only take effect on humans , fae , and youma . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01320))_
- Also, with magic of the physical ability type, two or more cannot affect the same target at the same time. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01321))_

## 《 Weapon Enhancement 》

- Two or more of this kind of magic cannot affect the same weapon at the same time. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01324))_
- Weapons that have been given power by ancient magic, silver weapons, or mithril silver weapons are assumed to already have non-removable (see below) weapon enhancement magic cast on them. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01325))_
- Therefore, that power cannot be nullified, so even if you cast new weapon enhancement magic, it'll be useless . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01325))_
- Therefore, that power cannot be nullified, so even if you cast new weapon enhancement magic, it'll be useless . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01325))_

## 《 Non-removable 》

- Some magic, such as Dispel Magic (ancient magic) and Remove Curse (holy magic), can be used as counter magic that removes other magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01327))_
- However, magic of the non-removable type cannot be removed by other magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01327))_
- Some magic, such as Dispel Magic (ancient magic) and Remove Curse (holy magic), can be used as counter magic that removes other magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01327))_
- Although, the ancient magic Perfect Cancellation is able to remove nonremovable magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01328))_
- It's also possible to remove non-removable magic by directly using the power of a god (wicked god) with the holy/dark magic Call God . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01328))_
- Also, sometimes there is counter magic that counters certain magic, which if specified, will be removed by that counter magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01328))_

## 《 Curse 》

- Dispel Magic (ancient magic) can be used to remove most magic, but for magic of the curse type, this is not possible. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01330))_
- However, Remove Curse (holy magic) can be used to remove it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01330))_

## 《 Detection 》

- These can be targeted by the ancient magic Counter Sense . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01332))_

## 《 Focus 》

- Magic has a fixed duration . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01335))_
- Magic of the focus type is that in which the magic's effect lasts as long as the caster (the one who casts the magic) is focused . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01335))_
- you can still attempt to evade it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01340))_
- If magic is cast on you, it's also possible to resist it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01340))_
- Also, when the target is no longer within the magic's area of effect (out of reach, out of sight, etc.), the magic will lose its effect, even if you continue to focus. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01341))_
- Also, when the target is no longer within the magic's area of effect (out of reach, out of sight, etc.), the magic will lose its effect, even if you continue to focus. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01341))_
- If the caster suffers damage to their life force or mental power, their focus will be interrupted and the magic's effect will be lost . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01342))_
- your focus will be interrupted at the timing in which the damage is dealt. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01343))_
- If your focus is interrupted due to damage, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01343))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01335))_

> While focusing, the caster cannot take the following actions:

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01343))_

> If the caster wishes to voluntarily release their focus (in order to take another action), they must declare it at the beginning of the round, when no one else has made their action announcements yet.

## 《 Illusion 》

- There are three types of senses through which monsters perceive their surroundings: fi ve senses , pseudo senses, and magic senses. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01345))_
- Magic of the illusion type is effective on those that perceive their surroundings with fi ve senses or pseudo senses. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01345))_
- Humans and fae perceive their surroundings through fi ve senses , so they can all be targeted by illusions . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01345))_
- These spells deceive the opponent's sensory organs and give them false sensations. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01345))_
- It is completely ineffective against monsters who perceive their surroundings through magic senses, and illusions that deceive vision are useless against monsters who lack vision. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01346))_
- If the target does not have the senses to deceive, this spell will have no effect at all. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01346))_
- In the case of player characters (adventurers), this may be when the players themselves suspect an illusion. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01347))_
- For NPCs and monsters, the game master should decide based on their intelligence. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01347))_
- The effects of spells of the illusion type can be detected by a resistance roll. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01347))_
- However, in order to do this, you must first be suspicious of the illusion. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01347))_
- The game master should decide in which cases it seems suspicious. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01347))_
- For example, suppose a fake floor is created above a pit using a Create Image (ancient magic) spell. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01348))_
- No matter how smart you are, you're not likely to notice this. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01348))_
- For example, suppose a fake floor is created above a pit using a Create Image (ancient magic) spell. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01348))_
- No matter how foolish you are, you should suspect that the floor is an illusion. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01349))_
- It might be unreasonable for a monster with low intelligence, such as a goblin, but a human of average intelligence would find it suspicious. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01351))_
- It might be unreasonable for a monster with low intelligence, such as a goblin, but a human of average intelligence would find it suspicious. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01351))_
- If you're successful, you'll be able to see through the illusion and know the correct situation. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01352))_
- However, you can only make this resistance roll once . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01352))_
- The target score is the final score from when the illusion spell was cast (if you forgot, roll the dice and determine it again). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01352))_
- Once you fail, no matter how suspicious it may be, you won't be able to detect its true form (of course, you can walk around suspicious floors). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01352))_
- However, you can only make this resistance roll once . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01352))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01351))_

> It might be unreasonable for a monster with low intelligence, such as a goblin, but a human of average intelligence would find it suspicious.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01352))_

> In the event of such a suspicion, the target of the illusion can make a mental power resistance roll.

## 《 Ritual 》

- Magic of the ritual type can increase its effect (final score) due to carefully preparing and performing a ritual. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01354))_
- If it's ancient magic, the caster must have been taught at a school such as an academy of sages , etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01355))_
- If additional casters who can use the same spell also participate in the ritual, you will gain +1 to your final score for each one. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01355))_
- and if it's holy (dark) magic, they must be a believer. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01355))_
- In this case, you can gain +1 to your final score for every 10 people (rounded down). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01355))_
- Even humans who cannot use spells can participate in the ritual. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01355))_
- However, the ritual procedures are very complicated, so those who have not been taught the procedure in advance will not be able to participate in the ritual. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01355))_
- If it's ancient magic, the caster must have been taught at a school such as an academy of sages , etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01355))_
- These bonuses are stacked in the form of days x participants . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01356))_
- Fractions of the number of days must be rounded down , so if you can't spend a full day, the final score bonus will be 0 , regardless of how many participants there are. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01356))_
- Unlike magic expansion, there is no limit to the increase in final score through rituals. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01357))_
- Unlike magic expansion, there is no limit to the increase in final score through rituals. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01357))_
- In the previous example, if 10 believers drop out, even if it's right after the ritual begins, just before the ritual ends, or at any timing in between, the final score bonus will be 2 x (1 + 2) = +6 . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01358))_
- A ritual must be performed without sleep or rest, and is usually limited to 2 days. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01358))_
- If someone drops out during the ritual, their number will not be considered at all. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01358))_
- In the previous example, if 10 believers drop out, even if it's right after the ritual begins, just before the ritual ends, or at any timing in between, the final score bonus will be 2 x (1 + 2) = +6 . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01358))_
- A ritual must be performed without sleep or rest, and is usually limited to 2 days. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01358))_
- The person who makes the success roll is the one who takes the center role in performing the ritual. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01359))_

In this case, you can gain +1 to your final score for every 10 people (rounded down). However, the ritual procedures are very complicated, so those who have not been taught the procedure in advance will not be ab

> If the ritual takes two days (+2), one extra priest who can also use Remove Curse participates (+1), and 30 believers participate (+3), the final score bonus will be 2 x (1 + 3) = +8 .

## 《 Lost 》

- These are called lost spells . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01362))_
- Among ancient magic, there are some spells known only to a limited number of sorcerers, and spells that were lost with the fall of the ancient kingdom. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01362))_
- Among ancient magic, there are some spells known only to a limited number of sorcerers, and spells that were lost with the fall of the ancient kingdom. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01362))_
- The game master gets to determine which spells are considered lost spells. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01363))_
- It's acceptable to have all spells on the magic list be lost, or conversely, to have all magic be known and no spells be lost. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01363))_
- Unless the game master has a particular reason, please consider these to be lost spells. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01364))_
- If a spell says lost under its magic details, it may be easier to maintain balance when enjoying the game if you consider it a lost spell. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01364))_
- Unless the game master has a particular reason, please consider these to be lost spells. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01364))_

## 5.1.10 How to Read Magic

## Details

## [Sample Magic Details]

- This spell allows the caster to understand how to read magic details. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01372))_

> Base Mental Power Cost=0 Distance=Caster Area=Caster Duration=Until you forget the contents Effect=Understand how to read magic details Type=Non-removable Expansion=-

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01371))_

> Resist=None

## 《 Base Mental Power Cost 》

- The base mental power cost represents how much mental power is consumed when using that magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01374))_
- As previously explained, this base mental power cost divided by the corresponding rune master skill level equals the actual mental power consumed by the caster. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01374))_

## 《 Distance 》

- This represents the distance the magic can reach. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01376))_
- Any exceptions will always be noted in the explanation that follows. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01376))_
- At this time, there is no need to roll dice to determine whether you've touched your opponent, like with an attack hit check (you can touch them automatically). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01376))_
- To cast these spells in combat, you must be engaged with the target. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01376))_
- Basically, magic works on things that the caster can see and are within this distance. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01376))_
- Basically, magic works on things that the caster can see and are within this distance. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01376))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01376))_

> If the distance is touch , the caster must touch the target with their hand or (for ancient magic) with their magical catalyst (see below).

## 《 Area 》

- This represents the target that the magic affects. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01378))_
- It is also possible for casters to cast it on themselves. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01380))_
- There are many other ways to write this, but it should be clear if you read the description. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01382))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01381))_

> If it works on a specific space or area , then everything within that area is targeted. For example, a Fireball explosion deals explosion damage to everything within a 3 meter radius. It makes no difference whether it's the caster's enemies, allies, or the caster.

## 《 Duration 》

- Wounds caused by a Fireball explosion will remain, and if you receive healing by Cure Wounds , those wounds will be recovered instantly. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01384))_
- This represents how long the magic will remain in effect. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01384))_
- This includes instant , 18 rounds , 1 day , permanent , until focus ends or until certain conditions are met . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01384))_
- For magic whose duration is instant , the magic itself disappears in an instant, but its effects remain. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01384))_
- Wounds caused by a Fireball explosion will remain, and if you receive healing by Cure Wounds , those wounds will be recovered instantly. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01384))_

## 《 Effect 》

- Once you've read the detailed description, you'll be able to recall the general effect of the magic just by looking at this. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01386))_
- This is a brief description of the magic's effect. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01386))_

## 《 Type 》

- Magic of the mind , physical ability , and weapon enhancement types also omit counters and countered by , since they are sufficiently described. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01388))_
- Counters (negates): and counters (overpowers): describe magic that can be negated by this magic, while countered (negated) by: and countered (overpowered) by: describe magic that can negate this magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01388))_

## 《 Expansion 》

## 《 Resist 》

- This represents whether the magic can be resisted, and what will happen if it is resisted. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01392))_
- None : No resist can be performed. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01393))_
- Spells of the damage type will have their strike power reduced by -10 and can no longer critical. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01395))_
- After these details are briefly written, a detailed description of each spell is written. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01396))_
- After these details are briefly written, a detailed description of each spell is written. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01396))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01393))_

> Spells always take their effect.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01394))_

> Negated Effect : If resisted, the spell does not take its effect.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01395))_

> Reduced Effect : If resisted, the spell only takes an incomplete effect.

## 5.1.11 Ancient Magic and the Sorcerer Skill

- The skill for using ancient magic is called the sorcerer skill , and those who have this skill are called sorcerers . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01400))_
- High ancient are the great runes that were developed and studied during the time of the ancient kingdom. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01400))_
- Many of the spells and runes of this system were lost with the fall of the ancient kingdom, but a small amount of them have been passed down to modern Forcelia, and are now referred to as ancient magic . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01400))_
- The skill for using ancient magic is called the sorcerer skill , and those who have this skill are called sorcerers . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01400))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01400))_

> High ancient are the great runes that were developed and studied during the time of the ancient kingdom. The power of these runes releases magic forces and brings about various effects. Many of the spells and runes of this system were lost with the fall of the ancient kingdom, but a small amount of them have been passed down to modern Forcelia, and are now referred to as ancient magic . The skill for using ancient magic is called the sorcerer skill , and those who have this skill are called sorc

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01401))_
