## Restrictions on Using Ancient Magic

- Ancient magic has powerful effects because it draws its source of power (which is sometimes called mana ) directly from matter, but it is subject to the following two restrictions in order to cast the spells correctly: _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01403))_
- Ancient magic has powerful effects because it draws its source of power (which is sometimes called mana ) directly from matter, but it is subject to the following two restrictions in order to cast the spells correctly: _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01403))_
- - Due to complex gestures required, armor is limited to cloth or soft leather _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01405))_
- - Due to complex gestures required, armor is limited to cloth or soft leather _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01405))_
- If you don't obey these two things, you won't be able to use ancient magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01406))_

## 5.1.11.2

## Basic Abilities of the Sorcerer Skill

## 《 High Ancient 》

- It seems that these runes were used in official texts and conversation in the ancient kingdom, but now much of it has been lost, except for the few that remain in spellbooks. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01411))_
- Sorcerers can speak, read, and write in high ancient. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01411))_
- It seems that these runes were used in official texts and conversation in the ancient kingdom, but now much of it has been lost, except for the few that remain in spellbooks. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01411))_

## 《 Low Ancient 》

- Low ancient was used in informal texts in the ancient kingdom. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01413))_
- Sorcerers can speak, read and write in this language. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01413))_
- This was an everyday language of the ancient kingdom, called low ancient , and was the language used by citizens and slaves. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01413))_

## Characteristics of Sorcerers and Ancient Magic

## 《 Spellbook 》

- A sorcerer must somehow preserve the ancient magic spells they've learned. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01418))_
- Otherwise, even those with the greatest minds cannot possibly memorize all the words, actions, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01418))_
- However, because it's a very important thing, it would be a disaster if it were lost or stolen, so some sorcerers may keep several copies in reserve. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01419))_
- For this reason, it is customary for sorcerers to write these spells down in a book called a spellbook . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01419))_
- A spellbook is, so to speak, just a handwritten notebook, and the spellbook itself has no magical power of its own. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01419))_
- However, because it's a very important thing, it would be a disaster if it were lost or stolen, so some sorcerers may keep several copies in reserve. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01419))_
- A spellbook is used to review them, always confirming and ensuring your memory. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01420))_
- This is because the words and actions of a spell are usually sharply memorized in your head. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01420))_
- When you go on an adventure, or you're in a situation where you'd need to use magic, you'd usually bring your spellbook with you. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01420))_
- This is because the words and actions of a spell are usually sharply memorized in your head. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01420))_
- There are no special restrictions on spellbooks according to the rules. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01421))_

## 《 Magical Catalyst 》

- This is a magical catalyst , and it is through this that a sorcerer exercises the power of a spell. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01423))_
- Usually, a specially-made mage's staff is used as a magical catalyst, made from a wooden staff with a Create Device spell cast on it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01423))_
- Sorcerers require a special medium to cast spells. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01423))_
- For example, Laverna, the witch of Orphan, uses an amethyst ring she wears on her right middle finger as her magical catalyst, and Cyanos, leader of the magic knights of Ramliearth, carries a small twig wand in his left hand as a magical catalyst. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01423))_
- For example, Laverna, the witch of Orphan, uses an amethyst ring she wears on her right middle finger as her magical catalyst, and Cyanos, leader of the magic knights of Ramliearth, carries a small twig wand in his left hand as a magical catalyst. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01423))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01423))_

> This is why you must have a mage's staff as a restriction when using ancient magic.

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01423))_

> Sorcerers require a special medium to cast spells. This is a magical catalyst , and it is through this that a sorcerer exercises the power of a spell. Usually, a specially-made mage's staff is used as a magical catalyst, made from a wooden staff with a Create Device spell cast on it. This is why you must have a mage's staff as a restriction when using ancient magic. However, some sorcerers substitute other things besides staves. ## [ Sleep Cloud ]

- Resist=Negated effect This spell alters the air in a space within a 5 meter radius from the target, creating a gas with the effect of instantly putting any creatures inside to sleep. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01493))_
- Anything within the area is affected, friend or foe, but targets that make a successful resistance roll will be completely unaffected by the spell. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01493))_
- Anything within the area is affected, friend or foe, but targets that make a successful resistance roll will be completely unaffected by the spell. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01493))_
- Resist=Negated effect This spell alters the air in a space within a 5 meter radius from the target, creating a gas with the effect of instantly putting any creatures inside to sleep. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01493))_
- Those that fail to resist fall asleep, but since it's a natural sleep, they will wake up immediately if there's any noise, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01494))_
- Also, if they're dealt physical or mental damage, if they receive a shock such as being hit or kicked even if it does not deal damage, or if an extremely loud noise is made, they will automatically wake up without the need for a resistance roll. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01494))_
- Also, if they're dealt physical or mental damage, if they receive a shock such as being hit or kicked even if it does not deal damage, or if an extremely loud noise is made, they will automatically wake up without the need for a resistance roll. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01494))_

## [ Decrease Weight ] Base Mental Power Cost=3 Distance=10 meters Area=One object Duration=18 rounds Effect=Reduce the weight of an object Type=Lost Counters (Negates): Increase Weight Countered (Negated) By: Increase Weight Expansion=Duration, distance, targets, effect (see description)

- This spell is used on a single object and has the effect of reducing the target's weight. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01518))_
- When used on other objects, it has the ability to reduce their weight by about 90%. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01518))_
- To reduce the weight by half , you must expand it 7 times , and to reduce it to 1/10th , you must expand it 22 times . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01519))_
- This spell's effect can be expanded. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01519))_
- the required strength can become -2 or -3 ...... _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01519))_
- For other objects, it'll be reduced by 10% each time. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01519))_
- When reducing the weight of an object, it's reduced by 90% each, the rate of double expansion would be 0.9 x 0.9 = 0.81 times . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01519))_
- For triple , it' d be 0.9 x 0.9 x 0.9 = 0.721 times . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01519))_
- Also, in this case, required strength can only be reduced to 1. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01520))_
- Also, in this case, required strength can only be reduced to 1. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01520))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01517))_

> Resist=None

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01518))_

> If cast on a weapon or armor, it has the effect of reducing the target's required strength by -1 without changing its strike power or defense power.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01520))_

> Even if you reduce the required strength, the strike power or defense power of weapons and armor will not change.

## [ Kindle ]

- This is a spell used on flammable objects several centimeters in size, causing them to ignite. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01538))_
- The effect of the spell will disappear in an instant, but the object should burn on its own afterwards. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01538))_
- It has almost no effect on monsters either. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01538))_
- This spell's effect only works on highly flammable objects such as oil, dead grass, and sawdust, so it's completely useless if used on live trees or non-flammable materials. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01538))_
- This spell's effect only works on highly flammable objects such as oil, dead grass, and sawdust, so it's completely useless if used on live trees or non-flammable materials. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01538))_

## [ Magic Protection ]

- This spell has the effect of giving magic resistance to objects that do not have it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01560))_
- If the resist fails, the spell will take its full effect, and furthermore the Magic Protection spell itself will be removed. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01560))_
- If the targeted object is exposed to another spell that's not detection type, it will resist that spell unless the opponent succeeds on a success roll against a target score equal to the final score from when Magic Protection was cast. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01560))_
- If the targeted object is exposed to another spell that's not detection type, it will resist that spell unless the opponent succeeds on a success roll against a target score equal to the final score from when Magic Protection was cast. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01560))_
- In this case, the spell will take no effect at all. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01561))_
- For example, if you cast Kindle on a bundle of straw that has Magic Protection cast on it, if Kindle cannot break through the protection of Magic Protection (the final score is insufficient), it won't be able to ignite. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01561))_
- Even spells with a resist of none can be resisted by Magic Protection . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01561))_
- For example, if you cast Kindle on a bundle of straw that has Magic Protection cast on it, if Kindle cannot break through the protection of Magic Protection (the final score is insufficient), it won't be able to ignite. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01561))_
- Therefore, objects with this spell cast on them will respond to Sense Magic . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01562))_
- This spell is powerless against spells that belong to detection . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01562))_
- Therefore, objects with this spell cast on them will respond to Sense Magic . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01562))_
- Also, if you cast it on something that naturally has resistance (humans, fae, youma, etc.), it will have no effect at all. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01563))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01550))_

## 2nd Level Ancient Magic List [ Oak ]

- Oaks can only fight, and the caster must specify whom to attack. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01589))_
- Or otherwise, they can specify a location, and have the oak attack anyone invading that location. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01589))_
- After the spell's duration expires, the oak will turn back into a branch. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01589))_
- This simplified version of a wood golem came to be called an Oak because the material used was many oak tree branches, so that eventually became the name of the spell. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01589))_
- This simplified version of a wood golem came to be called an Oak because the material used was many oak tree branches, so that eventually became the name of the spell. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01589))_

- After the spell's duration expires, the oak will turn back into a branch. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01589))_

This simplified version of a wood golem came to be called an Oak because the material used was many oak tree branches, so that eventually became the name of the spell. After the spell's duration expires, the oak will turn back into a branch.

## [ Sense Enemy ]

- However, if the theft is committed in order to cause problems for someone, you will be able to sense that intention. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01593))_
- Aggressive intentions in this case refers to a desire to deal physical or mental damage to the caster, so cases such as simply wanting to steal the caster's money will not be detected. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01593))_
- Aggressive intentions in this case refers to a desire to deal physical or mental damage to the caster, so cases such as simply wanting to steal the caster's money will not be detected. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01593))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01592))_

> Base Mental Power Cost=6 Distance=Caster Area=Within the caster's view Duration=18 round Effect=Makes the presence of hostility clear to the caster Type=Detection Expansion=Duration Resist=None

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01593))_

> By casting this spell, the caster can learn of the presence of anything that has aggressive intentions towards them. Aggressive intentions in this case refers to a desire to deal physical or mental damage to the caster, so cases such as simply wanting to steal the caster's money will not be detected. However, if the theft is committed in order to cause problems for someone, you will be able to sense that intention.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01594))_

> Anything that is not directly visible to the caster cannot be detected, even if it is hostile.

## [ Fire Weapon ]

- The targeted weapon will now emit a magical flame from its striking end, adding a +10 bonus to the weapon's own strike power. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01608))_
- This is a spell used on weapons. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01608))_
- For monsters that are weak against fire, you can add an extra +10 bonus to strike power (+20 total). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01608))_
- This spell will not change the attack power or critical target of the weapon. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01608))_
- Conversely, this spell's bonus to strike power will not apply to monsters that resist fire. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01608))_
- This spell can be used to damage monsters that only magic weapons are effective against. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01609))_
- However, in such a case, the strike power will be 10 regardless of the strike power of the weapon itself. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01609))_
- Monsters that can only be wounded by magic and are also immune to fire cannot be dealt damage by attacking them with a weapon that had this spell cast on it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01609))_
- This spell can be used to damage monsters that only magic weapons are effective against. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01609))_

- Base Mental Power Cost=6 Distance=10 meters Area=One Duration=18 rounds Effect=You can control falling speed Type=Expansion=Duration, distance, targets Resist=None A target with this spell cast on them can fall at any speed they desire, ignoring their normal falling speed. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01612))_

## [ Increase Weight ] Base Mental Power Cost=9 Distance=10 meters Area=One object Duration=18 rounds Effect=Increase the weight of an object Type=Lost Counters (Negates): Decrease Weight Countered (Negated) By: Decrease Weight

- When used on other objects, consider it to have the effect of increasing their weight by 10%. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01629))_

- For other objects, it'll be increased by 10% each time. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01630))_
- To double the weight, you must expand it 8 times , and to increase it tenfold , you must expand it 25 times . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01630))_
- For triple , it' d be 1.1 x 1.1 x 1.1 = 1.331 times. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01630))_
- Even if you increase the required strength, the strike power or defense power of weapons and armor will not change. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01631))_
- 268), they can still act, but they'll receive a penalty to attack power, evasion speed, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01631))_

- However, more complex work is beyond a stone servant's hands. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01646))_
- After the spell's duration expires, the stone servant will turn back into a stone. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01646))_

## [ Familiar ]

- The animals that can become familiars are somewhat limited. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01656))_
- Cats and owls are also famous familiars, and these animals will appear in response to the caster's summons and serve the caster. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01656))_
- This spell has the effect of allowing a sorcerer to summon and control an animal to become their familiar. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01656))_
- A sorcerer can have only one familiar. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01656))_
- If a sorcerer who already has a familiar tries to summon a second one, it'll show no effect whatsoever. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01656))_
- The animals that can become familiars are somewhat limited. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01656))_
- A sorcerer can have only one familiar. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01656))_
- This spell must always be performed as a ritual. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01657))_
- Please refer to Table 5-2: Familiars to see what kind of animal will appear as a familiar in response to a summon. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01657))_
- The caster requires 3 full days of preparation, followed by 12 hours of spell chanting. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01657))_
- Also, when you give a command to your familiar, the familiar will try to execute it, but there are natural limits to what it can actually do depending on the familiar's physical abilities. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01658))_
- Abilities of each familiar are listed on the table, but you can find out more details by referring to an animal encyclopedia. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01658))_
- Also, when you give a command to your familiar, the familiar will try to execute it, but there are natural limits to what it can actually do depending on the familiar's physical abilities. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01658))_
- The caster can also borrow mental points from their familiar to cast spells. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01659))_
- In this case, the mental power that would've been consumed by the caster will instead be reduced from the familiar's mental points. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01659))_
- However, the number of points lost cannot go beyond the familiar's maximum life points or mental points. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01661))_
- If the familiar loses life points or mental points due to an attack from another, etc., the caster will suffer the same pain that the familiar felt, so they will lose the same amount of points in life force and mental power (this damage cannot be reduced by adventurer level). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01661))_
- Until they're both within 1 kilometer of each other again, they cannot share senses, nor can the caster borrow mental points from their familiar. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01662))_
- When a familiar is involved in magic, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01662))_
- If a caster and their familiar are separated by more than 1 kilometer, contact between them will be temporarily interrupted. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01662))_
- When a familiar takes damage, the caster can also use their adventurer level to reduce the damage. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01662))_
- Until they're both within 1 kilometer of each other again, they cannot share senses, nor can the caster borrow mental points from their familiar. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01662))_

> This spell has the effect of allowing a sorcerer to summon and control an animal to become their familiar. The animals that can become familiars are somewhat limited. For example, frogs or crows. Cats and owls are also famous familiars, and these animals will appear in response to the caster's summons and serve the caster. A sorcerer can have only one familiar. If a sorcerer who already has a familiar tries to summon a second one, it'll show no effect whatsoever.

> The summoned familiar and the sorcerer are always in mental contact, so they can communicate in a way similar to telepathy and can also share sensory organs. ## Sharpness

- Increases attack power (points) and the baseline score of dexterity-related abilities by 1 point. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01676))_

## Dullness

- Decreases attack power (points) and the baseline score of dexterity-related abilities by 1 point. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01678))_

## Quickness

- Affects evasion speed (points) and action order. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01680))_
- Also increases the baseline score of related abilities. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01681))_

## Slowness

- Affects evasion speed (points) and action order. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01683))_
- Also decreases the baseline score of related abilities. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01684))_

## Strength

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01686))_

> Also allows you to use weapons that you cannot use with your normal strength.

- 268), you can still act, but you'll receive a penalty to attack power, evasion speed, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01688))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01688))_

> If, due to this spell being cast, the required strength of your weapon or armor exceeds your own strength, you will be disabled.

## [ Bone Servant ]

- This spell creates a puppet golem called a bone servant from the bones of a living creature. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01699))_
- The bones used for this spell can be human or animal, but they must be of a certain size and consistency, such as ribs or femurs, as very small bones (such as teeth) or fragments are of no use. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01699))_
- The bones used for this spell can be human or animal, but they must be of a certain size and consistency, such as ribs or femurs, as very small bones (such as teeth) or fragments are of no use. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01699))_
- A bone servant appears in the form of a skeleton. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01700))_
- The form it takes depends on the bones used in the spell. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01700))_

## [ Lightning ]

- Base Mental Power Cost=15 Distance=Caster Area=A space 1 meter high and wide and 20 meters long Duration=Instant Effect=Emits strike power 20 lightning Type=Damage (Electric-type) Expansion=Final score, area length (see description), damage certainty Resist=Reduced effect _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01703))_

> By casting this spell, the caster can levitate up to 10 meters above the ground. During this time, you're completely free to adjust the height. Y ou can use other spells while floating, and perform attacks and evasion as usual. However, you cannot take actions that seem impossible depending on the situation (for example, it would be impossible for a caster 10 meters above the ground to engage in melee combat with a monster on the ground). If someone casts Dispel Magic , etc. on you and the spell is removed, you will fall. If you do fall, apply the rules for falling damage (see p. 122).

## 4th Level Ancient Magic List [ Counter Sense ]

- Effect=You can negate the power of detection spells and items, and know the type (effect) of spell or item, the one who cast it, their whereabouts, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01721))_
- At the same time, it will also reveal the type (effect) of spell or item used on you, as well as the clear identity of the person who used it (not just knowing their name, but what they look like). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01725))_
- After that the effect of the Counter Sense spell vanishes (although you can recast it, of course). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01725))_
- After that the effect of the Counter Sense spell vanishes (although you can recast it, of course). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01725))_
- This spell targets spells of the detection type, and items such as crystal orb of clairvoyance that have the same effect. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01726))_
- This spell targets spells of the detection type, and items such as crystal orb of clairvoyance that have the same effect. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01726))_
- Also, the effects of detection items and spells, no matter how long their duration, will vanish after 1 round due to Counter Sense activating. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01727))_
- They'll also discover that you have used the spell Counter Sense . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01727))_
- In other words, for 1 round, the opponent's detection spell or item will work normally, and information of what happened during that time will be told to the opponent. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01727))_
- Also, the effects of detection items and spells, no matter how long their duration, will vanish after 1 round due to Counter Sense activating. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01727))_

## [ Shape Change

- You can never change into something whose origins are not clearly known, such as magical beasts, mythical beasts, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01741))_
- This is a spell that allows the caster to change their form into another living creature at will. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01741))_
- You can think of the maximum as a 6meter tall titan and the minimum as a medium-sized cat. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01741))_
- You can only change into humans, fae, youma, titans, and animals, and only those the caster knows in detail (you must succeed on a roll such as the sage skill's monster check ). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01741))_
- However, the creatures they can change into are limited to about 10 times or 1/10th of the caster's weight. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01741))_
- However, the creatures they can change into are limited to about 10 times or 1/10th of the caster's weight. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01741))_

- They will fall off or break in the process of changing. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01742))_

- This spell only allows you to speak one language each time you cast it, so in order to be able to speak two or three unknown languages at the same time, you must expand the effect of the spell. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01764))_

> By casting this spell, the caster will be able to converse in a language previously unknown to them. This spell only allows you to speak one language each time you cast it, so in order to be able to speak two or three unknown languages at the same time, you must expand the effect of the spell. Also, this spell only allows you to use languages used by intelligent creatures listed on Table 12-1: Languages (see p. 159), so that means you will not be able to speak to animals, etc.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01763))_

## [ Location ]

- This is a spell that specifies a specific object and the direction in which it currently exists. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01793))_
- Also, the closer you get, the more you can feel its presence, so you can get a rough estimate of the distance. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01794))_
- Therefore, unspecified objects such as a sword or a goblin cannot be detected (it's not possible if it's my favorite sword ). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01794))_
- The caster must know the actual object being targeted by the spell well enough to specify it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01794))_
- No matter how far away the object is from the caster, the spell will still take effect. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01794))_
- Therefore, unspecified objects such as a sword or a goblin cannot be detected (it's not possible if it's my favorite sword ). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01794))_

## 5th Level Ancient Magic List [ Apport ]

- This is a spell that allows the caster to teleport their possessions into the palm of their hand. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01799))_
- However, even though it's their possession, the caster must have a complete memory of it, and moreover must be able to identify specifically where it's kept. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01799))_
- Also, the size of the target is limited to something you can hold in your hand (for example, you can summon a sword, but not armor). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01799))_
- If the duration expires or if the spell is canceled, the target immediately returns to its original location. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01799))_
- Also, the size of the target is limited to something you can hold in your hand (for example, you can summon a sword, but not armor). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01799))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01796))_

> Effect=Teleports the caster's possessions into

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01797))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01809))_

> This spell creates illusions that affect the senses of hearing and vision. The illusion can be anything within its area of effect, but it cannot cause any realistic effects. For example, you can create a wall of fire via illusion, but you won't feel any heat even if you approach it, and you won't burn to death even if you jump into it. However, the illusions created by this spell are so realistic that they cannot be discovered just by looking at them normally. The spell's effect continues even if you touch it. If an illusion of a stone wall is in a passage, you can't see beyond it, but you're completely free to pass through it (if you try). However, this result will not destroy the illusion of the stone wall. As long as the caster maintains focus, they can freely change the illusion, but if they lose focus, only static or simple repeating illusions can remain. The caster can freely cancel the spell's effect, but a Dispel Magic spell is required if someone else attempts to remove it.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01809))_

> For example, you can create a wall of fire via illusion, but you won't feel any heat even if you approach it, and you won't burn to death even if you jump into it.

## [ Suppress Elemental ]

- This spell cannot be expanded to block two or more kinds of spirit power from working at the same time. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01819))_
- Also, if a spell effect is present due to the negated spirit power (either gnome, undine, salamander, or sylph) within the spell's area of effect, it will be negated. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01819))_
- However, this has no effect on greater spirits (behemoth, kraken, efreet, djinn). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01819))_
- As a result of this, spirit magic that depends on that spirit power will no longer be usable. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01819))_
- This spell has the effect of negating any one of the four major spirit powers of earth, water, fire, or wind. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01819))_
- If that spirit is present, it will also disappear from existence and return to the spirit world. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01819))_
- However, only one kind of spirit power can be erased at a time. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01819))_
- Also, if a spell effect is present due to the negated spirit power (either gnome, undine, salamander, or sylph) within the spell's area of effect, it will be negated. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01819))_
- However, only one kind of spirit power can be erased at a time. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01819))_

## [ Skeleton Warrior ]

- Resist=None A skeleton warrior, also known as a dragontooth warrior, is a kind of golem created from a dragon's tooth, and resembles a human skeleton with a sword and shield. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01829))_
- This spell is what creates that formidable warrior. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01829))_
- For example, commands such as kill anyone who enters this room or kill that man are very simple and can be carried out, but a command such as go to the next village and kidnap the chief's daughter cannot be carried out. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01830))_
- The caster can give commands to the skeleton warrior in high ancient. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01830))_
- They cannot understand overly complex commands, but they handle simple commands accurately. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01830))_
- Only the caster can give commands. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01830))_
- For example, commands such as kill anyone who enters this room or kill that man are very simple and can be carried out, but a command such as go to the next village and kidnap the chief's daughter cannot be carried out. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01830))_
- Only the caster can give commands. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01830))_
- The dragon's tooth, which is the source of the skeleton warrior, is a very valuable item as one of the treasures of the ancient kingdom. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01831))_
- You'd have to pay a whopping 5000 silver coins to purchase it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01831))_

## [ Flight ]

- The speed of flying in the sky is what would be movement speed 50, and during full movement, 50 km per hour is the maximum speed. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01870))_
- If the spell's effect is removed while you're flying, you'll naturally fall. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01870))_
- Casting this spell allows the caster to fly freely. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01870))_
- However, even if movement speed changes, the caster's agility itself does not change. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01870))_

## [ Analyze Enchantment ]

- This is a spell that identifies the type of magic being cast on a target and specifies its effect. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01894))_
- If they fail, the same caster cannot use this spell on the same object until their magic power increases (any attempts will always fail). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01894))_
- When you use this spell on an object that had Seal Enchantment cast on it, its effect cannot be inferred if your final score does not exceed the target score determined by Seal Enchantment . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01894))_
- However, some items are safe from the effect of this spell due to the lost spell , Seal Enchantment . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01894))_

## [ Geas ]

- This spell gives the target a " do not __ " command and makes them obey it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01904))_
- If the person who had the spell cast on them tries to break this prohibition command, they will suffer severe pain all over their body. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01904))_
- The pain is so severe that if you continue to suffer it for more than 10 minutes, you will become mentally abnormal. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01904))_
- This spell's effect only works on those who have some degree of intelligence. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01906))_

## [

## Create Undead ]

- Even walking alongside you as guards is too difficult for them. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01911))_
- If it's still a corpse before that happens, then a zombie will be born. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01911))_
- The commands must be extremely simple, at best they can be made to protect a specific location. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01911))_
- To use this spell, of course, you'll need a corpse (usually a human corpse is used). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01911))_
- Create Undead is a spell that creates undead monsters such as skeletons and zombies. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01911))_
- If you use this spell on a mummified or severely decomposed corpse, the corpse will be completely skeletonized and a skeleton will be born. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01911))_
- Depending on the state of decomposition of the corpse, it will determine whether it'll become a skeleton or a zombie. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01911))_
- The caster can give commands to the skeletons and zombies created in this way. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01911))_
- If it's still a corpse before that happens, then a zombie will be born. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01911))_
- Create Undead is a spell that creates undead monsters such as skeletons and zombies. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01911))_
- into undead, but to cast this on something larger than human size, you must consume additional mental power (points) to expand the effect. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01912))_
- On the other hand, turning small animals into undead does not mean that they consume less mental power. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01912))_
- The required mental power (points) increases in proportion with the size of the target ( double for an ogre, seven times for a chimera, and over 1000 times for a 20-meter long dragon!). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01912))_
- Details for non-human skeletons and zombies should be decided by the game master. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01913))_
- A rough guideline is to set life scores to 1/2 for skeletons, and 3/2 for zombies. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01913))_
- Other scores may not need to be changed. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01913))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01909))_

> Base Mental Power Cost=24 Distance=Touch Area=One corpse Duration=Permanent Effect=Turns a corpse into undead Type=Non-removable, lost, ritual Expansion=Target volume

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01910))_

> Resist=None

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01911))_

> Create Undead is a spell that creates undead monsters such as skeletons and zombies. To use this spell, of course, you'll need a corpse (usually a human corpse is used). Depending on the state of decomposition of the corpse, it will determine whether it'll become a skeleton or a zombie. If you use this spell on a mummified or severely decomposed corpse, the corpse will be completely skeletonized and a skeleton will be born. If it's still a corpse before that happens, then a zombie will be born. 

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01912))_

> If you wish, you can turn non-human animals, fae, youma, titans, mythical beasts, magical beasts, etc.

## [ See-Through ]

- This is a clairvoyance spell, so to speak. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01944))_
- The clairvoyant information appears directly in your mind as an image, so you can still see even if the target location is closed in darkness. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01944))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01935))_

> Base Mental Power Cost=18

> Distance=Caster

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01937))_

> Area=A space within a 30 meter radius from

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01939))_

> Duration=18 rounds

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01940))_

> Effect=Can see through obstacles and the interior of objects

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01941))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01942))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01943))_

> Resist=None

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01944))_

> As long as it's within the area of effect, the caster can adjust the desired range and distance they want to see at will.

## [ Seal Enchantment ]

- This spell is used on objects imbued with magical power to hide the presence of that magical power. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01957))_
- When discerning magic power with Analyze Enchantment , you'll need a final score greater than or equal to the Seal Enchantment that was cast on it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01957))_
- For this reason, Sense Magic or Sense Aura will no longer be able to distinguish them. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01957))_
- Many of them are protected by Seal Enchantment with a final score as high as 30 or greater. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01958))_
- Sometimes there are items from the ancient kingdom period that have this cast on them. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01958))_
- This spell has no effect when using the sage skill to appraise an item (however, if you don't think it has magical power, you might not try to appraise it). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01959))_
- This spell cannot be cast on living things. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01959))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01946))_

> Base Mental Power Cost=30

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01948))_

> Area=One object

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01949))_

> Duration=Permanent

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01950))_

> Effect=Hides magical power applied to an

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01952))_

> Type=Target score, non-removable, lost

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01955))_

> Expansion=Final score

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01956))_

> Resist=None

## [ Steal Mind ]

- This also has no effect on opponents that do not have mental power (points), such as golems and skeletons. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01969))_
- First make a strike power 20 check to deal damage to the target, then the target's mental power (points) will be reduced while at the same time the caster's mental power (points) will be recovered by the same amount. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01969))_
- Also, it has no effect at all if your opponent successfully resists. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01969))_
- This spell allows you to steal mental power (points) from the target and make it your own. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01969))_
- However, you cannot make your mental power (points) higher than your original score. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01969))_
- This also has no effect on opponents that do not have mental power (points), such as golems and skeletons. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01969))_
- First make a strike power 20 check to deal damage to the target, then the target's mental power (points) will be reduced while at the same time the caster's mental power (points) will be recovered by the same amount. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01969))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01961))_

> Base Mental Power Cost=24

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01962))_

> Distance=10 meters

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01963))_

> Area=One

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01964))_

> Duration=Instant

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01965))_

> Effect=Steals strike power 20 mental power from the target and gives it to the caster

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01966))_

> Type=Lost, damage (Mind-type, see description)

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01967))_

> Expansion=Final score, distance, targets, damage certainty

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01968))_

> Resist=Negated effect

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01969))_

> If you expand the effect and steal mental power (points) from multiple targets, you can recover the total mental power (points) you stole.

## [ Slow ]

- Regarding the evasion speed (points) penalty, the effect differs depending on the target's original agility. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01980))_
- Targets who fail to resist will have their action order and movement speed reduced by half due to changes in their agility, and their evasion speed (points) will also take a penalty. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01980))_
- Please refer to Table 5-3: Slow: Agility and Evasion Penalties. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01980))_
- This is a spell that reduces the target's agility to half its original score. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01980))_

## [ Haste ]

- Regarding the evasion speed (points) bonus, the effect differs depending on the target's original agility. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01991))_
- This is a spell that doubles the target's agility from its original score. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01991))_
- The target's action order and movement speed will be doubled, and their evasion speed (points) will also receive a bonus. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01991))_
- Please refer to Table 5-4: Haste: Agility and Evasion Bonuses. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01991))_

## [ Rune Rope ]

- If the target fails to resist, they will be bound by this rope and become completely unable to move. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01995))_
- Area=One Duration=18 rounds Effect=Binds the target with invisible rope Type=Target score Expansion=Final score, duration, distance, targets Resist=Negated effect This spell creates an invisible magical rope, with the effect of binding the target. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01995))_
- The poor victim will be unable to take any actions. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01995))_
- Not even an ogre can break this magical rope. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01995))_
- However, since they can still move their mouth, they can speak and use holy magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01995))_
- Note that if the target succeeds on a resistance roll against this spell, it'll have no effect. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01996))_
- This spell works on targets slightly larger than a human (such as an ogre or a manticore), but has no effect on targets of a larger size than that (such as a dragon or a roc). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01997))_
- This spell works on targets slightly larger than a human (such as an ogre or a manticore), but has no effect on targets of a larger size than that (such as a dragon or a roc). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01997))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01996))_

> Note that if the target succeeds on a resistance roll against this spell, it'll have no effect. When making a check, you may only make a resistance roll against this spell once per round in which the spell is cast. At this time, the result lasts for the duration of the spell.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01994))_

> Base Mental Power Cost=24 Distance=10 meters

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01995))_

If the target fails to resist, they will be bound by this rope and become completely unable to move. The poor victim will be unable to take any actions. However, since they can still move their mouth, they can speak and use holy magic. Not even an ogre

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01996))_

## 7th Level Ancient Magic List [ Dispel Order ]

- This spell nullifies the effects of the types of spells that give commands, such as Quest , Geas , etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02007))_
- This spell nullifies the effects of the types of spells that give commands, such as Quest , Geas , etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02007))_
- This spell can also cancel commands given to a golem. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02008))_
- However, the final score of commands given during the ancient kingdom period is very high, so you'll need a final score of at least 30 or greater to cancel a golem's commands. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02008))_
- Once a golem has had its commands canceled, it becomes neutral and can be given new commands using the 9th level spell Command Golem . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02008))_
- Once this spell fails, you cannot attempt it again until your magic power increases. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02009))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-01999))_

> Base Mental Power Cost=21

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02000))_

> Distance=Touch

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02001))_

> Area=One

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02002))_

> Duration=Instant

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02003))_

> Effect=Remove spells that enforce commands

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02004))_

> Type=Counters (Negates): All puppet and golem-type magic, Geas , Command Golem , Quest

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02005))_

> Expansion=Final score

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02006))_

> Resist=None

## [ Telekinesis ]

- The target can be an individual or object up to 1 cubic meter in volume. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02019))_
- Its movement speed is 10 meters per round. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02019))_
- Targets who attempt to resist this spell and fail, or do not attempt to resist, will be moved at the caster's will. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02019))_
- Telekinesis is a spell that allows you to move things using only the power of your consciousness. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02019))_
- Telekinesis is a spell that allows you to move things using only the power of your consciousness. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02019))_
- This spell cannot move only one part of the target. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02020))_
- all have to be moved in one piece, and it's impossible to tear them apart. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02020))_
- This spell cannot move only one part of the target. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02020))_

> Base Mental Power Cost=28

## [ Teleport ]

- This spell will not work if there's an obstacle blocking the movement destination. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02030))_
- The movement destination is limited to a location that's visible to the caster or a location that's familiar to the caster. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02030))_
- Only solids greater than a certain size can be obstacles. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02030))_
- This is a spell that instantly moves a target (individual or object) to another location. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02030))_
- The movement destination is limited to a location that's visible to the caster or a location that's familiar to the caster. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02030))_
- Only solids greater than a certain size can be obstacles. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02030))_

## [ Full Potential ]

- The result is the same effect as casting the Sharpness , Quickness and Strength spells of Physical Enchantment all at the same time. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02042))_
- As a result, each ability bonus will be increased by +1, so for the duration, the baseline score of the abilities of each skill related to the increased ability score will also become +1. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02042))_
- Full Potential is a spell that enhances the effects of Physical Enchantment and raises potential capabilities of the human body to maximum. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02042))_
- If the target is expressed as a monster, its attack points, evasion points, and strike points will increase by 1 point, and at the same time its movement speed and action order will also increase by 6. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02042))_
- You cannot expand this spell's effect (that is, increase ability scores by 12 points, 18 points, etc.). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02043))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02034))_

## [ Blade Net ]

- If a target fails to resist against this spell and attempts to act, they will suffer a -4 penalty on all success rolls because the net coiled around their body will hinder them. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02053))_
- In addition, each thread that forms the magical net is razor sharp, causing the target to suffer strike power 20 damage each round in which they attempt to act. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02053))_
- If a target fails to resist against this spell and attempts to act, they will suffer a -4 penalty on all success rolls because the net coiled around their body will hinder them. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02053))_
- If you do not take action, you will not suffer this damage. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02055))_
- You can determine the damage by rolling the dice each round your character takes an action. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02056))_
- This spell works on targets slightly larger than a human (such as an ogre or a manticore), but has no effect on targets of a larger size than that (such as a dragon or a roc). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02057))_
- This spell works on targets slightly larger than a human (such as an ogre or a manticore), but has no effect on targets of a larger size than that (such as a dragon or a roc). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02057))_

> Movement and combat, as well as casting spells, all count as having taken an action (using holy magic also counts as having taken an action). If you do not take action, you will not suffer this damage.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02056))_

> Please note that when making a check, you may only make a resistance roll against this spell once per round in which the spell is cast.

## [ Bend Bar ]

- A bar-shaped object is one that's up to 10 cm thick and has a length to thickness ratio of 3 to 1 or greater. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02062))_
- The target bar will bend in the direction desired by the caster, regardless of the elasticity of the material. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02062))_
- This is a spell that bends bars. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02062))_
- Most weapons have a bar-like part that can be bent to make them useless. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02062))_
- Since it only targets bar-shaped objects, shields and armor cannot be bent. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02062))_
- Since it only targets bar-shaped objects, shields and armor cannot be bent. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02062))_
- This magic's effect cannot work on things that have already had magic cast on them or have life (or have undead life force). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02063))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02059))_

## [ Polymorph ]

- The targets of this spell can only be animals and plants created by the hands of the gods, including humans, fae, and youma, and do not include mythical beasts, magical beasts, titans, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02074))_
- The target will be completely transformed physically and will be able to use all of the creature's physical abilities after transformation (flying, breathing underwater, etc.). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02074))_
- Since they're not living things, undead and magical creatures are also impossible. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02074))_
- Creatures that have already been transformed are also included in this limitation. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02074))_
- In addition, their memories, intelligence, and soul from before the transformation will be passed on to the new body. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02074))_
- The target will be completely transformed physically and will be able to use all of the creature's physical abilities after transformation (flying, breathing underwater, etc.). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02074))_

- Creatures that have already been transformed are also included in this limitation. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02074))_
- In addition, their memories, intelligence, and soul from before the transformation will be passed on to the new body. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02074))_

## [ Magic Reflection ]

- At the same time, the effect of Magic Reflection will disappear. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02084))_
- If magic is cast on the person who casts this spell, that magic will rebound back to the opponent who cast it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02084))_
- In addition, spells that nullify magic, such as Dispel Magic , cannot be reflected. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02086))_
- In the case of magic that affects a space, Magic Reflection has no effect. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02086))_
- However, this can only reflect magic which has an area of effect of one . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02086))_
- Also, since the reflection is indiscriminate, even magic that's favorable towards the caster will be reflected. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02086))_
- In addition, spells that nullify magic, such as Dispel Magic , cannot be reflected. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02086))_
- However, this can only reflect magic which has an area of effect of one . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02086))_
- If a caster using Magic Reflection casts other magic on his or herself, the effect of Magic Reflection will be lost at the same time the new magic is cast. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02087))_

- The attack will continue until the illusionary beast itself is defeated, this spell is removed, the duration expires, or the target dies. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02099))_
- As the name suggests, this is a spell that creates an illusionary beast to attack the target. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02099))_

- This illusionary beast can only be seen by the target. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02099))_

## [ Force Field ]

- Even if you fall from a very high place or a huge piece of rubble falls on you, you will still be wounded if the damage you receive exceeds 30 points. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02123))_

## [ Lightning Bind ]

- Lightning Bind is a spell that entangles the target in a net of electricity, completely sealing their movement. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02131))_
- However, in this case, they will take a -4 penalty to the final score of all success rolls, because they must fight against the pain and binding they receive from the electric net. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02131))_
- If the target successfully resists, the damage is reduced (following the rules for damage magic) and the target can move. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02131))_
- Its strike power is 20. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02131))_

- You can determine the damage by rolling the dice each round. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02132))_
- This spell works on targets slightly larger than a human (such as an ogre or a manticore), but has no effect on targets of a larger size than that (such as a dragon or a roc). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02133))_

## [ Wraith Form ]

- In this case, the body becomes nothing more than an empty husk without a soul, so it cannot be brought back to life by any means. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02144))_
- A caster who casts this spell will be able to separate their spiritual body from their physical body, allowing only their ethereal body to move around freely. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02144))_
- If the wraith itself is destroyed, the caster dies. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02144))_
- The same applies if your body is destroyed (your life force or life points become 0 or less) while you are a wraith. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02144))_
- This ethereal body is called a wraith. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02144))_
- Wraiths are a kind of undead, but they can resume their life activities once they return to their own bodies. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02144))_
- In this case, the body becomes nothing more than an empty husk without a soul, so it cannot be brought back to life by any means. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02144))_

## 9th Level Ancient Magic List [ Command Golem ]

- This spell is not a spell that creates golems. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02155))_
- Moreover, the target golem must be in a state where no commands have been given. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02155))_
- It's only a spell that gives commands to a golem. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02155))_
- Golems in a state without commands are extremely rarely found, but may be found in the ruins of the ancient kingdom. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02155))_
- This spell is ineffective on a golem that's already following a command. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02155))_
- It's only a spell that gives commands to a golem. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02155))_

## [ Control Weather ]

- Weather changes begin on the round you cast the spell, and the spell is completed in 10 rounds. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02165))_
- This is a spell that can change the weather within its area of effect. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02165))_
- This spell is non-removable , but if two Control Weather spells are cast within the same area of effect, the one with the higher final score will take effect, and the one with the lower final score will be negated. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02165))_
- This is a spell that can change the weather within its area of effect. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02165))_
- This spell is non-removable , but if two Control Weather spells are cast within the same area of effect, the one with the higher final score will take effect, and the one with the lower final score will be negated. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02165))_
- before the spell was cast. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02166))_
- It has nothing to do with the weather, season, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02166))_
- Weather you can change to includes sunny, cloudy, rainy, foggy, or snowy. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02166))_
- As the spell ends, the weather will return to its natural state. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02166))_
- However, effects caused by this spell will remain and cannot be removed. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02166))_
- However, effects caused by this spell will remain and cannot be removed. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02166))_
- before the spell was cast. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02166))_
- Below is a brief description of the extent of the weather. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02167))_
- Sunny ： The sky within the area of effect will be completely clear of clouds. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02168))_
- At night, you'll be able to see the moon and stars. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02168))_
- Depending on the angle of the sun, the sun will shine during the day and the ground will be warm. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02168))_
- Sunny ： The sky within the area of effect will be completely clear of clouds. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02168))_
- Since direct sunlight is blocked, the area becomes darker and the temperature on the ground decreases. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02169))_
- At night, the moon and stars will be hidden, making it a dark night. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02169))_
- Cloudy ： The sky within the area of effect is covered by clouds, hiding the sun. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02169))_
- Cloudy ： The sky within the area of effect is covered by clouds, hiding the sun. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02169))_
- Rainy ： Rain clouds cover the sky, the conditions will be the same as cloudy. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02170))_
- In addition, rain will begin to fall at about 10 mm per hour, wetting the ground. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02170))_
- Foggy ： Visibility within the area of effect is 5 meters or less for fog. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02171))_
- Foggy ： Visibility within the area of effect is 5 meters or less for fog. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02171))_
- Snowy ： Snow clouds cover the sky, the conditions will be the same as cloudy. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02172))_
- In addition, snow will begin to fall at about 10 mm per hour. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02172))_
- The surrounding temperature will drop to 0°celsius. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02172))_

## [ Disintegrate ]

- It's impossible to regenerate a target that has become like this. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02183))_
- Targets who have this spell cast on them and fail to resist will, after a moment of brightness, be broken down into the smallest unit of matter they were composed of, literally disappearing. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02183))_
- Targets who have this spell cast on them and fail to resist will, after a moment of brightness, be broken down into the smallest unit of matter they were composed of, literally disappearing. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02183))_
- Usually it's limited to 1 cubic meter, but by expanding the volume, it's possible to cast it on a larger target. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02184))_
- Usually it's limited to 1 cubic meter, but by expanding the volume, it's possible to cast it on a larger target. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02184))_

## [ Petrification

- However, if a petrified statue is destroyed in the meantime, it will be revived while broken apart at the time the spell is removed, so it will naturally die instantly (or suffer wounds or irreversible injury). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02194))_
- Those who fail to resist this spell, no matter what they're made of, will instantly be turned to stone. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02194))_
- If it's removed with Dispel Magic , etc., they will be revived in the same state they were before being petrified. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02194))_
- Only creatures with natural life (humans, plants, animals, mythical beasts, magical beasts, fae, youma, and daemons) can be targets of this spell, with the exception of magical creatures such as spirits, undead, and golems. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02194))_
- A petrified target will cease all life activity until they're released, so they will not age. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02194))_

## [ Rune Shield ]

- This is a spell that creates a magical barrier that glows white around the caster. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02205))_
- You can attempt to remove it with Dispel Magic , but all other possible spells will be blocked by this barrier, and cannot have any effect. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02205))_
- This barrier has the effect of completely blocking magic from others. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02205))_
- During the duration of this spell, the caster can still use other spells, but any spells that also affect the caster will be blocked by the Rune Shield and nullified just the same. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02207))_
- Any spell effects that were applied to the caster will also be lost. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02207))_
