## 10th Level Ancient Magic List [ Dimension Gate ]

- A disc of the same shape will also appear above the destination. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02217))_
- The gate is a silver disc 5 meters in diameter, which appears on the floor. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02217))_
- The disc can be penetrated like water, and those who jump into it will jump out of the other disc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02217))_
- There is no restriction on the travel distance, but the destination must be a place the caster knows. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02218))_
- A normal Dimension Gate lasts for only 3 minutes, but the sorcerers of the ancient kingdom knew the technique for fixing gates semi-permanently, and so used them as a way of moving between distant places or within labyrinths. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02219))_
- A normal Dimension Gate lasts for only 3 minutes, but the sorcerers of the ancient kingdom knew the technique for fixing gates semi-permanently, and so used them as a way of moving between distant places or within labyrinths. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02219))_

## [ Perfect Cancellation ]

- This spell is a powerful version of Dispel Magic , which removes the effects of all spells. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02242))_
- However, to remove a spell with a target score, you'll need a final score accordingly. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02242))_
- Even spells of the nonremovable or curse type, which cannot be removed by Dispel Magic , will be nullified. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02242))_
- In addition, only the dragon roar magic Reborn Dragon cannot be removed by this magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02242))_
- In addition, only the dragon roar magic Reborn Dragon cannot be removed by this magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02242))_

## [ Meteor Strike ]

- These rocks fall to the ground at a rate of about once every hundred years. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02253))_
- These rocks floating in the sky are called meteorites. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02253))_
- The meteorite will fall the moment you finish the spell, causing a large explosion. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02253))_
- The fact that there are countless unseen masses of rock floating in the sky is considered a matter of course among sages. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02253))_
- Targets within the area of effect will be hit by shockwaves and fragments of the meteorite, suffering strike power 50 _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02253))_
- The spell Meteor Strike is a spell that allows the caster to control a meteorite (a very small one) at will, and make it fall to the ground. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02253))_
- Targets within the area of effect will be hit by shockwaves and fragments of the meteorite, suffering strike power 50 _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02253))_
- Of course, its destructive power would be enough to destroy buildings and ramparts. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02254))_

## Restrictions on Using Spirit Magic

- The basic rules for casting magic are the same, but the following conditions are required in order to use the shaman skill. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02258))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02263))_

> Therefore, you must not wear clothing or armor that severely restricts movement of your arms, and your fingers must be completely free.

## ⬤ Wind Spirits

- The spirit power of wind does not work inside buildings, deep caves, or even underground passages. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02266))_
- It must be in a place where the wind blows in its natural state. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02266))_
- The spirit power of wind does not work inside buildings, deep caves, or even underground passages. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02266))_

## ⬤ Earth Spirits

- Likewise, this spirit power does not work on the floors of buildings (whether they're stone or wood). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02268))_
- Particularly strong spirit power is at work in the mountains. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02268))_
- Since the power of water spirits is strong on the ocean floor and the bottoms of lakes, the spirit power of earth does not work there. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02268))_
- This is a power that's at work in places where the ground is exposed or underground. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02268))_

## ⬤ Water Spirits

- Even if you carry water in a water bottle, etc., if you open the lid, the spirit power will work. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02270))_
- The spirit power of water is at work wherever there is water, such as the ocean or a lake. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02270))_
- The spirit power of water is at work wherever there is water, such as the ocean or a lake. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02270))_

## ⬤ Fire Spirits

- This spirit power is at work wherever there's fire burning. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02272))_
- You can also use fire from a torch you're carrying with you. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02272))_

## ⬤ Ice Spirits

- This spirit power is at work wherever there is snow or ice. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02274))_

## ⬤ Mind Spirits

- Of course if the caster him or herself is like that, there's no problem. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02276))_
- It's said that if one emotion has too much of an outburst, it can cause phenomena such as alienation or complete loss of functions of other spirits, which can lead to mental disorders. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02276))_
- This spirit power is at work wherever there are living things with functioning minds. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02276))_
- Some of these types of spirits include those that control the nature of the mind, and those that control fluctuation of emotions. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02276))_
- It's said that if one emotion has too much of an outburst, it can cause phenomena such as alienation or complete loss of functions of other spirits, which can lead to mental disorders. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02276))_

## ⬤ Plant Spirits

- Very strong power is at work in forests, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02278))_

## ⬤ Other Spirits

- These are the spirits that control light, darkness, and life. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02280))_
- Explanations of where these are at work can be found under each individual spell. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02280))_

## Basic Abilities of the Shaman Skill

- Shamans have the following basic abilities, which they can use without any restrictions. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02283))_

## 《 Infravision 》

- However, you cannot see colors at all. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02285))_

## 《 Sense Aura 》

- When a player declares that they will use this ability, the game master must tell the player what spirit power is at work in that location. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02287))_
- This ability is used to know what kind of spirit power is at work in your surroundings. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02287))_
- Ordinary corpses and monsters created by magic (magical creatures) such as gargoyles do not emit either aura. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02288))_
- Since there are spirits of life and spirits of undeath (which control negative life force), the sense aura ability can be used to distinguish between living things and undead. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02288))_
- Ordinary corpses and monsters created by magic (magical creatures) such as gargoyles do not emit either aura. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02288))_
- Also, if there's extremely strong spirit power in your surroundings, you may not be able to sense weak spirit power at work. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02289))_
- Sense aura is a subtle sensation, more like what we can smell than see . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02289))_
- Even if you know that spirit power is at work, you won't be able to tell where that spirit power is coming from unless you get very close. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02289))_
- Even if you know that spirit power is at work, you won't be able to tell where that spirit power is coming from unless you get very close. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02289))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02287))_

> You cannot use spells that belong to a specific spirit in places where that spirit power is not at work.

## 《 Silent Spirit 》

- Most spirits speak directly to the mind without using words, but when a caster gives commands to a spirit, they must speak these runes out loud. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02291))_
- These are runes used to communicate with spirits. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02291))_
- Also, some fae are well versed in silent spirit. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02291))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02291))_

> Those who can use these runes can communicate with any spirit.

## 5.1.14

## Spirit Magic List

## 1st Level Spirit Magic List [ Wind Voice ]

- Conversely, you can also transmit your voice to the location. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02305))_
- Since it can be used to narrow the area of effect, it's also possible to communicate with just a single target. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02305))_
- This spell has the effect of commanding a sylph to deliver air vibrations (sounds) to the caster without weakening them. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02305))_

> This spell has the effect of commanding a sylph to deliver air vibrations (sounds) to the caster without weakening them. As a result, you can specify a point in space within 500 meters and hear every conversation and sound exchanged within a radius of 5 meters from that point. Conversely, you can also transmit your voice to the location. Since it can be used to narrow the area of effect, it's also possible to communicate with just a single target.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02303))_

> Expansion=Duration, distance, area

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02305))_

## [ Firebolt ] (Salamander/Fire Spirit)

- A line of fire up to 10 meters will reach out from that fire and catch the target. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02344))_

- This magical fire will always hit, and the target will suffer strike power 10 damage (strike power 0 and no criticals if they successfully resist). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02344))_
- To use this spell, there must be a fire (or a controlled salamander) large enough to burn a torch within at least 10 meters around the caster. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02344))_

## [ Brownie ] (Brownie/Building Spirit)

- This spell has the effect of giving a command to a brownie, specifying a chore the caster would like them to do while they're asleep. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02348))_
- If you request something too complicated, it's too much for them and you can't expect a good result. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02348))_
- Brownies are spirits that live in old houses and castles that were built over 50 years ago. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02348))_
- However, the requested job must be a simple one. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02348))_
- They may clean the house while the family members are sleeping. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02348))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02348))_

## 2nd Level Spirit Magic List [ Will-O-Wisp ] (Will-O-Wisp/Light Spirit)

- Counters (Negates): Shade , Spirit Wall: Shade Countered (Negated) By: Shade , Spirit Wall: Shade _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02356))_
- The light can illuminate a space within a 5 meter radius. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02357))_
- This spirit can be easily destroyed by applying a small amount of force, and when it does, it emits powerful energy. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02357))_
- If the will-o-wisp hits an opponent, the target will receive damage from the energy generated when the will-o-wisp disintegrates. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02357))_
- However, if it moves more than 20 meters away from the caster, they will no longer be able to control it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02357))_
- When used for this purpose, a will-o-wisp disintegrates immediately, even during its duration. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02357))_
- However, in places affected by the ancient magic Darkness , the light emitted by a will-owisp will have no effect, and if it overlaps with the darkness created by a shade, they will negate each other's effects. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02357))_
- The light can illuminate a space within a 5 meter radius. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02357))_
- Furthermore, if someone destroys a will-o-wisp with a weapon they're holding, the one who took that action will also suffer the same damage. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02358))_
- If a will-o-wisp itself comes into contact with a shade's body or enters the area of effect of Darkness , it'll vanish without emitting any energy. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02359))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02350))_

## [ Confusion ] (Leprechaun/Mind Spirit)

- As a result, you won't be able to take any assertive action, and will be completely unable to attack or use magic on your opponents. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02379))_
- Of course, this is not the case if Confusion is removed by that magic's effect. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02379))_
- You'll also lose your ability to make accurate judgments. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02379))_
- At this time, even if an ally casts magic on you in order to help you, you will consider it a hostile act. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02379))_
- If you have this spell cast on you and you fail to resist, you'll be unable to understand your current situation. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02379))_
- You can make similar judgments about those who cast magic on you. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02379))_
- You can also cast Dispel Magic , Sanity , or other magic that belongs to mind on yourself. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02380))_
- Also, it doesn't mean you've become stupid, so you won't trust an opponent just because they yell I'm your friend! _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02380))_
- Also, it doesn't mean you've become stupid, so you won't trust an opponent just because they yell I'm your friend! _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02380))_

## [ Shade ] (Shade/Dark Spirit)

- Expansion=Final score, duration, distance, targets, damage certainty Resist=Reduced effect Shade is the spirit of darkness that opposes will-o-wisp, and is also the spirit that controls fear. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02391))_
- This has no physical effect, but it impairs mental activity and has the effect of reducing mental power (points). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02391))_
- The shade is also very fragile and will easily disintegrate with the slightest force. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02391))_
- If mental power (points) becomes 0 or negative, the target loses consciousness. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02391))_
- The darkness created by a shade has no effect in a space where the ancient magic Light is at work. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02391))_
- The damage is only dealt to mental power (points), the rest of the check is the same as for magic that deals normal damage. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02391))_
- In addition, if the light emitted by a will-owisp and the darkness produced by a shade overlap, the powers of both will be negated. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02391))_
- Furthermore, if an opponent destroys a shade with a weapon they're holding, the one who took that action will also suffer the same damage. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02391))_
- All natural light within a 5 meter radius of this spirit is negated, closing it in complete darkness. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02391))_
- The damage is only dealt to mental power (points), the rest of the check is the same as for magic that deals normal damage. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02391))_
- All natural light within a 5 meter radius of this spirit is negated, closing it in complete darkness. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02391))_
- If a shade itself comes into contact with a will-o-wisp's body or enters the area of effect of the ancient magic Light , it'll vanish without emitting any energy. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02392))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02382))_

## [ Forget ] (Leprechaun/Mind Spirit)

- This spell is used by borrowing the power of a leprechaun, but humans and elves cannot use it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02413))_
- Among sages, the reason for this is thought to be that the spell doesn't just require a hand, but a wing . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02413))_
- Those who have this spell cast on them will lose their memory, and be unable to make normal decisions. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02414))_
- A gremlin casting this spell on a pegasus carrying the hero Grax, and flinging Grax off of it, is a very well-known tragic episode in Alecrast. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02414))_
- You will no longer be able to remember your name, where you were born and raised, or your friends and colleagues, but you will still be able to use language, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02415))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02404))_

> Only featherfolk (fae) and gremlins (youma) can use it.

## The Tragedy of the Hero Grax

- Around 200 years ago, a kingdom by the name of Zanty flourished in western Alecrast. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02417))_
- In that kingdom, there was a knight named Grax who was hailed as a hero by all for protecting the kingdom from the invasion of the "Land of Chaos". _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02418))_
- This is worthy of special mention even among the many tales of bravery passed down in Alecrast. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02419))_
- Legend has it that Grax, astride a pegasus, single-handedly defeated hundreds of enemy soldiers. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02419))_

## [ Hold ] (Gnome/Earth Spirit)

- This spell causes a gnome to rise from the earth and wrap itself around the lower body of a target that fails to resist, sealing their movement. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02430))_

## 3rd Level Spirit Magic List [ Invisibility ] (Sprite/Mind Spirit)

- Grax paid no heed to this little youma, but quite unexpectedly, the gremlin cast a "Forget" spell on the pegasus he was riding and fled. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02436))_
- However, Grax's end was a pitiful one. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02436))_
- After emerging victorious from a battle, he was on his way back to report to the kingdom ahead of the others, when he encountered a lone gremlin. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02436))_
- After emerging victorious from a battle, he was on his way back to report to the kingdom ahead of the others, when he encountered a lone gremlin. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02436))_
- Caught off-guard, the pegasus was struck by the spell, and without realizing what it was doing, it flung its master off its back, and flew off. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02437))_
- The hero Grax slammed into the ground far below, and perished. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02437))_
- Ever since, gremlins have come to be known as "the Goblins of the Sky". _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02438))_
- from a hidden state at the beginning of a round without being noticed by your opponent. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02439))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02432))_

> Base Mental Power Cost=12 Distance=Caster Area=Caster Duration=Until focus ends Effect=Makes the caster invisible Type=Focus, Illusion Expansion=-

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02435))_

> If you cast Invisibility during combat and then attempt to cancel it voluntarily (in order to take another action), by the definition of focus magic, at the beginning of that round, you must declare it when no one has yet made their action announcements. Therefore, you cannot attack unopposed or use magic

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02433))_

> If you cast Invisibility during combat and then attempt to cancel it voluntarily (in order to take another action), by the definition of focus magic, at the beginning of that round, you must declare it when no one has yet made their action announcements.

## [ Water Breathing ] (Undine/Water Spirit)

## [ Control Spirit ] (Various lesser spirits)

- Of course, it can only be summoned in a place where spirit power is at work, and summoning also requires a three-hour magical ritual. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02462))_
- This is a spell that summons a spirit and lets you control it as your servant (you're free to call it your friend). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02462))_
- The only spirits you can summon are those that belong to the lesser spirits (monster level 4 or lower). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02462))_
- The only spirits you can summon are those that belong to the lesser spirits (monster level 4 or lower). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02462))_
- Of course, it can only be summoned in a place where spirit power is at work, and summoning also requires a three-hour magical ritual. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02462))_
- A controlled spirit can communicate with its caster using silent spirit, and will carry out simple commands, but cannot do much. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02463))_
- It cannot attack others directly. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02463))_
- A shaman can only control one kind of spirit at a time. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02463))_
- Spirits that have been successfully summoned and controlled can be sealed in items, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02463))_
- It is up to the game master's discretion to decide what kind of item the spirit will be sealed in (for example, an undine in a water bag, etc.). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02463))_
- A shaman can only control one kind of spirit at a time. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02463))_
- It is up to the game master's discretion to decide what kind of item the spirit will be sealed in (for example, an undine in a water bag, etc.). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02463))_
- The biggest advantage of controlling spirits is that you can cast spirit magic that belongs to them, even in places where spirit power would not normally be at work. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02464))_
- It's always possible to release a controlled spirit. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02464))_
- A controlled spirit can only be used by its controller. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02464))_
- A controlled spirit can only be used by its controller. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02464))_
- The main spirits that can be controlled are gnome (earth spirits), undine (water spirits), salamander (fire spirits), sylph (wind spirits), brownie (building spirits), leprechaun (mind spirits), sprite (mind spirits), etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02465))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02451))_

## [ Silence ] (Sylph/Wind Spirit)

- If you fail to resist, you won't make a sound even if you cast a spell, so you won't be able to use magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02475))_
- This spell has the effect of stopping the movement of air and muffling all sounds within the area of effect. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02475))_
- This spell has the effect of stopping the movement of air and muffling all sounds within the area of effect. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02475))_
- Once you move out of the area of effect, you'll be able to make sound again. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02476))_
- If someone who was outside the spell's area of effect when it was cast later enters the area of effect, they must make a resistance check at that point. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02477))_
- If they fail, they will no longer be able to generate sounds or voices within the area of effect. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02477))_
- If they fail, they will no longer be able to generate sounds or voices within the area of effect. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02477))_

## [ Stone Blast ] (Gnome/Earth Spirit)

- To cast this spell, there must be bare, natural ground directly under the target's feet. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02488))_
- These stones always hit, and the target will suffer strike power 20 damage. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02488))_
- The spell has no effect if the target is standing on a solid chunk of rock or on a cobblestone surface. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02488))_
- Please note that this stone attack is magical, so the damage cannot be reduced by armor. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02488))_

## [ Binding ] (Dryad/Plant Spirit)

- The target score equals the magic intensity or final score from when the magic was cast. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02498))_
- Those who fail to resist will be unable to take any actions for 18 rounds and will suffer a -4 modifier to their evasion speed (points). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02498))_
- To cast this spell, you need enough grass, tree branches, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02498))_
- Targets within the area of effect will become entangled in those plants and be unable to move. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02498))_
- Targets that successfully resist are not affected in any way. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02498))_
- Targets within the area of effect will become entangled in those plants and be unable to move. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02498))_

## [ Tunnel ] (Gnome/Earth Spirit)

- This is a spell that creates a hole with a 1 meter radius in walls and ground made of stone or earth, as well as the sides and ceilings of caves. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02555))_
- This spell allows you to create holes up to 10 meters in length. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02555))_
- However, if the wall is less than 10 meters thick, the spell's effect ends there. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02555))_
- In other words, you can't open holes in two walls with one spell. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02555))_
- The effect of this spell can be expanded regarding the size of the hole being made (target volume). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02555))_
- Also, this spell has absolutely no effect on walls made of wood. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02556))_
- If the resist is successful, the hole will open, but those on top will be able to immediately jump out of the way and prevent themselves from falling into the hole (assuming they have a place to escape, of course). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02557))_
- If the resist fails, the hole will open slowly and they will not suffer damage from the fall. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02557))_
- If this spell is used at the feet of a human, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02557))_
- those present can attempt to resist. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02557))_
- This is because the bottom of the hole will rise back up. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02558))_
- At this time, those at the bottom of the hole will not be buried alive. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02558))_
- Once the duration has expired, the hole will slowly return to its original state. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02558))_
- This is because the bottom of the hole will rise back up. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02558))_

- This allows you to control all plants at will. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02586))_

## [ Shoot Arrow ] (Sylph/Wind Spirit)

- The target cannot resist this spell. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02598))_
- Type=Counters (Negates): Missile Protection Expansion=Distance, targets Resist=None When you cast this spell, the caster's arrow will be carried by a sylph, ensuring that it hits the target. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02598))_
- However, armor protection is effective. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02598))_
- The strike power of the arrow is a uniform 20, the magic power of the caster is used as bonus damage. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02598))_
- Also, if you roll 10 or greater on your damage check, a critical will occur. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02598))_
- This magic is a counter spell to the spirit magic Missile Protection , so when the target of the arrow is under the influence of Missile Protection , the wind spirit powers of the same nature will interfere with each other, nullifying both. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02599))_
- However, you cannot launch multiple arrows at a single target at once. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02600))_
- (unless the arrow itself is magical or silver). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02600))_
- It is possible to expand the effect of this spell to launch multiple arrows and attack multiple targets at once. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02600))_
- (unless the arrow itself is magical or silver). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02600))_

> Type=Counters (Negates): Missile Protection Expansion=Distance, targets Resist=None When you cast this spell, the caster's arrow will be carried by a sylph, ensuring that it hits the target. The strike power of the arrow is a uniform 20, the magic power of the caster is used as bonus damage. Also, if you roll 10 or greater on your damage check, a critical will occur. The target cannot resist this spell. However, armor protection is effective.

## [ Charm ] (Dryad/Plant Spirit)

- This spell has the effect of using the dryad's mind spirit power to charm the target. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02611))_
- Dryad is a plant spirit which at the same time has the nature of a mind spirit. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02611))_
- In either case, the target under the spell will attempt to protect the caster from danger. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02611))_
- Additionally, if the caster loses their life for any reason, the spell's effect will be canceled immediately. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02611))_
- If the target successfully resists this spell, they will not suffer any effects. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02611))_
- Dryads are not spirits that are always present in the minds of humans (or other creatures). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02612))_
- This spell cannot be used if there are no plants in your surroundings. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02612))_

## 6th Level Spirit Magic List

- Base Mental Power Cost=24 Distance=Caster Area=A space within a 30 meter radius from the caster Duration=Until focus ends Effect=Manipulate the echoes of sounds within the area of effect Type=Focus Countered (Overpowered) By: Silence Expansion=Final score, area Resist=Negated effect _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02636))_
- Base Mental Power Cost=24 Distance=Caster Area=A space within a 30 meter radius from the caster Duration=Until focus ends Effect=Manipulate the echoes of sounds within the area of effect Type=Focus Countered (Overpowered) By: Silence Expansion=Final score, area Resist=Negated effect _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02636))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02637))_

> When you cast this spell, you can control the echoes of any sound that occurs within a 30 meter radius around the caster, no matter what it may be. You can make it so that only certain people can hear specific sounds, or conversely, you can make them inaudible. Any number of people can be targeted and made to hear or not hear sounds, as long as they're within the area of effect. Moreover, the targets can be chosen completely at the caster's discretion. For example, you can let your allies hear a spellsong that raises their morale without giving the enemy an advantage, or you can have secret conversations in a crowded place full of people while staying separate. However, the caster who is focusing the spell can only control one type of sound source at a time. If the caster desires, they can also switch the sound source they control each round.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02637))_

> You can make it so that only certain people can hear specific sounds, or conversely, you can make them inaudible.

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02637))_

## [ Spirit Wall ]

- Some walls may block your gaze, preventing attacks from spells and projectiles. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02642))_
- Walls can be negated by Dispel Magic or Suppress Elemental , or countered by the opposing Spirit Wall . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02642))_
- The wall is normally 0.5 meters thick, but you can consume extra mental power to expand the target size and make it thicker (as long as you do not change the length or height of the wall, the thickness will increase as the expansion rate increases). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02642))_
- This spell has the effect of creating a wall in a specified area using certain spirit power. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02642))_
- The types of spells are divided by the lesser spirits that control them, and the walls created by each spell each have different characteristics depending on their spirit power. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02643))_
- Furthermore, once a wall is put up, it cannot be moved or removed by the caster's will. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02643))_
- You cannot build a wall where other materials such as rocks, trees, or living things already exist. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02643))_
- You cannot build a wall where other materials such as rocks, trees, or living things already exist. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02643))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02640))_

> Base Mental Power Cost=30 Distance=30 meters Area=10 x 3 x 0.5 meters Duration=1 hour

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02641))_

> Effect=Put up a wall using spirits

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02641))_

> Effect=Put up a wall using spirits

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02642))_

> There are also walls that you cannot pass through, walls that deal damage even if you force your way through, etc.

## Spirit Wall: Wisp

- Counters (Negates): Shade , Spirit Wall: Shade Countered (Negated) By: Shade , Spirit Wall: Shade _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02647))_
- However, if you touch the wall or try to pass through it, you will destroy the will-o-wisps forming the wall. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02650))_
- The glow from the wall is so intense that you can't look directly at it (so your gaze won't pass through it). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02650))_
- Therefore, the space on either side of the wall of light is illuminated with a brightness like midday. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02650))_
- The wall of light is not a solid entity, but a collection of will-o-wisps themselves. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02650))_
- With the help of the spirit of light, you can build a dazzling wall of light. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02650))_
- The wall of light has no way to prevent objects from passing through it, so you can pass through it without any resistance. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02650))_
- At this time, make a resistance roll, and if you fail, you will suffer strike power 10 damage. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02650))_
- Therefore, the space on either side of the wall of light is illuminated with a brightness like midday. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02650))_
- At this time, the shade will also vanish. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02651))_
- If Spirit Wall: Shade is used in the same place, their effects will negate each other, and both walls will vanish. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02651))_
- Also, if the magical darkness created by Darkness and the wall of light overlap, the wall will end there. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02652))_
- A wall of light cannot be put up within the area of effect of the ancient magic Darkness . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02652))_
- A wall of light cannot be put up within the area of effect of the ancient magic Darkness . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02652))_

> Type=Target score, damage (Pure energytype)

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02650))_

> With the help of the spirit of light, you can build a dazzling wall of light. The wall of light is not a solid entity, but a collection of will-o-wisps themselves. Therefore, the space on either side of the wall of light is illuminated with a brightness like midday. The glow from the wall is so intense that you can't look directly at it (so your gaze won't pass through it). The wall of light has no way to prevent objects from passing through it, so you can pass through it without any resistance.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02649))_

> Expansion=Final score, duration, distance, target volume, damage certainty Resist=Reduced effect

Therefore, the space on either side of the wall of light is illuminated with a brightness like midday. The glow from the wall is so intense that you can't look directly at it (so your gaze won't pass through it). - Water walls do not obstruct your gaze, but projectiles cannot pass through them. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02659))_
- You cannot escape on your own. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02659))_
- A wall made of water can't be destroyed by physical means or even magic that deals damage, as it quickly compensates for any damaged areas. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02659))_
- Anything that attempts to touch or pass through the wall must attempt to resist. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02659))_
- Undine is waiting inside the water wall. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02659))_
- Moreover, any rescuers must also be able to get inside the wall in order to save those that have been swallowed up by it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02659))_
- Those inside the wall will automatically drown after a number of rounds equal to their life force (points) have elapsed, unless rescued from the outside. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02659))_

## Spirit Wall: Sylph

- Those that touch the wall or try to pass through it must attempt to resist. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02683))_

- If you succeed, you will be able to pass through the wall without incident, but if you fail, you will be blown away in the opposite direction from the wall. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02683))_
- The storm wall cannot be destroyed by physical methods or magic that deals damage. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02683))_
- When you chant the spell, a wild gust of wind comes out of nowhere and begins swirling in the same place. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02683))_

## [ Decrease Water Pressure ] (Undine/Water Spirit)

- Targets under this spell are saved from the effects of water pressure when diving deep underwater. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02706))_
- All water pressure exerted on the body by the spell will be alleviated regardless of its strength, and reduced to a point where normal actions are no longer a problem. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02706))_
- In addition, to actually dive, it is essential to use Water Breathing in order to be able to breathe underwater. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02707))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02705))_

## [ Preserve Sound ] (Sylph/Wind Spirit)

- Base Mental Power Cost=30 Distance=10 meters Area=A space with a 5 meter radius Duration=Until sound is transmitted Effect=Record and transmit sound to a specific location Type=Expansion=Distance, area Resist=None _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02709))_
- However, in order to specify a specific person, the caster must be familiar with the person's features and appearance. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02710))_
- Also, at the same time you cast the spell, you must also generate the sound you want to transmit. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02710))_
- It's also not possible to use this to record spells and activate them. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02710))_
- You can optionally determine the person to whom the sound is transmitted to some extent, such as the first person to step into that space. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02710))_
- It secures a sylph in place and allows it to transmit recorded sounds to others. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02710))_
- This spell has the effect of recording a sound and transmitting it to a specific location. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02710))_
- You can optionally determine the person to whom the sound is transmitted to some extent, such as the first person to step into that space. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02710))_
- Once the sound is transmitted, the effect of this spell vanishes. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02711))_

- in this state, all will suffer a -4 penalty. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02723))_

## [ Crack ] (Behemoth/Greater Earth Spirit)

- The effect of the spell is momentary, but once something is swallowed up by the crack, it cannot climb out of it on its own. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02727))_
- If a target falls into the cracks, they will first be buried in the ground up to their chest, and then be caught between the closing bedrock. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02727))_
- Then, by being crushed between the bedrock, they will suffer strike power 30 damage. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02727))_
- If you successfully resist the spell, you will avoid being swallowed by the crack and will not be affected. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02727))_
- It remains trapped in the crack until someone else pulls it out, which takes one round. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02727))_
- Duration=Instant Effect=Trap the target between a crack in the ground, dealing strike power 30 damage Type=Damage (Earthquake-type) targets, Expansion=Final score, distance, target volume, damage certainty Resist=Negated effect This is a spell that creates deep cracks, causing the ground underfoot to cave in, and swallowing the target in a deep chasm created this way. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02727))_
- When trapped in the ground, there is a 4 penalty to attack power (points) and evasion speed (points). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02727))_
- If a target falls into the cracks, they will first be buried in the ground up to their chest, and then be caught between the closing bedrock. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02727))_
- Then, by being crushed between the bedrock, they will suffer strike power 30 damage. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02727))_
- Note that this spell can also be used on targets larger than human size by expanding its effect. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02728))_

## [ Valkyrie Blessing ] (Valkyrie/Mind Spirit)

- Any damage is first absorbed by this protective light, so until it vanishes, virtually no damage can be dealt directly to the body. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02739))_

## [ Plant Shell ]

## (Ent/Greater Plant Spirit)

- The inside of the dome is covered with a carpet of soft fresh grass, making it moderately warm and moderately cool. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02751))_
- When you chant this spell, plants will grow along the perimeter of a 5 meter radius circle centered on the place the caster touches, creating a 2 meter tall dome of natural plants on the next round. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02751))_
- The outer walls of the dome are tough and densely intertwined with living plants, protecting those inside from attacks by wild beasts and less powerful monsters. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02751))_
- The dome serves as a tent that protects from the elements and as a temporary shelter when a suitable campsite cannot be found. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02751))_
- The inside of the dome is covered with a carpet of soft fresh grass, making it moderately warm and moderately cool. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02751))_
- The outer walls of the dome are tough and densely intertwined with living plants, protecting those inside from attacks by wild beasts and less powerful monsters. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02751))_

> Duration=Permanent Effect=Summon different types of spirits and take complete control of them Type=Target score Counters (Overpowers): Control Spirit Countered (Overpowered) By: Control Spirit Expansion=Final score, distance Resist=None This is a spell used to summon and control lesser spirits, and is an advanced Control Spirit spell. By casting this spell, a caster can control the spirits according to their own will. Same as Control Spirit , spirits that have been successfully summoned and controlled can be sealed in items, etc. It is the same as Control Spirit in that it requires a three-hour ritual, only one type of spirit can be controlled at a time, and it is possible to communicate in silent spirit. However, the biggest difference from Control Spirit is that it can ignore the spirit's will and force the caster's commands. Depending on the nature (intelligence and habits) of the controlled spirit, it can be made to carry out fairly complex and advanced commands. For example, you can command a sylph to create a cloud of dust to blind your enemies, or a salamander to set fire to the roofs of a row of houses one by one. It is up to the caster to decide what kind of command to give. You can also command others to attack, which is not possible with a lower level spell. However, if you command a spirit to do something that is too contrary to its true nature, the spirit may disappear after carrying out the command. For detailed characteristics and details of the controlled spirits, please refer to 13.2.4: Spirits (see p. 181)

## 8th Level Spirit Magic List [ Ice Coffin ]

- If the opponent successfully resists, the ice pillar will vanish before it's completed. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02760))_
- Base Mental Power Cost=32 Distance=30 meters Area=1 x 1 x 2 meters Duration=Instant Effect=Trap the opponent in a pillar of ice Type=- Expansion=Final score, distance, target volume Resist=Negated effect This spell instantly condenses moisture in the air, creating a pillar of ice 1 meter wide and 2 meters high, which can trap your opponent. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02760))_
- Although it cannot be cast on opponents who are too large to fit into the ice pillar, you can increase the size of the ice pillar by expanding the effect. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02760))_
- If the opponent successfully resists, the ice pillar will vanish before it's completed. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02760))_
- Once the ice pillar completely melts or breaks, the target will be free. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02762))_
- If the temperature is below freezing, it will not melt permanently. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02762))_
- Although they're in a state of suspended animation and their life force (points) is 0, they're not dead. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02762))_
- Even if your friends are trapped in an ice pillar, it is extremely dangerous to attempt to destroy it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02763))_
- This is because there is a risk that your friends who are packed in the ice will also be destroyed. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02763))_
- This is because there is a risk that your friends who are packed in the ice will also be destroyed. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02763))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02763))_

> Even if your friends are trapped in an ice pillar, it is extremely dangerous to attempt to destroy it. This is because there is a risk that your friends who are packed in the ice will also be destroyed. Damage dealt to the ice by weapons etc. will also be applied to whatever's inside the ice. For details on destruction, please refer to 18.3: Rules for Destroying Structures (see p. 277).

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02761))_

> If the target fails to resist, they become trapped in ice, unable to take any action, will lose consciousness and enter a state of suspended animation.

## [ Nightmare ] (Incubus, Succubus/Dream Spirit)

- At this time, the contents of the nightmare the opponent sees can be chosen as desired by the caster. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02794))_
- If the ritual is interrupted, even for one night, the spell's effect is completely lost. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02794))_
- The spell begins when the target goes to sleep, while the caster remains awake and focuses on controlling the dream spirit. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02794))_
- Also, the ritual must be continued overnight with undivided attention from sunset until dawn. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02794))_
- This is a spell that uses a dream spirit to send nightmares into the target's sleep, cursing your opponent to death. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02794))_
- Thus, the dream spirit controlled in this way enters the opponent's dreams and causes them to have nightmares. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02794))_
- This spell has no distance restrictions, but the target must be someone the caster knows personally. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02794))_
- This ritual must be performed every night until the target becomes weak and dies. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02794))_
- Thus, the dream spirit controlled in this way enters the opponent's dreams and causes them to have nightmares. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02794))_
- The target of the spell must attempt to resist daily. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02795))_
- Also, regardless of whether the resist succeeded or failed, they will no longer be able to recover their mental power (points) by any means (it will only recover once the spell's effect is removed). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02795))_
- If they fail, their mental power (points) will decrease by 1 point. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02795))_
- Also, regardless of whether the resist succeeded or failed, they will no longer be able to recover their mental power (points) by any means (it will only recover once the spell's effect is removed). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02795))_
- If their mental power (points) reaches 0 due to the spell's reduction, the person will fall into a coma, and die if the ritual continues for one more week. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02796))_
- The spell's effect will never disappear until the ritual is interrupted for some reason or it is negated with Remove Curse , etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02796))_

## [ Maze Woods ] (Ent/Greater Plant Spirit)

- Anyone within the area of effect when the spell is cast, or who enters within the area of effect during the duration of the spell, must make a resistance roll. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02815))_

## 9th Level Spirit Magic List [ Earthquake ] (Behemoth/Greater Earth Spirit)

- For the duration of the spell, you can only move 3 meters per round while crawling on the ground, taking a -4 penalty on success rolls such as attacks, evasion, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02827))_
- With the exception of the caster, anyone within the spell's area of effect or who attempts to enter the earthquake during the spell's duration will be knocked off their feet and fall prone, regardless of whether or not they successfully resist. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02827))_
- This spell causes a localized earthquake only within a 10 meter radius. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02827))_
- With the exception of the caster, anyone within the spell's area of effect or who attempts to enter the earthquake during the spell's duration will be knocked off their feet and fall prone, regardless of whether or not they successfully resist. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02827))_
- For the duration of the spell, you can only move 3 meters per round while crawling on the ground, taking a -4 penalty on success rolls such as attacks, evasion, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02827))_
- This spell causes a localized earthquake only within a 10 meter radius. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02827))_
- This earthquake causes all normal houses within the spell's area of effect to collapse (with the exception of strong buildings such as castles and forts, or those with magical protection), and trees to fall down. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02828))_
- However, those who successfully resist will only suffer strike power 10 and no criticals. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02828))_
- Additionally, as long as you remain within the area of effect, you will be slammed to the ground by the earthquake every round, suffering strike power 20 damage. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02828))_
- Depending on the situation, falling rocks and avalanches are quite possible. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02828))_
- However, those who successfully resist will only suffer strike power 10 and no criticals. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02828))_

## [ Freeze ] (Fenrir/Greater Ice Spirit)

- If you successfully resist the spell, there will be no effect, but if you fail, all life activities will cease and you will die immediately. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02839))_
- This spell has the effect of completely freezing the target instantly. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02839))_
- This spell cannot exert its original effect on things that do not have living bodies with blood flowing through them, such as undead, golems, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02839))_
- and can only freeze the surface of their bodies and render them unable to act. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02839))_

- Those killed by this spell will not come back to life even when thawed. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02840))_

## [ Maelstrom ]

## (Kraken/Greater Water Spirit)

- The spell's effect can work on anything that can fit inside the whirlpool. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02852))_
- This is a spell that creates a large whirlpool on the surface of the water, dragging everything floating within its range and sinking it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02852))_
- To cast this spell, a sea or lake with a depth of at least 100 meters is essential. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02852))_
- This is a spell that creates a large whirlpool on the surface of the water, dragging everything floating within its range and sinking it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02852))_
- The spell's effect can work on anything that can fit inside the whirlpool. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02852))_
- The baseline score is sailor skill level/adventurer level + dexterity bonus for a small ship, and sailor skill level + intelligence bonus for a large ship. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02853))_
- If successful, the ship will be able to safely survive the whirlpool, but if you fail, it will be swallowed up by the whirlpool and sink into the water. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02853))_
- The target score is the final score from when the spell was cast. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02853))_
- In that case, make a success roll using the swim ability to determine whether you drown. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02854))_
- If the ship is swallowed up by the whirlpool, everyone on board will be thrown into the whirlpool. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02854))_

## 10th Level Spirit Magic List ]

## [ Neutralize Elemental (Various greater spirits)

- Base Mental Power Cost=50 Distance=Caster Area=A space within a 100 meter radius from the caster Duration=18 rounds Effect=Appeal to the greater spirits to neutralize spirit power Type=Target score Counters (Overpowers): All magic that uses related spirit power Expansion=Final score, duration, area _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02857))_
- Base Mental Power Cost=50 Distance=Caster Area=A space within a 100 meter radius from the caster Duration=18 rounds Effect=Appeal to the greater spirits to neutralize spirit power Type=Target score Counters (Overpowers): All magic that uses related spirit power Expansion=Final score, duration, area _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02857))_
- This is the same even if multiple casters attempt it (only one type of spirit power can be neutralized in one space). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02859))_
- However, only one type of spirit power can be neutralized at a time. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02859))_
- This spell appeals to a greater spirit and completely neutralizes one type of spirit power within its area of effect for a limited time. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02859))_
- This is the same even if multiple casters attempt it (only one type of spirit power can be neutralized in one space). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02859))_
- However, only one type of spirit power can be neutralized at a time. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02859))_
- This spell appeals to a greater spirit and completely neutralizes one type of spirit power within its area of effect for a limited time. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02859))_
- It' s not that the spirit power ceases to exist; the lesser spirits still exist there, but they temporarily become completely neutral and you won't be able to draw out their magical powers. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02860))_
- This also applies to spirits sealed with spells such as Control Spirit , etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02860))_
- Within the area of effect, any spirit magic that depends on the neutralized spirit power will no longer be able to be used, and any magic that had an effect will be canceled immediately. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02860))_
- This spell's restrictions include the caster him or herself who appealed to the greater spirit. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02860))_
- This also applies to spirits sealed with spells such as Control Spirit , etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02860))_

- The greater spirits and spirit power that can be neutralized are as follows. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02861))_

> Resist=None

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02859))_

> Even if you expand this spell and use it, you cannot neutralize two or more types of spirit power at the same time.
