**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02862))_

> Behemoth=Earth spirit power Kraken=Water spirit power Efreet=Fire spirit power Djinn=Wind spirit power Fenrir=Ice spirit power Ent=Plant spirit power

## 5.1.15 Holy Magic and the

## Priest Skill

- There are many gods in Sword World , each drawing worship from humans and other intelligent races. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02866))_
- Holy prayers are runes used to contact the great beings, the gods , and use that power as a source to perform various miracles. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02866))_
- The gods' thought form is completely different from humans, therefore humans cannot fully understand it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02867))_
- This is because their words enter the mind as highly complex symbols. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02867))_
- Runes called holy prayers were created during the ancient kingdom period as a means to give words to this and cause miracles. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02867))_
- In order to use holy magic , you need to have enough faith to be able to hear the voices of the gods. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02867))_
- The gods' thought form is completely different from humans, therefore humans cannot fully understand it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02867))_
- This is because their words enter the mind as highly complex symbols. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02867))_
- Runes called holy prayers were created during the ancient kingdom period as a means to give words to this and cause miracles. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02867))_
- In addition, each holy magic has special spells that can only be used by believers of a specific god. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02868))_
- The caster uses these holy prayers to pray to the gods and activate the power of the spells. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02868))_
- Those spells cannot be used by members of other sects. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02868))_
- In addition, each holy magic has special spells that can only be used by believers of a specific god. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02868))_
- The skill for using holy magic is called the priest skill , and those who have the priest skill are called priests . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02869))_
- The skill for using holy magic is called the priest skill , and those who have the priest skill are called priests . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02869))_
- The priests of the wicked gods are not called priests, but dark priests . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02870))_
- Among the many gods that exist in Forcelia, there are also those called wicked gods . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02870))_
- The teachings of these wicked gods are extremely inconvenient for protecting human society, and many of them threaten the lives and property of others. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02870))_
- Because of their anti-social nature, the followers of these wicked gods tend to be abhorred, and the magic used by the followers of these wicked gods is called dark magic and is distinguished from holy magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02870))_
- Because of their anti-social nature, the followers of these wicked gods tend to be abhorred, and the magic used by the followers of these wicked gods is called dark magic and is distinguished from holy magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02870))_
- If you role-play according to the wicked gods' teachings, there is a high possibility that it will soon lead to the destruction of not only that PC, but also the party. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02871))_
- Game masters should not allow characters to become priests of wicked gods. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02871))_
- If you role-play according to the wicked gods' teachings, there is a high possibility that it will soon lead to the destruction of not only that PC, but also the party. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02871))_

## Restrictions on Using Holy Magic

- Also, a priest who loses faith immediately loses their priest skill. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02874))_
- There are no restrictions on armor or weapons to use the priest skill, and priests can cast magic simply by chanting holy prayers. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02874))_
- However, this action must be in accordance with the will of the god you believe in. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02874))_
- Also, one character cannot worship multiple gods. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02875))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02874))_

> If you try to use magic for a purpose that is far removed from the god's will, it may not work at all.

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02874))_

> There are no restrictions on armor or weapons to use the priest skill, and priests can cast magic simply by chanting holy prayers. However, this action must be in accordance with the will of the god you believe in. If you try to use magic for a purpose that is far removed from the god's will, it may not work at all. Also, a priest who loses faith immediately loses their priest skill.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02875))_

> Those with the priest skill must choose only one god to worship.

## 5.1.15.2 The Six Major Gods

- These six major gods almost always have temples in most towns. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02877))_
- Among the gods of Alecrast, the six most powerful gods (and those with the greatest number of believers) are called the six major gods . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02877))_
- These six major gods are Pharis (the supreme god) , the guardian of order and law, Phalaris (the dark god) , who rules over destruction and chaos, Myrii (the god of war) , the guardian of war and victory, Rahda (the god of knowledge) , who rules over wisdom and knowledge, Cha Za (the god of trade) , who is the god of luck and commerce, and Marfa (the earth mother) , the goddess of nature and agriculture, and the protector of marriage. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02878))_

## 《 Pharis 》

- His ardent believers include members of the ruling class such as kings, aristocrats, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02881))_
- It's up to the game master to decide what is fair, but assault, murder, and for that matter, theft for fun, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02881))_
- Also, he especially dislikes undead, monsters created by magic, or summoned from other planes as they're impure (this is a characteristic common to most gods except wicked gods). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02881))_
- Pharis's teachings are for people to act in an orderly manner and to achieve unchanging justice in the world. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02881))_
- His ardent believers include members of the ruling class such as kings, aristocrats, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02881))_
- Also, he especially dislikes undead, monsters created by magic, or summoned from other planes as they're impure (this is a characteristic common to most gods except wicked gods). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02881))_

## 《 Myrii 》

- His believers are knights and mercenaries. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02883))_
- He only supports righteous conflict, so he will not lend his strength to fights that are just for the sake of stealing or simply killing one another. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02883))_
- He only supports righteous conflict, so he will not lend his strength to fights that are just for the sake of stealing or simply killing one another. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02883))_

## 《 Rahda 》

- It seems that he has many believers among sages and sorcerers. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02885))_
- He doesn't have many restrictions, but he tends to dislike barbaric behavior. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02885))_
- He teaches an intelligent way of life, and his doctrine is that if all things are wise, the world will be well. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02885))_

## 《 Cha Za 》

- His believers are the citizens living in towns. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02887))_
- He also denies closed-minded thinking. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02887))_
- He teaches that happiness can be achieved through conversation and interaction between people, such as through trade. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02887))_
- Although he prohibits stealing, it's okay to claim something that doesn't have an obvious owner (such as lost property or treasure in ruins) as your own. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02887))_
- He teaches that happiness can be achieved through conversation and interaction between people, such as through trade. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02887))_
- Although he prohibits stealing, it's okay to claim something that doesn't have an obvious owner (such as lost property or treasure in ruins) as your own. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02887))_

## 《 Marfa 》

- It seems that she has many believers among the poor, farmers, and hunters. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02889))_
- She particularly encourages farming and hunting, which are basic activities indispensable for human survival. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02889))_
- This is different from the concept of nature-worship, and her ideal is for humans to be in their natural state. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02889))_
- Her doctrine is expressed in the words be natural . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02889))_

## 《 Phalaris (Wicked God) 》

- Phalaris is a wicked god . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02891))_
- Game masters should not allow player characters to worship this god. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02891))_
- It is clear that those who follow these doctrines must eventually become wicked. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02892))_
- Although there is no shortage of believers, it seems they often remain hidden in order to protect their own position. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02892))_
- Followers of Phalaris recognize all desires inherent in the individual and affirm any means necessary to enhance one's own existence. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02892))_
- He teaches that it is okay to do something, even if it means destruction or murder, as long as it is for your own benefit. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02892))_
- What his followers aim for is complete freedom, and they dislike succumbing to the constraints of law, order, and morality. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02892))_
- Followers of Phalaris recognize all desires inherent in the individual and affirm any means necessary to enhance one's own existence. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02892))_

- However, the kingdom of chaos Phandria , located in the central plains region, has Phalaris as its state religion, and the largest Phalaris temple in Alecrast is built there. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02893))_
- Temples of Phalaris often exist in large towns, but because he is considered a wicked god, they are confined to basements and secluded forests. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02893))_

- However, this does not mean that everything is forgivable, so game masters should only confiscate the priest skill when the character repeatedly commits unjust acts or shows no remorse. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02894))_
- Therefore, players and game masters should use common sense when making judgments, rather than forcefully twisting the doctrine or interpreting it too rigidly. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02894))_
- The gods see everything, but they also see from a vast perspective at the same time, so unless it's a very extreme act, they will not abandon a priest. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02894))_

## Other Gods

- In addition to the six major gods, the following gods are also worshiped in Alecrast. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02897))_
- Player characters cannot worship wicked gods. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02897))_
- Among these are wicked gods whose teachings are to bring disaster to the world. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02897))_

## 《 Fenes 》

- During the war of the gods, it is said that he did not join the forces of darkness nor the forces of light led by his older brother Pharis, choosing instead to take the position of king of the neutral gods. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02899))_
- It is sometimes said that he is the true form of the Nameless God of Madness (a wicked god, explained later), and he is also said to be the god of beastmen such as werewolves. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02899))_
- Belief in him is not popular in Alecrast, and he has almost no temples. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02899))_
- Fenes is the younger brother of the supreme god Pharis, and is said to govern things that repeat (cycles). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02899))_
- It is sometimes said that he is the true form of the Nameless God of Madness (a wicked god, explained later), and he is also said to be the god of beastmen such as werewolves. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02899))_

## 《 Wehner 》

- Belief in him is especially popular among artists. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02901))_
- He is the god of the arts and also the god of bards. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02901))_
- He is also believed to write history, and so is also characterized as a god of destiny. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02901))_
- Although he does not have great power, he is widely believed in by the masses, and his temples can be seen from time to time. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02901))_

## 《 Ganerd 》

- Temples dedicated to Ganerd can sometimes be seen in large towns, but his power is by no means great. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02903))_
- Although he is said to be the god of thieves, he was originally the god of craftsmanship, and so has believers among craftsmen. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02903))_
- He is also considered the god of gifts, as he brings unexpected wealth. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02903))_
- Temples dedicated to Ganerd can sometimes be seen in large towns, but his power is by no means great. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02903))_

## 《 Braki 》

- He has many believers among those who work in the mines, and he even has the personality of a chief god, especially among the dwarves. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02905))_
- However, he was originally the god of volcanoes, and because he told people that when you heat a stone, it melts like water, he was worshiped as the god of smiths. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02905))_
- As a result, most dwarven settlements have built shrines to Braki. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02905))_
- He is known as the god of smiths. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02905))_
- However, he was originally the god of volcanoes, and because he told people that when you heat a stone, it melts like water, he was worshiped as the god of smiths. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02905))_
- However, his temples are rarely seen in human cities. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02906))_

## The Nameless God of Madness (Wicked God)

- The priests of his cult teach that madness frees its believers from bondage and gives them freedom. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02908))_
- His followers are few and he has no temples either. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02908))_
- It is said that he gives sudden inspiration that is not based in logic, and for this reason he is also considered the god of art and invention, so there are sometimes believers in this god among artists and sages. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02908))_
- It is said that he exists in the star world and causes people to go mad, and it is believed that those who come into contact with the light emitted by this mad god on a full moon's night will be afflicted with madness. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02908))_
- He is the god of madness, and because of his madness, he is a deity whose name cannot be identified. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02908))_
- He is the god of madness, and because of his madness, he is a deity whose name cannot be identified. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02908))_

## 《 Kardis (Wicked God) 》

- Due to the nature of her faith, she has no temples, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02910))_
- Believers consider destruction and slaughter to be their mission anyway, as they believe that without destruction there can be no new beginning. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02910))_
- She is feared as the goddess of destruction and the goddess of the undead, and is considered to be the goddess who controls the end . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02910))_
- but her doctrines have been continually passed down throughout the past and present, so she has believers. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02910))_
- but her doctrines have been continually passed down throughout the past and present, so she has believers. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02910))_

## 《 Mirleaf (Wicked God) 》

- He is the god of the dead of the sea, and teaches that life is pain and sin, and that death is the only way to be saved from it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02912))_
- Mirleaf believers believe that new challenges and efforts to survive (as exemplified by voyages) create and prolong suffering, and that a prompt death is the only mercy for those who do such things. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02912))_
- Mirleaf believers believe that new challenges and efforts to survive (as exemplified by voyages) create and prolong suffering, and that a prompt death is the only mercy for those who do such things. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02912))_

## Basic Abilities of the Priest Skill

- Priests can use the following abilities. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02917))_

## 《 Divination 》

- However, a god's words can only be understood abstractly by humans, and you cannot ask detailed questions to the gods. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02919))_
- Occasionally a god will give you a revelation (given at the game master's discretion). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02919))_
- This is the ability to pray and communicate with a god, asking whether or not one's actions are right. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02919))_
- However, a god's words can only be understood abstractly by humans, and you cannot ask detailed questions to the gods. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02919))_
- It must be done only when they absolutely need a word from their god to protect their faith. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02920))_
- Revelations should not be used too conveniently for the characters (players). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02920))_
- It must be done only when they absolutely need a word from their god to protect their faith. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02920))_

## 《 Vow 》

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02923))_

> This is a voluntary vow. When a priest wants to do something, they can make a vow to their god. When a priest's actions contradict or move away from their vows, their god will give them some form of attention or assistance. If a priest of Marfa and his wife make a vow to never divorce at the time of their marriage, but then the relationship between the two turns sour, the two of them may end up having a child together. No vow can be made that violates your faith in your god. For example, a priest of Myrii can make a vow to defeat the traitor XX with my own hands , but a priest of Marfa cannot .

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02923))_

> When a priest wants to do something, they can make a vow to their god.

However, a success roll check is required, and if you fail, there will be no effect. If successful, roll another 2D and an effect corresponding to the rolled score will be applied. ## [ Transfer Mental Power

- This spell is a spell that transfers the caster's mental power (points) to another person as it is. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02968))_
- Even those who have lost their consciousness with 0 mental power can be recovered with this spell. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02968))_
- For example, if the caster spends 10 points of mental power with this spell, 9 points will be added to the target's mental power, excluding the base mental power cost of 1 point. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02968))_
- For example, if the caster spends 10 points of mental power with this spell, 9 points will be added to the target's mental power, excluding the base mental power cost of 1 point. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02968))_
- The amount of mental power being transferred cannot be divided by priest skill level. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02969))_
- Please note that this spell cannot transfer more mental power (points) than the target's starting mental power (points). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-02970))_

> This spell is a spell that transfers the caster's mental power (points) to another person as it is. For example, if the caster spends 10 points of mental power with this spell, 9 points will be added to the target's mental power, excluding the base mental power cost of 1 point. Even those who have lost their consciousness with 0 mental power can be recovered with this spell.

> Even if you are a 10th level priest, if you want to give 10 points of mental power (points) to a target, you must spend 11 points of mental power (points).

## [ Holy Weapon ]

- This is a spell that applies a negative force against undead to a weapon, rather than to space like Turn Undead . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03012))_
- This additional strike power does not apply to anything other than undead. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03013))_
- For undead that can only be wounded by magic weapons, strike power will be 10 regardless of the strike power of the weapon itself. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03013))_
- It also has no effect on (non-undead) enemies that can only be wounded by magical weapons, such as werewolves, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03013))_
- It also has no effect on (non-undead) enemies that can only be wounded by magical weapons, such as werewolves, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03013))_

## [ Holy Light ]

- This spell emits a light from your hands that is harmful to undead. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03035))_
- Its strike power is 20. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03035))_
- As a result, you can deal damage to undead within 10 meters of the caster. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03035))_
- As a result, you can deal damage to undead within 10 meters of the caster. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03035))_
- Those who lose their vision suffer a penalty of -4 to attack power (points) and evasion speed (points). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03036))_
- This means that undead will suffer damage and lose vision for one round. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03036))_
- Also, anyone (undead or not) who sees the spell's light and fails to resist loses their vision for one round due to the glare. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03036))_
- This means that undead will suffer damage and lose vision for one round. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03036))_
- This spell cannot take effect within the area of effect of Darkness . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03037))_

## Heat Protective Circle

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03057))_

> The specific effect is that you can subtract 2 points from damage from those attacks.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03057))_

> Type=Counters (Overpowers): Cold Protective Circle, Spirit Wall: Salamander Countered (Overpowered) By: Cold Protective Circle, Spirit Wall: Salamander Expansion=Duration, area Resist=None This spell protects those within its area of effect from fire and heat. The specific effect is that you can subtract 2 points from damage from those attacks. The same goes for attacks from weapons that had Fire Weapon cast on them. Salamanders, which are fire spirits, will not attempt to enter within this range. If a fire spirit enters the area of effect, that spirit will immediately try to leave. If this is not possible (for example, if it's being controlled by another person using a spell such as Control Spirit , if it's sealed in an item, etc.), the spirit will return to its own spirit world.

## Cold Protective Circle

- Also, frau, an ice spirit, will not try to enter this range. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03060))_
- If they are inside when the spell is cast, they will immediately try to escape, and if for some reason that is not possible, they will return to their own spirit world. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03060))_
- The effect of this spell is almost the same as Heat Protective Circle , but it protects against damage from ice and cold. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03060))_
- If they are inside when the spell is cast, they will immediately try to escape, and if for some reason that is not possible, they will return to their own spirit world. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03060))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03059))_

> Type=Counters (Overpowers): Heat Protective Circle, Spirit Wall: Frau Countered (Overpowered) By: Heat Protective Circle, Spirit Wall: Frau Expansion=Duration, Area Resist=None

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03060))_

## 5th Level Basic Holy Magic List [ Quest ]

- However, even if you do remember, you will still experience pain if you do not actively try to fulfill it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03067))_
- If the target of the spell takes any action that violates this mission, they will experience severe pain throughout their entire body. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03067))_
- The pain is so severe that if you continue to be exposed to it for more than 10 minutes, you will become mentally abnormal. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03067))_
- This spell has the effect of allowing the caster to set one mission for the target. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03067))_
- This is not a matter of action, but of the mind, and the spell does not cause pain unless the one on whom it was cast forgets their mission. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03067))_
- For example, you might be asked to fetch a certain item or defeat a certain monster. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03067))_

- For example, asking someone to bring you the most beautiful woman in the world is an abstract command, and ruling the world is a mission that goes beyond the compulsion of this spell. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03068))_
- This spell is canceled when the caster dies. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03068))_

## [ Preservation ]

- This is a spell that protects objects that would normally rot from decay. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03098))_
- It can be used to preserve food, and it is also effective in protecting corpses that are planned to be brought back to life in the future with Resurrection . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03098))_
- It is also a counter spell to the dark magic Rot , and if cast within the duration of Rot , it can restore things that have decayed back to their original state. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03098))_
- Objects that have this spell cast on them will no longer decay naturally. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03098))_
- However, even if you cast it on something that has completely decayed after the duration of Rot has expired, or something that has naturally decayed, it will not return to its original state. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03098))_
- It is also a counter spell to the dark magic Rot , and if cast within the duration of Rot , it can restore things that have decayed back to their original state. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03098))_
- However, even if you cast it on something that has completely decayed after the duration of Rot has expired, or something that has naturally decayed, it will not return to its original state. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03098))_
- the decay will begin to progress at normal rate from that moment on. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03099))_
- If the effect of this spell is removed, such as with Perfect Cancellation , etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03099))_
- If the effect of this spell is removed, such as with Perfect Cancellation , etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03099))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03096))_

## [ Regeneration ]

- This is a spell that regenerates missing or non-functioning body tissues and restores their function. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03121))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03136))_

> The commands you give the animal should be very simple. For example, launching an attack on a specific target, delivering a certain package somewhere, heading to a certain location as a group, etc. You can also give commands to encourage suicide, such as jumping into a fire to become food, but if you give such commands unnecessarily, you may risk losing your priest skill depending on the god you worship. For example, a priest of Myrii should only use animals to buy time while he escapes from an enemy, unless the enemy is extremely unmanageable.

## Magic List [ Recall Spirit ]

- Only those that the caster knows well (or at least is acquainted with) can be resurrected. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03166))_
- However, in return, they can use their body to bring the dead back to life. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03166))_
- If this spell is used, the priest's soul will be called to their god. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03166))_
- Also, those who have lost their souls and are destroyed, or those who have become undead, cannot be resurrected. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03166))_
- This is a precious spell of selfsacrifice. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03166))_
- Only those that the caster knows well (or at least is acquainted with) can be resurrected. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03166))_
- Priests who have given their bodies to others cannot be resurrected using Resurrection , because they have lost their soul containers (although they can have another priest cast Recall Spirit on them...). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03167))_
- Priests who have given their bodies to others cannot be resurrected using Resurrection , because they have lost their soul containers (although they can have another priest cast Recall Spirit on them...). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03167))_

## [ Resurrection

- In order to bring someone back to life, you need something that is strongly connected to the dead person who is the target of the spell. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03177))_

- If you have a corpse, that's fine, but if you don't, you'll need items that were loved by the deceased. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03177))_

If you die within one day, you can be resurrected with a final score of 20 or greater, but for each day that passes, the required final value score will increase by 1, such as 21, 22, 23...... etc. Once this spell fails, the caster cannot attempt Resurrection on the same dead person (it will always fail) until their magic power increases. ## [ Save Soul ]

- There are several cases in which a normal life form becomes undead. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03203))_
- In either case, if you become undead, your soul will become abnormal and you will not be able to be resurrected even if Resurrection is used normally. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03203))_
- Those that have had their mental power (points) taken away by other undead (wights, lesser vampires, etc.), those created by magic (skeleton, zombies, etc.), those created by their own will (haunts, undead kings, etc.), and there are also things such as ghouls whose causes are still unknown. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03203))_
- Those that have had their mental power (points) taken away by other undead (wights, lesser vampires, etc.), those created by magic (skeleton, zombies, etc.), those created by their own will (haunts, undead kings, etc.), and there are also things such as ghouls whose causes are still unknown. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03203))_

- If you then cast Resurrection , it is also possible to restore their life. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03205))_

- If you then cast Resurrection , it is also possible to restore their life. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03205))_

Reborn babies have their ability scores preserved (they have the same ability scores after becoming adults). As the baby grows up, at a certain moment it'll remember its former personality. At that stage they will be able to use all their previous memories and skills. When they remember their previous personality depends on the final score

- with this spell, arrows are automatically generated as well. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03299))_

- Also, it's not possible to give this weapon to someone else. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03299))_
- This weapon can also take effect against monsters that can only be wounded by silver or magic weapons. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03299))_
- This weapon can also take effect against monsters that can only be wounded by silver or magic weapons. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03299))_

## [ Legend ] (Spell Level=7)

- This is a spell for passing down oral instruction. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03326))_
- The caster can make the target of the spell memorize specific text without error. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03326))_
- The text must be limited to 10 sentences. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03327))_
- This spell allows you to increase the amount of text your target memorizes by expanding its effect (for example, they can memorize up to 20 sentences of text if you consume double the mental power). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03327))_
- Also, it must be pronounced and heard directly. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03327))_
- This spell allows you to increase the amount of text your target memorizes by expanding its effect (for example, they can memorize up to 20 sentences of text if you consume double the mental power). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03327))_
- The text must be limited to 10 sentences. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03327))_
- In other words, text of this amount can be easily memorized. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03328))_
- For reference, this spell's description, including this last part, is 8 sentences long. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03328))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03324))_

> Base Mental Power Cost=28 Distance=Touch Area=One Duration=Permanent Effect=Make the target memorize text Type=Non-removable Expansion=Text amount (see explanation)

> Resist=None

## [ Guard Trading ] (Spell Level=5)

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03344))_

> This is a spell for protecting trade. If you try to engage in an illegal business transaction with the caster who cast this spell (e.g. trying to sell for more than the intended price, trying to buy for less than the intended price, etc.), the caster will discover it immediately. Also, when someone tries to steal or take something from the caster, it will be discovered because it means they're trying to buy it for free = less than the intended price .

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03342))_

> Effect=You can see who is trying to engage in illegal business transactions with the caster

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03344))_

> This is a spell for protecting trade. If you try to engage in an illegal business transaction with the caster who cast this spell (e.g. trying to sell for more than the intended price, trying to buy for less than the intended price, etc.), the caster will discover it immediately. Also, when someone tries to steal or take something from the caster, it will be discovered because it means they're trying to buy it for free = less than the intended price .

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03343))_

> Base Mental Power Cost=25 Distance=Caster Area=Within the caster's view Duration=1 day Type=Detection, target score Expansion=Final score, duration Resist=None

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03344))_

If you try to engage in an illegal business transaction with the caster who cast this spell (e.g. trying to sell for more than the intended price, trying to buy for less than the intended price, etc.), the caster will discover it immediately. Also, when someone tries to steal or take something from the caster, it will be discovered because it means they're trying to buy it for free = less than the intended price .

## Marfa Special Holy Magic List

- This spell has no effect on those without a mind, or when it is natural for them to attack another due to hunger, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03356))_
- Therefore, priests of Marfa can use this spell to take away the feelings of hatred that have arisen in each other's hearts and prevent them from fighting. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03356))_
- Those who fail to resist will lose their hostility and attempt to stop the fight. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03356))_

## 5.2

## Common Runes

- Common runes were invented by Mana Rai, the great sage of Oran, and it involves putting the power of ancient magic into items (mainly rings) and activating it using a password in common . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03380))_
- Theoretically, any ancient magic can be made into common runes, but the sorcerers' guild (academy of sages) limits what gets put on the market, to prevent the reputation of magic and sorcerers _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03381))_
- Theoretically, any ancient magic can be made into common runes, but the sorcerers' guild (academy of sages) limits what gets put on the market, to prevent the reputation of magic and sorcerers _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03381))_
- Common runes, like other magic, consume mental power when used. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03382))_
- The amount of mental power consumed is determined by each common rune. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03382))_
- When using common runes, if magic power is required for a game procedure, treat it as 0 regardless of the user. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03383))_
- However, no matter how high your rune master skill is, you cannot reduce the amount of mental power consumed. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03383))_
- However, increasing the final score is the one thing you cannot do. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03383))_
- Common runes can be used by anyone who knows the password. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03383))_
- Common runes can also be expanded by consuming extra mental power. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03383))_
- You can increase the weight of metal that can be affected by 20 kilograms by consuming double the mental power, 40 kilograms by consuming quadruple the mental power...... _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03386))_
- from being damaged due to misuse of magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03387))_
- However, Decrease Weight will not appear on the market as a common rune if it's lost to the world. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03388))_
- The following are common runes that characters can obtain. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03388))_
- It only appears on the market when a character discovers it, or has already discovered it, through an adventure (which means it is no longer a lost spell). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03388))_
- It only appears on the market when a character discovers it, or has already discovered it, through an adventure (which means it is no longer a lost spell). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03388))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03380))_

> Common runes were invented by Mana Rai, the great sage of Oran, and it involves putting the power of ancient magic into items (mainly rings) and activating it using a password in common .

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03383))_

> Also, even if you can't use your hands or are wearing metal armor, you can use them as long as you can say the word.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03385))_

> In the middle of combat, it can only be used on enemies that are engaged with you, and if you suffer damage from an enemy's counterattack, your focus will be broken and the magic's effect will be lost.

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03388))_

> The following are common runes that characters can obtain. However, Decrease Weight will not appear on the market as a common rune if it's lost to the world. It only appears on the market when a character discovers it, or has already discovered it, through an adventure (which means it is no longer a lost spell).

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03389))_

> For detailed effects of these, please refer to the ancient magic of the same name (see Table 5-9: Common Runes).

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03388))_

> The following are common runes that characters can obtain. However, Decrease Weight will not appear on the market as a common rune if it's lost to the world. It only appears on the market when a character discovers it, or has already discovered it, through an adventure (which means it is no longer a lost spell).

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03390))_

> The game master may add other common runes at their discretion.

## 5.3

- Those with the bard skill can use magic, although weak, by singing these spellsongs. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03393))_
- A spellsong is a song with magical power that was created during the ancient kingdom period. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03393))_
- In such cases, please make sure to make a decision such as The sorcerers' guild would never allow them on the market because they'd bring down the reputation of magic and sorcerers . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03394))_
- became common runes, it's obvious that thieves would use them to commit evil deeds. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03394))_
- In such cases, please make sure to make a decision such as The sorcerers' guild would never allow them on the market because they'd bring down the reputation of magic and sorcerers . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03394))_
- Also, when creating a new common rune, its mental power consumption is the same as the base mental power cost of ancient magic, and the price should be _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03395))_

## Spellsongs

- However, instead of magic power, the baseline score is bard skill level + mental power bonus ( not intelligence bonus!) . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03397))_
- However, bards are never called rune masters. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03398))_
- Furthermore, you must sing the lyrics in high ancient at the same time. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03399))_
- This instrument must be unique to each bard, and the spellsong cannot be used when playing another instrument. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03399))_
- To use a spellsong, you must play an instrument. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03399))_
- Every time your level goes up, you have to learn a new spellsong. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03400))_
- Y ou can learn one spellsong per bard level. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03400))_
- However, it has no effect on those who are unable to hear. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03400))_

- Also, the effect of a spellsong cannot be expanded. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03401))_
- Resistance rolls against spellsongs are generally made only once at the beginning of the song (depending on the spellsong, they may be on the fourth round). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03402))_
- However, unlike focus , it' s not interrupted by damage dealt to life force or mental power (unless, of course, you fall unconscious as a result of the damage). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03402))_
- A spellsong remains in effect as long as the bard sings it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03402))_
- However, once the song is interrupted, the effect disappears. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03402))_
- Once you successfully resist, you do not need to make any further resistance rolls and will not suffer from the effect, even if the spellsong continues. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03402))_

## Curiosity (Mind)

- The resistance roll is made on the fourth round after the song begins (count the beginning of the song as the first round, and make the roll when the bard's action order occurs on the fourth round). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03412))_

## Summon Small Animals (Mind)

- This spell has the effect of summoning specific small animals nearby. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03414))_
- When this spellsong begins, all small animals within earshot of the song will gather around the bard. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03414))_
- You can summon any hand-sized mammals or birds (mice, squirrels, small cats, small birds, etc.). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03414))_
- If the summoned small animals are attacked, the effect of the spellsong will be broken and they will all run away. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03414))_
- When this spellsong begins, all small animals within earshot of the song will gather around the bard. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03414))_

- Those affected will not be restricted in their actions, but as long as the spellsong continues, they will also be singing and will not be able to cast magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03416))_
- Anyone who hears this spellsong will start singing the same lyrics along with the bard's song. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03416))_
- There's no need to remember the lyrics. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03416))_

## 6.1

## Precautions When Using Skills

- The abilities associated with these skills, including the thief skill , are mostly determined by success rolls. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03460))_
- and depending on the money they may undertake assassinations. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03463))_
- For better or worse, society cannot exist without their presence. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03463))_
- They may be hired by the king for espionage, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03463))_
- However, not all of them make their living by stealing from others. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03463))_
- The owner of this skill is called a thief . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03463))_
- The owner of this skill is called a thief . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03463))_
- The thief skill is taught at the thieves' guild . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03464))_
- People who aren't in the guild usually can't learn it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03464))_
- Each year, guild members must give 10% of their (annual) income or 500 silver coins (whichever is higher) to their guild. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03464))_
- Also, it is of course illegal to use this skill to commit theft, and if caught, punishment awaits. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03465))_
- The thief skill includes the following abilities. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03466))_
- For example, the thief skill's lockpicking ability cannot be retried. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03467))_
- Once you fail such an ability, you cannot attempt it again on the same target. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03467))_
- For example, the thief skill's lockpicking ability cannot be retried. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03467))_

## [ ④ Mnemonics [Intelligence]] (No equipment restriction, not retriable)

- Thieves do this habitually all the time. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03502))_
- A success roll should be made when recalling something, not when trying to memorize something. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03502))_
- The game master should determine the target score based on the contents being recalled and the time since you witnessed it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03502))_
- This is the ability to remember what you witness. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03502))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03502))_

> For example, even if a book is written in a language you don't know, by using this ability you can memorize the shape of each letter exactly as it is, even if you don't know the meaning, and can write it down later.

## [ ⑤ Listen [Intelligence] ] (Equipment restriction)

- The game master should determine the difficulty according to the situation. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03504))_
- If you fail, you may not be able to hear anything, or you may not be able to choose a particular sound. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03504))_
- This ability is used to hear certain sounds from behind walls, doors, or from a distance. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03504))_
- Also, a helmet will clearly interfere with this ability. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03505))_
- If you are wearing metal armor or heavy armor, the noise it makes will interfere with your hearing. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03505))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03504))_

> You can also choose and listen to a specific sound from a mixture of various sounds.

## [ ⑥ Stealthy Step [Agility] ] (Equipment restriction)

- A success roll determines whether the sound of walking can be heard. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03507))_
- This is the ability to move without making a sound. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03507))_
- If there is a tie or the listener's final score is greater, the thief will be overheard. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03508))_
- At this time, the thief makes a success roll using thief skill + dexterity bonus as the baseline score, and the person trying to hear the sound makes one using adventurer level + intelligence bonus as the baseline score. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03508))_
- In particular, if they're not paying attention to the sound, impose a -4 penalty on the listener and make the same check. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03509))_
- At this time, if you can hear the sound, you will be able to discern not only the presence of something sneaking around, but also its general appearance (walking speed, stride length, number of people if there is more than one, etc.). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03510))_
- At this time, if you can hear the sound, you will be able to discern not only the presence of something sneaking around, but also its general appearance (walking speed, stride length, number of people if there is more than one, etc.). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03510))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03507))_

> This is the ability to move without making a sound. A success roll determines whether the sound of walking can be heard.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03508))_

> If the thief's final score is greater, the sound will never be heard.

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03509))_

> In particular, if they're not paying attention to the sound, impose a -4 penalty on the listener and make the same check.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03510))_

> If the person hearing the sound also has the thief skill, they may make a check using thief skill level + intelligence bonus (this is the listen ability from the previous section).

## [ ⑦ Pickpocket [Dexterity] ] (Equipment restriction)

- This is the ability to see an opening on an opponent and pickpocket their wallet, small items, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03512))_
- It's a success if the final score on the thief's side is greater, but it is a failure if it's a tie or if the side being pickpocketed's is greater. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03512))_
- If you fail, it will definitely be exposed to the opponent. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03512))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03512))_

> The person trying to pickpocket must make a success roll using thief skill level + dexterity bonus and the person being pickpocketed must make one using adventurer level + intelligence bonus as the baseline score.

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03512))_

- This is the ability to search for hidden things. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03517))_

## [ ⑩ Climb [Agility] ] (Equipment restriction)

- This ability is used to climb walls and cliffs. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03519))_
- Please refer to that section for details on determining target scores, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03519))_

## [ ⑪ Special Combat [Dexterity, Agility, Strength]] (Equipment restriction)

- This critical target modifier is always -1, regardless of your thief skill level. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03522))_
- However, the way a thief fights is quite different from that of a fighter. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03522))_
- Even thieves have combat abilities and can fight using their thief skill level. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03522))_
- The major difference (other than equipment restrictions) is the critical target. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03522))_
- For more information, please refer to Chapter 4: Weapon Combat . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03522))_
- For this reason, a thief's attacks have a greater chance of dealing intense damage in one hit. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03522))_
- If you use weapons or armor that exceed the thief skill's restrictions, you will automatically have to fight with the fighter skill. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03523))_
- If you want to use heavy weapons and armor that are full of strength, you should use the fighter skill as your standard for combat, and if you want to deal a lot of damage with a single blow, you should use light weapons and the thief skill in combat. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03523))_
- You may change the skill you use in combat each round, but you may not use different skills for attack and defense on the same round (such as defending with the fighter skill, then attacking with the thief skill, etc.). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03523))_
- You may change the skill you use in combat each round, but you may not use different skills for attack and defense on the same round (such as defending with the fighter skill, then attacking with the thief skill, etc.). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03523))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03522))_

> Even thieves have combat abilities and can fight using their thief skill level. However, the way a thief fights is quite different from that of a fighter. For more information, please refer to Chapter 4: Weapon Combat . The major difference (other than equipment restrictions) is the critical target. While a fighter fights in a linear style, trying to crush the enemy head-on, a thief tries to focus on the opponent's vital points and weaknesses. For this reason, a thief's attacks have a greater ch

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03523))_

> If one adventurer has acquired both the thief skill and the fighter skill, the player must choose which skill to fight with.

## [ ⑫ Long Jump/High Jump [Agility] ] (Equipment restriction)

- You can jump over obstacles using (pole) high jump or (pole) long jump . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03525))_

## [ ⑬ Follow [Agility] ] (Equipment restriction)

- This is the ability to follow an opponent without them noticing. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03527))_
- A tie is a failure to follow. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03527))_
- If you fail, your opponent will realize that they are being followed. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03528))_
- What action the person takes after that is up to them. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03528))_
- What action the person takes after that is up to them. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03528))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03527))_

> The side that's following must use thief skill level + agility bonus as their baseline score, while the side being followed must use adventurer level + intelligence bonus , and success or failure is determined by comparing the final scores of their success rolls.

## [ ⑭ Disguise [Dexterity] ] (No equipment restriction)

- This is the ability to change one's face and appearance using special makeup. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03530))_
- Things like height and physique can be changed to a certain extent, but there are still limits. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03530))_
- Things like height and physique can be changed to a certain extent, but there are still limits. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03530))_
- The game master should add modifiers to success rolls to account for the unnaturalness of the disguise (such as disguising as the opposite sex, etc.). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03531))_
- Especially when disguised as someone whose characteristics the thief doesn't know in detail, it's best to add a difficult modifier. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03531))_
- The game master should add modifiers to success rolls to account for the unnaturalness of the disguise (such as disguising as the opposite sex, etc.). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03531))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03530))_

> This is the ability to change one's face and appearance using special makeup. It's easy to just act like a completely different person, but it's difficult to disguise yourself as someone specific. Things like height and physique can be changed to a certain extent, but there are still limits.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03531))_

> If the thief is disguised as a specific person and they encounter an acquaintance of that person, they must make a success roll to determine success or failure.

## [ ⑮ Treasure Appraisal [Intelligence] ] (No equipment restriction, not retriable)

- However, magical items and books whose contents need to be understood are completely excluded. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03533))_
- The game master should set the target score each time. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03533))_
- This is the ability to instantly judge whether something is valuable as a treasure or not, and which one is likely to be more valuable. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03533))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03533))_

## [ ⑯ Find/Sense Trap [Intelligence]] (No equipment restriction, not retriable)

- This is the ability to sense and find traps set indoors, such as doors, hallways, boxes, drawers, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03535))_
- This is the ability to sense and find traps set indoors, such as doors, hallways, boxes, drawers, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03535))_
- In the case of a success, please accurately tell them of the presence of the trap and the difficulty to disarm it, and in the case of a failure, or if a trap is not present in the first place, make sure to tell them that it cannot be found. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03536))_
- This check (success roll) is based on difficulty . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03536))_
- Never say no , even when there are no traps. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03536))_
- The fi nd ability is used by the thief to actively identify a location and determine if a trap is set there. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03536))_
- Sense is the ability to sense the presence of a trap based on past experience and knowledge without actively taking any action. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03537))_
- Traps that have been successfully sensed can always be found by attempting to fi nd them. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03537))_
- This is determined by making a success roll just before the trap is about to go off. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03537))_

> The fi nd ability is used by the thief to actively identify a location and determine if a trap is set there. This check (success roll) is based on difficulty . In the case of a success, please accurately tell them of the presence of the trap and the difficulty to disarm it, and in the case of a failure, or if a trap is not present in the first place, make sure to tell them that it cannot be found. Never say no , even when there are no traps.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03537))_

> If successful, the presence of a trap will be sensed at a perilous point, and the game master must inform the player of the type of trap.

## [ ⑰ Remove/Set Trap [Dexterity] ] (Equipment restriction, not retriable)

- Removal also involves attempting a success roll against the trap's difficulty. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03539))_
- You can attempt to remove traps discovered through fi nd . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03539))_
- Unless the game master has specifically set traps that are easy to find but difficult to remove , or conversely, difficult to find but easy to remove , the difficulty of finding and removing should be the same. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03540))_
- The effect of an activated trap depends on the type of trap. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03540))_
- Traps that you fail to find cannot be removed. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03540))_
- Unless the game master has specifically set traps that are easy to find but difficult to remove , or conversely, difficult to find but easy to remove , the difficulty of finding and removing should be the same. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03540))_
- If a third party attempts to sense , find , or remove a trap set by a player, the game master must attempt a success roll on their behalf. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03541))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03539))_

> You can attempt to remove traps discovered through fi nd . Removal also involves attempting a success roll against the trap's difficulty.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03540))_

> If you fail, the trap will be activated if the dice roll was 6 or more beneath the target score.

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03540))_

> Unless the game master has specifically set traps that are easy to find but difficult to remove , or conversely, difficult to find but easy to remove , the difficulty of finding and removing should be the same. If you fail, the trap will be activated if the dice roll was 6 or more beneath the target score. The effect of an activated trap depends on the type of trap. Traps that you fail to find cannot be removed.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03541))_

> For set , you can set traps up to a difficulty equal to your thief skill level without failing (you cannot set traps of a higher level).

## 6.3

## Ranger Skill

- Owners of the ranger skill demonstrate a variety of abilities in outdoor activities, as explained below. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03545))_

## [ ② First-Aid [-] ] (No equipment restriction)

- The ranger skill is also limited by equipment, just like the thief skill, if you want to make full use of its abilities. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03547))_
- The armor you wear must have a required strength of up to half your own strength, and must be ring mail or non-metal _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03547))_
- The ranger skill is also limited by equipment, just like the thief skill, if you want to make full use of its abilities. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03547))_
- The ranger skill has some similar abilities to the thief skill. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03548))_
- However, while the thief skill can be used both outdoors and indoors, the ranger skill is mostly useful only outdoors. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03548))_
- However, while the thief skill can be used both outdoors and indoors, the ranger skill is mostly useful only outdoors. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03548))_

## [ ① Footprint Tracking [Intelligence] ] (No equipment restriction, not retriable)

- The game master determines the difficulty by taking into account factors such as the condition of the ground and the amount of time that has passed since the footprints were made. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03567))_
- This is the ability to track footprints left on the ground. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03567))_
- The game master determines the difficulty by taking into account factors such as the condition of the ground and the amount of time that has passed since the footprints were made. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03567))_
- First-aid provided by a ranger will restore your life force to 1 point, allowing you to regain consciousness. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03568))_
- If an adventurer's life force falls to 0 or less due to wounds, it will not recover naturally and there is a risk of death if left untreated. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03568))_
- It cannot fail, but it will take about 30 minutes of game time, and it cannot be done while in a state where you can't focus, such as in the middle of combat, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03568))_
- It cannot fail, but it will take about 30 minutes of game time, and it cannot be done while in a state where you can't focus, such as in the middle of combat, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03568))_

## [ ③ Camouflage [Intelligence] ] (Equipment restriction)

- This is the ability to hide behind rocks, hide in bushes, or use such things to hide something. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03570))_
- Since it's an ability that uses natural terrain, it cannot be used indoors. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03570))_

## [ ④ Listen [Intelligence] ] (Equipment restriction)

- This is handed the same way as the thief's ability. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03573))_
- Rangers can listen to even the smallest sounds and can choose the sound they want to hear from a wide range of sounds. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03573))_

## [ ⑤ Sense Danger [Intelligence]] (No equipment restriction)

- The target score is determined by the game master depending on the situation, but in general it should be set high. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03575))_
- Rangers acquire a good intuition, which can be called a sixth sense. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03575))_
- This ability is the ability used to sense when danger is approaching. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03575))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03575))_

> For example, when you walk through a ravine and see a pebble fall, you may feel like a landslide is about to occur, or you may feel an arrow flying from the darkness.

## [ ⑥ Stealthy Step [Agility] ] (Equipment restriction)

- This is handled the same way as the thief skill's ability. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03577))_
- Rangers can walk silently and unnoticed. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03577))_

## [ ⑦ Survivalism [Life Force] ] (No equipment restriction)

- Rangers have acquired the ability to endure difficult situations brought about by disaster, such as surviving with only a small amount of water or avoiding freezing to death in winter mountains, and either survive until help arrives or escape from a predicament on their own. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03579))_
- Rangers have acquired the ability to endure difficult situations brought about by disaster, such as surviving with only a small amount of water or avoiding freezing to death in winter mountains, and either survive until help arrives or escape from a predicament on their own. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03579))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03579))_

## [ ⑧ Search [Intelligence] ] (No equipment restriction, not retriable)

- Since it's an ability that relies on feeling out of place in nature, it can only be used outdoors. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03582))_
- This is the ability to search for hidden things. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03582))_
