## [ ⑨ Map Creation [Intelligence]] (No equipment restriction, not retriable)

- When creating a map, the game master determines a difficulty, and a success roll must be made to determine whether or not the map was drawn correctly. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03584))_
- Rangers have a good sense of direction and can map out the places they've been. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03584))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03584))_

> You can also determine direction from the position of the sun or stars.

## [ ⑩ Weather Prediction [Intelligence] ] (No equipment restriction, not retriable)

- This is because failure means that the weather is unpredictable, and this is also very clear to the characters as well. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03586))_
- Rangers have the ability to predict the weather. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03586))_
- From these combinations, you can roughly predict the weather. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03586))_

- Normally you would use a target score. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03586))_
- Rangers can measure the humidity using their own senses, and they also use small knowledge such as birds that eat small insects such as flies fly close to the ground = no updraft = thick clouds = rain . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03586))_
- Rangers can measure the humidity using their own senses, and they also use small knowledge such as birds that eat small insects such as flies fly close to the ground = no updraft = thick clouds = rain . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03586))_
- This is because failure means that the weather is unpredictable, and this is also very clear to the characters as well. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03586))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03586))_

> Rangers have the ability to predict the weather. Rangers can measure the humidity using their own senses, and they also use small knowledge such as birds that eat small insects such as flies fly close to the ground = no updraft = thick clouds = rain . From these combinations, you can roughly predict the weather. If a ranger succeeds on a success roll against a set target score using ranger skill level + intelligence bonus as the baseline score, the ranger can roughly predict the weather (sunny, 

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03587))_

> If you attempt to use this ability and fail the success roll, you simply cannot predict the weather; it does not predict the opposite.

## [ ⑪ Plant and Animal Check [Intelligence] ] (No equipment restriction, not retriable)

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03589))_

> Rangers can determine what animals and plants they see.

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03589))_

> Rangers can determine what animals and plants they see. When an animal or plant appears as a monster, you can make a success roll using its rarity as the target score, similar to the sage skill's monster check ability (the sage skill's abilities are explained later on page 118).

> In other cases (such as searching for herbs), the game master should determine a target score for the check.

## [ ⑫ Projectile Use [Dexterity, Strength] ] (No equipment restriction)

- The ranger skill is treated the same as the fighter skill (attack power, bonus damage modifiers) only when attacking with projectiles. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03592))_
- The ranger skill is not relevant to the use of or defense from melee weapons. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03592))_
- When using the thief skill for defense, you must be lightly armed (required strength of weapons and armor must be half your own strength or less). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03592))_
- The ranger skill is treated the same as the fighter skill (attack power, bonus damage modifiers) only when attacking with projectiles. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03592))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03592))_

> You can use any projectile as long as your strength allows it.

## [ ⑬ Follow [Agility] ] (Equipment restriction)

- However, it can only be used in nature. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03594))_
- This handled the same way as the thief skill's ability of the same name. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03594))_
- It cannot be used indoors or in a city. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03594))_
- However, it can only be used in nature. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03594))_

## [ ⑮ Find/Sense Trap [Intelligence]] (No equipment restriction, not retriable)

- Indoor mechanical traps cannot be found/sensed with the ranger skill. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03598))_
- This includes those that are made by tying grass into a ring, or are hung from a tree using string, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03598))_
- This is basically the same ability as that of the thief skill, but it only applies to traps that use outdoor nature. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03598))_
- This is basically the same ability as that of the thief skill, but it only applies to traps that use outdoor nature. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03598))_

## 6.4

- Academic fields in Sword World are undifferentiated, and owners of this skill are skilled in all disciplines. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03603))_
- The sage skill represents a comprehensive understanding and depth of knowledge in all academic fields. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03603))_
- Many sorcerers have this skill. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03603))_

> There is no requirement that you have to have the sage skill and the sorcerer skill at the same time, but if you do acquire the sage skill and the sorcerer skill at the same time, you will receive a bonus on experience points consumed.

## [ ① Monster Check [Intelligence]] (Not retriable)

- This includes knowledge of the various monsters that live in Alecrast. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03613))_
- Sages have a wide range of knowledge. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03613))_
- Using sage skill level + intelligence bonus as the baseline score, make a success roll with this rarity as the target score, and if you succeed, you know the monster. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03614))_
- Each monster has a score called rarity . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03614))_
- If the check fails, the character has no knowledge of the monster. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03615))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03613))_

> When a sage sees a monster or hears its name, this ability may allow them to discover its true identity.

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03614))_

> Each monster has a score called rarity . Using sage skill level + intelligence bonus as the baseline score, make a success roll with this rarity as the target score, and if you succeed, you know the monster.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03615))_

## [ ② Languages [Intelligence]]

## Sage Skill

- However, runes cannot be chosen. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03620))_
- You can also write in any language that you can read and speak. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03620))_
- Even in the same language, being able to read and speak is different, so if you want to become proficient in one language, you need 2 levels of experience. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03620))_
- As an optional rule, you can set a target score or difficulty for text or conversations so that it cannot be understood if you fail a success roll. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03620))_
- The player chooses which language to learn, along with whether they will speak or read it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03620))_
- Characters who cannot read common must fi rst learn how to read common before learning other languages. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03621))_
- Then, a character who cannot read low ancient (but has learned common) must learn to read low ancient before learning any other language. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03621))_
- There are limitations to learning languages through the sage skill. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03621))_
- Characters who cannot read common must fi rst learn how to read common before learning other languages. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03621))_
- Then, a character who cannot read low ancient (but has learned common) must learn to read low ancient before learning any other language. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03621))_
- There are limitations to learning languages through the sage skill. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03621))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03620))_

> The player chooses which language to learn, along with whether they will speak or read it. However, runes cannot be chosen. Even in the same language, being able to read and speak is different, so if you want to become proficient in one language, you need 2 levels of experience. You can also write in any language that you can read and speak. As an optional rule, you can set a target score or difficulty for text or conversations so that it cannot be understood if you fail a success roll.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03621))_

> If you can read both common and low ancient, you are free to learn subsequent languages.

## [ ③ Astrology [Intelligence] ] (Not retriable)

- It is entirely up to the game master to decide what kind of sign there is. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03624))_
- From the movement of celestial bodies, you can know the signs of events that will occur in the near future. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03624))_
- Solar and lunar eclipses rarely occur in Forcelia, but when they do, they are always a harbinger of something to come. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03624))_
- Signs should be given as rough information about the incident. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03624))_
- It's enough to let you know that a king passes away or that a major war is about to happen (you can think of it as just a headline in a newspaper, etc.). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03624))_
- However, this ability only allows you to know about events related to the country or the world, and when no events occur, no signs appear. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03624))_
- However, this ability only allows you to know about events related to the country or the world, and when no events occur, no signs appear. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03624))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03624))_

> You can also set a difficulty and ask for a success roll.

- There are two methods of making checks. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03627))_

## [ ⑤ Research [Intelligence] ] (Not retriable)

- When a sage fails a success roll on a check such as monster check , treasure appraisal (described below), or knowledge and is unable to figure it out, the sage can later find out by researching literature. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03631))_
- When a sage fails a success roll on a check such as monster check , treasure appraisal (described below), or knowledge and is unable to figure it out, the sage can later find out by researching literature. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03631))_
- Research basically takes about one week for each item (this may be increased or decreased at the game master's discretion). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03632))_
- Also, if you don't have a place with a wealth of literature (the best place is the academy of sages = sorcerers' guild in each city), research itself is impossible. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03632))_
- During this time, you cannot do much other than research. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03632))_
- When something they didn't know (something that failed) becomes a success, the sage has found a description of it in the literature and has access to that knowledge. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03633))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03631))_

> When a sage fails a success roll on a check such as monster check , treasure appraisal (described below), or knowledge and is unable to figure it out, the sage can later find out by researching literature.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03633))_

> If the research is successful, the sage may make another success roll.

- Those with the bard skill are knowledgeable about ancient folklore and poetry, and make a living by performing them. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03636))_
- If you use other instruments, you won't be able to use abilities that require an instrument. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03637))_
- Bards are free to choose any instrument, but only one type. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03637))_

## [ ⑥ Treasure Appraisal [Intelligence] ] (Not retriable)

- This ability is used to know the value and utility of treasure. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03642))_
- However, if the difference from the target score is 6 or greater, there is a possibility of this kind of misunderstanding. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03642))_
- For standard ancient kingdom treasure-- many of which are magical items --the target score is around 15. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03642))_
- The rarity of that treasure becomes the target score for a success roll. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03642))_
- If the true value is 100 gamels, you will not think that it's worth 10,000 gamels just because you failed the check. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03642))_
- If the true value is 100 gamels, you will not think that it's worth 10,000 gamels just because you failed the check. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03642))_
- Basically, these connoisseurs and specialty shops will only exist in large towns. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03643))_
- Also, any item can be picked up by a specialty shop for half the appraised value. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03643))_
- The price value determined by this ability is the price that a connoisseur (or obsessor) would accept, i.e., the maximum price. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03643))_
- Basically, these connoisseurs and specialty shops will only exist in large towns. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03643))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03642))_

> This ability is used to know the value and utility of treasure. The rarity of that treasure becomes the target score for a success roll. For standard ancient kingdom treasure-- many of which are magical items --the target score is around 15. Treat a failed treasure as being unable to determine the treasure's value, not as if you got the value wrong . If the true value is 100 gamels, you will not think that it's worth 10,000 gamels just because you failed the check. However, if the difference fro

> Alternatively, if it is something that can be used in combat, such as weapons or armor, other adventurers may purchase it.

## Bard Skill

## [ ① Sing [Mental Power] ]

- Heroic tales and love poems are used as subjects. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03650))_
- This is the art of singing songs. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03650))_
- Although they're called songs, unlike modern pop songs, most of them are melodies attached to legends and folklore. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03650))_
- Although they're called songs, unlike modern pop songs, most of them are melodies attached to legends and folklore. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03650))_

## [ ② Play Instrument [Dexterity]]

- This is the art of playing a musical instrument. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03652))_
- The higher the bard's level, the more skillful they will be at playing an instrument. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03652))_

## [ ⑦ Medicines [Intelligence]] ((Appraisal only) Not retriable)

- Sages can appraise unknown medicines and poisons, and can mix magical potions and poisons with various effects. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03654))_
- This ability represents knowledge of poisons and medicines. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03654))_
- You can make up to 10 doses at most. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03656))_
- Regardless of the result or dice roll, you will need materials and at least one week to attempt to create a medicine. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03656))_
- The target score for a poison which is able to kill people even in small amounts and be tasteless and odorless, is around 20. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03656))_
- Therefore, game masters should not allow PCs to create or use poisons. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03657))_
- In Alecrast, the creation and use of poison is considered shameful and inhumane . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03657))_
- Therefore, game masters should not allow PCs to create or use poisons. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03657))_
- Bards can earn bard skill level x bard skill level x 2D silver coins by singing and playing an instrument for about an hour in a suitable location (such as a tavern, etc.). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03659))_
- Bards can earn bard skill level x bard skill level x 2D silver coins by singing and playing an instrument for about an hour in a suitable location (such as a tavern, etc.). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03659))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03656))_

> To create medicines or poisons, the game master should set a target score depending on the type, and ask for a success roll check. The target score for a poison which is able to kill people even in small amounts and be tasteless and odorless, is around 20. Regardless of the result or dice roll, you will need materials and at least one week to attempt to create a medicine. You can make up to 10 doses at most.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03655))_

> When appraising medicines or poisons, a success roll must be made using their rarity as the target score.

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03655, source-range-de1806a5-03657))_

> When appraising medicines or poisons, a success roll must be made using their rarity as the target score. In Alecrast, the creation and use of poison is considered shameful and inhumane . Therefore, game masters should not allow PCs to create or use poisons.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03656))_

> To create medicines or poisons, the game master should set a target score depending on the type, and ask for a success roll check.

## [ ③ Languages (Spoken) [Intelligence] ]

- Unlike the sage skill, there is no restriction on the languages that can be learned. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03661))_
- In other words, bards can converse in languages other than their native language, but they cannot read (or write, of course) text. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03661))_
- This ability is almost the same as the sage skill's ability of the same name, but it only applies to speaking, not reading. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03661))_
- However, of course, you cannot learn runes. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03661))_
- Unlike the sage skill, there is no restriction on the languages that can be learned. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03661))_

- Musical instruments are always required to sing spellsongs. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03665))_
- A bard can learn one spellsong per skill level. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03666))_

## [ ⑤ Folklore Knowledge [Intelligence] ] (Not retriable)

- If the game master wants to provide the players with information in the form of ancient poems or folklore, please decide on a rarity and use it as the target score when making a success roll check. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03671))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03670))_

> By the nature of their business, a bard is familiar with myths and folklore passed down in various regions, as well as ancient poetry. This is because telling these stories is an important part of their job. Also, some of these legends include things that can serve as clues for your adventures. For example, a saga that tells of a battle between a monster and a hero may contain information about the monster's weakness. Legends about the ancient kingdom can sometimes lead adventurers to ancient ruins.

## Common Adventurer Abilities

- These abilities that any adventurer can acquire are called common adventurer abilities . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03674))_
- These common abilities use adventurer level + related ability bonus as the baseline score when making success roll checks. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03675))_

> The riding rules here apply when dealing with trained horses, such as riding horses, war horses, etc. When trying to ride a wild horse, you must first succeed on a success roll while attempting to mount it. If you want to control a wild horse in combat, etc. the target score is 11. If you consider the penalty for not having reins, it's effectively 15 .

If you want to control a wild horse in combat, etc. the target score is 11. If you consider the penalty for not having reins, it's effectivel

## [ ② Swim [Agility] ]

- Basically all adventurers can swim. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03689))_
- Therefore, you can swim across any pond that is about 25 meters in size. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03689))_
- Therefore, you can swim across any pond that is about 25 meters in size. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03689))_
- The game master must determine the target score by considering the difficulty of the action. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03690))_
- The player must make a success roll using adventurer level + agility bonus as the baseline score, and if they fail, they drown. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03690))_
- Also, in order to swim, you need to be as light as possible. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03691))_
- The target scores are 13 for ring mail, hard leather, and mithril chain mail , 15 for chain mail , and 19 for lamellar armor, splint armor, and plate armor . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03692))_
- To do so, you must succeed on a success roll using adventurer level + dexterity bonus as the baseline score. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03692))_
- Those who sink due to the weight of their armor can attempt to remove it underwater. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03692))_
- If you can't take off your armor in time, you'll drown. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03693))_
- An adventurer can only hold their breath underwater for a number of rounds equal to their life force. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03693))_
- Each round is 10 seconds long, so this success roll can only be made a number of times equal to your life force ÷ 6, or in other words, your life force bonus. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03693))_
- Each round is 10 seconds long, so this success roll can only be made a number of times equal to your life force ÷ 6, or in other words, your life force bonus. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03693))_
- An adventurer can only hold their breath underwater for a number of rounds equal to their life force. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03693))_
- If you're alive, you'll be able to breathe again if you're rescued and treated within 30 minutes. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03695))_
- If you're not rescued within 30 minutes, you will automatically die. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03695))_
- If you're alive, you'll be able to breathe again if you're rescued and treated within 30 minutes. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03695))_
- If you're not rescued within 30 minutes, you will automatically die. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03695))_

> Basically all adventurers can swim. Therefore, you can swim across any pond that is about 25 meters in size. There is no need for a success roll (some players may choose to say my character is sinking like a stone , but that's up to them).

The player must make a success roll using adventurer level + agility bonus as the baseline score, and if they fail, they drown.

> Heavy weapons and luggage also impede swimming. If you recklessly try to swim with a sword, spear, or ax, then using adventurer level + agility bonus as the baseline score, make a success roll against target score 13 (this can be increased or decreased depending on the weight of your belongings. Also, if the distance is long or there are rapids, add a few more points to the target score), and if you fail, you will sink. However, unlike armor, weapons can be easily discarded. Even when carrying something other than a weapon, the game master should consider its weight when determining the target score.

## [ ③ Ship Steering [Dexterity]]

- Adventurers can handle small boats using oars or poles. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03697))_
- However, sailing ships require the full-fledged sailor skill , and adventurer level cannot be used as a substitute. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03697))_
- In special cases such as avoiding collision with an approaching ship or surviving rapids , the adventurer operating the ship must succeed on a success roll using adventurer level + dexterity bonus as the baseline score. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03698))_
- The difficulty is determined by the game master. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03698))_
- If you fail, the boat will capsize. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03698))_
- Any adventurer can operate a small vessel (boat, raft, etc.) that is operated using oars or poles. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03698))_
- In special cases such as avoiding collision with an approaching ship or surviving rapids , the adventurer operating the ship must succeed on a success roll using adventurer level + dexterity bonus as the baseline score. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03698))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03697))_

> Adventurers can handle small boats using oars or poles. However, sailing ships require the full-fledged sailor skill , and adventurer level cannot be used as a substitute.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03698))_

> If you're just going straight through calm water, you don't need a success roll.

## [ ④ Climb [Agility] ]

- Climbing is both a common adventurer ability and a thief skill ability. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03700))_
- The latter allows for more advanced climbing challenges. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03700))_
- As a formality, a success roll should still be made, but a failure only occurs on double ones. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03701))_
- For details, please refer to Table 6-1: Climb by Skill. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03701))_
- First of all, climbing, which is a common ability of adventurers, always requires assistance such as rope. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03701))_
- As a formality, a success roll should still be made, but a failure only occurs on double ones. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03701))_
- First of all, climbing, which is a common ability of adventurers, always requires assistance such as rope. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03701))_
- The baseline score is thief skill level + agility bonus or adventurer level + agility bonus . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03703))_
- When someone with the thief skill climbs without a rope, or someone without the thief skill climbs with a rope, set the target score using Table 6-2: Determining Climb Target Scores and make a success roll check. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03703))_
- Determining the target score is almost the same in both cases. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03703))_
- Note that when a thief climbs up or down a wall or cliff without using a rope, the conditions marked * are not possible. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03704))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03701))_

> Climbing with the thief skill does not require rope assistance, and if you do have a rope, you can almost certainly climb.

## Example:

- The baseline score is adventurer level + agility bonus = 6 . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03706))_
- In other words, if he rolls 2D and gets a score of 10 or greater, he'll succeed at climbing. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03706))_
- The target score is 10+2+4= 16 taking into account the conditions of vertical cliff with a foothold and chain mail. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03706))_
- At this time, only double ones will result in a failure. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03708))_
- At this time, only double ones will result in a failure. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03708))_
- If the result of adding 2D-2 meters is greater than or equal to the distance required for the climb, consider the climb a success. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03709))_
- If you fall, please refer to Falling Damage below to determine the damage. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03709))_
- A check must be made every 10 meters. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03709))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03706, source-range-de1806a5-03709))_

> An adventurer with adventurer level 4 and an agility bonus +2, attempts to climb a vertical natural cliff using a rope. He's wearing chain mail armor. The baseline score is adventurer level + agility bonus = 6 . The target score is 10+2+4= 16 taking into account the conditions of vertical cliff with a foothold and chain mail. In other words, if he rolls 2D and gets a score of 10 or greater, he'll succeed at climbing. A check must be made every 10 meters. If you fail on the way, add 2D-2 meters t

> If this adventurer is a thief, he can remove and discard the heavy armor he is wearing, and he can use his thief skill to attempt the climb more safely.

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03708))_

> If this adventurer is a thief, he can remove and discard the heavy armor he is wearing, and he can use his thief skill to attempt the climb more safely. At this time, only double ones will result in a failure.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03709))_

> If you fail on the way, add 2D-2 meters to the height you climbed and height you descended up to that point to determine the final height you climbed and descended.

## Example 1:

- In this case, a success roll is attempted three times. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03711))_
- Now he rolls 2D and gets a 5. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03711))_
- 5 - 2 = 3 meters is added to the 20 meters from the two attempts, which means he has climbed 23 meters . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03711))_
- The first and second attempts are successful, but the third attempt fails. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03711))_
- 5 - 2 = 3 meters is added to the 20 meters from the two attempts, which means he has climbed 23 meters . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03711))_

## Example 2:

- If the result of the 2D rolled to check the distance the adventurer climbed was double ones or 3 , the adventurer would've fallen from a height of 20 or 21 meters . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03713))_

## Falling Damage

- If an adventurer falls, damage will be determined as follows. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03715))_
- The adventurer will suffer this damage to their life force. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03716))_
- First, fall height x 3 is the base damage. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03716))_
- However, an adventurer can reduce this damage depending on their adventurer level and armor. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03717))_
- If the defense roll comes up double ones , all damage reduction is lost, including adventurer level. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03717))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03715))_

> If an adventurer falls, damage will be determined as follows.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03717))_

> Just like when reducing damage in weapon combat, make a defense roll using the armor's defense power as the key number, and add your adventurer level to the result to determine the damage reduced.

## Base Target Score = 10

- The base damage minus this damage reduction is the actual damage the adventurer suffers. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03721))_
- Base falling damage (fall height x 3) is for falling on normal ground. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03723))_
- On the other hand, if you have something like spikes sticking out, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03723))_
- This decision should be made by the game master. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03723))_
- If the result of this subtraction is 0 or less, even if the thief falls, they can land cleanly on their feet or stand up in one motion. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03724))_
- Owners of the thief skill can greatly reduce this damage with their tumble ability. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03724))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03720, source-range-de1806a5-03724))_

> *This condition is not possible to climb with the thief skill (not using a rope) Owners of the thief skill can greatly reduce this damage with their tumble ability. If an owner of the thief skill falls, the height can be calculated by subtracting thief skill level + agility bonus meters from the height of the fall. If the result of this subtraction is 0 or less, even if the thief falls, they can land cleanly on their feet or stand up in one motion.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03722))_

> Falling damage = fall height x 3 (defense roll result + adventurer level)

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03723))_

> Base falling damage (fall height x 3) is for falling on normal ground. If you fall on soft grass or on the water surface, calculate by reducing factors, such as fall height x 2 , fall height x 1 , etc. On the other hand, if you have something like spikes sticking out, etc. increase the factor to increase the damage. This decision should be made by the game master.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03724))_

> If an owner of the thief skill falls, the height can be calculated by subtracting thief skill level + agility bonus meters from the height of the fall.

## Example:

- A thief with thief skill level 3 and dexterity bonus +2 can fall from a height of 5 meters or less without suffering any damage. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03726))_

## [ ⑤ Long Jump/High Jump [Agility] ]

- Long jump and high jump are common adventurer abilities, and are also abilities of the thief skill. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03729))_
- The latter allows you to jump farther and higher. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03729))_
- The baseline score is thief skill level + agility bonus or adventurer level + agility bonus (Table 6-3: Determining Long Jump Target Scores). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03729))_
- To attempt a pole high jump, you will need a pole that is about the same length as the height you are attempting to jump (Table 6-4: Determining High Jump Target Scores). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03730))_
- In this case, the distance you can jump will be further improved. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03730))_
- However, to attempt a pole long jump, you need a pole that is at least half as long as the distance you are attempting to jump. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03730))_
- In addition, the thief skill allows you to attempt pole long jumps and pole high jumps using a long pole. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03730))_

## Example 1:

- The baseline score is 6 , so anything other than double sixes is a failure. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03732))_
- A narrow rocky area continues, but eventually it is interrupted by a 7 meter long chasm. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03732))_
- Below is boiling lava. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03732))_
- An adventurer with adventurer level 4, agility bonus +2, wearing chain mail, is in a cave beneath a volcano. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03732))_
- At this time, considering the following conditions: 7 meter width , chain mail , the rocky area is too narrow to make a proper run-up , and death is inevitable if you fall , the target score is 20+4+2+2= 28. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03732))_

## Example 2:

- The adventurer throws away his luggage and takes on a light outfit with only a short sword strapped to his waist. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03734))_
- The adventurer has 1 level in the thief skill. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03734))_
- The baseline score is 3, so it's a success if he rolls 8 or greater on 2D. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03734))_
- The target score at this time is 9 + 0 - 2 + 2 + 2 = 11 , taking into account the following conditions: 7 meters wide , no armor , no luggage , insufficient run-up , and danger . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03734))_
- Thinking it'd be impossible to jump like this, he takes off his heavy chain mail. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03734))_
- This will allow him to utilize his thief skill. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03734))_
- The adventurer throws away his luggage and takes on a light outfit with only a short sword strapped to his waist. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03734))_
- It usually doesn't cause much damage, and if you're a thief, you'll be able to land it perfectly. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03735))_
- However, this can be a problem if the ground you jump over is significantly lower than the ground you took off from. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03735))_
- Jumping over obstacles with a high jump does not guarantee a safe landing. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03735))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03734))_

## Chapter 7:

## 7.1

## Notes on General Skills

## The Difference Between General Skills and Adventurer Skills

- Of course, the opposite is also true. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03746))_
- The details will be explained later, but the abilities of the two actually overlap quite a bit, and a good ranger can also become a good hunter. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03746))_
- This is because the hunter skill and the ranger skill are completely different things. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03747))_
- This is because the hunter skill and the ranger skill are completely different things. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03747))_
- The reason for this is that the hunter skill is a general skill, while the ranger skill is, as precisely called, an adventurer skill. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03749))_
- Of course, adventurer skills are the necessary skills to live as an adventurer. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03750))_
- However, the biggest difference between the two is whether or not you can become a protagonist-- called a hero -who appears in fantasy novels, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03750))_
- General skills, so to speak, can be said to be the skills necessary for daily life. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03750))_

## 7.2

- In other words, adventurer level can even be called hero level. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03752))_
- higher your adventurer level, the more qualified you are to be called a hero. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03752))_
- People with higher levels in general skills should also be given due respect. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03753))_
- Of course, being a hunter is also a respectable profession, so you should never look down on it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03753))_
- Therefore, a good ranger has the potential to be called a hero by the people, but a hunter, no matter how good he is, has a hard time getting people to recognize him as a hero. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03753))_
- However, they are not called heroes. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03753))_
- They are unrelated to these adventures . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03753))_
- Therefore, a good ranger has the potential to be called a hero by the people, but a hunter, no matter how good he is, has a hard time getting people to recognize him as a hero. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03753))_
- For example, the famous playwright William Tell, who was just a hunter, was considered a hero for shooting an apple off his child's head. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03754))_
- In such cases, it is okay to grant adventurer skills to masters of general skills. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03754))_
- However, basically in Sword World RPG , only those who are masters of adventurer skills are worthy of being called heroes. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03754))_
- If you understand this mentality, then on the other hand, it would be acceptable to recognize adventurer skills for skills that would be called heroes. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03754))_
- If you understand this mentality, then on the other hand, it would be acceptable to recognize adventurer skills for skills that would be called heroes. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03754))_
- For example, the famous playwright William Tell, who was just a hunter, was considered a hero for shooting an apple off his child's head. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03754))_
- However, basically in Sword World RPG , only those who are masters of adventurer skills are worthy of being called heroes. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03754))_

## Merchant Skill

- This is a skill related to trade. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03757))_
- A person holding this is given the right to open a shop in public. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03757))_

- Merchants are usually issued a merchant's pass by the king as proof of their status. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03757))_

## Craftsman Skill

- In Sword World , all production is done by hand. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03782))_
- There are craftsmen who make furniture, and there are also blacksmiths who make weapons. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03783))_
- It is illegal for anyone outside a guild to make products handled by that guild. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03783))_
- Also, a craftsman must belong to a guild. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03783))_
- Of course, items made by skilled craftsmen will be more expensive, and items that are not made by skilled craftsmen will be cheaper . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03783))_
- These techniques are secretly taught from master to apprentice, and care is taken to ensure that no secret techniques are leaked. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03783))_
- Naturally, there are many different types of craftsmen. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03783))_
- Products made by craftsmen are picked up by merchants and displayed in their shops. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03783))_

## [ ① Craft [Dexterity] ]

- If a craftsman devotes the appropriate amount of time to production (which varies depending on the price and quality of the item they're making), they will be able to create a product that complies with their level. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03788))_
- Items made by high level craftsmen are naturally of high quality. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03788))_
- To put it simply, this is a technique for creating items. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03788))_
- Of course, prices will also go up. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03788))_
- Of course, depending on the item, you may need tools and equipment. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03788))_
- The finished product will be picked up by a merchant at half the price listed on the price list. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03788))_
- It's up to the game master to decide what bonuses to give to these high-quality, expensive items. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03788))_
- Success rolls are not required to create items of normal quality, but success rolls are required for weapon The price will increase or decrease by about 3% for every 1 point of difference in the final score. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03789))_

## Healer Skill

- However, there are not that many rune masters, so in most cases it is the job of doctors called healers to heal injuries and illnesses. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03798))_
- Since there's magic in the world of Sword World , medicine has not made much progress. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03798))_
- Healers are knowledgeable in basic medicine and herbs, and are able to provide appropriate treatment for injuries and illnesses. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03798))_

- Please refer to the ranger skill. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03803))_

## 7.5

## [ ② Treatment [Intelligence]]

- Healers can help a wounded person recover their life force naturally. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03806))_
- This is the ability to appropriately treat illnesses and injuries and aid in their recovery. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03806))_
- When a healer is nursing, use the Rating Table with healer skill level as the key number. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03807))_
- If the result when using the Rating Table is double ones , there will be no recovery at all (the treatment method was poor, and the result was not good). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03807))_
- The patient can recover life force equal to the result plus the healer's intelligence bonus. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03807))_
- It takes at least one hour to use this ability. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03808))_

## Hunter Skill

- The hunter skill is the skill needed to hunt. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03811))_
- Additionally, even those who do not specialize in hunting but do it as a hobby or side job still possess this skill. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03811))_
- People who own this skill are called hunters, and people called hunters own this skill. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03811))_
- To use this skill, you are subject to the same equipment restrictions as when using the ranger skill. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03812))_

## [ ① Large Ship Steering [Intelligence] ]

- As a major premise, large ships (fishing ships, trading ships, battleships, etc.) cannot be operated by one person. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03844))_
- For these ships, at least half of the crew must have the sailor skill. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03844))_
- Even if a large ship fails, it will not sink immediately, but it will likely suffer some damage. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03845))_
- In this case, make a success roll using the captain's sailor skill level + intelligence bonus as the baseline score. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03845))_
- At this time, the captain can also give instructions to the helmsman. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03845))_
- In order to perform delicate maneuvers such as surviving a storm , avoiding a reef , and ramming an enemy ship , the person at the helm must succeed on a success roll using their sailor skill level + intelligence bonus as the baseline score. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03845))_
- In order to perform delicate maneuvers such as surviving a storm , avoiding a reef , and ramming an enemy ship , the person at the helm must succeed on a success roll using their sailor skill level + intelligence bonus as the baseline score. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03845))_

## Sailor Skill

## [ ② Seamanship [Intelligence] ]

- Sailors have the ability to know direction by looking at the stars on the sea at night, and to identify dangerous areas where reefs are likely to exist. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03848))_
- The difficulty or target score is determined by the game master each time. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03848))_
- The game master should ask for a success roll check for such actions using sailor skill level + intelligence bonus as the baseline score. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03848))_

## [ ③ Small Ship Steering [Dexterity] ]

- The difficulty is determined by the game master. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03850))_
- In special cases such as avoiding collision with an approaching ship or surviving rapids , you must succeed on a success roll using sailor skill level + dexterity bonus as the baseline score. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03850))_
- This is the ability to handle small boats that are moved by poles or oars, and move them as desired. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03850))_
- If you fail, the boat will capsize. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03850))_
- In special cases such as avoiding collision with an approaching ship or surviving rapids , you must succeed on a success roll using sailor skill level + dexterity bonus as the baseline score. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03850))_

- Sailors have the ability to swim. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03852))_

- Sailors are able to sensitively feel and predict changes in the weather while out at sea. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03854))_

## [ ⑥ Climb [Agility] ] (Equipment restriction)

- This is handled in the same way as that of the thief skill. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03856))_
- Sailors have the ability to climb in order to perform actions such as ascending masts or stretched nets. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03856))_
- Sailors have the ability to climb in order to perform actions such as ascending masts or stretched nets. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03856))_

## [ ⑦ Ropework [Dexterity] ]

- At this time, the game master should decide the difficulty or target score, taking into consideration the tightness of the knot and the time it'll take. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03858))_
- A sailor can untie a knot by succeeding on a success roll using sailor skill level + dexterity bonus as the baseline score. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03858))_
- Sailors have the ability to tie ropes at will so that they do not unravel or, conversely, quickly unravel. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03858))_
- A rope that a sailor tied to keep it from coming undone should have a difficulty equal to the sailor's skill level if someone attempts to untie it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03859))_

## 8.1

## Experience Points

- Experience points are points given to characters as an indicator of how much experience they have gained as a result of their adventures. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03868))_
- Character growth is done using these experience points. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03868))_

## 8.2

## How to Use Experience Points: Increasing Skill Levels

- However, in any case, a character's skill level can only reach 10th level. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03872))_
- A character can advance in any number of skills and by any number of levels at once. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03872))_
- At the end of an adventure, characters gain experience points. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03872))_
- However, in any case, a character's skill level can only reach 10th level. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03872))_
- The experience points required to increase each skill are shown on Table 81: Experience Points by Skill. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03873))_

## Example:

- He would like to increase his fighter skill level, which is currently 2, to 3rd level. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03875))_
- The adventurer Ducard II gains 5000 experience points as a result of his adventure. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03875))_
- He still has 3000 experience points left. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03875))_
- At this time, the required experience points are 2000 points. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03875))_
- There are 500 experience points left. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03875))_
- The experience points required for this are 1000 + 1500 = 2500 points. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03875))_
- It may seem strange to carry over experience , but think of it as cutting off the adventurer's growth by the amount of experience points carried over for now. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03876))_
- Any remaining experience points can be carried over and used in addition to the experience points earned on the next adventure. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03876))_

## Example:

- Ducard II will keep 500 experience points for future use. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03878))_
- You also cannot sell your skill levels for experience points. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03879))_
- Experience points cannot be negative. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03879))_
- This is because you can't grow from experiences you haven't had. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03879))_
- This is because you can't grow from experiences you haven't had. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03879))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03879))_

> Experience points cannot be negative. This is because you can't grow from experiences you haven't had. You also cannot sell your skill levels for experience points.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03878))_

> If he gains 5000 experience points again on his next adventure, he can now use his 5500 experience points to advance.

## 8.2.1 Sorcerer Skill and

## Sage Skill

- There is a close connection between the sorcerer skill and the sage skill. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03883))_
- The sorcerer skill is the mastery of ancient through study and the improvement of magical ability, while the sage skill is knowledge gained primarily through the study of ancient books. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03883))_
- These two skills have something in common in that their basics are the study of ancient as well as ancient books. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03884))_
- In fact, many sorcerers are excellent sages, and the sorcerers' guild is also called the academy of sages . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03884))_
- For this reason, a character can spend fewer experience points only when acquiring both the sorcerer and sage skills. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03885))_
- For this reason, a character can spend fewer experience points only when acquiring both the sorcerer and sage skills. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03885))_
- When a character who already has the sorcerer skill acquires the sage skill at the same level or lower, or when a character who already has the sage skill acquires the sorcerer skill at the same level or lower, the amount of experience points spent can be reduced depending on the skill level. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03886))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03887))_

> Please see the rightmost column of Table 8-1: Experience Points by Skill.

## Example 1:

- Suppose a character has a 3rd level sorcerer skill and a 1st level sage skill and increases his sage skill to 2nd level. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03889))_
- At this time, the newly acquired sage skill level 2 is lower than the already acquired sorcerer skill level 3 , so he can acquire it for fewer experience points. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03889))_

## 8.3

- To increase dexterity , agility , intelligence , or strength by 1 point, humans need 3000 experience points and non-human _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03901))_

## Increasing General Skills

- General skills are not necessary for adventurer characters. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03906))_
- However, providing general skills may lead to individualization of a character and expand the range of role-playing . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03906))_
- Therefore, no matter how much experience you might gain through adventuring, it would be silly for it to result in you being able to grow fine eggplant (increase in farmer skill) or result in you being able to have lots of repeat customers (increase in bartender skill). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03907))_
- Therefore, no matter how much experience you might gain through adventuring, it would be silly for it to result in you being able to grow fine eggplant (increase in farmer skill) or result in you being able to have lots of repeat customers (increase in bartender skill). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03907))_
- All decisions are made by the game master. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03909))_
- It's only acceptable to increase the level of a general skill if you've used that specific general skill for a long period of time. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03909))_
- It's only acceptable to increase the level of a general skill if you've used that specific general skill for a long period of time. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03909))_

- Of course, different people will pick up different jobs at different speeds, but anyone would have gained some experience in that time. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03910))_
- He has no choice but to work as a shop clerk. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03910))_

- 5th level signifies being sufficient at a general skill, so consider reaching levels beyond that to take a large amount of effort. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03912))_
- Doing something casually in your free time would probably only let you get to 3rd level. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03912))_
- Doing something casually in your free time would probably only let you get to 3rd level. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03912))_

## Setting Target Scores and Difficulties

- To make a success roll, you must decide on the skill to be used , the relevant ability score , and the target score or difficulty . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03926))_
- There is no problem with things that are clearly stipulated in the rules, such as climbing, hit checks in combat, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03926))_
- but things that are not will have to be set by the game master each time they are needed. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03926))_
- The problem is the target score or difficulty. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03926))_
- Of these, skill and ability score should be clear immediately as long as you understand the abilities included under each skill. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03926))_
- There is no problem with things that are clearly stipulated in the rules, such as climbing, hit checks in combat, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03926))_
- This table is written in a somewhat abstract format to accommodate all success rolls. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03929))_

## Should You Use a Target Score Check or a Difficulty Check?

- There are two types of success rolls: those that use a target score for the check and those that use a difficulty for the check. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03933))_
- The game master must decide which of these should be used to make the success roll. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03933))_
- Checks for actions with clear successes or failures are made using target scores . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03934))_
- If you succeed, you can jump over it, and if you fail, you will fall. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03934))_
- For example, if you want to jump over a cliff, success or failure is clear. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03934))_
- For example, if you want to jump over a cliff, success or failure is clear. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03934))_
- An example of something where success or failure cannot be determined is finding a trap. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03935))_
- Even though it looks like it's a success, the monster may actually be pretending to be asleep. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03935))_
- When a trap is not found, a character has no way of knowing whether there really are no traps or if it's because they couldn't find it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03935))_
- When a trap is not found, a character has no way of knowing whether there really are no traps or if it's because they couldn't find it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03935))_
- If you can fail on a success roll but still have it appear to be a success, then the success roll should be made as a difficulty check. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03936))_
- If you can fail on a success roll but still have it appear to be a success, then the success roll should be made as a difficulty check. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03936))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03933, source-range-de1806a5-03935))_

> There are two types of success rolls: those that use a target score for the check and those that use a difficulty for the check. The game master must decide which of these should be used to make the success roll. An example of something where success or failure cannot be determined is finding a trap. When a trap is not found, a character has no way of knowing whether there really are no traps or if it's because they couldn't find it. The same goes for when you're sneaking up on a sleeping monste

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03934))_

> The standard for deciding is whether the character can tell if the action succeeded or failed .

## Should the Difficulty Be Clear?

- At this time, if you don't know the difficulty, it'll be difficult to guess. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03938))_
- During a difficulty check, it is up to the game master to decide whether or not to reveal the difficulty. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03938))_
- When a player makes a success roll, they use the baseline score (skill level + ability bonus) and the final score attained from the dice roll to infer the success or failure of the action. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03938))_
- However, the difficulty should be made as clear as possible. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03938))_
- In this case, the final score of his success roll is 13. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03939))_
- However, this is not possible without knowing the difficulty. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03940))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03938))_

> During a difficulty check, it is up to the game master to decide whether or not to reveal the difficulty. However, the difficulty should be made as clear as possible. When a player makes a success roll, they use the baseline score (skill level + ability bonus) and the final score attained from the dice roll to infer the success or failure of the action. At this time, if you don't know the difficulty, it'll be difficult to guess.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03939))_

> If the difficulty is clear, let's say it's 3, players can infer that they can only fail when the game master rolls an 11 or 12.

## 9.3

- For example, suppose one mansion has a difficulty 5 trap and a difficulty 6 trap. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03942))_
- For example, suppose one mansion has a difficulty 5 trap and a difficulty 6 trap. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03942))_
- That alone will make players wary. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03943))_
- In such cases, it is better to keep the difficulty low. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03943))_
- A technique for creating scenarios is to keep the difficulty consistent for success rolls that are likely to be made frequently in one scenario, such as finding traps. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03943))_
- A technique for creating scenarios is to keep the difficulty consistent for success rolls that are likely to be made frequently in one scenario, such as finding traps. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03943))_
- If you really want to include traps with different difficulties, then when the difficulty changes, just nonchalantly say Okay, make a success roll without telling _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03944))_
- If you really want to include traps with different difficulties, then when the difficulty changes, just nonchalantly say Okay, make a success roll without telling _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03944))_

> The time when you should not reveal the difficulty is when revealing the difficulty itself would indicate that something is wrong .

## General Modifiers

- For example, trying to find things in situations with little light can be difficult. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03947))_
- Success rolls may have modifiers applied to them. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03947))_
- For example, trying to find things in situations with little light can be difficult. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03947))_
- This situation can be reflected in the target score or difficulty, but there is also a way to deal with it by modifying the final score of the success roll. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03948))_
- The advantage of dealing with this through modifiers is that it is simpler and easier to maintain fairness. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03948))_
- Suppose there are three people: a human, an elf (shaman), and a dwarf. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03949))_

## 9.4

- Also, since the modifiers are reflected in the final score, the advantage is that you can also see who did the best search. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03951))_
- In this case, instead of the game master looking at the Determining Target Scores or Difficulties table for each , it's easier to deal with it by setting one target score, assuming there is complete light, and applying -4 to the human because they can't see, -2 to the elf (shaman) because they can use infravision, and no modifier to the dwarf because they have full darkvision. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03951))_

## Automatic Success Restrictions

- No matter how difficult an action is, there is a 1 in 36 chance of success. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03955))_
- This is a rule for game-like fun. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03955))_
- A success roll of double sixes is defined as an automatic success. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03955))_
- A success roll of double sixes is defined as an automatic success. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03955))_
- However, it would be unnatural if even something that seems so impossible has a 1 in 36 chance of success. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03956))_
- In Sword World RPG , those with a high thief skill can jump them the difficulty. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03957))_
- The world record for the long jump is just under 9 meters. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03957))_
- Players will probably think it's the same difficulty as before. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03957))_
- Then, after it becomes clear that their success roll was a failure, it'll turn out that the difficulty was actually high. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03957))_
- Then, after it becomes clear that their success roll was a failure, it'll turn out that the difficulty was actually high. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03957))_

- In order for the game to proceed smoothly, it is important for the game master to gain the trust of the players. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03959))_
- Therefore, the greater the negative number, the more difficult it is. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03960))_

- Therefore, the greater the negative number, the more difficult it is. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03960))_
