## 10.1

## NPC and Monster Action Announcement

- In combat, the planned actions of NPCs and monsters must be announced at the beginning of the round. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03973))_
- The game master must manage the actions of NPCs and monsters. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03973))_
- At this time, the game master does not need to make a specific announcement. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03974))_
- All they have to do is tell you what you can understand from the character's perspective. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03974))_
- However, that does not mean that you can make loose announcements and change them depending on the situation. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03976))_
- However, the game master should decide in advance which actions they are going to take. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03977))_
- For example, it's correct to announce the planned action of a hellhound with the ability to breathe fire by saying, I'm about to do something with my mouth wide open… The characters have no way of knowing if the hellhound is about to bite them or breathe fire. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03977))_
- For example, it's correct to announce the planned action of a hellhound with the ability to breathe fire by saying, I'm about to do something with my mouth wide open… The characters have no way of knowing if the hellhound is about to bite them or breathe fire. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03977))_

## Combat in Special Situations

- Combat often occurs in unusual locations, such as in the dark, on poor footing, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03980))_
- If the same conditions apply to monsters, the same penalty (bonus) will be given to the monster's attack and evasion points. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03980))_
- In such cases, a penalty (sometimes a bonus) is given to an adventurer's attack power or evasion speed, depending on the situation. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03980))_
- Combat often occurs in unusual locations, such as in the dark, on poor footing, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03980))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03980))_

> Combat often occurs in unusual locations, such as in the dark, on poor footing, etc. In such cases, a penalty (sometimes a bonus) is given to an adventurer's attack power or evasion speed, depending on the situation. If the same conditions apply to monsters, the same penalty (bonus) will be given to the monster's attack and evasion points.

## 10.3

## Surprise Attacks

- On the Surprise Attack Check table, if this score is lower than the one in the monster column, the monster has a chance for a surprise They must not change things based on the circumstances, such as attacking with fangs if the character used the spell Counter Magic to increase their resistance, or breathing fire if the character used the spell Quickness to raise their agility (evasion speed). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03986))_
- The game master must roll 2D and add it to the monster level (the highest one in the case of a group). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03986))_
- This can lead to a loss of game fairness and may also spoil player motivation. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03986))_
- Next, all adventurers make a success roll using ranger skill level + intelligence bonus as the baseline score. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03986))_
- This should also be determined by the game master depending on the situation, but we've included Table 10-2: Surprise Attack Check as a reference. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03986))_
- On the Surprise Attack Check table, if this score is lower than the one in the monster column, the monster has a chance for a surprise They must not change things based on the circumstances, such as attacking with fangs if the character used the spell Counter Magic to increase their resistance, or breathing fire if the character used the spell Quickness to raise their agility (evasion speed). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03986))_
- attack, and if it's greater than the one in the adventurer column, the adventurers have a chance for a surprise attack. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03990))_

## Water Combat

- Depending on the situation, adventurers may have to fight in water. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03996))_
- If the water is chest-high, your freedom of movement is restricted and you suffer a -2 penalty on hit and evasion checks. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03997))_
- spellsongs will be unusable. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03998))_
- Other weapons and shields cannot be used. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03999))_
- If you are head-deep in water, you suffer a -4 penalty on hit and evasion checks. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-03999))_

## Attacks Against the Sleeping

## Rules for Sleeping Monsters

- If you fail, the monster will sense your presence and wake up immediately. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04006))_
- To get within 5 meters of a sleeping monster, you must successfully perform the thief skill stealthy step . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04006))_
- If you succeed on a success roll using thief skill level + dexterity bonus as the baseline score, the monster will not wake up. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04006))_
- To get within 5 meters of a sleeping monster, you must successfully perform the thief skill stealthy step . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04006))_
- If you are attacking with the thief skill, your critical target will be -2. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04008))_
- Furthermore, when making a damage check, you can reduce the weapon's critical target by -1. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04008))_
- It will probably become angry and counterattack the adventurer starting on the next round. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04009))_
- If there is combat, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04010))_
- going on in the surrounding area or a loud noise is made, the monster will wake up immediately. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04010))_
- attack will incur a -4 penalty to evasion speed (points). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04011))_
- you cast Water Breathing , you will drown if you do not reach the surface within this number of rounds. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04012))_
- you cast Water Breathing , you will drown if you do not reach the surface within this number of rounds. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04012))_
- However, creatures that live underwater, such as mermen, do not suffer any penalties other than weapon restrictions. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04013))_
- Some creatures, such as hydra and scylla, can act both in water and on land without penalty. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04013))_
- If the opponent you're fighting is a creature that lives on land, such as a human, they will suffer the same penalty. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04013))_
- Conversely, these creatures become slower on land and typically suffer a -4 penalty to hit and evasion. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04013))_

- However, the spirit magic Sleep is an exception. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04015))_

> To get within 5 meters of a sleeping monster, you must successfully perform the thief skill stealthy step . If you succeed on a success roll using thief skill level + dexterity bonus as the baseline score, the monster will not wake up. If you fail, the monster will sense your presence and wake up immediately.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04007))_

> The game master must set the monster's monster level as the difficulty and add a 2D roll to it to determine the target score. Depending on the situation (for example, there are pebbles on the floor and they make a lot of noise, or the monster happens to be wearing earplugs), you can apply positive or negative modifiers to the final score (at this time, the reason you must use a difficulty instead of a target score is because there is a possibility that the monster will continue to pretend to be asleep even though it's aware). If you use Silence or Mute magic, there will be no sound, so there is no need for a success roll.

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04006))_

> Attacks against sleeping monsters are always a success unless you roll 2D and get double ones on your hit check (even when attacking a sleeping opponent, double ones is always a failure).

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04008))_

> Attacks against sleeping monsters are always a success unless you roll 2D and get double ones on your hit check (even when attacking a sleeping opponent, double ones is always a failure). Furthermore, when making a damage check, you can reduce the weapon's critical target by -1. If you are attacking with the thief skill, your critical target will be -2.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04009))_

> If you attack a sleeping monster but do not deal any damage, or if you deal damage but are unable to reduce its life points to 0, the monster will wake up immediately.

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04013))_

> If the opponent you're fighting is a creature that lives on land, such as a human, they will suffer the same penalty. However, creatures that live underwater, such as mermen, do not suffer any penalties other than weapon restrictions. Conversely, these creatures become slower on land and typically suffer a -4 penalty to hit and evasion. Some creatures, such as hydra and scylla, can act both in water and on land without penalty.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04014))_

> If it's natural sleep, there is no need to roll and it'll always wake up.

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04014))_

> In the case of something sleeping due to the ancient magic Sleep Cloud or the spellsong Lullaby , a resistance check must be made every round to judge. If it's natural sleep, there is no need to roll and it'll always wake up.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04015))_

> Unless the magic itself is broken by Dispel Magic or other magic belonging to mind , it will never wake up.

## Rules for Sleeping Adventurers

- their final score will become the target score. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04017))_
- If the monster has the ability to sneak up on you, the target score will be even higher. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04017))_
- attacks a sleeping adventurer, the attack will automatically hit. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04020))_
- If the attack does not reduce life to 0, the adventurer wakes up immediately. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04020))_
- Therefore, the quickest way to wake up your friends is to kick them. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04020))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04017, source-range-de1806a5-04020))_

> If a sleeping adventurer is approached by a monster, the baseline score is adventurer level + intelligence bonus , and if you succeed on a resistance roll against target score 9, you can wake up before being attacked. If the monster has the ability to sneak up on you, the target score will be even higher. If they approach using stealthy step , etc. their final score will become the target score. - If the difference is 0 or less, only 1 point of damage will be dealt. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04028))_
- If the difference is 0 or less, only 1 point of damage will be dealt. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04028))_

> If the attack hits, roll 2D. If it's double ones, the damage will be equal to the strike points of the attacking monster. Otherwise, the damage equals the attacking monster's strike points minus the defending monster's defense points. If the difference is 0 or less, only 1 point of damage will be dealt.

## Rune Masters' Status

## Dark Magic

- For this reason, the rune masters of these runes are both hated and feared by the general public. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04041))_
- As mentioned earlier, these runes, like holy magic, use the gods as its source of power. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04041))_
- A rune master who uses dark magic is called a dark priest . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04041))_
- In a narrow sense, only the priests of Phalaris are sometimes called dark priests. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04041))_
- However, it is derived from the power of the gods of evil (wicked gods) such as Phalaris, who are believed to cause harm to us humans. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04041))_
- This is because believers in wicked gods other than Phalaris are rarely seen. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04041))_

- A rune master who uses dark magic is called a dark priest . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04041))_
- Dark magic basically has the same origin as holy magic, and dark priests can use most of the basic holy magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04042))_
- In addition, dark priests can use wicked magic that the gods of light do not allow (do not give power to). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04042))_

## 4th Level Basic Dark Magic List [ Control Imp ]

- The difference, however, is that the thing you can summon to become your familiar is an imp, not a small animal. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04133))_
- One caster cannot summon a second one. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04133))_
- An imp that's become a familiar can be controlled freely from a distance, and the caster can see and hear through the imp's eyes and ears. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04134))_
- If the imp loses life points or mental points due to an attack from another, the caster will also suffer the same pain as the imp, and will lose the same amount in life force or mental power. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04135))_

- from the target and give it to the caster. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04142))_

- This spell also cannot be used if the dark priest him or herself is undead. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04146))_
- First, make a strike power 10 check for damage dealt to the target, and the caster's life force (points) will be restored by the same number of points. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04146))_
- Also, like Wounds , it has no effect at all if the opponent successfully resists, and it has no effect on opponents that don't have normal life, such as undead, skeleton warriors, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04146))_

## 5th Level Basic Dark Magic List

- This spell is used on an individual to impose penalties that are not directly life-threatening. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04151))_
- Game masters should limit the effects of curses so that they do not immediately kill the individual. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04151))_
- Curses can be removed by Remove Curse or Perfect Cancellation , but there are also always items or actions that are the key to lifting the curse. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04151))_
- An example of a curse is making a beautiful face ugly or changing the color of one's skin. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04151))_
- This key is usually unknown to the target of the curse. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04151))_
- However, the higher the caster's level, or if some kind of price is paid at the same time as the spell, the more terrifying the effect will be. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04151))_
- The curse will be lifted when you obtain the item or complete the action. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04151))_
- Game masters should limit the effects of curses so that they do not immediately kill the individual. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04151))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04149))_

> Resist=Negated effect

- To cast this spell, you need a corpse that is within a few days of death. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04154))_

## Curse

- The waiter placed the order on the plate, though with some hesitation. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04156))_
- The man who sat down at the table bluntly ordered dried meat and hard bread from the waiter. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04156))_
- Then, he moved on to the hard bread. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04158))_
- The man brought the dried meat to his mouth and began to chew it very slowly. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04158))_
- He chewed countless times, until finally he swallowed. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04158))_
- This too, he chewed for so long that it was vexing to watch, and then, with much effort, sent it down his throat and into his stomach. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04158))_
- This too, he chewed for so long that it was vexing to watch, and then, with much effort, sent it down his throat and into his stomach. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04158))_
- Then, he moved on to the hard bread. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04158))_
- fafa The man's eyes were sunken in, his skin dry and flaky. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04159))_
- A cup was placed in front of the man. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04161))_
- He was shook by the intensity in his eyes. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04164))_
- The waiter looked into the man's face as he asked. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04164))_
- The man glared at the cup, with his eyes arched wide. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04165))_
- The man was staring intently into the glass of water. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04165))_
- according to the caster's commands, but due to their low intellect, they can only understand simple commands such as kill anyone who enters this room or dig a hole . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04167))_
- according to the caster's commands, but due to their low intellect, they can only understand simple commands such as kill anyone who enters this room or dig a hole . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04167))_
- into zombies, but if you want to cast it on something larger than human size, you will need to consume extra mental power (points) to expand the effect. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04168))_
- On the other hand, if you turn a small animal into a zombie, it does not mean that you'll need to consume less mental power. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04168))_
- The required mental power (points) increases in proportion to the volume of the target. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04168))_
- Each game master is responsible for determining the details for non-human zombies. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04169))_
- Eventually a shaky hand rose up and grabbed the cup. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04170))_
- The cup was slowly raised in front of the waiter. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04170))_
- The waiter instinctively exclaimed. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04174))_
- As he was about to put his hand on his shoulder, the waiter noticed a strong, suffocating smell of alcohol. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04174))_
- The waiter looked around. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04175))_
- He wondered if perhaps someone tipped over their drink, but there didn't seem to be any sign of that anywhere. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04175))_
- He lifted the cup he brought and held it up to his lips. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04176))_
- Sure enough, it was just water, but....... _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04176))_
- As he wiped up the mess the man had made, the waiter noticed that it was giving off a strong odor of alcohol. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04177))_
- With a trembling finger, the man pointed to the glass of water. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04179))_
- The waiter nodded and carried it away. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04179))_
- While he was drunk and acting rowdy, he swung his arm around and hit him in the head. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04181))_
- It was that man in the black robe. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04181))_
- The man in the black robe looked back with a cold smile and a dark gaze. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04183))_
- It's even stronger than the hard liquor that the dwarves are said to treasure. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04186))_
- Since then, all the water he's drank has turned into alcohol. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04186))_
- Since then, all the water he's drank has turned into alcohol. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04186))_
- The juices that drip from cooked meat and fresh juice from fruit were all turned into alcohol. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04187))_
- As soon as it entered his mouth, the supposedly diluted liquor burned his throat. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04188))_
- He tried to dilute liquor with water, but the result was the same. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04188))_
- As the man cleared his throat, he was annoyed by the noise around him. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04190))_
- Full of resentment and hatred, the man looked around the bar. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04192))_
- His eyes stopped. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04193))_
- He then walked up to the black table. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04194))_
- He then walked up to the black table. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04194))_
- With a wry smile on his face, the man in the black robe placed a bottle of liquor on the table with a thud. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04196))_
- The bottle that had been knocked aside fell off the table and shattered with a loud crash. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04198))_
- The man suffering from the curse replied, in a hoarse voice. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04200))_
- The man in the black robe turned and walked away, with a cold, triumphant smile hidden beneath his hood. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04202))_
- The key to breaking the curse was to "drink from a bottle of alcohol served by another"... _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04203))_
- ...but the man tormented by the curse of alcohol would never find out. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04204))_

> This spell hypnotizes the opponent, rendering them unable to actively think. The caster can control the hypnotized subject at will. However, this cannot be used to make them do intense movements such as combat, or casting magic. It can only be as much as making them walk slowly in the direction you want or bring you something in their hands. You also cannot give complex commands that require the person to judge the situation and have them carry them out. For example, if you were to command someo

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04214))_

> Resist=Negated effect

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04215))_

> This spell hypnotizes the opponent, rendering them unable to actively think. The caster can control the hypnotized subject at will. However, this cannot be used to make them do intense movements such as combat, or casting magic. It can only be as much as making them walk slowly in the direction you want or bring you something in their hands. You also cannot give complex commands that require the person to judge the situation and have them carry them out. For example, if you were to command someone to go to a certain house and steal some jewels , it wouldn't be possible because those under the spell's influence wouldn't be able to think of a way to break into that house. Furthermore, you cannot command actions that directly encourage suicide. However, it is possible to make someone walk off a cliff and fall to their death.

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04215))_

> This spell hypnotizes the opponent, rendering them unable to actively think. The caster can control the hypnotized subject at will. However, this cannot be used to make them do intense movements such as combat, or casting magic. It can only be as much as making them walk slowly in the direction you want or bring you something in their hands. You also cannot give complex commands that require the person to judge the situation and have them carry them out. For example, if you were to command someo

> If you expand the effect and apply it to multiple targets at once, you can only give the same command to all targets.

## [ Rot ]

- Objects that had this spell cast on them will decay very quickly. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04221))_
- Targets are limited to non-living meat, plants, fibers, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04221))_
- This spell has the effect of accelerating the rate of decay and causing the target to rot faster. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04221))_
- However, this has no effect on metals or rocks, and it has no effect on living creatures at all. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04221))_
- As long as an object is perishable, it will decay, even if under conditions where decay would normally not progress, such as the environment being below freezing, or being soaked in a saturated brine. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04221))_
- Decay, which normally takes two to three days, will be reduced to half an hour. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04221))_
- As long as an object is perishable, it will decay, even if under conditions where decay would normally not progress, such as the environment being below freezing, or being soaked in a saturated brine. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04221))_
- Targets are limited to non-living meat, plants, fibers, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04221))_
- If double the normal amount of mental power is consumed, the target will decay in 15 minutes, and if triple , the target will decay in 10 minutes. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04222))_
- This spell can reduce the time it takes for decay to complete by consuming extra mental power. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04222))_
- Even if the spell is removed with Perfect Cancellation , etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04223))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04218))_

> Base Mental Power Cost=24 Distance=Touch Area=One object Duration=30 minutes Effect=Decays the target Type=Target score, Non-removable Counters (Overpowers): Preservation

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04219))_

> Countered (Overpowered) By: Preservation Expansion=Final score, time reduction (see description)

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04220))_

> Resist=None

## 8th Level Basic Dark Magic List [ Cripple ]

- This spell has the effect of taking away freedom of a part of the target's body, such as a limb, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04235))_
- If freedom of your head is taken away, you will be unable to see, hear, speak, or smell. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04235))_
- As a result, it'll be difficult to willingly take action. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04235))_
- Those who've had this spell cast on them will suffer various penalties depending on the body part. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04235))_
- This spell has the effect of taking away freedom of a part of the target's body, such as a limb, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04235))_

> This spell has the effect of taking away freedom of a part of the target's body, such as a limb, etc. Those who've had this spell cast on them will suffer various penalties depending on the body part. If you lose freedom of your arms, you won't be able to hold anything in those arms, and if you lose freedom of your legs, you will have difficulty moving, so you will suffer a -2 penalty on attack and evasion in combat, respectively. If freedom of your head is taken away, you will be unable to see,

## 9th Level Basic Dark Magic List [ Plague ]

- There are various types of this plague. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04260))_
- Each game master should specify the symptoms. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04260))_
- This is a spell that inflicts a plague on the target. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04260))_
- Note that the caster of the spell also becomes a target of the contagion immediately after the target contracts the illness. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04261))_
- Also, the progression speed/progression Intensity/ Healing score is 3 days/8/11 (22). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04261))_
- Regardless of the symptoms specified by the game master, the plague's rarity is 16. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04261))_
- It has a lethal depth of 3 and is very highly contagious. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04261))_
- Note that the caster of the spell also becomes a target of the contagion immediately after the target contracts the illness. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04261))_

## [ Recall Spirit ]

- Also, those who have lost their souls and are destroyed, or those who have become undead, cannot be resurrected. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04273))_
- The person who was sacrificed loses their soul container and cannot be resurrected. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04273))_
- Only those that the caster knows well (or at least is acquainted with) can be resurrected. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04273))_
- This spell is almost the same as the divine magic of the same name, except that it uses the body of a sacrifice instead of the caster to bring the dead back to life. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04273))_
- This spell is almost the same as the divine magic of the same name, except that it uses the body of a sacrifice instead of the caster to bring the dead back to life. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04273))_
- Only those that the caster knows well (or at least is acquainted with) can be resurrected. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04273))_
- This spell requires a final score of 20 or greater while also defeating the sacrifice's resist for it to be fully effective. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04274))_
- Even if you defeat the sacrifice's resist, if you do not attain a final score of 20 or greater, the dead who was resurrected will lose their memories. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04274))_

## 10th Level Basic Dark Magic List [ Call God ]

- This spell is almost the same as the holy magic of the same name, except for its duration and the fact that it summons a god (wicked god) into the body of a sacrifice rather than the caster. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04278))_
- However, humans' frail bodies and minds cannot withstand the great power of a god, so the sacrifice to the spell is destroyed, and you will not be able to bring them back to life again. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04278))_
- Even wicked gods who have lost contact with the material world will be able to use their full power if summoned with this spell. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04278))_
- This spell is almost the same as the holy magic of the same name, except for its duration and the fact that it summons a god (wicked god) into the body of a sacrifice rather than the caster. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04278))_
- Even if you defeat the sacrifice's resist, if you do not attain a final score of 30 or greater, the dark god's summoning will only last for 1 minute. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04279))_
- This spell requires a final score of 30 or greater while also defeating the sacrifice's resist for it to be fully effective. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04279))_
- Even if you defeat the sacrifice's resist, if you do not attain a final score of 30 or greater, the dark god's summoning will only last for 1 minute. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04279))_
- Each game master is responsible for determining the suitability of sacrifices, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04280))_
- Their priest skill level is a reference for how close the sacrifice is to a god, but there are some humans who are close to a god regardless of their skill level. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04280))_
- This spell has a bonus added to the final score depending on the person being sacrificed. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04280))_
- For example, it is for this reason that innocent girls are preferred as sacrifices. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04280))_
- For example, it is for this reason that innocent girls are preferred as sacrifices. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04280))_

## 11.2.3

## Special Dark Magic List

- Priests of wicked gods can use basic holy magic, basic dark magic, and special dark magic created by their god. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04283))_
- Here is a list of special dark magic that can be used uniquely by each wicked god. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04283))_

## Phalaris Special Dark Magic List ]

- Resist=Negated effect This spell has the effect of amplifying the evil spirit that lies dormant in a person's heart. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04294))_
- Targets that fail to resist will impulsively act in evil ways. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04294))_
- What the target does depends on the situation at the moment and their desires. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04294))_
- For example, if you think deep down I want money , you'll be tempted to steal it immediately. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04294))_
- For example, if you think deep down I want money , you'll be tempted to steal it immediately. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04294))_
- This spell has no effect on beings without intelligence or beasts who always act on impulse. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04295))_

## The Nameless God of Madness Special Dark Magic List

- Targets who lose their sanity due to this spell go into bizarre states such as staring vacantly in bewilderment, yelling nonsense, or curling up and sobbing, and become completely unable to take logical actions. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04307))_
- This spell has the effect of giving a strong shock to the opponent's mind, with the power to ruin their peace of mind and cause them to lose their sanity. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04307))_
- Targets who lose their sanity due to this spell go into bizarre states such as staring vacantly in bewilderment, yelling nonsense, or curling up and sobbing, and become completely unable to take logical actions. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04307))_
- Most of the time, they will only be rendered useless, but only when they roll 2D again and the result is double ones, they will go berserk with madness and engage in destructive acts. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04308))_
- Please refer to Berserk for handling. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04308))_

## [ Berserk ] (Spell Level=3)

- Even the caster is not safe from the target. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04310))_
- Base Mental Power Cost=15 Distance=Touch Area=One Duration=18 rounds Effect=Make the target go berserk Type=Mind Expansion=Final score, duration Resist=Negated effect Those who have this spell cast on them and fail to resist will go berserk and feel an urge to destroy everything nearby. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04310))_
- Also, if no one is around, they will wound themselves. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04310))_
- They also become indifferent to wounds and pain and ignore the risks of injury or life. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04310))_
- As a result, they will destroy property within sight and blindly attack creatures, regardless of friend or foe. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04310))_
- At this time, their attack power and bonus damage will be +2, and their evasion speed will be -4. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04310))_
- As a result, they will destroy property within sight and blindly attack creatures, regardless of friend or foe. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04310))_
- However, a death check must be made. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04311))_
- While under the influence of this spell, you will not fall unconscious even if your life force (points) drops to 0 or less. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04311))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04311))_

> The first time it becomes 0 or less, and each time you receive a new wound, you must make a death check, and if you fail, you will die.

## Mirleaf Special Dark Magic List

## [ Create Ghost Ship ] (Spell Level=6)

- This spell is effective even on ships that have already sunk or are shipwrecked and partially destroyed. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04359))_
- However, this does not stop the ship itself from decaying, so over many years it will rot to pieces. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04359))_
- The priests of Mirleaf often load zombie and skeleton sailors onto the ships they create, and use them as ghost ships to wreak havoc on the seas. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04360))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04350))_

## 11.3

## Dragon Roar Magic

- In modernday Alecrast, there is no custom of worshiping dragons in civilized countries, so no one uses this type of magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04364))_
- Dragon roar magic are runes used by those who worship dragons as guardians rather than gods. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04364))_
- Even if Silence or Mute spirit magic is cast on you, you can still use dragon roar magic! _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04365))_
- There are no restrictions when using dragon roar magic spells. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04365))_
- The skill for using this magic is the dragon priest skill , and its owners are called dragon priests . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04366))_
- However, even among the great sages, the actual situation is not well known. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04367))_
- It is said that there are users of dragon roar magic among uncivilized savage tribes and among the greater species of lizardmen, an intelligent race born from the scales of primordial titans such as dragons. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04367))_
- It is said that there are users of dragon roar magic among uncivilized savage tribes and among the greater species of lizardmen, an intelligent race born from the scales of primordial titans such as dragons. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04367))_
- Those who believe in dragons have only one goal, to be reborn as a dragon . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04368))_
- Through repeated training, users of dragon roar magic can master the physical, mental, and magical transcendental abilities of dragons. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04368))_
- Due to the nature of their faith, dragon priests do not form a cult or gather believers. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04368))_
- For this reason, they train their bodies and minds and strive to be strong and free. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04368))_
- Those who believe in dragons have only one goal, to be reborn as a dragon . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04368))_
- Since their lifestyle, such as eating only raw food , worshiping fire , regarding poison as sacred , etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04369))_
- However, the original cause of this incident was that the savage tribes on the shores of Lake Air, where Krish was born and raised, were all exterminated because they were evil believers who worshiped dragons. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04369))_
- It is a famous story that the evil dragon that destroyed the kingdom of Moraana, which had flourished in the central part of Alecrast, was the reincarnation of Krish, a user of dragon roar magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04369))_
- Since their lifestyle, such as eating only raw food , worshiping fire , regarding poison as sacred , etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04369))_
- However, the original cause of this incident was that the savage tribes on the shores of Lake Air, where Krish was born and raised, were all exterminated because they were evil believers who worshiped dragons. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04369))_
- It can be said that this skill is not suitable for a player character. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04370))_
- Dragon priests will not join an adventurer's party due to their religious beliefs. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04370))_
- Dragon priests worship dragons, so the dragon priest skill cannot be acquired at the same time as the priest skill (and dark priest skill). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04372))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04365))_

> If your consciousness is clear, you can receive the effects of a spell just by remembering it in your mind .

## 11.3.1 Basic Abilities of the

## Dragon Priest Skill

- Owners of the dragon priest skill gain the following basic abilities. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04375))_

## Reptile Check [Intelligence]

- For these monsters only, they can identify them with a success roll using dragon priest skill + intelligence bonus as the baseline score, just like the sage skill's monster check . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04377))_
- Dragon priests have knowledge of dragons, their subspecies such as wyrms, wyverns, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04377))_
- For these monsters only, they can identify them with a success roll using dragon priest skill + intelligence bonus as the baseline score, just like the sage skill's monster check . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04377))_
- Dragon priests have knowledge of dragons, their subspecies such as wyrms, wyverns, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04377))_
- For the summon magic described below, the dragon priest must know the creature they're trying to summon. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04378))_

## 11.3.2 Dragon Roar Magic

## Spell List

- Here is a list of dragon roar magic that dragon priests can use. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04381))_
- Among the types of spells, there is one called summon . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04381))_

## 《 Summon 》

- Spells of this type are spells that summon and employ the race specified by each spell. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04383))_
- The result will determine when it will be summoned (Table 11-1: Summon). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04383))_
- Therefore, it's possible to instantly summon creatures no matter where they are. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04384))_
- The caster can also increase the final score through spell expansion or rituals. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04384))_
- However, the closer the target creature is, the easier it will be to summon it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04384))_
- If you can basically infer that they'll be in the surrounding 10km, please add +2. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04384))_
- Therefore, it's possible to instantly summon creatures no matter where they are. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04384))_
- However, no matter what modifiers are applied, if the 2D roll when calculating the final score is double ones, the summoned creature will immediately appear and attack the caster him or herself. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04385))_
- However, by using Pharis's special holy magic Banish , it's possible to drive the summoned creatures back to where they came from. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04386))_
- All summons are non-removable magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04386))_
- Therefore, Dispel Magic has no effect. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04386))_
- Therefore, Dispel Magic has no effect. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04386))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04384))_

> Summoning takes place across space. Therefore, it's possible to instantly summon creatures no matter where they are. However, the closer the target creature is, the easier it will be to summon it. When using the Summon table, the game master can apply any modifiers as desired. If you can basically infer that they'll be in the surrounding 10km, please add +2. If you know for sure they're there, +4. The caster can also increase the final score through spell expansion or rituals.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04383))_

> When using these spells, the caster must determine the final score of the spell.

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04383, source-range-de1806a5-04386))_

> Spells of this type are spells that summon and employ the race specified by each spell. When using these spells, the caster must determine the final score of the spell. Then, compare this final score with the mental resistance score of the creature you're trying to summon. The result will determine when it will be summoned (Table 11-1: Summon). All summons are non-removable magic. Therefore, Dispel Magic has no effect. However, by using Pharis's special holy magic Banish , it's possible to drive

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04384))_

> When using the Summon table, the game master can apply any modifiers as desired.

## 1st Level Dragon Roar Magic List [ Iron Stomach ]

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04388))_

> Base Mental Power Cost=3

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04389))_

> Distance=Caster

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04390))_

> Area=Caster

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04391))_

> Duration=1 day

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04392))_

> Effect=Digest everything that can fit in the stomach and use it as nourishment

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04392))_

> Effect=Digest everything that can fit in the stomach and use it as nourishment

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04395))_

> Resist=None The caster of this spell will be able to digest anything that enters their stomach and use it as nourishment. For example, whether it's a pebble or mud, once it enters the stomach, it gives the same feeling of fullness as when eating the same amount of average food, and at the same time provides energy for life activities. It takes effect on anything that enters the stomach within the effect period, and your stomach will not feel upset even after the effect period has expired. Also, even if you put poison that belongs to dose into your stomach during the effect period of this spell, the poison's effect will not appear. However, this spell cannot protect you from other types of poison.

## [ Swordclaw ]

- However, while these claws are grown out, you cannot grasp or hold anything. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04438))_

## [ Blood Protection ]

- At this point, the target is no longer able to remove the blood by normal means such as wiping or washing. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04543))_
- Specifically, the caster must consume their life force at the same time as their mental power. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04543))_
- That blood allows you to protect others from all attacks. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04543))_
- Losing 1 point of life force can give you 1 point of defense effect. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04543))_
- At this point, the target is no longer able to remove the blood by normal means such as wiping or washing. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04543))_
- While the spell is in effect, the caster cannot regain the life force they've consumed (think of it as their starting life force being lowered). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04544))_
- However, in order to do this, you must consume an extra amount of your life force as well as your mental power. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04545))_
- There is no need to consume extra life force when expanding the final score. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04545))_
- If an 8th level caster were to do the same thing, the mental power consumed would only be 18 points, but the life force consumed would still be 6 points. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04545))_
- The caster can expand the effect to provide a greater defense effect. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04545))_
- If you wanted to give 2 points of defense effect to three people each, a 6th level caster's mental power consumed would be 24 points and their life force consumed would be 6 points. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04545))_
- For example, a 6th level caster can consume 8 points of mental power and 2 points of life force at the same time to provide 2 points of defense effect. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04545))_
- Life force consumed cannot be reduced by increasing dragon priest skill level. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04545))_
- For example, a 6th level caster can consume 8 points of mental power and 2 points of life force at the same time to provide 2 points of defense effect. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04545))_
- If an 8th level caster were to do the same thing, the mental power consumed would only be 18 points, but the life force consumed would still be 6 points. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04545))_
- Please note that this spell cannot be cast on the caster him or herself. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04546))_

## 9th Level Dragon Roar Magic List [ Summon Lesser Dragon ]

- Up to two adult humans can ride on the back of a lesser dragon. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04580))_
- Lesser dragons have super strength, so this restriction is not a matter of weight, but of space for riding _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04580))_
- Although greater than a wyvern, a lesser dragon's intellect is also not very high, so it can only be used to fight enemies or to carry you on its back. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04580))_

## 10th Level Dragon Roar Magic List [ Reborn Dragon ]

- It is no exaggeration to say that dragon priests undergo rigorous training for this spell. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04586))_
- They cannot be revived by any means. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04586))_
- Upon using this spell, death will come to the dragon priest. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04586))_
- If this final score does not reach 20, the caster will die as they are. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04586))_
- They cannot be revived by any means. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04586))_
- Even Perfect Cancellation is ineffective. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04587))_
- The egg cannot be destroyed by any means. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04587))_
- If a final score of 20 or greater is attained, then after the caster's death, their corpse will be wrapped in a dragon egg, and a few years later, will be reborn as a lesser dragon. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04587))_
- The egg cannot be destroyed by any means. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04587))_
- If a final score of 20 or greater is attained, then after the caster's death, their corpse will be wrapped in a dragon egg, and a few years later, will be reborn as a lesser dragon. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04587))_
- At this time, along with the memories from when you became a dragon, the memories and skills you had during your lifetime will be resurrected. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04588))_
- When you're reborn, your memories of your previous life will be lost, but your potential as a dragon is high, and after several decades you will shed your skin and transform into an elder dragon. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04588))_
- When you're reborn, your memories of your previous life will be lost, but your potential as a dragon is high, and after several decades you will shed your skin and transform into an elder dragon. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04588))_

## Acquiring Rune Master Skills and Increasing Levels

- Here is a summary of how to acquire and increase the level of each rune master skill. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04591))_

## 《 Sorcerer Skill 》

- One is to join the sorcerers' guild. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04593))_
- The other is to become an apprentice to a sorcerer with a sorcerer skill of 6th level or greater. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04593))_
- There are two ways to acquire the sorcerer skill. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04593))_
- Please interpret this as because the sorcerer's spellbook has spells that they cannot handle written down in advance. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04594))_
- Then, you'll be given basic knowledge as a sorcerer, such as speaking and reading in high and low ancient, thus a sorcerer who can use 1st level spells is born. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04594))_
- Also, although there are no specific restrictions in the rules, a training period of about 3 to 5 years is required. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04594))_
- The sorcerer skill is increased by spending experience points. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04594))_
- As your sorcerer skill increases, your magic power increases and at the same time you also immediately gain access to higher level spells. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04594))_
- In this case, the rules require 2000 experience points (1500 points if you've acquired the sage skill). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04594))_
- Then, you'll be given basic knowledge as a sorcerer, such as speaking and reading in high and low ancient, thus a sorcerer who can use 1st level spells is born. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04594))_
- Please interpret this as because the sorcerer's spellbook has spells that they cannot handle written down in advance. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04594))_

## 《 Shaman Skill 》

- To acquire the shaman skill, you must be taught how to communicate with spirits by a shaman with a shaman skill of 1st level or higher. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04596))_
- The art of communicating with spirits is not based on theory, but must be learned through experience, by watching and imitating other shamans. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04596))_
- Although there are no specific restrictions in the rules, training for one year or more is usually required. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04596))_
- The shaman skill is increased by spending experience points. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04597))_
- As your shaman skill increases, your magic power increases and at the same time you also immediately gain access to higher level spells. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04597))_
- This is because your relationship with the spirits becomes stronger. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04597))_
- This is because your relationship with the spirits becomes stronger. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04597))_

## 《 Priest Skill 》

- Therefore, there may be no particular need for a master, teacher, or period of training. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04599))_
- It is possible to suddenly feel Myrii's power while fighting and become a priest, or to feel heartbroken by the chaotic mayhem and, worried about what to do, become an apostle of Pharis. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04599))_
- To acquire the priest skill, it is necessary to awaken to faith . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04599))_
- Therefore, there may be no particular need for a master, teacher, or period of training. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04599))_
- However, the surest way to awaken to faith is to work in a temple, constantly see other priests, and receive their teachings. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04600))_
- This is because it is the best way to experience the nature of faith firsthand. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04600))_
- This is because it is the best way to experience the nature of faith firsthand. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04600))_
- The priest skill is increased by spending experience points. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04601))_
- As your priest skill increases, your magic power increases and at the same time you also immediately gain access to higher level spells. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04601))_
- This is because your relationship with your god becomes stronger. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04601))_
- This is because your relationship with your god becomes stronger. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04601))_
- If the game master wishes, on the basis that you rebelled greatly against your old faith, they may require only half the normal experience points to increase your level until you reach your previous priest skill level. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04602))_
- From there, you will have to increase your priest skill again. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04602))_
- If the game master wishes, on the basis that you rebelled greatly against your old faith, they may require only half the normal experience points to increase your level until you reach your previous priest skill level. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04602))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04600))_

> However, the surest way to awaken to faith is to work in a temple, constantly see other priests, and receive their teachings. This is because it is the best way to experience the nature of faith firsthand.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04599))_

> When you awaken to faith and recognize the existence of the gods, you can acquire the 1st level priest skill.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04602))_

> In rare cases, if a character who had the priest skill believes that their previous teachings are wrong and awakens to the teachings of another god, they may lose any previous priest skill levels they had and acquire 1st level in a new god's priest skill level instead.

## 《 Dark Priest Skill 》

- The method of acquiring and increasing the dark priest skill is almost the same as the priest skill. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04604))_

## 11.5

- believe in have no temples, and most dark priests will be those who have awakened to faith by some occurrence. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04606))_

## Asking NPCs to Use Magic

- You may want to have a Remove Curse cast on you when you're cursed, a Resurrection cast when someone dies, or have a magical item appraised using Analyze Enchantment . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04609))_
- In some cases, adventurers may need to rely on NPCs to save them from situations that are beyond their control. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04609))_
- First, the game master must decide whether there are enough rune masters to do this. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04611))_
- Even in a large country, there may or may not be at least one rune master who has reached 10th level. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04611))_
- High ranking (high level) rune masters are not easy to come by. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04611))_
- Once you have found such a rune master, you must next determine whether or not your request will be granted. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04613))_
- They surely won't hear your requests too easily, and it's questionable whether they'd even allow you to meet them in the first place. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04613))_
- The higher-ranking rune masters are, the busier they are. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04613))_
- If you want to meet someone at a higher level, you'll need some connections on the side. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04614))_
- Basically, you can expect to meet any rune master up to 2 levels higher than the adventurers' adventurer level. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04614))_
- Of course, it would be difficult to ask a single rune master to do all sorts of things again and again, and if the adventurers conclusively incur an NPC's displeasure, no amount of money will make them say yes. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04616))_
- Priests are relatively easy to meet, but shamans and sorcerers are by no means easy to meet. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04616))_
- All such decisions are made by the game master. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04616))_
- Priests are relatively easy to meet, but shamans and sorcerers are by no means easy to meet. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04616))_
- And of course, a certain price is required in order to have the magic cast. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04617))_
- through a ritual, you have to double, triple...... _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04617))_
- The market price is NPC's rune master skill level x base mental power cost for magic x 20 . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04617))_
- The same goes for having a ritual performed. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04617))_
- For such requests, you usually give 10% to 30% as advance payment. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04618))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04609))_

## Example:

- At this time, the final score required for resurrection is 19. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04620))_
- Think about when you use Resurrection to bring back a friend who lost their life on an adventure. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04620))_
- You successfully find a 10th level priest and the negotiations are settled. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04621))_
- However, assuming the priest's intelligence bonus is +2 , a 2D roll of 7 or greater is required for a successful resurrection. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04621))_

If you want to cast Resurrection normally, the required money is 10 (priest's level) x 45 (base mental power cost for Resurrection ) x 20 = 9000 (gamels). However, assuming the priest's intelligence bonus is +2 , a 2D roll of 7 or greater is required for a successful resurrection.

## 《 Dragon Priest Skill 》

- Dragon priests are based on a unique belief in dragons. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04624))_
- This is only possible if you're part of a group of people who believe in dragons (mostly considered savages). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04624))_
- This is only possible if you're part of a group of people who believe in dragons (mostly considered savages). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04624))_
- The dragon priest skill is increased by spending experience points. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04625))_
- If you roll 6 or greater on a success roll, it'll be a success. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04627))_
- The priest's mental power is 14, so it can be expanded by double (final score +1). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04627))_
- The money required at this time is 18,000 gamels. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04627))_
- To be even more certain, the adventurers request an additional +3 to their final score via ritual. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04628))_
- However, in order to do so, you must donate 9000 x 5 (because the eventual final score is +4) = 45,000 gamels to the priest (temple). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04628))_
- In this case, the average advance payment is between 4,500 and 13,500 Gamels. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04628))_
- However, in order to do so, you must donate 9000 x 5 (because the eventual final score is +4) = 45,000 gamels to the priest (temple). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04628))_
- Adventurers themselves cannot go around charging these same rates. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04629))_
- These are the going rates when an adventurer makes a request to an NPC . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04629))_
- Trying to force people to pay is, of course, a criminal act. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04629))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04627))_
