## Chapter 12: Various Checks

## 12.1

## Rules Regarding Language

- Language includes spoken words and written words. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04636))_
- In Alecrast, there are not many written languages, and there are quite a few languages that only have spoken words. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04636))_
- In Forcelia (as in our world), there are multiple language systems. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04636))_
- There are not many races other than humans that have the habit of writing and reading. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04636))_
- The characters and intelligent monsters of Forcelia each have a means of communicating, that is, a language. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04636))_
- The characters and intelligent monsters of Forcelia each have a means of communicating, that is, a language. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04636))_
- In Alecrast, there are not many written languages, and there are quite a few languages that only have spoken words. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04636))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04636))_

> If you have a written language, you can not only have conversations with it, but also read it, but with a language that only has spoken words, you cannot read it, and can only have conversations with it.

## 12.1.1 Normal Languages

## and Runes

- Language can be broadly divided into two types: normal language and runes . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04639))_

## 《 Normal Languages 》

- Normal language has common runes, but this is because they indirectly use the power of high ancient, and the words themselves have no magical power at all. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04641))_
- Normal languages are words used for communication, such as conversation and writing. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04641))_
- Y ou usually can't cast any magic with these words. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04641))_
- Normal language has common runes, but this is because they indirectly use the power of high ancient, and the words themselves have no magical power at all. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04641))_
- Normal languages are words used for communication, such as conversation and writing. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04641))_

## 《 Runes 》

- The languages called runes are all quite excellent, but they lack practical application because they have too many rules and restrictions. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04643))_
- Therefore, it is almost impossible to communicate with each other using these languages. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04643))_
- Runes have magical power, and by chanting them, a rune master can use various types of magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04643))_
- Therefore, it is almost impossible to communicate with each other using these languages. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04643))_
- The languages called runes are all quite excellent, but they lack practical application because they have too many rules and restrictions. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04643))_
- Silent spirit is an exception among runes and can be used for communication. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04644))_

## 12.1.2 Normal Languages of

## Forcelia

- Forcelia currently has the following known normal languages. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04647))_

## 《 Common 》

- This custom has continued to this day. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04649))_
- Therefore, these people and those who often had contact with them (merchants, innkeepers, kings, nobles, etc.) began to use common as a means of communicating with each other. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04649))_
- Language was a major barrier for peddlers without borders, traveling bards, mercenaries and adventurers. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04649))_
- Common was frequently used as a normal language in the great empire that was formed in the early new kingdom period. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04649))_
- However, from that time on, there had been no small number of people who moved back and forth across the kingdom. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04649))_
- Common is the language most widely used in the world of Sword World . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04649))_
- However, as the great empire fell and many small kingdoms were born in various regions, each region began to develop its own language, and its role as a normal language was lost. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04649))_
- This language was first used during the early new kingdom period, replacing low ancient which had been the normal language of the ancient kingdom. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04649))_
- Common is the language used by the most people in the world of Forcelia. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04649))_
- Therefore, these people and those who often had contact with them (merchants, innkeepers, kings, nobles, etc.) began to use common as a means of communicating with each other. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04649))_

## 《 Regional 》

- For example, there is the northeast region, where three kingdoms are at war, and the central plains, which is crowded with major powers such as Orphan and Ramliearth. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04651))_
- Each region, or even smaller kingdom, has its own language. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04651))_
- Alecrast is divided into several regions. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04651))_
- Strictly speaking, each kingdom should have its own regional language, but we don't want to place too many restrictions on language, so the rules only allow for two broad categories: mārdan and gundar . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04651))_
- If the game master desires, more regional languages may be created. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04651))_
- These languages are widespread not only among humans, but also among demihumans and intelligent monsters living in the regions. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04651))_
- Strictly speaking, each kingdom should have its own regional language, but we don't want to place too many restrictions on language, so the rules only allow for two broad categories: mārdan and gundar . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04651))_
- For example, there is the northeast region, where three kingdoms are at war, and the central plains, which is crowded with major powers such as Orphan and Ramliearth. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04651))_
- These languages are widespread not only among humans, but also among demihumans and intelligent monsters living in the regions. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04651))_

## [ Mārdan ]

- Mārdan (eastern) is mainly used by the people of Oran, the kingdom of sages and adventurers in the east, and its surrounding kingdoms. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04653))_
- Its western border is the kingdom of Eremire, but with the exception of a small village to the west called Palmer , mārdan is also spoken. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04653))_

## [ Gundar ]

- Gundar (western) is mainly used in the region west of the kingdom of Saine. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04655))_
- The two countries in the north central plains (Orphan and Ramliearth) also have gundar as their mother tongue. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04655))_

## 《 Low Ancient 》

- Also, those called sages and sorcerers study low ancient, considering it an almost essential language. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04657))_
- Low ancient is the normal language used in the ancient kingdom of Kastuul, which once flourished throughout Alecrast. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04657))_
- Although it is now a dead language, its words are still passed down among people and monsters connected to the ancient kingdom. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04657))_
- Low ancient is the normal language used in the ancient kingdom of Kastuul, which once flourished throughout Alecrast. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04657))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04657))_

> This is because you cannot begin to understand the great civilization of the ancient kingdom unless you know low ancient.

## 《 Racial 》

- Fae such as elves and dwarves, as well as youma such as goblins and imps, each have their own unique language that has remained unchanged from ancient times to the present day, and is used to communicate among their own kind. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04659))_
- A racial language is a language used by a race different from humans. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04659))_
- Fae such as elves and dwarves, as well as youma such as goblins and imps, each have their own unique language that has remained unchanged from ancient times to the present day, and is used to communicate among their own kind. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04659))_

## [ Elven ]

- This language is also used by mythical beasts and magical beasts that live in the forest. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04661))_
- This is the language used by elves. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04661))_
- The dark elves, who are wicked elves, also use this language as their normal language. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04661))_

## [ Dwarven ]

- There are also other mythical beasts and magical beasts that live in mountains or underground that use this language. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04663))_
- This is the language used by dwarves. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04663))_

## [ Impish ]

- This is the language used by youma such as imps, gremlins, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04665))_
- This is the language used by youma such as imps, gremlins, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04665))_

## [ Centaurian ]

- Other intelligent races that make their home in the meadow region also use this language. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04667))_
- This is the language used by centaurs. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04667))_
- It is said that in the past, this had a high language used as runes, but in modern times it's almost completely lost. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04667))_

## [ Goblin ]

- It is also said to have the same etymology as dwarven. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04669))_
- Kobolds and hobgoblins also use this language. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04669))_

## [ Giant ]

- This is the language used by titans such as giants, cyclops, ogres, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04671))_
- It is said that the high language of giant are runes comparable to high ancient for humans, but when we usually refer to giant , it's the language that titans use on a normal basis. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04671))_
- This is the language used by titans such as giants, cyclops, ogres, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04671))_

## [ Harpy ]

- Some intelligent flying races can speak this language. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04673))_
- This is the language used by harpies. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04673))_

## [ Fairy ]

- This is the language used by smallbodied fae such as fairies and pookas. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04675))_
- This is the language used by smallbodied fae such as fairies and pookas. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04675))_

## [ Merman ]

- This is the language used by mermen. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04677))_
- Other intelligent races that make their home in the sea also use this language. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04677))_

## [ Minotaur ]

- This is the language spoken by minotaurs. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04679))_

## [ Lizardman ]

- It is also said to be a lesser language of dragon roar, which are the runes of dragon roar magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04681))_
- Lizardmen, wyrms, and elder dragons use this language as their normal language. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04681))_
- This is the language used by lizardmen. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04681))_

## 12.1.3 Adventurer Languages

- Of course, adventurers also use language in their lives. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04683))_

## Starting Adventurer Languages

- Immediately after creation, an adventurer has the following language abilities. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04685))_
- Immediately after creation, an adventurer has the following language abilities. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04685))_
- - All adventurers can speak common and racial . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04686))_
- - Those with an intelligence of 6 or greater can also read their mother tongue . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04687))_
- - Those with an intelligence of 12 or above can additionally read common. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04688))_
- If the adventurer is an elf, dwarf, or half-elf raised in an elven society, mother tongue is the racial language of the race in which the adventurer was born and raised ( elven or dwarven ). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04689))_
- In the case of humans, grassrunners, and half-elves raised in human society, the mother tongue referred to here is the regional language of the region where the adventurer was born and raised. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04689))_

## 12.1.4 Learning Unknown

## Languages

- With the sage skill, you can learn both to speak and to read. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04692))_
- Adventurers can study and learn common and normal languages other than their mother tongue. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04692))_
- Of course, it's impossible to learn how to read a language that doesn't have written characters. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04692))_
- Adventurers who have learned both to speak and to read can write meaningful sentences using that language. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04692))_
- The way to do this is by acquiring (and increasing) bard or sage skill levels. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04692))_
- Y ou can only learn to speak with the bard skill. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04692))_
- Y ou can only learn to speak with the bard skill. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04692))_
- Also, you cannot learn runes with these skills. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04693))_
- When it comes to languages learned through the sage skill, priority is given to reading common and reading low ancient. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04694))_
- If an adventurer who has learned low ancient through the sage skill acquires the sorcerer skill, they will not be able to learn another language because it would just be low ancient again . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04695))_
- When acquiring these two skills, it is better to acquire them in the order of sorcerer → sage, which gives you a one language advantage. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04695))_
- If an adventurer who has learned low ancient through the sage skill acquires the sorcerer skill, they will not be able to learn another language because it would just be low ancient again . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04695))_
- *Holy prayer and daemon scream are basically the same thing. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04698))_
- **Now (believed to be) lost. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04698))_
- However, there are slight differences depending on the god (wicked god) you believe in. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04698))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04692, source-range-de1806a5-04695))_

Adventurers who have learned both to speak and to read can write meaningful sentences using that language. ## Rules for Poison, Illness and Infection

- In addition, a wound may become infected , which is treated as an illness. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04736))_
- One is due to poison and the other is due to illness . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04736))_
- There are two types of symptoms that can appear. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04736))_
- In Sword World RPG , illness is defined as a state in which the balance of spirit power within the body is disrupted. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04736))_
- The concept of bacterial or viral contagion does not exist. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04736))_
- In Sword World RPG , illness is defined as a state in which the balance of spirit power within the body is disrupted. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04736))_
- As long as the poison remains in the body, even if the symptoms disappear, the balance of spirit power will be disrupted and the symptoms will appear again. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04737))_
- However, if the poison itself is cleared away, the spirit power within the body will naturally return to a balanced state and restore health. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04737))_
- However, if the poison itself is cleared away, the spirit power within the body will naturally return to a balanced state and restore health. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04737))_
- Illness infection occurs when spirits transmit information about the incorrect equilibrium state to spirits in other human bodies. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04738))_
- On the other hand, illness is a state where the spirit power within the body remains unbalanced and in a fixed state. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04738))_
- Think of it as the spirits inside your body that are under the illusion that a false equilibrium is the correct one. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04738))_
- On the other hand, illness is a state where the spirit power within the body remains unbalanced and in a fixed state. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04738))_
- Think of it as the spirits inside your body that are under the illusion that a false equilibrium is the correct one. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04738))_
- In Sword World RPG , the phenomenon of a wound becoming infected means that the container was broken and deformed, causing the contents to become unbalanced . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04739))_
- In Sword World RPG , the phenomenon of a wound becoming infected means that the container was broken and deformed, causing the contents to become unbalanced . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04739))_

## Poison Treatment and Detox Methods

- Just like in our world, in Alecrast, using poison as a weapon is an immoral act. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04745))_
- If a player character uses poison to defeat an enemy, they are sure to be treated as a coward and looked down upon by the public. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04745))_
- Therefore, a proud warrior does not want to use poison. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04745))_
- Therefore, a proud warrior does not want to use poison. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04745))_
- To remove a poison with magic, the caster's final score (magic power + 2D roll) must be greater than or equal to the poison's toxicity score . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04747))_
- Even if you detoxify someone after they die from poison, they will not come back to life. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04748))_
- Even if you detoxify someone after they die from poison, they will not come back to life. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04748))_
- However, it's not possible to drive off a poison that's already entered the body. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04749))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04745))_

> Just like in our world, in Alecrast, using poison as a weapon is an immoral act. If a player character uses poison to defeat an enemy, they are sure to be treated as a coward and looked down upon by the public. Therefore, a proud warrior does not want to use poison. On the other hand, assassins, evil rune masters, dark priests, etc. do like to use poison.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04746))_

> Poisons that have entered the body can be cleared using specific antidotes (if any), the holy magic Cure Poison or Refresh , or the spirit magic Restore Health .

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04746))_

> Poisons that have entered the body can be cleared using specific antidotes (if any), the holy magic Cure Poison or Refresh , or the spirit magic Restore Health .

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04747))_

> Once a detox fails, the same caster cannot attempt detox magic until their magic power increases (and even if they try, they will always fail).

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04747))_

> To remove a poison with magic, the caster's final score (magic power + 2D roll) must be greater than or equal to the poison's toxicity score . Once a detox fails, the same caster cannot attempt detox magic until their magic power increases (and even if they try, they will always fail).

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04749))_

> The spirit magic Purification can make liquid poison harmless if the final score when casting the magic is greater than or equal to than the toxicity score.

## 12.2.1.2 Resistance to Poison

- Some poison effects may or may not affect specific monsters. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04751))_
- It has no effect on monsters that have no life such as undead, golems, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04751))_
- Poisons are not effective against everything. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04751))_
- Some mythical and magical beasts have strong life force that makes them immune to poison. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04751))_
- It has no effect on monsters that have no life such as undead, golems, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04751))_
- Monsters that use poison as weapons are immune to their own poisons (but are still affected by other poisons). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04752))_

## 《 Usage 》

- Even if the blade hits, if it doesn't cause a wound, it has no effect. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04761))_
- The usage of the poison is written in parentheses after the name. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04761))_
- It's applied to small daggers and needles and used as traps on doors and treasure chests. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04761))_
- It can be applied to knives and arrows to increase their killing power, but the poison usually wears off after about three uses and loses its effect, so it must be reapplied frequently. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04761))_
- This type of poison only takes effect if you lose 1 or more points of life force when you are hurt by a poisoned blade. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04761))_
- These are divided into injected , inhaled , dose , and touch . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04761))_
- The usage of the poison is written in parentheses after the name. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04761))_
- It can be applied to knives and arrows to increase their killing power, but the poison usually wears off after about three uses and loses its effect, so it must be reapplied frequently. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04761))_
- This type of poison only takes effect if you lose 1 or more points of life force when you are hurt by a poisoned blade. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04761))_
- In rare cases, some creatures use poison gas as a weapon. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04762))_
- This is also often used as a trap, but another method is to store it in a breakable bottle and use it by slamming it into your opponent. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04762))_
- An adventurer can only hold their breath for a number of rounds equal to their life force. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04763))_
- If you hold your breath, you will not be affected by the gas, but of course you will not be able to speak or cast spells while holding your breath. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04763))_
- An adventurer can only hold their breath for a number of rounds equal to their life force. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04763))_
- It is mainly used for assassinations, so adventurers will barely use it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04764))_
- Dose poison is used by mixing it into food or drink and comes in powder or liquid form. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04764))_
- There are not many types of them, and as expected they are often used as traps. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04765))_
- Touch poison comes in liquid or powder form and can penetrate through the skin. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04765))_

> Inhaled poisons are in gas or powder form and take effect when inhaled through the respiratory tract. This is also often used as a trap, but another method is to store it in a breakable bottle and use it by slamming it into your opponent. In rare cases, some creatures use poison gas as a weapon.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04763))_

> If you're trapped in a room filled with poison gas, you must make a resistance roll every round.

## 《 Types of Poison 》

- Poisons are sometimes labeled as magic , mind , or damage , depending on how they affect you. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04767))_
- Magical poisons and their effects can be removed with Dispel Magic as well as Purification , Cure Poison , etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04768))_
- Those that say magic are poisons that have magical effects. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04768))_
- These are basically magical items, so they respond to the ancient magic called Sense Magic . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04768))_
- The holy magic Sanity is effective. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04769))_
- Poisons that are both magic and mind are equivalent to magic that has a target score . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04769))_
- The poison's effect also vanishes when another effect appears due to magic that belongs to mind . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04769))_
- Those that say mind are poisons that affect the target's mind. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04769))_
- The target score of a poison is the same as its toxicity score (described later). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04769))_
- If this type of poison enters your body, you will suffer this damage. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04770))_
- Each poison has its own unique strike power and bonus damage. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04770))_
- If you roll 10 or greater, it becomes a critical. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04770))_
- Those that say damage are poisons that damage life force (points), but there are common rules for these types of poisons. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04770))_
- For characters, the score is adventurer level, and for monsters, it's monster level. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04771))_
- After deducting this score, if 1 or more damage remains, your life force (points) will be subtracted by the amount of damage that remains. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04771))_
- After deducting this score, if 1 or more damage remains, your life force (points) will be subtracted by the amount of damage that remains. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04771))_
- Those affected by the poison can attempt a life force resistance roll. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04772))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04770))_

> Those that say damage are poisons that damage life force (points), but there are common rules for these types of poisons. Each poison has its own unique strike power and bonus damage. If this type of poison enters your body, you will suffer this damage. Make a strike roll as you would for any magic that deals damage. If you roll 10 or greater, it becomes a critical.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04771))_

> Those affected by the poison can reduce this damage.

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04770))_

> Those that say damage are poisons that damage life force (points), but there are common rules for these types of poisons. Each poison has its own unique strike power and bonus damage. If this type of poison enters your body, you will suffer this damage. Make a strike roll as you would for any magic that deals damage. If you roll 10 or greater, it becomes a critical.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04772))_

> If you successfully resist, the damage will be reduced (in this case, strike power will be -10 and no criticals will occur) or you will not suffer any damage at all.

## 《 Effect 》

## 《 Toxicity Score 》

- When you cast the holy magic Cure Poison on someone who has been poisoned, compare the final score when casting the magic to this toxicity score. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04776))_
- If you fail, the effect will appear, but if you succeed, the effect will only appear incomplete or won't appear at all. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04776))_
- Each poison has a toxicity score . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04776))_
- The toxicity scores listed here are just examples; by diluting the substance, the toxicity score can be made as low as desired, and by concentrating it, it can be made somewhat greater. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04776))_
- If the final score is equal to or greater than the toxicity score, the poison can be removed by the magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04776))_
- If you fail, the effect will appear, but if you succeed, the effect will only appear incomplete or won't appear at all. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04776))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04776))_

> When the poison enters the body, make a life force resistance roll (for monsters, a life point resistance roll) using the toxicity score as the target score.

## 《 Rarity 》

- You can also guess the name of the poison when you see the symptoms of the poisoned person. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04778))_
- This represents how famous the poison is. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04778))_
- If your success roll is 4 or more above the rarity , you can also know how to make the poison and its antidote (if it has one). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04778))_
- If a player declares that they want to make a poison (or antidote), the game master is responsible for deciding which materials are needed. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04779))_
- Also, poisons with magical effects can only be mixed by sorcerers. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04779))_
- Some poisons require very rare ingredients. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04779))_
- Also, poisons with magical effects can only be mixed by sorcerers. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04779))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04778))_

> An adventurer must make a success roll using sage skill level + intelligence bonus as the baseline score, and if they succeed, they will know about the poison.

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04778))_

> This represents how famous the poison is. The higher this score, the rarer the poison. An adventurer must make a success roll using sage skill level + intelligence bonus as the baseline score, and if they succeed, they will know about the poison. You can also guess the name of the poison when you see the symptoms of the poisoned person. If your success roll is 4 or more above the rarity , you can also know how to make the poison and its antidote (if it has one).

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04779))_

> However, even if you know how to make it, whether or not you can make it is another matter.

## 《 Effect Start Time 》

- Some poisons have an immediate effect, while others take many hours to take effect. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04781))_
- This is the time it takes from when the poison enters the body until it begins to take effect. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04781))_

## 《 Effect Duration 》

- It represents the time from when the poison's effect appears until it disappears. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04783))_

## 《 Description 》

- After basic data is presented, a detailed description is provided. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04785))_
- After basic data is presented, a detailed description is provided. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04785))_

- This is because this poison is completely transparent, tasteless, and odorless, so it'll never be noticed if it's mixed into alcohol or food. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04792))_

## [Centauri Blood (Touch/Damage)]

- It' s used in assassinations by soaking it into items that are close to the body, such as underwear, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04809))_
- A poison said to have been invented by a wise centaur. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04809))_
- Even if you wash it, only the color will come off, and the poisonous ingredients will remain on the cloth. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04809))_
- It's naturally a red liquid, but if you soak it in a cloth and then wash it, it becomes colorless. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04809))_
- There is a myth that it's made from the blood of centaurs, but it's actually made from the fruit of certain plants. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04809))_
- Even if you wash it, only the color will come off, and the poisonous ingredients will remain on the cloth. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04809))_

- A successful resistance roll will reduce the damage. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04810))_
- What's more, this poison is completely harmless at room temperature, and only becomes toxic when warmed by body heat. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04810))_
- The damage is a terrifying strike power 30 plus bonus damage 12. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04810))_
- Those wearing cloth soaked with centauri blood will experience intense pain and heat after one hour. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04810))_
- This poison is said to have killed a famous hero. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04810))_
- Once that happens, you can no longer strip it from your body or wash it off, and it will continue to deal damage every hour from then on. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04810))_
- Those wearing cloth soaked with centauri blood will experience intense pain and heat after one hour. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04810))_
- Once that happens, you can no longer strip it from your body or wash it off, and it will continue to deal damage every hour from then on. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04810))_
- What's more, this poison is completely harmless at room temperature, and only becomes toxic when warmed by body heat. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04810))_

## 12.2.2

## Illnesses

## How to Read Illness Details

- Illness details are expressed as follows. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04904))_

## [ Common Cold ]

- It's accompanied by a slight fever, cough, sneezing, runny nose, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04911))_
- Some people may experience diarrhea symptoms or joint pain. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04911))_
- This is what they call a cold. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04911))_
- You suffer a -1 penalty on all success rolls while you have a cold. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04911))_
- As the cold progresses, you may develop a high fever and also have difficulty breathing. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04911))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04906))_

> Symptoms=Fever, cough, sneezing, runny nose, diarrhea, arthritis

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04907))_

> Rarity=5

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04909))_

> Fatal Depth=5

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04910))_

> Infection Power=Moderate

## 《 Symptoms 》

- This briefly describes the conditions that appear in the illness. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04913))_

## 《 Rarity 》

- This means not only knowing the name of the disease, but also its characteristics and how to deal with it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04915))_
- This score is used when making a check to see if you know the illness. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04915))_
- If an owner of the sage skill or healer skill succeeds on a success roll using skill level + intelligence bonus as the baseline score and rarity as the target score, they can look at a sick patient and identify which illness they have. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04915))_
- This means not only knowing the name of the disease, but also its characteristics and how to deal with it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04915))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04915))_

> If a disease can be identified, owners of the healer skill can provide appropriate treatment.

## 《 Progression Speed/Progression Intensity/ Healing Score 》

- After the time indicated by progression speed has elapsed since you contracted the illness, roll two dice and look at the result. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04917))_
- Adventurer level may also be hero level, but even if you're a hero, you cannot win against illness . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04917))_
- When the depth becomes 0, you are completely recovered. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04917))_
- If the roll is greater than or equal to the progression intensity but less than the healing score , the illness neither worsens nor improves, and the depth remains the same. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04917))_
- After a certain period of time has elapsed after becoming ill, the illness either progresses further or gets better. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04917))_
- The degree of progression of an illness is indicated by a score called depth . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04917))_
- If the result is greater than or equal to the healing score , the illness will be cured and the depth will be reduced by 1. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04917))_
- Immediately after contracting an illness, the depth is 1. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04917))_
- The patient's adventurer level and life force bonus have no influence on this check. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04917))_
- After a certain period of time has elapsed after becoming ill, the illness either progresses further or gets better. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04917))_
- Immediately after contracting an illness, the depth is 1. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04917))_
- After the time indicated by progression speed has elapsed since you contracted the illness, roll two dice and look at the result. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04917))_
- For example, by working with salamander, fever, which is the main symptom of a cold, can be alleviated. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04918))_
- When a shaman performs such a treatment, they gain a +1 bonus on progression/healing checks. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04918))_
- For example, by working with salamander, fever, which is the main symptom of a cold, can be alleviated. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04918))_
- In addition to these, depending on the illness, there are herbs and special medicines that can provide bonuses to progression/healing checks. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04919))_
- If you succeed, the depth of the illness is reduced by 1 and you can make an additional success roll. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04920))_
- If this does not completely cure the illness, it'll be useless to cast these spells on the same patient until the caster's magic power increases. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04920))_
- The target score is double the healing score (added in parentheses). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04920))_
- You can continue to make this check until you fail or until the illness is completely cured. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04920))_
- If after some time has passed, an illness progression check occurs, the healer can also make a healing check. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04921))_
- However, even if they fail, the same healer can continue to care for the patient. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04921))_
- If a healer who knows the true nature of an illness cares for the patient for more than one hour per day, they can make a similar check using that healer's healer skill level + intelligence bonus as the baseline score. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04921))_
- If after some time has passed, an illness progression check occurs, the healer can also make a healing check. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04921))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04917))_

> If the roll is less than the progression intensity , the disease gets worse and the depth increases by 1.

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04917))_

> After a certain period of time has elapsed after becoming ill, the illness either progresses further or gets better. The degree of progression of an illness is indicated by a score called depth . Immediately after contracting an illness, the depth is 1. After the time indicated by progression speed has elapsed since you contracted the illness, roll two dice and look at the result. If the roll is less than the progression intensity , the disease gets worse and the depth increases by 1. If the rol

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04918))_

> Even if a shaman cannot use the spell Restore Health , they can still work with one type of spirit to alleviate symptoms.

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04918))_

> Even if a shaman cannot use the spell Restore Health , they can still work with one type of spirit to alleviate symptoms. For example, by working with salamander, fever, which is the main symptom of a cold, can be alleviated. When a shaman performs such a treatment, they gain a +1 bonus on progression/healing checks.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04920))_

> When the holy magic Cure Disease or Refresh , or the spirit magic Restore Health are cast, the caster must make a success roll using their magic power as the baseline score.

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04920))_

> When the holy magic Cure Disease or Refresh , or the spirit magic Restore Health are cast, the caster must make a success roll using their magic power as the baseline score. The target score is double the healing score (added in parentheses). If you succeed, the depth of the illness is reduced by 1 and you can make an additional success roll. You can continue to make this check until you fail or until the illness is completely cured. If this does not completely cure the illness, it'll be useless

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04921))_

> immediately after the illness's progression check), and you can only make one success roll.

## 《 Fatal Depth 》

- If, as an illness progresses, its depth reaches the fatal depth , the character will die from the illness. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04923))_

## 《 Infection Power 》

- who is caring for the patient. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04925))_
- If they fail, the character has contracted the illness at depth 1. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04925))_
- If it' s very strong , it has the infection power of a plague. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04925))_
- If the game master determines that there is a possibility of contracting the illness, have the character make a progression check for the illness (compare a 2D roll with progression intensity). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04925))_
- Strong is about the same level as influenza. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04925))_
- When an illness is very strong or strong , there is a high possibility that the infection will spread to the healer, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04925))_
- When it's very weak , it's not infectious and is unlikely to spread to other people. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04925))_
- As in the example, moderate means it's just a cold, and weak means it's not very infectious. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04925))_
- As in the example, moderate means it's just a cold, and weak means it's not very infectious. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04925))_

## 《 Description 》

- A detailed description and data on the illness is included at the end. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04927))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04928))_

## Illness Samples

- Most of the illnesses listed here are incurable diseases that are difficult to heal and have a high mortality rate. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04930))_
- Here are some examples of illnesses seen in Sword World . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04930))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04930))_

> The game master may also create any other illnesses they desire.

## [ Green Slime Rot ]

- This is said to be an illness that occurs when the power of gnome in the body weakens and the power of undine becomes stronger. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04936))_
- When the lethal depth of 3 is reached, the entire body rots, dissolves and washes away. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04936))_
- The chance of being infected by a character before death is not particularly high, but if you touch the green goo left behind by a character after death, there's a very high chance of being infected. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04936))_
- Immediately after infection, itchy green spots about 3 cm in diameter appear all over the body, but at depth 2, the spots emit a putrid odor and a dirty pus begins to flow out. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04936))_
- Immediately after infection, itchy green spots about 3 cm in diameter appear all over the body, but at depth 2, the spots emit a putrid odor and a dirty pus begins to flow out. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04936))_
- The chance of being infected by a character before death is not particularly high, but if you touch the green goo left behind by a character after death, there's a very high chance of being infected. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04936))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04932))_

> Symptoms=Green spots appear on the body, which eventually rots away from there Rarity=15

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04934))_

> Fatal Depth=3

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04935))_

> Infection Power=Moderate

## [ Cotton Weaver ]

- Progression Speed/Progression Intensity/ Healing Score=1 week/5/10 (20) Fatal Depth=3 _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04940))_
- When infected with this illness, the wound will not close at all, but moreover, something that looks like cotton will start to bulge out of the wound. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04942))_
- At depth 1, the character's actions are not affected at all. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04942))_
- If you pluck a little bit of the cotton, it will instantly disappear, but at 2, the character will fall into a coma and the cotton will come out no matter how much you pluck. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04942))_
- Although the progression speed is not that fast, it is an incurable disease that is difficult to treat once contracted. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04942))_
- The cause is a very small wound on the fingertip, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04942))_
- This is a strange disease that occurs due to a significant decrease in the power of undine within the body. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04942))_
- This is a strange disease that occurs due to a significant decrease in the power of undine within the body. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04942))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04938))_

> Symptoms=Cotton-like tissue peels off from the wound

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04939))_

> Rarity=14

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04941))_

> Infection Power=Weak

## [ Stone Skin ]

- However, the disease will continue to progress, and eventually your entire body will become a stone statue. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04949))_
- This is a terrifying illness in which the power of gnome becomes so strong that the surface of the body turns to stone beginning with the feet. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04949))_
- At depth 2, your knees become stiff. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04949))_
- At depth 3, your body will become stiff up to the waist, and at depth 4, your chest will become stiff, at which point your character will be unable to breathe and will die of suffocation. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04949))_
- At depth 1, your ankles will become stiff and you won't be able to walk. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04949))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04944))_

> Symptoms=The surface of the body gradually becomes hard like stone

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04945))_

> Rarity=14

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04947))_

> Fatal Depth=4

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04948))_

> Infection Power=Weak

## [ Dance Macabre ]

- When a person contracts this illness, their body begins to dance on its own, regardless of their consciousness. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04956))_
- As the depth of the illness increases, the dancing becomes more intense. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04956))_
- While suffering from this illness, you'll suffer a -4 penalty to your attack power and evasion speed, and you will not be able to cast ancient magic or spirit magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04956))_
- Since the person him or herself feels festive while suffering from the illness, it's believed that this is an abnormal manifestation of the power of leprechaun, which is a mind spirit. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04956))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04951))_

> Symptoms=The body keeps dancing separate from the person's will

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04952))_

> Rarity=13

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04954))_

> Fatal Depth=4

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04955))_

> Infection Power=Strong

## [ Deep Sleep ]

- Symptoms=Excessive sleep, extreme fatigue Rarity=11 Progression Speed/Progression Intensity/ Healing Score=3 days/6/9 (18) Fatal Depth=5 _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04958))_
- The reason for the outbreak of the disease is unknown, but there are many known cases where excessive use of the spirit magic Sleep has brought the disease to shamans. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04960))_
- It' s believed that this illness is caused by the power of the mind spirit sandman becoming too strong. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04960))_
- As the illness progresses, the patient will begin to complain of extreme fatigue with even the slightest amount of exercise, and the amount of time spent sleeping each day will increase (use depth x 3 + 9 as a standard). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04960))_
- It may also be triggered by an unnatural sleep caused by the ancient magic Sleep Cloud . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04960))_
- The patient will then die when it reaches the fatal depth of 5. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04960))_
- It may also be triggered by an unnatural sleep caused by the ancient magic Sleep Cloud . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04960))_
- The patient will then die when it reaches the fatal depth of 5. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04960))_
- It' s believed that this illness is caused by the power of the mind spirit sandman becoming too strong. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04960))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04959))_

> Infection Power=Weak

- This is an illness caused by bat bites. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04967))_
- Infections are not often caused except by bat bites. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04967))_

## [ Balloon Burst ]

- This illness causes difficulty breathing, along with body swelling, then you become unable to move, and eventually your body ruptures and you die. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04974))_
- This illness causes difficulty breathing, along with body swelling, then you become unable to move, and eventually your body ruptures and you die. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04974))_
- At depth 1, you suffer from severe breathing difficulties and will be unable to speak or cast spells. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04975))_
- At depth 2, your body becomes abnormally swollen and round, and you'll be in severe pain and unable to move. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04975))_
- If you reach the fatal depth of 3, your body will rupture and you will die. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04975))_
- Due to this, some argue that the spirit power of fire may also be involved in the onset of the illness. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04976))_
- This illness is not seen in cold regions. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04976))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04969))_

> Symptoms=Shortness of breath, body swelling, inability to move, pain throughout the body

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04970))_

> Rarity=12

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04972))_

> Fatal Depth=3

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04973))_

> Infection Power=Weak

## [ Vampire Skin ]

- At depth 2, vision is weakened and most success rolls suffer a -2 penalty. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04983))_
- At depth 1, painful blisters resembling burns accompany areas exposed to sunlight. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04983))_
- At depth 3 you lose your vision, and at depth 4 you fall into a coma. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04983))_
- This is an illness in which the power of dark spirits becomes unnecessarily strong, causing a hypersensitivity to light. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04983))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04978))_

> Symptoms=Become extremely weak against sunlight

> Rarity=15

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04981))_

> Fatal Depth=5

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04982))_

> Infection Power=Weak

## [ Humbaba Curse ]

- This disease is extremely contagious, classed as a plague. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04988))_
- Characters affected by this illness brought on by the fire of the magical beast humbaba will suffer from severe fever and vomiting, making almost no activity possible. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04988))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04985))_

## [ Lycanthropy ]

- Progression Speed/Progression Healing Score=Special/7/- (16) Fatal Depth=None _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04992))_
- Some sages claim that this is a type of curse (although these sages' claim is not accepted, as it cannot be removed with a Remove Curse spell). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04994))_
- This illness, which turns humans into lycanthropes, is thought to be different from normal illnesses caused by abnormalities in spirit power. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04994))_
- This illness, which turns humans into lycanthropes, is thought to be different from normal illnesses caused by abnormalities in spirit power. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04994))_
- If the roll is a 6 or less, you'll be infected with lycanthropy (the game master must secretly roll the dice if the adventurer does not know that lycanthropy is an infectious disease). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04995))_
- Those infected with lycanthropy will have swollen wounds and a high fever. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04996))_
- This cannot heal naturally. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04996))_
- Once the score is equal to or less than the number of days, the character becomes a full lycanthrope and transforms into a beast form. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04996))_
- Before becoming a full lycanthrope, it can be cured with a spell such as the holy magic Cure Disease , etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04997))_
- (the target score is 16), but once you become a beast, you cannot be cured again. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04997))_
- Before becoming a full lycanthrope, it can be cured with a spell such as the holy magic Cure Disease , etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04997))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04990))_

> Symptoms=Become a lycanthrope

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04991))_

> Rarity=8 Intensity/

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04993))_

> Infection Power=Very weak

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-04995))_

> Anyone wounded by a lycanthrope must roll 2D.

## [ Rat Disease ]

- Rarity=7 Progression Speed/Progression Intensity/ Healing Score=1 day/5/7 (14) Fatal Depth=5 _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05000))_

## [ Red Cap ]

- This illness was given its name because the entire body turns red and hair falls out. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05009))_
- leprechaun, the mind spirit, manifests abnormally and causes this illness. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05009))_
- Patients in this state go berserk and begin to attack things around them at random. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05009))_
- When the illness is at depth 1, symptoms include being unable to move due to being seized by fear and having nightmares every night. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05009))_
- When you're exposed to extremely strong fear, such as due to combat, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05009))_
- When the depth is at 2 or greater, changes will appear in your body shape. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05009))_
- You'll become hunched over, your hands abnormally long, your face contorted, and your eyes blazing red. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05009))_
- This illness was given its name because the entire body turns red and hair falls out. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05009))_
- When you're exposed to extremely strong fear, such as due to combat, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05009))_
- This illness is transmitted when eye contact is made with someone who's been infected. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05010))_
- In other words, roll two dice, and if the roll does not total 5 or greater, you'll be infected. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05010))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05004))_

## [ Lockjaw ]

- A character will be unable to do much while suffering from lockjaw due to a high fever. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05017))_
- the chance of infection is fairly high. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05017))_
- A wound can greatly disturb the balance of spirit power within the body, and the power of salamander in particular may become stronger. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05017))_
- It is said that this is because undine and gnome create illusions due to the mud. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05017))_
- This results in lockjaw, a disease that causes a severe fever. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05017))_
- A wound can greatly disturb the balance of spirit power within the body, and the power of salamander in particular may become stronger. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05017))_
- This results in lockjaw, a disease that causes a severe fever. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05017))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05013))_

> Rarity=7

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05017))_

> A wound can greatly disturb the balance of spirit power within the body, and the power of salamander in particular may become stronger. This results in lockjaw, a disease that causes a severe fever. A character will be unable to do much while suffering from lockjaw due to a high fever. It's not very contagious, but if you leave a wound with mud, etc. the chance of infection is fairly high. It is said that this is because undine and gnome create illusions due to the mud.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05015))_

> Fatal Depth=4

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05017))_

It's not very contagious, but if you leave a wound with mud, etc. the chance of infection is fairly high. It is said that this is because undine and gnome create illusions due to the mud.

## 12.2.3 Herbs

- Each has a provided rarity. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05020))_
- Below is a list of herbs known in Forcelia . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05020))_
- Each herb has a base trade value . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05021))_
- If an adventurer is lucky enough to obtain these items and sell them, a merchant will buy them for half the prices provided here. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05021))_
- The prices are for one day's worth for one adult. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05021))_
- You basically have to take them every day to receive a bonus on illness progression/healing checks. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05021))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05020))_

> Those with the sage, ranger, or healer skill can discern herbs by looking at them if they succeed on a success roll using rarity as the target score and skill level + intelligence bonus as the baseline score.

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05020))_

> Below is a list of herbs known in Forcelia . Each has a provided rarity. Those with the sage, ranger, or healer skill can discern herbs by looking at them if they succeed on a success roll using rarity as the target score and skill level + intelligence bonus as the baseline score.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05021))_

> If adventurers are in a large city, they can purchase them at the prices provided here.

## [ Arnica ]

- Each plant has 2 to 3 flowers. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05025))_
- The flowers can only be stored for 2 to 3 days. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05025))_
- This is a perennial plant that's often found in high mountains. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05025))_
- One flower is enough for one day for an adult. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05025))_
- The flowers can only be stored for 2 to 3 days. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05025))_

> Base Trade Value=600 gamels

> The flowers can alleviate fever, and when used on a patient suffering from a fever, they'll receive a +2 bonus on progression/healing checks.

## [ Upas ]

- The bark of this tree is a type of poison that causes feelings of vomiting. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05029))_
- A large amount of bark can be removed from one tree and can also be stored. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05029))_
- However, it can be dangerous if used too much. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05029))_
- This is a tall tree that has strong fire spirit power and can be found in areas with high average temperatures. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05029))_

> Rarity=11

> Base Trade Value=360 gamels

> It's not useful for treating illness, but is effective when accidentally taking other poisons, giving you a +2 bonus to resistance rolls.

## [ Dulcamara ]

- When used on illnesses that cause severe inflammation of the skin, such as green slime rot, it provides a +2 bonus on progression/healing checks. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05033))_
- Dozens of seeds can be harvested from one plant, and 2 to 3 seeds are enough for one adult per day. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05033))_
- Seeds can be stored for long periods of time as long as they're in good condition. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05033))_
- Its seeds are ground and mixed with oil to make an ointment that's used to treat skin diseases. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05033))_
- This is a vine-like shrub that can be found in highlands. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05033))_
- When used on illnesses that cause severe inflammation of the skin, such as green slime rot, it provides a +2 bonus on progression/healing checks. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05033))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05031))_

> Rarity=13

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05032))_

> Base Trade Value=320 gamels

## [ Henruda ]

- This herb cannot be stored and if it's not used within three days of being collected, it will have no effect at all. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05037))_
- This herb is useful as a preventative against monsters with the ability to petrify and Petrification magic, but it's also a wonder drug for the dreaded stone skin . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05037))_
- This is an herb that grows in the wilderness and is the staple food of the cockatrice, a magical beast. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05037))_
- One henruda plant is enough for one adult for one day. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05037))_
- This herb cannot be stored and if it's not used within three days of being collected, it will have no effect at all. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05037))_

## [ Mandrake ]

- If used against an illness that stimulates going berserk, you'll receive a +2 bonus on illness progression/healing checks. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05041))_
- One mandrake is enough for one adult to take for one week. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05041))_
- The roots of young mandrake are prized as an ingredient in sedatives. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05041))_
- Depending on the refining process, mandrake can also be used as an ingredient for aphrodisiacs, poisons, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05042))_
- This is an amber stone that comes from the body of the mythical beast lynx. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05045))_
- If you crush, brew, and drink this stone, you will receive a +4 bonus on progression/healing checks for illnesses that affect the mind (such as dance macabre). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05047))_
- If you crush, brew, and drink this stone, you will receive a +4 bonus on progression/healing checks for illnesses that affect the mind (such as dance macabre). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05047))_
