## Work Requests to NPCs

- As you progress through your adventures, such things will happen. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05050))_
- You found a beautiful gemstone and would like to have it forged into a ring. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05050))_
- In these cases, adventurers can request NPCs to do this kind of work. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05051))_
- If the task becomes a little more complex, use numbers such as x 40 or x 50 instead of x 30. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05051))_
- Also, if there's no one available to do this for you, there is of course no point in paying any amount of money. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05051))_
- For example, if you request an appraisal from a 5th level sage, you will have to pay 5 x 5 x 30 = 750 gamels. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05051))_
- For example, if you request an appraisal from a 5th level sage, you will have to pay 5 x 5 x 30 = 750 gamels. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05051))_
- If the task becomes a little more complex, use numbers such as x 40 or x 50 instead of x 30. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05051))_
- If the task you're requesting from an NPC is something that will completely restrain that NPC, you will need to hire an NPC . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05052))_
- In this case, higher compensation is required. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05052))_
- The average price per day is about NPC's skill level multiplied by 50 to 200 gamels . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05052))_
- 154) to find out which skill level NPCs are in which locations. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05053))_
- For requests for such work, you'd usually give 10% to 30% as an advance payment. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05055))_
- If the contractor willfully abandons the job, it is customary to return double the advance payment to the client. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05055))_
- This is the price an adventurer must pay when making a request to an NPC . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05056))_
- Adventurers themselves cannot go around charging these same rates. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05056))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05051))_

> If it' s a very simple task like those above, you can have it done for NPC skill level x skill level x 30 gamels .

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05055))_

> If the work fails , you do not have to pay the remainder.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05056))_

> If you don't have clients, you won't get paid (so just patiently wait for work at the adventurer shop, okay?).

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05057))_

## 13.1

## Types of Monsters

- The meaning of each type are as follows. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05064))_
- This is based on the types set by Laverna, the famous witch of Orphan, who compiled the Natural History of Alecrast . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05064))_
- There are 12 types of monsters in Alecrast: fae , youma , spirits , titans , mythical beasts , magical beasts , animals , plants , undead , magical creatures , daemons , humans , and others . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05064))_
- certain that spirits are involved in the activities of life itself. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05065))_
- Poisons, illnesses, and mental attacks are all meaningless against spirits. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05065))_
- Also, they will not be wounded even if attacked by the spirit power they control. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05065))_

## 《 Fae 》

- Fae are a demi-human race that originally lived in the fairy world, but for various reasons they came to live in this world and were unable to return to their original world. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05067))_
- However, some races, such as high elves and fairies, still have the ability to travel between the two worlds. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05067))_
- They are relatively friendly towards humans, but do not actively try to connect with them. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05067))_
- However, some races, such as high elves and fairies, still have the ability to travel between the two worlds. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05067))_
- Elves, dwarves, and grassrunners are also fae, and these three races can also be player characters. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05068))_

## 《 Youma 》

- They have a very strong hostile relationship with the fae, and of course they are not friendly with humans either. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05070))_
- Youma are a race of fae that have evil personalities. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05070))_
- Typical examples of youma include goblins and gremlins. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05071))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05070))_

> They may also use spirit magic or dark magic.

## 《 Spirits 》

- These mad spirits are extremely dangerous. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05073))_
- Spirits have a will, but they can be called energy rather than living beings. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05073))_
- They are closely related to the natural elements of earth, water, fire, wind and light, as well as darkness, and emotions and the nature of the heart, which are the functions of the mind. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05073))_
- A mad spirit will return to the spirit world as soon as its life points or spirit points reach 0. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05073))_
- They cannot adapt to the material world and will act destructively towards everything in it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05073))_
- However, they cannot expand the power of their spells. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05074))_
- No matter how much they use it, it will not consume their mental points. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05074))_
- Regardless of a spirit's rarity (a score related to how well-known the monster is, which will be explained later), a shaman knows all spirits. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05075))_
- Typical spirits include sylph, undine, and will-o-wisp. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05076))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05073))_

> In addition, spirits may reside in natural creatures and objects, and above all, it seems Spirits that appear in the material world in response to a shaman's summoning usually return to the spirit world after fulfilling their role (when you use spirit magic).

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05073))_

> Spirits have a will, but they can be called energy rather than living beings. They are closely related to the natural elements of earth, water, fire, wind and light, as well as darkness, and emotions and the nature of the heart, which are the functions of the mind. In addition, spirits may reside in natural creatures and objects, and above all, it seems Spirits that appear in the material world in response to a shaman's summoning usually return to the spirit world after fulfilling their role (wh

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05074))_

> Spirits can use an unlimited amount of spirit magic depending on their power.

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05074))_

> Spirits can use an unlimited amount of spirit magic depending on their power. No matter how much they use it, it will not consume their mental points. However, they cannot expand the power of their spells.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05075))_

> When encountering a spirit, a shaman can recognize a spirit without the need for a success roll.

## 《 Titans 》

- Some are said to be titan species of fae or youma, but others are clearly not. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05078))_
- The origin of the titans is unclear. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05078))_
- Some sages claim that, like the gods, they were born directly from the primordial titans, and that the gods were the greatest titans among them (though of course priests and theologians strongly deny this). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05078))_
- Their bodies are much larger than that of a human. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05079))_
- Their strong bodies hold terrifying power, so it is best not to deal with them unless you're a very experienced adventurer. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05079))_
- Among the titans, some races are relatively gentle, while others are frenetic and hostile. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05079))_
- Their strong bodies hold terrifying power, so it is best not to deal with them unless you're a very experienced adventurer. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05079))_

## 《 Mythical Beasts and Magical Beasts 》

- Mythical beast and magical beast are general terms for monsters that have living bodies, unlike spirits or undead. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05081))_
- These include three types: things that have existed long before humans, such as dragons, things that live like humans, and artificial creatures created through the experiments of ancient sorcerers that have turned wild. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05081))_
- Many have a mixture of features from multiple animals. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05081))_
- Mythical beast and magical beast are general terms for monsters that have living bodies, unlike spirits or undead. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05081))_
- These include three types: things that have existed long before humans, such as dragons, things that live like humans, and artificial creatures created through the experiments of ancient sorcerers that have turned wild. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05081))_
- Some of them have high intellect, while others have become wild and have lost most of their intellect. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05082))_
- Many of them have special abilities, like using ancient magic, or having undifferentiated spirit power (fire, ice, life, mind, etc.) in their bodies (in these cases, attacks involving that spirit power have no effect on them). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05082))_
- They have a near-infinite lifespan, but leave behind very few offspring, and so are doomed to gradual decline and extinction. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05082))_
- They are also not affected by illness or poison, and do not sleep in the normal sense of the word. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05082))_
- These creatures have an intellect close to that of humans, and create societies and live their lives in the same way as humans. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05083))_
- Many of them are unable to reproduce on their own and can only produce offspring with the help of humans. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05083))_
- Many of them are unable to reproduce on their own and can only produce offspring with the help of humans. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05083))_
- Sleep is necessary for the maintenance of normal animals and humans both as individuals and a race, but some mythical beasts and magical beasts are created such that they do not need to sleep. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05084))_
- These mythical beasts and magical beasts created by such magic have almost no reproductive ability. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05084))_
- However, on the other hand, they can survive on very little food. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05084))_
- Magic that causes sleep (such as " Sleep Cloud " or " Sleep ") has no effect on such things. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05084))_
- To protect themselves or to show off their power, sorcerers of the ancient kingdom period often gave them various offensive abilities and frenetic personalities, and many of these kinds of mythical and magical beasts are dangerous. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05084))_
- Magic that causes sleep (such as " Sleep Cloud " or " Sleep ") has no effect on such things. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05084))_
- However, this is rather a result of selfish value judgment by humans, and even if they are called mythical beasts, they do not seem to like interacting with humans. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05085))_
- There are also things such as dragons that are called both mythical and magical beasts. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05085))_
- Creatures that have a beautiful appearance and are neutral or friendly towards humans are called mythical beasts , while those that have an ugly or unpleasant appearance and are harmful to humans are called magical beasts . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05085))_
- There are also things such as dragons that are called both mythical and magical beasts. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05085))_
- Examples of mythical beasts include griffons, unicorns, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05086))_
- and magical beasts include chimeras, manticores etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05086))_

## 《 Animals 》

- There are animals in Forcelia too. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05088))_
- Of course, they are basically the same animals that live in our world, but they also include those of unusual size and animals that are already extinct in our world. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05088))_

## 《 Plants 》

- Plants are basically the same as those that live in our world, but there are also abnormal creatures that move around under the influence of magic, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05090))_

## 《 Undead 》

- Undead are monsters that exist and move around through forces that are the exact opposite of those of us humans and normal animals. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05092))_
- There are many mysteries surrounding the origin of these undead, but it's completely different from how normal animals give birth. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05093))_
- This negative life force is sometimes called the undeath force . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05093))_
- If you meet them, there is a high probability that you'll fight. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05094))_
- Many spells with mental effects are also meaningless. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05095))_
- They do not require rest in the normal sense and can never be magically put to sleep. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05095))_
- Undead are not affected by poison or illness. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05095))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05093))_

> If the source of our life is called positive life force, then the undead's source can be called negative life force.

## 《 Magical Creatures 》

- Pseudo-life forms created (or created in the past) using ancient magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05097))_
- During the ancient kingdom period, various magical creatures were created as a challenge to the gods . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05098))_
- The sorcerers sought to gain power as creators. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05098))_
- The magical creatures that were created in this way basically continue to live indefinitely without needing to eat or breathe, and many of them are still around today. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05098))_
- Among the failures that were carelessly discarded, there are some that are still alive due to their strong life force. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05099))_
- There were also many failures in the production of magical creatures. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05099))_
- These are also of the magical creature type. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05099))_

## 《 Daemons/Underworld Creatures 》

- In the age of the gods, they were known as terrifying slaughterers who followed the dark god Phalaris, and in the age of the ancient kingdom, they were summoned to this material world by sorcerers who were skilled in summoning magic, offering their wicked power to the sorcerers. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05101))_
- They have a number of special abilities and wicked personalities, making them extremely dangerous. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05101))_
- Although they rarely make their presence felt in this world, those summoned during the days of the ancient kingdom still dwell in underground labyrinths and remote ruins. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05101))_
- They are said to have a deep connection with the dark gods, and many are also well-versed in dark magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05101))_
- Daemons are underworld monsters that live in a material world different from ours. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05101))_
- Furthermore, in the original world in which daemons live the underworld - it's said that they form society just like humans. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05102))_
- Many of them seem to have a humanoid appearance, but there are many different types, such as those with horns, tails, wings, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05102))_
- Many of them seem to have a humanoid appearance, but there are many different types, such as those with horns, tails, wings, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05102))_
- The highest rank ones, called daemon lords and archdaemons, are said to have powers comparable to that of ancient titans or dragons. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05103))_
- Below them are types called greater daemons and lesser daemons, and even the lowest rank Lesser Daemons have powers that far exceed those of humans. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05103))_
- There are different ranks of daemons. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05103))_
- With the discovery of two similar daemons (lesser daemons and greater daemons) called doubleburg and doppelgänger, it's become an established theory among sages that daemons are born as lower rank daemons and grow to become higher rank. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05104))_
- In the underworld where daemons live, there are also animal-like creatures with low intellect. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05105))_
- Sages say that they are comparable to the animals in our world, and claim that this is proof that there are multiple material worlds. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05105))_

## 13.2.1

## 《 Humans 》

- Even among humans, there are those who are called villains. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05109))_
- There are bandits who build strongholds in the mountains and fields and attack nearby villages and roads, and dark priests who believe in wicked gods and do evil according to their teachings. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05109))_

## Monster Catalog

- decrease the scores listed here by 1 or 2 points. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05111))_

## How to Read the Monster Catalog

- A few lines of game data are shown first, followed by a detailed explanation. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05114))_
- The meaning of each game detail is as follows. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05114))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05113))_

> Dogs have a habit of following their leaders, and humans have taken advantage of this habit to use dogs for various purposes. Dogs react to humans in a variety of ways. If they are domesticated, they will not attack humans because they consider humans to be their masters. However, special guard dogs, military dogs, etc. that have been trained to treat all but specific people as enemies will attack even humans larger than themselves. Dogs are especially aggressive towards intruders-they also have a strong sense of territory. If it's a wild dog that's not owned by humans, it will act according to its own instincts. If they're hungry and think their opponent is weak, they may attack.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05113))_

> If they're hungry and think their opponent is weak, they may attack.

## 《 Monster Level 》

- This is a score that corresponds to a character's adventurer level, and represents the general strength of that monster. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05116))_
- If it's 10, even a seasoned adventurer will have a hard time crossing swords with it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05116))_
- Monster data is written in the following format. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05119))_

## [ Dog ]

- Monster Level=1 Rarity=3 Agility=15 Movement Speed=20 Number=One to around ten Frequency=Frequent Intellect=Animal Reaction=Neutral to friendly Attack Points=Fangs: 8 (1) Strike Points=4 Evasion Points=9 (2) Defense Points=4 Life Points/Resistance=12/7 (0) Mental Points/Resistance=5/7 (0) Special Abilities=None in particular Habitat=Forests, meadows, human villages Perception=Five senses Languages=None _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05121))_
- Dogs are animals that have a very close relationship with humans. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05122))_
- The data presented here is for the most commonly seen medium-sized dog, and its body height is roughly from the knee to the thigh of a human. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05122))_
- Dogs have been domesticated and used for a variety of purposes, such as hunting dogs, guard dogs, or simply as pet dogs. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05122))_
- New breeds have been artificially created by the hands of humans, and there are many subspecies, ranging from small dogs that are no taller than a person's shins to large dogs that are taller than a human's waist. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05122))_
- They have fur and fangs in their mouths. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05122))_
- Dogs have been domesticated and used for a variety of purposes, such as hunting dogs, guard dogs, or simply as pet dogs. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05122))_

- There are also monsters in Alecrast that do not belong to any of the 12 types. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05124))_
- damage can be reduced by this monster level score. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05125))_

## 《 Rarity 》

- The lower this score, the more well-known the monster is. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05127))_
- This is a score that indicates whether the monster is famous or not. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05127))_
- 118), this rarity is the target score for a success roll. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05127))_

## 《 Agility 》

- It's used to determine the order of actions in a combat round. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05129))_

## 《 Movement Speed 》

- Indicates the speed at which the monster moves. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05131))_
- It's also used to determine whether a character can escape from the monster. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05132))_
- If the monster's movement speed is greater than the character's agility, the character will not be able to escape from the monster unless they think of something. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05132))_
- If the monster's movement speed is greater than the character's agility, the character will not be able to escape from the monster unless they think of something. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05132))_
- In rare cases, there are monsters that do not move on the ground (such as those that are always floating in the air), so in these cases, the movement method is written in parentheses immediately after the movement speed. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05133))_
- For such monsters, two types of movement speed are written. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05133))_
- The number before the slash (/) is movement speed on the ground , and the number after the slash is movement speed when performing special movements . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05133))_
- In rare cases, there are monsters that do not move on the ground (such as those that are always floating in the air), so in these cases, the movement method is written in parentheses immediately after the movement speed. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05133))_
- The number before the slash (/) is movement speed on the ground , and the number after the slash is movement speed when performing special movements . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05133))_

## 《 Number 》

- Monsters that act in groups are usually encountered in large numbers, while monsters that have a strong sense of territory and really only exist alone in a certain area are unlikely to be encountered in numbers greater than one. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05135))_
- This is the most common number appearing when encountering that monster. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05135))_
- Monsters that act in groups are usually encountered in large numbers, while monsters that have a strong sense of territory and really only exist alone in a certain area are unlikely to be encountered in numbers greater than one. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05135))_
- However, in order to do so, you will need a reason that the players can understand. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05136))_
- This data is not exact, and the game master may change the number appearing depending on the circumstances of the scenario. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05136))_

## 《 Frequency 》

- It's a bit unnatural to have rare or very rare monsters repeatedly appear in a scenario. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05138))_
- In such cases, it would be best to provide a reason that the players can understand. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05138))_
- This is the frequency at which the monster appears. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05138))_
- The types in descending order of frequency are frequent , moderate , rare , and very rare . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05138))_

## 《 Intellect 》

- There are eight types: none , almost none , obeys commands , animal , low , human , high , and very high . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05140))_
- If it says none , that means it doesn't have intelligence, so to speak. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05141))_
- It does not think, nor does it even have instincts. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05141))_
- Spells that affect the mind have no effect on these monsters. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05141))_

- Of course, spells that affect the mind cannot be expected to have any effect. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05142))_

## 《 Reaction 》

- This represents the monster's general reaction when it encounters adventurers. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05150))_
- It can be violent , adversarial , neutral , friendly , hunger-based or commandbased . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05150))_
- Many have no concept of running away. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05151))_
- If it says violent , that means it will attack immediately. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05151))_
- Examples include undead who have hatred for the living, and plants that act solely on reflex. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05151))_
- If it says violent , that means it will attack immediately. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05151))_
- Depending on the situation, they can be your enemy or your ally. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05153))_
- If it says neutral , it means the monster holds no special feelings of hostility nor allyship towards the adventurers. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05153))_
- If it says neutral , it means the monster holds no special feelings of hostility nor allyship towards the adventurers. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05153))_
- If it says friendly , it means the monster has friendly feelings towards adventurers (humans and fae). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05154))_
- If you don't feel like they're a nuisance to you, they might provide some assistance. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05154))_
- In addition, out in the world are also monsters that get carried away , who do things that end up causing annoyance even though they mean no harm. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05154))_
- However, if an adventurer takes hostile action, they will naturally consider retaliation. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05154))_
- If it says friendly , it means the monster has friendly feelings towards adventurers (humans and fae). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05154))_
- This is because they may attack adventurers, seeing them as food. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05155))_
- If it says hunger-based , it means they're basically neutral. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05155))_
- However, for carnivorous (omnivorous) animals, it can be very dangerous when they're hungry. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05155))_
- If it says hunger-based , it means they're basically neutral. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05155))_
- This is because they may attack adventurers, seeing them as food. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05155))_
- Whether they consider adventurers to be enemies or not depends on the commands given to them. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05156))_
- Command-based is often seen in magical creatures and lower grade undead that move according to the commands of others. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05156))_
- There are several other reactions as well, but you can understand their meaning by looking at the explanation text after the data. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05157))_

> If it says adversarial , it means they consider adventurers (human or fae) to be their enemies. The specific actions they'll take will vary depending on the power dynamic (difference in number) between the adventurers and monsters, as well as the intelligence of the monsters. Even if the monster is adversarial, if the adventurers have the superior numbers, it will not attack immediately and may try to use trickery.

## 《 Attack Points 》

- The higher this score, the more likely the monster will be able to hit you with an attack. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05159))_
- If you fail, you will suffer damage (refer to Chapter 4: Weapon Combat ). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05159))_
- This represents the monster's attack method and its accuracy. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05159))_
- For example, Horn ： 12 (5)/Hoof ： 12 (5) means that two attacks can be made with horn and hoof. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05160))_
- Multiple attack points are also listed for these cases. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05160))_
- Each targeted character must make a success roll to determine whether they're able to avoid the attack. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05160))_
- Some monsters have multiple attack methods. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05160))_
- For example, Horn ： 12 (5)/Hoof ： 12 (5) means that two attacks can be made with horn and hoof. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05160))_
- If there are multiple attack methods, but they are written on two (or more) lines, the monster may have multiple attack methods, but can only use one of them during a round. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05161))_
- If there are multiple attack methods, but they are written on two (or more) lines, the monster may have multiple attack methods, but can only use one of them during a round. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05161))_
- The numbers in parentheses next to each attack point score are used in the optional rule 16.1: Combat in Which Monsters Roll Dice. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05162))_

## 《 Evasion Points 》

- This represents the degree to which the monster can evade attacks. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05169))_
- If you fail, your character's attack will miss. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05169))_
- In order for a character to hit a monster with an attack, they must succeed on a success roll using these evasion points as the target score and their attack power as the baseline score. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05169))_

## 《 Defense Points 》

- This is represented by defense points. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05171))_
- This is exactly the same as a character's damage reduction due to armor (defense rolls) and adventurer level. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05171))_
- to reduce damage (some fae and youma may wear armor just like humans). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05171))_
- When a monster suffers damage from a character's (weapon) attack, they can reduce the damage by the amount of defense points. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05171))_
- Defense points are only effective against attacks such as weapons, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05172))_
- Whether or not a character can reduce damage through armor is the standard for deciding whether to use defense points or monster level. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05172))_
- Defense points are only effective against attacks such as weapons, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05172))_
- Therefore, only defense points should be applied when reducing damage from weapon attacks. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05173))_
- Monster level may not be further subtracted from it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05173))_
- Therefore, only defense points should be applied when reducing damage from weapon attacks. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05173))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05173))_

> Monster level, like adventurer level, prevents all damage, but a monster's defense points already include damage reduction due to monster level. Therefore, only defense points should be applied when reducing damage from weapon attacks. Monster level may not be further subtracted from it.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05171))_

> Just as characters can reduce damage through armor, monsters also have thick skin, shells, scales, etc.

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05173))_

> Monster level, like adventurer level, prevents all damage, but a monster's defense points already include damage reduction due to monster level. Therefore, only defense points should be applied when reducing damage from weapon attacks. Monster level may not be further subtracted from it.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05172))_

> When struck by magic or similar attacks, defense points cannot reduce damage, monster level reduces damage instead.

## 《 Life Points/Resistance 》

- There are two numbers written. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05175))_
- The number before the slash (/) is life points, and the number after is life point resistance. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05175))_
- The number before the slash (/) is life points, and the number after is life point resistance. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05175))_
- Life points represents the monster's life force. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05176))_
- As with a character, when a monster's life points fall to 0 or less, they become disabled and, in some cases, die. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05176))_
- Where a character would make a life force resistance roll, a monster would use their life point resistance. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05177))_
- For characters, the resistance roll is successful if the final score of the resistance roll is equal to the toxicity score, etc., but for monsters, the life point resistance must be greater than the toxicity score, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05177))_
- a life force resistance roll determines whether they can avoid or reduce the effects of the poison. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05177))_
- When a character is poisoned, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05177))_
- When a monster is poisoned, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05177))_
- (Life point) resistance is a substitute for a character's life force resistance roll . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05177))_
- In the case of monsters, life point resistance is used instead. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05177))_
- If the life point resistance is greater, the monster will be safe from the effects of the poison. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05177))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05176))_

> When a monster suffers damage, it will lose life points.

## 《 Mental Points/Resistance 》

- Mental points have the same meaning as a character's mental power. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05180))_
- Monsters whose mental points are reduced to 0 (or less) by Shade magic, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05180))_
- Mental point resistance is a score that's a substitute for a character's mental power resistance roll , so when a character casts magic on a monster, this mental point resistance becomes the target score. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05180))_
- If the final score is equal to or greater than the monster's mental point resistance, the magic will successfully be cast. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05181))_
- This is done purely for consistency, so that from the character's perspective, tied success rolls are always successful . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05181))_
- Conversely, for a monster to resist magic, its mental point resistance must be greater than the magic's final score. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05181))_
- A tie means the magic will successfully be cast. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05181))_
- A tie means the magic will successfully be cast. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05181))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05180))_

> Mental points have the same meaning as a character's mental power. When a monster uses magic, it consumes mental points, just like a character. Monsters whose mental points are reduced to 0 (or less) by Shade magic, etc. will fall unconscious. Mental point resistance is a score that's a substitute for a character's mental power resistance roll , so when a character casts magic on a monster, this mental point resistance becomes the target score.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05181))_

> When a character casts a spell on a monster, they must make a success roll using their magic power as the baseline score.

## 《 Special Abilities 》

- Some breathe fire, and others are not affected by mental attacks. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05183))_
- There are some that cannot be hurt by normal weapons, and require magic or magical weapons to defeat them. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05183))_
- Monsters may have various special abilities . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05183))_
- When a monster has such special abilities, they are briefly expressed here. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05184))_

## 《 Habitat 》

- If you want to have the monster appear in a place other than what's shown here, you'll need a reason that the players can understand. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05186))_
- This is where the monster commonly lives. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05186))_

## 《 Perception 》

- There are three types: five senses , pseudo , and magic . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05188))_
- This represents the monster's sensory abilities. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05188))_
- It may also include specialized features such as darkvision , infravision , illumination , sonar , and vibration sense . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05189))_
- Illusions that deceive monsters which lack these senses will be ineffective. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05189))_
- Five senses refer to the same five senses that humans use to perceive the outside world: vision, hearing, smell, taste, and touch. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05189))_
- In some cases, some of these senses may be missing. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05189))_
- It may also include specialized features such as darkvision , infravision , illumination , sonar , and vibration sense . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05189))_
- Dwarf player characters have this ability. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05190))_
- ( Darkvision ) means the monster can see completely in the dark. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05190))_
- ( Darkvision ) means the monster can see completely in the dark. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05190))_
- ( Illumination ) means the monster can see as clearly as daytime even under very weak light, such as only starlight. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05192))_
- ( Illumination ) means the monster can see as clearly as daytime even under very weak light, such as only starlight. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05192))_
- Therefore, they have almost no restrictions on action even in the dark. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05193))_
- ( Sonar ) means the monster can use sound waves or ultrasonic echoes to perceive the outside world. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05193))_
- Therefore, they have almost no restrictions on action even in the dark. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05193))_
- ( Sonar ) means the monster can use sound waves or ultrasonic echoes to perceive the outside world. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05193))_
- They cannot perceive things that are flying in the air or that are not moving. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05194))_
- ( Vibration sense ) means the monster can sense vibrations in the ground and perceive things moving around it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05194))_
- ( Vibration sense ) means the monster can sense vibrations in the ground and perceive things moving around it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05194))_
- Illusions are ineffective on monsters whose perception is magic . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05196))_
- Those whose sensory abilities are magic perceive their surroundings with magical senses. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05196))_
- These senses cannot be blocked or deceived by any means. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05196))_
- These senses cannot be blocked or deceived by any means. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05196))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05193))_

> ( Sonar ) means the monster can use sound waves or ultrasonic echoes to perceive the outside world. Therefore, they have almost no restrictions on action even in the dark.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05195))_

> Those whose sensory abilities are pseudo have five pseudo-senses through magical means. After all, one part may be missing, or they may have special senses. In such cases, there is an organ that captures the sensation in a pseudo manner. If those organs are destroyed, the pseudo-senses will no longer be usable. For example, skeletons can use their empty eye sockets for pseudo vision. Therefore, if they're blindfolded, they won't be able to see, and they won't be able to see anything approaching from behind. Monsters whose perception is pseudo can experience illusions.

## 《 Languages 》

- This indicates whether the monster speaks, and if so, what kind of language it uses. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05198))_
- Only normal languages are described, and runes (except for silent spirit) are omitted. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05198))_
- Only normal languages are described, and runes (except for silent spirit) are omitted. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05198))_

> If it says none , then the monster does not use language (those with obeys commands intellect may not speak themselves, but may understand what others are saying).

## [ Pixie ]

- Most of them have the appearance of women, but there are also individuals that have the appearance of men. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05217))_
- Also, for some reason, they seem to be wearing something that looks like clothes. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05217))_
- Although they are relatively friendly towards humans, they do not actively interact with humans and rarely appear in public. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05217))_
- Moreover, they seem to have a very close relationship with the small spirits called sprites, and have as a basic ability the power of the Invisibility spell that the sprites provide to shamans, which makes them all the more difficult to witness. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05217))_
- However, in order to remain invisible, they need focus, and if they cannot do this, you will not be able to use Invisibility , and even if they do use it, if they lose their concentration (such as when attacking or using other magic, etc.) they will appear instantly. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05217))_
- They have wings on their backs reminiscent of insects. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05217))_
- However, in order to remain invisible, they need focus, and if they cannot do this, you will not be able to use Invisibility , and even if they do use it, if they lose their concentration (such as when attacking or using other magic, etc.) they will appear instantly. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05217))_
- They'll whisper in your ear while remaining hidden from view, and thrust a weapon in their hand (it appears to be a needle-thin dagger) into your butt. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05218))_

## 13.2.2 Fae

- However, there are some places in the material world that have contact with the fairy world. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05222))_
- Stories are often told of humans who inadvertently wandered into the fairy world from these places. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05222))_
- Fairies are a representative race of fae, and many of them still live in the fairy world, and rarely come to the material world, the world we live in. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05222))_
- Fairies take the form of beautiful elf women, often mostly naked or clad in thin silk garments. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05223))_
- As they are residents of the fairy world, they have a deep connection with spirits, and use spirit magic up to 3rd level. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05223))_
- They may carry items such as silver daggers, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05223))_
- They are about the same height as elves, but the most prominent difference between them and elves is the beautiful wings that grow from their backs. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05223))_
- Fairies are sometimes seen where these two worlds meet. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05223))_
- If they really get into trouble, they will choose to use their power of spirit magic rather than weapons. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05223))_
- These wings are very thin but strong, allowing them to fly, albeit at a slow speed. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05223))_
- They may carry items such as silver daggers, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05223))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05220))_

> Combat is unlikely to occur, but when it does, pixies can use up to 2nd level spirit magic.

## [ Pooka ]

- Monster Level=3 Rarity=12 Agility=18 Movement Speed=18 Number=One to several Frequency=Rare Intellect=Human Reaction=Friendly Attack Points=Fist: 11 (4) Strike Points=4 Evasion Points=13 (6) Defense Points=5 Life Points/Resistance=10/10 (3) Mental Points/Resistance=8/12 (5) Special Abilities=3rd level spirit magic (Magic Intensity/Magic Power=12/5) Shapeshift (Animal) Habitat=Forests Languages=Fairy, silent spirit, regional _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05225))_
- However, they cannot transform into very large animals such as bears, wolves, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05227))_
- However, they don't always wander around naked; they have the ability to transform into forest animals, and most of the time they live as animals. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05227))_
- This transformation cannot be detected even by using Sense Magic or Sense Aura . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05227))_
- However, they cannot transform into very large animals such as bears, wolves, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05227))_
- They can use spirit magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05228))_
- They are friendly to characters they meet in the forest, and will contact them in an attempt to befriend them. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05228))_
- However, once you get in touch with them, they will help you in many ways. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05228))_
- Their shaman skill level is 3. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05228))_
- In addition, they will show lifelong loyalty to a character who saves them from danger, and will act together with them. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05228))_
- However, they like mischief, and in order to surprise you, they will sometimes call out to you while disguised as an animal, hiding their appearance, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05228))_
- They will guide you through the forest and tell you where dangerous places are. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05228))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05226))_

> Perception=Five senses (infravision)

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05227))_

> While transformed, they can use all of the animal's physical abilities and can also speak.

## [ Featherfolk ]

- Monster Level=4 Rarity=9 Agility=16 Movement Speed=10/30 (air) Number=One to several Frequency=Rare Intellect=Human Reaction=Neutral Attack Points=Weapon: 11 (4) Strike Points=8 Evasion Points=12 (5) Defense Points=7 Life Points/Resistance=12/12 (5) Mental Points/Resistance=18/13 (6) Special Abilities=4th level spirit magic (Magic Intensity/Magic Power=13/6) Habitat=Mountains Languages=Harpy, silent spirit, regional _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05230))_

- Featherfolk resemble humans, but have bird wings growing from their shoulders, allowing them to fly. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05232))_
- They live in rugged mountainous areas, have gentle personalities and do not like fighting, but they despise harpies (furiaspecies). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05232))_
- Featherfolk use swords, bows and arrows, and spears as weapons. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05233))_
- They use spirit magic and their shaman skill level is 4. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05233))_

## [ Merman ] Monster Level=2 Rarity=11 Agility=16 Movement Speed=3/20 (water) Number=Several to dozens Frequency=Rare Intellect=Human Reaction=Neutral Attack Points=Weapon: 9 (2) Strike Points=5 Evasion Points=10 (3) Defense Points=4 Life Points/Resistance=14/10 (3) Mental Points/Resistance=16/10 (3) Special Abilities=Water adaptation Habitat=Seas Languages=Merman Perception=Five senses (illumination)

- Female mermen are called mermaids. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05235))_
- Since then, mermen have lived at the bottom of the deep sea, avoiding humans, and their social system and customs are shrouded in mystery. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05235))_
- Mermen are a race that lives under the sea, with the upper body of a human and the lower body of fish. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05235))_
- They have an extreme fear and hatred of humans and will never try to negotiate with them. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05235))_
- This is because over a hundred years ago, a rumor spread that eating merman flesh will give long life , so humans fought and overhunted mermen. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05235))_
- Since then, mermen have lived at the bottom of the deep sea, avoiding humans, and their social system and customs are shrouded in mystery. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05235))_
- This is because over a hundred years ago, a rumor spread that eating merman flesh will give long life , so humans fought and overhunted mermen. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05235))_
- They can only act on land for up to their life points rounds (14 rounds), after which they will suffocate. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05236))_
- The group has a leader and a shaman who govern the tribe. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05236))_
- Mermen are a species that breathes underwater and cannot breathe on land. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05236))_
- They can only act on land for up to their life points rounds (14 rounds), after which they will suffocate. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05236))_
- They use a trident as a weapon. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05237))_

## Mermaid Shaman

- A combat group whose leader and shaman are both defeated will either join another group or flee. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05245))_
- Also, if the merman leader is defeated, she will take command of the battle in his place. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05245))_
- The result is a mermaid shaman. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05245))_
- When this is not possible, the mermen will fight to the death. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05245))_
- There is one mermaid shaman per combat group, and her role is to assist the merman leader. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05245))_

> Merman tribes select girls with outstanding intelligence and mental power and train them as shamans from an early age. The result is a mermaid shaman. Mermaid shamans can use spirit magic up to 4th level, which is powered by water spirits (undine). There is one mermaid shaman per combat group, and her role is to assist the merman leader. **Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05243))_

> Merman tribes select girls with outstanding intelligence and mental power and train them as shamans from an early age. The result is a mermaid shaman. Mermaid shamans can use spirit magic up to 4th level, which is powered by water spirits (undine). There is one mermaid shaman per combat group, and her role is to assist the merman leader. Also, if the merman leader is defeated, she will take command of the battle in his place. A combat group whose leader and shaman are both defeated will either j

## [ Imp ]

- Anyone who suffers damage from an imp's attack must attempt a life force resistance roll. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05255))_
- If you fail, you've been poisoned and will be paralyzed and unable to move at the end of the next round. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05255))_
- The tail contains a paralyzing poison. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05255))_
- Imps are small youma with brown to dark brown skin, no body hair, and a tail. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05255))_
- Its tip is sharp like the tip of a spear, and the imp uses this tail to attack. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05255))_
- They may use 1st level dark magic, and may also be the familiars of evil sorcerers (many of whom also have the dark priest skill). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05256))_
- They are sometimes seen in large cities, and sometimes live in abandoned houses in the suburbs. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05256))_
- For this reason, some sages argue that imps are not youma at all, but were originally underworld creatures. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05257))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05253))_

## 13.2.3

## Youma

- Kobolds are small youma with doglike faces and tails. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05264))_
- However, kobolds are also known to be sneaky and will attack opponents who are outnumbered, wounded, or unable to fight, such as women and children. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05264))_
- They live in forests, hills, and mountains near human villages, but they are timid and rarely cause harm to human homes. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05264))_
- They have no body hair at all. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05264))_
- However, kobolds are also known to be sneaky and will attack opponents who are outnumbered, wounded, or unable to fight, such as women and children. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05264))_
- Legend has it that kobolds can corrode silver, so they are fiercely regarded as enemies by miners and dwarves. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05265))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05264))_

> They usually attack with their fangs, but they may also use a piece of wood as a club (in terms of data, they are the same).

## [ Gremlin ] Monster Level=2 Rarity=9 Agility=17 Movement Speed=6/8 (air) Number=One to several Frequency=Rare Intellect=Human Reaction=Adversarial Attack Points=Fangs: 9 (2) Strike Points=3 Evasion Points=11 (4) Defense Points=4 Life Points/Resistance=8/9 (2) Mental Points/Resistance=14/10 (3) Special Abilities=2nd level spirit magic (Magic Intensity/Magic Power=11/4) Habitat=Mountains, highlands Languages=Impish, silent spirit Perception=Five senses (infravision)

- They have the power to use spirit magic up to 2nd level. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05267))_
- These wings allow them to fly, but their speed is not that great. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05267))_
- Its body is dark brown and it has black wings on its back resembling those of a bat. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05267))_
- A small winged youma also known as the "sky imp". _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05267))_
- Gremlins are not aggressive, but they are treacherous and enjoy playing malicious pranks. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05268))_
- The tragedy of the hero Grax riding Pegasus and dying in a crash due to a gremlin's prank is widely known in Alecrast. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05268))_

## [ Hobgoblin ]

- Monster Level=3 Rarity=8 Agility=12 Movement Speed=8 Number=Several Frequency=Normal Intellect=Low Reaction=Adversarial Attack Points=Weapon or fangs: 10 (3) Strike Points=10 Evasion Points=11 (4) Defense Points=7 Life Points/Resistance=15/11 (4) Mental Points/Resistance=12/11 (4) Special Abilities=None in particular Habitat=Mountains relatively far from human villages, forests, caves Languages=Goblin _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05270))_
- They are a feared monster with a physique comparable to that of a human, strong and powerful. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05272))_
- When fighting, they use either a crude club or the fangs that protrude from their jaws. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05272))_
- They have reddish-brown skin and very little hair on their heads, but they do have thick hair all over their bodies. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05272))_
- Hobgoblins are a race of youma that are closely related to goblins, described later. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05272))_
- Although they have a belligerent personality, they are also surprisingly cowardly, and will run away as soon as they see that the situation is not going well. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05272))_
- Although they may live in a goblin village, they usually live alone or in groups of several, frequently changing locations and living relatively far from human villages. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05273))_

## [ Goblin ]

- They may also live with a hobgoblin who acts as their bodyguard. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05276))_
- Their height is slightly smaller than that of a human, and their skin is reddish-brown. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05276))_
- Goblins are a type of youma that live near human villages, and are extremely common monsters in Alecrast. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05276))_
- They usually live in groups of several to several dozen in forests and hills, but they sometimes appear at people's homes and attack livestock or steal. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05276))_
- They often use weapons (mostly small ones such as shortswords, daggers etc.) stolen from humans. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05276))_
- They often use weapons (mostly small ones such as shortswords, daggers etc.) stolen from humans. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05276))_

## Goblin Shaman

- This is not surprising, considering that goblins are originally from the fairy world. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05294))_
- Among the goblin tribe, this refers to those who are skilled in the power of spirit magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05294))_
- A goblin shaman has either a 3rd level shaman skill (magical intensity 12/magic power 5), a 1st level dark priest skill (magical intensity 10/magic power 3), or both. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05294))_
- Their physical characteristics are not much different from ordinary goblins, but they are smart and moreover, have mastered silent spirit. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05294))_
- Goblins served the dark gods in mythical times. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05294))_
- Some goblin shamans are also dark priests who can use dark magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05294))_
- Among the goblin tribe, this refers to those who are skilled in the power of spirit magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05294))_

## Goblin Lord

- However, not all tribes have this type of lord-species, if anything they're rare. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05299))_
- The goblin lord, as the name suggests, is the king of the goblins. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05299))_
- They are a greater species of goblin, so to speak, who retain a limited amount of power from the time when goblins lived in the fairy world. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05299))_
- Although they lack magical abilities, they have bodies that are about the same size or even larger than humans and hobgoblins. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05299))_
- It is said that there are quite a few of this goblin lord species in the Youma Forest to the east of Alecrast. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05299))_
- They are a greater species of goblin, so to speak, who retain a limited amount of power from the time when goblins lived in the fairy world. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05299))_

## [ Marshman ]

- They are exclusionary toward other races and react aggressively to anything that enters their habitat. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05320))_
- They seem to have a deep connection with water spirits, and use undine-type spirit magic up to 4th level. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05320))_
- They have high intelligence comparable to humans, and also have a rudimentary social life. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05320))_
- Their bodies are covered with green skin, and their backs are hard and shellshaped. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05320))_
- Marshmen, also known as water imps, are youma that live in swamps. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05320))_
- In addition, they are susceptible to dehydration and are nearly unable to leave the swamps where they live. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05321))_
- If they're forced to leave and their body becomes dehydrated, they'll lose life points at the rate of 1 point every hour. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05321))_

> Marshmen, also known as water imps, are youma that live in swamps. Their bodies are covered with green skin, and their backs are hard and shellshaped. They have high intelligence comparable to humans, and also have a rudimentary social life. They are exclusionary toward other races and react aggressively to anything that enters their habitat. They seem to have a deep connection with water spirits, and use undine-type spirit magic up to 4th level.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05321))_

> They're weak against fire and heat, so when attacking a marshman with firebased magic, add +10 to strike power when making the check.

## [ Dark Elf ]

- These elves with jet-black skin are called dark elves. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05326))_
- However, there were some who sided with the dark gods. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05326))_
- This damage is separate from the damage of the weapon itself and can be reduced by adventurer level. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05327))_
- If you fail, you will suffer damage resulting from a strike power 10 strike roll plus +3 bonus damage. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05327))_
- They are apostles of the dark gods, and love to be despicable. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05327))_
- A character who is attacked by a poisoned weapon and suffers damage must immediately make a life force resistance roll against target score 10. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05327))_
- If you successfully resist, you will not suffer any poison damage. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05327))_
- The weapons they use are often coated with poison. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05327))_
- Assassination using Invisibility is said to be their most special technique. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05327))_

## Dark Elf Leader

- The data listed here is based on the strength needed to lead a group of 5 to 6 people. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05333))_
- Those who lead larger groups can be even stronger. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05333))_
- Leaders also often apply and use poison on their weapons. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05334))_
- If a character is poisoned and also fails a life force resistance roll (target score 13), the character will be paralyzed at the end of the next round. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05334))_
- The poison they use has a higher toxicity score than the usual kind, and its effect is paralysis. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05334))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05330))_

> Monster Level=6

## [ Will-O-Wisp ]

- Monster Level=2 Rarity=12 (However, a shaman always knows) Agility=18 Movement Speed=20 (air) Number=Solo to several Frequency=Rare Intellect=Almost none Reaction=Neutral to violent Attack Points=Disintegrate: Always hits Strike Points=Strike power 10, bonus damage 2 Evasion Points=12 (5) Defense Points=0 Life Points/Resistance=1/8 (1) Mental Points/Resistance=-/10 (3) Special Abilities=Releases energy and disintegrates Mental attack immunity Not affected by poison and illness Habitat=Near forests and swamps, or anywhere Languages=None _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05338))_
- This type of will-o-wisp will not attack you directly. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05340))_
- They are among the most unstable of spirits and have little to no semblance of intellect. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05340))_
- Its main body is a blue-white ball of light about 50 cm in diameter, and its light illuminates a space with a 5-meter radius. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05340))_
- First, one will float gently in front of someone and lead them deep into an endless swamp or forest. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05340))_
- They also will not attack low grade undead that do not have a mind. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05341))_
- However, sleeping humans are subject to attack. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05341))_
- The other type is one that collides directly with anything that comes into view. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05341))_
- They will not target plants, minerals, vessels, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05341))_
- This shockwave's damage results from a strike power 10 strike roll plus bonus _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05341))_
- Please make your judgment based on whether it has a score called mental power (points) . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05341))_
- However, at the same time, the will-o-wisp emits a powerful shockwave. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05341))_
- When a Will-O-Wisp hits its target, it'll simply shatter. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05341))_
