## [ Shade ]

- Its body seems to be dark and spherical, but it's impossible to identify its shape because it' s in the dark. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05363))_
- Strike power is 10, bonus damage is 2, and only adventurer level can reduce it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05363))_
- All natural light within 5 meters of its body is canceled out, leaving you in total darkness. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05363))_
- Shade is a spirit of darkness, and also a mind spirit that controls fear. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05363))_
- Since the shade itself has 12 evasion points, it's unlikely that your attacks will hit it (it'll definitely disintegrate if they do). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05363))_
- Its body seems to be dark and spherical, but it's impossible to identify its shape because it' s in the dark. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05363))_
- All natural light within 5 meters of its body is canceled out, leaving you in total darkness. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05363))_
- Strike power is 10, bonus damage is 2, and only adventurer level can reduce it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05363))_
- Shade is the counterpart to the aforementioned will-o-wisp, and when it comes into contact with a will-o-wisp, it disappears without emitting any energy. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05364))_

> Shade is a spirit of darkness, and also a mind spirit that controls fear. All natural light within 5 meters of its body is canceled out, leaving you in total darkness. Its body seems to be dark and spherical, but it's impossible to identify its shape because it' s in the dark. Therefore, attacks against shades always suffer a -4 penalty. Since the shade itself has 12 evasion points, it's unlikely that your attacks will hit it (it'll definitely disintegrate if they do). They will always attack by

## [ Brownie ]

- Monster Level=3 Rarity=14 (However, a shaman always knows) Agility=14 Movement Speed=Special Number=Solo to several Frequency=Very Rare Intellect=Human Reaction=Neutral to violent Attack Points=Furniture ： 10 (3) Strike Points=5 to 9 Evasion Points=Defense Points=Life Points/Resistance=-/Mental Points/Resistance=18/12 (5) Special Abilities=Physical attack immunity Mental attack immunity Not affected by poison and illness T eleport (Limited) Illusion Habitat=Old mansions _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05366))_
- Monster Level=3 Rarity=14 (However, a shaman always knows) Agility=14 Movement Speed=Special Number=Solo to several Frequency=Very Rare Intellect=Human Reaction=Neutral to violent Attack Points=Furniture ： 10 (3) Strike Points=5 to 9 Evasion Points=Defense Points=Life Points/Resistance=-/Mental Points/Resistance=18/12 (5) Special Abilities=Physical attack immunity Mental attack immunity Not affected by poison and illness T eleport (Limited) Illusion Habitat=Old mansions _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05366))_
- If the humans living in the mansion disappear or die, the brownie may turn into a mad spirit. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05369))_
- Brownie is a spirit that appears in old mansions where people have lived for over 50 years. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05369))_
- Mad brownies have the ability to create illusions. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05370))_
- Some illusions are visual, while others are auditory, making their presence known through visions or strange noises. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05370))_
- The strike points when this attack hits vary depending on what is used for the attack. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05371))_
- A small dish would be 5 points, a knife, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05371))_
- They also have a small amount of telekinesis, and will attack unwanted intruders by hitting them with things inside the mansion. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05371))_
- They also have a small amount of telekinesis, and will attack unwanted intruders by hitting them with things inside the mansion. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05371))_
- Also, they are fully aware of everything happening inside the mansion with their magic senses. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05372))_
- Mad brownies also have the ability to teleport, allowing them to appear anywhere in the mansion. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05372))_
- Also, they are fully aware of everything happening inside the mansion with their magic senses. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05372))_
- However, these abilities can only be manifested within the mansion, and the brownie cannot leave the mansion. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05373))_
- However, these abilities can only be manifested within the mansion, and the brownie cannot leave the mansion. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05373))_
- Mad Brownies are often influenced by the actions of those who lived there, and in some cases continue to faithfully reproduce those actions through illusions (and telekinesis) after the residents have left. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05374))_
- Mad Brownies are often influenced by the actions of those who lived there, and in some cases continue to faithfully reproduce those actions through illusions (and telekinesis) after the residents have left. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05374))_
- However, if their mental points are reduced to 0 or if the mansion they live in is destroyed, they will vanish. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05375))_
- Brownies have no substance, and physical attacks have no effect on them at all. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05375))_

## [ Undine ]

- Mental attack immunity Normal weapon immunity Not affected by poison and illness Habitat=Water Languages=Silent spirit _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05388))_
- Its body is just about 10 liters of liquid. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05390))_
- However, if anyone bathes or swims in a spring or river where this spirit resides, without realizing its presence, the mad undine will do everything it can to drown its opponent, including casting a Sink spell to take away their buoyancy or fly directly into their lungs. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05390))_
- It often takes the form of a small girl, but it can take any form as long as its weight and volume remain the same. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05390))_
- Undine has no direct means of attack. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05390))_
- Undine is a Water Spirit. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05390))_
- Undine has no direct means of attack. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05390))_
- Undine's shaman skill level should be 4. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05391))_
- If a target drinks even a little of an undine's body, this water spirit will enter directly into their lungs. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05392))_
- The target score in this case is 12. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05392))_
- However, the undine's first attack will always be a surprise attack, so in the first round, please make a check to see whether you've swallowed the undine or not. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05392))_
- A check for whether or not you've taken a drink is made via success roll using " adventurer level + agility bonus " as the baseline score. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05392))_
- As long as you hold your breath, you don't have to worry about drinking the water. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05392))_
- This check must be made every round until you escape from the spring or river containing the undine. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05392))_
- However, in this case, you can obviously hold your breath. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05392))_
- The target score is still 12. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05393))_
- This check may be attempted once per round, but you cannot take any other actions while swallowing the undine. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05393))_
- However, the victim can attempt to spit the undine out once swallowed. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05393))_
- If a character fails the check, that means they've swallowed the undine. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05393))_
- Also, you cannot spit out the undine while underwater. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05393))_
- If a character fails the check, that means they've swallowed the undine. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05393))_
- The number of rounds in which you can hold your breath, or in which you can survive while swallowing an undine, is equal to your life force. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05394))_
- 139) for detailed rules. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05394))_
- Undines do not leave their habitat, so they are not a threat as long as you can escape from the water. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05395))_
- The same goes for characters who've had Water Breathing cast on them. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05395))_
- Of course, this attack has no meaning against things that don't breathe air (fish, undead, etc.). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05395))_
- To harm an undine, as with most other spirits, magical or silver weapons are required. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05396))_

## [ Salamander ]

- Normal weapon immunity Mental attack immunity Fire immunity Not affected by poison and illness _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05400))_
- However, its entire body is not covered in animal skin but in flames, making it extremely dangerous as it ignites flammable materials around it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05404))_
- This fire always hits, but an adventurer can attempt to resist just the same way they would against magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05404))_
- Salamanders, which are spirits of fire, look like quadrupedal beasts with a body length of about 1 meter, as they are called by the name fi re lizard . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05404))_
- A Salamander's fire breath ability should be treated as shaman skill level 4, magic intensity 12 (magic power 5). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05404))_
- Salamanders shower you in a breath of fire, which has the same effect as the 1st level spirit magic spell Fire Bolt . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05404))_
- Even when the Salamander breathes out this fiery breath , it does not consume a single mental point. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05404))_
- To damage a Salamander, you need a magic or magically-imbued weapon, or a silver weapon. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05405))_
- Salamanders are spirits, so their temporary bodies are, so to speak, a modified form of their spirit power, so they cannot be attacked by normal weapons. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05405))_
- The damage is 1 point per liter of water. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05405))_
- Iron can obstruct the workings of a spirit, but it cannot be used as a means to extinguish it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05405))_
- You can also deal damage to a Salamander by pouring water on it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05405))_
- Conversely, fire attacks have no effect on salamanders. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05405))_
- A salamander cannot reduce this damage either. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05405))_
- Iron can obstruct the workings of a spirit, but it cannot be used as a means to extinguish it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05405))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05399))_

> Special Abilities=Fire (Strike power 10, bonus damage 5, Magic Intensity/Magic Power=12/5)

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05402))_

> Habitat=Anywhere, provided there's fire Languages=Silent spirit

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05403))_

> Perception=Magic

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05404))_

> Salamanders, which are spirits of fire, look like quadrupedal beasts with a body length of about 1 meter, as they are called by the name fi re lizard . However, its entire body is not covered in animal skin but in flames, making it extremely dangerous as it ignites flammable materials around it. A mad salamander, as befitting of a spirit of fire, a symbol of destruction, acts with the sole purpose of burning everything to ash. Salamanders shower you in a breath of fire, which has the same effect

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05405))_

> Also, when a person using the spirit magic Water Screen is attacked by a salamander, after the normal effect, 2 points of damage will be dealt to the salamander (the salamander cannot reduce this damage), then the magic's effect will vanish.

## [ Sandman ]

- Sandman is a mind spirit that controls sleep. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05420))_
- Its figure is that of a small, completely naked child, with no features that would indicate gender. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05420))_
- A sandman can instantly appear wherever there's a working mind, and during combat, it can perform actions while teleporting. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05421))_
- No matter how much Sleep it uses, a sandman does not consume any mental points. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05421))_
- A mad sandman indiscriminately uses Sleep spells to try to put others to sleep. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05421))_
- To wound a sandman, you need magic or a silver weapon. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05422))_

## [ Sylph ]

- Normal weapon immunity Mental attack immunity Not affected by poison and illness Habitat=Anywhere Languages=Silent spirit Perception=Magic _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05431))_
- To harm a sylph, you need a magical or silver weapon. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05432))_
- Its magic intensity is 13 (magic power 6). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05432))_
- This attack cannot be evaded. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05432))_
- Its pale upper body is translucent, but from the waist down it is completely invisible and nothing can be seen. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05432))_
- Wind cutter is treated as strike power 10 damage magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05432))_
- However, spirit points are not consumed even if they use wind cutter attacks or spirit magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05432))_
- Sylphs also use spirit magic that is sourced from the power of the wind. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05432))_
- Their shaman skill level is 4. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05432))_
- Sylph is a spirit of wind. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05432))_
- It appears as a naked elf woman. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05432))_
- Sylph does not have normal methods of attack, but by entangling itself with its target, it can cause a powerful wind cutter attack. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05432))_

## [ Sprite ]

- Monster Level=4 Rarity=12 (However, a shaman always knows) Agility=18 Movement Speed=16 Number=One Frequency=Rare Intellect=Human Reaction=Violent Attack Points=Fangs: 11 (4) Strike Points=7 Evasion Points=14 (7) Defense Points=6 Life Points/Resistance=10/11 (4) Mental Points/Resistance=20/13 (6) Special Abilities=Transparent Make others transparent (resist target score=13) Normal weapon immunity Mental attack immunity Not affected by poison and illness Habitat=Anywhere Languages=Silent spirit Perception=Magic Sprites are said to be the spirits that control the emotion of shame (the function of the mind). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05434))_
- Because it's invisible, its appearance cannot be identified, but it is said to resemble a leprechaun, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05434))_
- When attacking a mad sprite, a -4 modifier will be imposed. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05434))_
- A mad sprite remains invisible and attacks nearby creatures with its fangs. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05434))_
- Because it's invisible, its appearance cannot be identified, but it is said to resemble a leprechaun, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05434))_
- Those who have become invisible cannot see themselves either. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05435))_
- If you fail, you will become invisible. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05435))_
- Mad sprites have the ability to make others invisible. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05435))_
- This invisibility cannot be removed unless you use Dispel Magic , etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05435))_
- For this reason, a -2 modifier will be imposed on all physical action checks. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05435))_
- This invisibility cannot be removed unless you use Dispel Magic , etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05435))_
- To harm a sprite, it must be a silver or magic weapon. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05436))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05434))_

> Also, you cannot cast magic on mad sprites.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05435))_

> When a mad sprite performs this attack, the target must make a mental power resistance roll (target score 13).

## [ Gnome ]

- knows) Agility=10 Movement Speed=6 (ground)/ 10 (underground) Number=One to several Frequency=Rare Intellect=Low Reaction=Violent Attack Points=Strike Points=Evasion Points=11 (4) Defense Points=6 Life Points/Resistance=10/11 (4) Mental Points/Resistance=20/13 (6) Special Abilities=Stone (Strike power 20, bonus damage 5, Magic Intensity/Magic Power=12/5) 4th level spirit magic (Magic Intensity/Magic Power=12/5, gnome only) Normal weapon immunity Mental attack immunity Not affected by poison and illness Habitat=Anywhere Languages=Silent spirit Perception=Magic _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05440))_

- Gnome is the spirit of earth. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05441))_
- Its shaman skill level is 4. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05442))_
- They also use spirit magic that is sourced from the power of the earth. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05442))_
- They do not consume mental points even when they throw stones or use spirit magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05442))_
- However, the gnome cannot take any other actions during the round in which this action was chosen. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05442))_
- Then, they suddenly appear above ground and attack by throwing stones at you. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05442))_
- A gnome can disappear into the ground, move underground, and reappear above ground all in one round. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05442))_
- A gnome's stones will always hit their target. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05442))_
- Then, they suddenly appear above ground and attack by throwing stones at you. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05442))_
- To harm a gnome, you need a magical or a silver weapon. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05443))_

> Frau is a spirit of ice and looks very similar to a sylph. Its whole body is pure white, as if covered in frost, becoming more transparent towards the lower half of the body. Therefore, its legs are not visible at all. Its eyes are also pure white. Frau only appear in areas with snow and ice.

> Also, when attacking with a weapon, you will only be able to deal damage if it's a magical or a silver weapon.

## [ Leprechaun ]

- Normal weapon immunity Mental attack immunity Not affected by poison and illness T eleport _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05470))_
- Its appearance is that of a completely naked imp, with no features that indicate its gender. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05474))_
- Their shaman skill level is 4. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05474))_
- Leprechauns are mind spirits who control chaos. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05474))_
- Leprechauns are spirits, but in this world they have a complete form, and will attack by biting. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05474))_
- To harm a leprechaun, you need a magical or silver weapon. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05474))_
- They cannot take any other actions during the round in which this action was chosen The teleportation destination is within the leprechaun's view. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05474))_
- They cannot take any other actions during the round in which this action was chosen The teleportation destination is within the leprechaun's view. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05474))_

- Mental Points/Resistance=20/14 (7) Special Abilities=Charm (Resist target score=14) 5th level spirit magic (Magic Intensity/Magic Power=14/7, dryad only) Normal weapon immunity Mental attack immunity Not affected by poison and illness Habitat=Woods Languages=Silent spirit Perception=Magic _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05484))_

- Their figure is that of a completely naked elf woman, with long green hair wrapped around her entire body. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05485))_
- Dryads are plant spirits. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05485))_
- They usually reside in trees, but a shaman can summon them anywhere there are plants. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05485))_
- A mad dryad uses the spirit magic " Charm " to cause division among allies, and tries to block their opponent's movements with " Binding ". _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05486))_
- Using these spells does not consume any of the dryad's mental points. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05486))_
- To harm a dryad, it must be a magical or silver weapon. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05488))_

## [ Mad Spirit of Life ]

- Normal weapon immunity Mental attack immunity Not affected by poison and illness Habitat=Anywhere Languages=Silent spirit Perception=Magic _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05501))_
- The mad spirit of life does not attack physically. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05502))_
- However, its reckless power has a major impact on the lives around it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05502))_
- The mad spirit of life appears in the form of a shining white horse. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05502))_
- If the roll is 6 or less, you will become younger by 7-roll years. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05503))_
- If you fail, roll 2D. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05503))_
- Those affected by it suffer the effects of (physical) age shifting. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05503))_
- If the roll is exactly 7, no age change will occur. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05503))_
- If the roll is 8 or greater, you will age by roll-7 years. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05503))_
- 276) and use the game master's discretion. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05503))_
- To harm a mad spirit of life, it must be a magical or silver weapon. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05504))_

## [ Valkyrie ]

- They attack from above, casting the spell Valkyrie Javelin where sword attacks can't reach. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05526))_
- They will also cast a Fanaticism spell to provoke you. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05526))_
- Valkyrie is a mind spirit. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05526))_
- To harm a valkyrie, you need magical or silver weapons. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05526))_
- Casting these spells does not consume spirit points. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05526))_
- Her appearance is that of a human woman clad in shining white armor, and her noble appearance is said to fascinate all men. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05526))_
- However, a mad valkyrie is extremely cruel and terrifying. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05526))_

## 13.2.5 Titans

## [ Yeti ]

- The yeti is a titan, about two and a half meters tall, that is rarely seen in cold, snowy regions, and its body is covered in thick white fur. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05547))_
- Its ecology is not very clear. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05547))_
- They are not very ferocious and do not actively attack humans, but they do seem to attack when they're hungry-- in cold areas with deep snow, it's not uncommon for them to be hungry and unable to find prey. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05547))_
- However, the yeti itself is adapted to snow and does not suffer this penalty. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05548))_
- When fighting in these locations, your attack and evasion will suffer a -2 penalty, and your movement speed will be halved. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05548))_
- The yeti is strong against cold, and cold-based attacks must be made with a -10 reduction to strike power during the check. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05549))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05530))_

> Characters cannot move freely in deep snow areas such as those where the yeti lives. When fighting in these locations, your attack and evasion will suffer a -2 penalty, and your movement speed will be halved. However, the yeti itself is adapted to snow and does not suffer this penalty.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05549))_

> Conversely, it is weak against fire, so if it's a fire-based attack, the check can be made with +10 to strike power.

## [ Ogre ]

- Monster Level=5 Rarity=10 Agility=10 Movement Speed=15 Number=One to several Frequency=Rare Intellect=Low Reaction=Adversarial Attack Points=Weapon or arm: 13 (6) Strike Points=12 Evasion Points=11 (4) Defense Points=8 Life Points/Resistance=21/14 (7) Mental Points/Resistance=10/12 (5) Special Abilities=None in particular Habitat=Forests and hills near human villages Languages=Giant _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05551))_
- Their body color is reddish-brown, and their face is reminiscent of primitive humans (of our world). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05553))_
- Numerically, there is no difference in the strength of an ogre even if it does not have a weapon. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05553))_
- Ogres, also known as jikininki , are ferocious, carnivorous titans who, as their name suggests, particularly enjoy human flesh. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05553))_
- Of course, their strength is also considerable. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05553))_
- Although they are on the smaller side of the titans, their height is well over 2 meters, and they have strong bodies to match. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05553))_
- They have sharp canine teeth that allow them to tear and eat raw meat. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05553))_
- They mainly fight with huge clubs made from thick tree branches, but even without using such a thing, their thick arms alone are enough to pose a threat. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05553))_
- If targeted by them, a small village, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05554))_
- In some cases, all the residents of one village have to abandon their homes and land and migrate. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05554))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05552))_

> Perception=Five senses (darkvision)

## [ Spriggan ]

- Monster Level=5 Rarity=12 Agility=18 Movement Speed=20 Number=One Frequency=Very Rare Intellect=Human Reaction=Adversarial Attack Points (Giant)=Fangs: 12 (5)/Claw: 13 (6)/Claw: 13 (6) Strike Points=14/13/13 Attack Points (Child)=Fist: 12 (5) Strike Points=7 _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05556))_
- Spriggans are evil titans who enjoy eating raw meat. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05561))_
- The transformation is so ingenious that there's nothing that hints at the spriggan's true identity, nor can it be detected by Sense Magic or Sense Aura . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05561))_
- Once their true identity is discovered, they won't be able to fool the same opponent again. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05561))_
- Therefore, a spriggan cannot take the form of a specific child. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05561))_
- Therefore, a spriggan cannot take the form of a specific child. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05561))_
- If given the chance (such as when they're alone with a human who believes they're a normal child), a spriggan will revert to their true form (an ugly, 3meter-tall titan with fangs bared and claws out) to attack their target. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05562))_
- If the target is unaware of the spriggan's true identity, this is a surprise attack. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05562))_
- If they are not hungry, they will not attack people unless they have a specific reason to do so (such as because they suspect their true identity, etc.). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05562))_
- If they are not hungry, they will not attack people unless they have a specific reason to do so (such as because they suspect their true identity, etc.). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05562))_
- If given the chance (such as when they're alone with a human who believes they're a normal child), a spriggan will revert to their true form (an ugly, 3meter-tall titan with fangs bared and claws out) to attack their target. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05562))_
- However, if they attempt to attack others while still in their child form, their attack ability will be significantly reduced. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05563))_
- Please use the (child) section of the data. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05563))_
- Spriggans are apostles of the dark gods and can use up to 2nd level dark magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05564))_

> Spriggans are evil titans who enjoy eating raw meat. They usually live in mountains, hills, forests, etc. but sometimes they come to human villages in search of their favorite food, human flesh. When entering a human village, spriggan transforms into a human child between the ages of 4 and 10. The transformation is so ingenious that there's nothing that hints at the spriggan's true identity, nor can it be detected by Sense Magic or Sense Aura . The form that a Spriggan can take after transformin

## [ Troll ] Monster Level=6 Rarity=11 Agility=12 Movement Speed=24 Number=One to several Frequency=Rare Intellect=Low Reaction=Adversarial Attack Points=Arm:14 (7) Strike Points=13 Evasion Points=13 (6) Defense Points=11 Life Points/Resistance=21/15 (8) Mental Points/Resistance=14/14 (7) Special Abilities=Camouflage (Sense target score=13) Habitat=Caves, hills Languages=Giant Perception=Five senses (darkvision)

- They have very low intellect and rarely use tools. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05566))_
- They live in caves and hills, and do not appear in forests or meadows. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05566))_
- Trolls are titans with rock-like skin. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05566))_
- A character caught by surprise cannot take any actions for one round, and suffers a -4 penalty to evasion for that round. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05567))_
- They also have arms so long that their fingertips just barely touch the ground. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05567))_
- To notice their presence, you must succeed on a success roll against target score 13 using ranger skill level + intelligence bonus as the baseline score. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05567))_
- If you fail, the troll can make a surprise attack. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05567))_
- That single blow has terrifying destructive power that can kill a person in an instant. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05568))_
- A troll's skin is not only similar in color, but also has a hardness comparable to that of rock. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05568))_
- It will not be affected by just any half-hearted attack, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05568))_
- A troll's skin is not only similar in color, but also has a hardness comparable to that of rock. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05568))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05566))_

> Trolls are titans with rock-like skin. They have very low intellect and rarely use tools. They live in caves and hills, and do not appear in forests or meadows. Due to this and their rugged, rock-like appearance, some sages believe that they may have some kind of connection with earth spirits, but it's not clear whether this is true. In any case, it's certain that they're terrifying monsters with enormous strength.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05567))_

> Their body color is the same as a rock surface, and if you are careless, you may mistake one for a huge rock.

## [ Hecatoncheir ]

- Monster Level=7 Rarity=15 Agility=7 Movement Speed=15 Number=One Frequency=Very Rare Intellect=Human Reaction=Neutral Attack Points=Weapon or arms (6 times): 15 (8) Strike Points=15 x 6 Evasion Points=13 (6) Defense Points=11 Life Points/Resistance=28/17 (10) Mental Points/Resistance=14/15 (8) Special Abilities=4th level holy magic (Magic Intensity/Magic Power=13/6) rarely Habitat=Underground ruins Languages=Giant _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05570))_
- Hecatoncheir are a subspecies of titans, reaching nearly 4 meters tall. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05572))_
- They can aim at different targets in one round, or focus on hitting one target. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05572))_
- Six of these are used in combat. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05572))_
- Although they're called the hundredhanded titan , they actually have only 12 arms. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05572))_
- Some of them carry weapons, but even without such things, their thick arms are enough to pose a threat to humans (and fae). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05572))_
- Although they're called the hundredhanded titan , they actually have only 12 arms. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05572))_
- Their intellect is on par with humans, and they're not necessarily evil. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05573))_
- Hecatoncheir protect the treasure and secrets of the ancient kingdom in deep underground labyrinths, and rarely appear above ground. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05573))_
- There are also hecatoncheir who serve the gods. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05573))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05573))_

> Hecatoncheir protect the treasure and secrets of the ancient kingdom in deep underground labyrinths, and rarely appear above ground. Their intellect is on par with humans, and they're not necessarily evil. There are also hecatoncheir who serve the gods. They possess the 4th level priest skill.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05571))_

> Perception=Five senses (darkvision)

## [ Giant ]

- Among the giants, the race called Giants in particular, unlike those that are merely large fae and youma (such as trolls, etc.), are one of the ancient races like dragons and gods, who are claimed to have originated from the primordial titan. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05575))_
- Giants are divided into several subspecies depending on where they live. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05575))_
- There are differences in skin color and hair color, and each has a different personality. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05575))_
- Some of them live alone, but they also live in groups of a few to about ten, and female giants and baby giants can sometimes be seen. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05575))_
- Among the giants, the race called Giants in particular, unlike those that are merely large fae and youma (such as trolls, etc.), are one of the ancient races like dragons and gods, who are claimed to have originated from the primordial titan. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05575))_

## Forest Giant

- Monster Level=10 Rarity=12 Agility=10 Movement Speed=20 Number=One to several Frequency=Very Rare Intellect=Low Reaction=Adversarial Attack Points=Arm:18 (11) Strike Points=19 Evasion Points=15 (8) Defense Points=14 Life Points/Resistance=40/22 (15) Mental Points/Resistance=14/18 (11) Special Abilities=None in particular Habitat=Forest Languages=Giant Perception=Five senses _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05581))_

## Fire Giant

- They also have body hair of the same color as the hair on their heads, but it's not all over their bodies. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05599))_
- They have rich heads of hair, the color of which ranges from jet black to deep crimson, depending on the individual. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05599))_
- A fire giant is a giant about 7 meters tall, with reddish-brown skin. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05599))_
- Since they often live near human villages, they are greatly feared by humans. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05600))_
- Fire giants are ferocious creatures that will attack anything that enters their territory without mercy. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05600))_
- Also, they will not suffer any damage at all from fire. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05601))_
- Fire giants have a deep connection with the spirit power of fire, and can use spirit magic sourced from the power of fire spirits (salamander, etc.) up to 7th level. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05601))_

## Frost Giant

- Monster Level=13 Rarity=13 Agility=8 Movement Speed=19 Number=One to several Frequency=Very Rare Intellect=Human Reaction=Neutral Attack Points=Arm:21 (14) Strike Points=23 Evasion Points=18 (11) Defense Points=17 Life Points/Resistance=50/27 (20) Mental Points/Resistance=16/21 (14) magic ice _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05603))_
- Yet, they have relatively gentle personalities and will not attack humans unless they do something particularly unjust. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05606))_
- If you're open to communication, they'll simply give you a warning and ask you to leave their territory. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05606))_
- Frost giants are giants that live in cold regions and are covered in white hair all over their bodies. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05606))_
- They are among the largest of the giants, reaching over 10 meters tall. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05606))_
- However, they live a closed life and do not like when their territory is invaded. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05606))_
- Yet, they have relatively gentle personalities and will not attack humans unless they do something particularly unjust. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05606))_
- Frost giants have a deep connection with the spirit power of ice, and can use spirit magic sourced from the power of ice spirits (frau, fenrir) up to 8th level. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05607))_
- Also, they will not suffer any damage at all from cold-type attacks. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05607))_

## [ Cyclops ]

- They will attack anyone who invades their territory without mercy. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05624))_
- They have brownish skin and brown bristles on their chest and limbs. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05624))_
- They have only one eye and no hair on their heads. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05624))_
- Cyclops are the largest of all titans, reaching over 10 meters in height. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05624))_
- They live on secluded seashores. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05624))_
- They're almost naked, but they do wear a loincloth. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05624))_
- They never leave their homes, and there are usually no humans living nearby. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05624))_
- They have only one eye and no hair on their heads. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05624))_

## 13.2.6

## Mythical Beasts and Magical Beasts

## [ Satyr ]

- Monster Level=3 Rarity=14 Agility=15 Movement Speed=15 Number=One to several Frequency=Rare Intellect=Human Reaction=Neutral Attack Points=Horns: 9 (2) Strike Points=9 Evasion Points=11 (4) Defense Points=5 Life Points/Resistance=12/11 (4) Mental Points/Resistance=18/12 (5) Special Abilities=Manipulate emotions with a flute (Resist target score=10) Habitat=Forests Languages=Regional _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05629))_
- They don't like fighting and will run away if danger approaches. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05631))_
- Their staple food is nuts and berries, they have gentle personalities, they're fond of alcohol, music, and women, and they love festivities. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05631))_
- Satyrs are a forest-dwelling race with the upper body of a hairy human, pointed ears, short horns sprouting from their heads, and the lower body of a goat. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05631))_
- Female satyrs are called she-satyrs. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05631))_
- To resist this, you must succeed on a mental power resistance roll against target score 10. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05632))_
- Humans who hear the satyr's flute may suddenly become frightened and run away, get excited and start dancing, or become lewd and start taking off their clothes. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05632))_
- They always carry a flute and can manipulate human emotions with their melodies. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05632))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05630))_

> Perception=Five senses

## [ Ceiling Hanger ]

- Its lower body is made of a glue-like substance that expands and contracts, and it's usually about 1 meter long. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05647))_
- Strangle Sleepless Habitat=Underground labyrinths Languages=None Perception=Five senses A ceiling hanger is a magical beast with arms of different sizes on its left and right sides. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05647))_
- In addition to its protective color, it also stretches its body out from the ceiling in an instant to attack, so it has a high potential for surprise attacks. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05648))_
- Failure will result in a surprise attack and the targeted character will suffer a -4 penalty to evasion. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05648))_
- To do so, you must succeed on a success toll against target score 12 using ranger skill level + intelligence bonus as the baseline score. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05648))_
- Rangers have a chance to notice this surprise attack with their sense danger ability. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05648))_
- When a ceiling hanger catches its prey, it will pull them up to the ceiling on the next round and attempt to choke the opponent to death. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05649))_
- At the same time, the left arm makes a normal attack (strike) on the prey. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05649))_
- A hanging character cannot breathe, nor even cast spells. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05649))_
- A ceiling hanger's right hand has an extremely enlarged thumb, while conversely, the other four fingers are integrated into a scissor shape, allowing it to strangle its prey. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05649))_
- Regardless of damage or armor, once character's life force rounds have elapsed, the character will suffocate and fall unconscious (life force 0). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05650))_
- Strangling has strike power 0 and bonus damage 6 when making a damage check. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05650))_
- Non-metal armor and ring mail have no effect against this damage, and points can only be reduced by adventurer level. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05650))_
- Characters wearing metal armor (other than ring mail) will not suffer any damage. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05650))_
- Non-metal armor and ring mail have no effect against this damage, and points can only be reduced by adventurer level. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05650))_
- Ceiling hangers with prey suspended from the ceiling cannot be reached by melee weapons, so it'll be extremely difficult to provide support to a suspended character. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05651))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05634))_

> Monster Level=3

In addition to its protective color, it also stretches its body out from the ceiling in an instant to attack, so it has a high potential for surprise attacks. ## [ Harpy ]

- Harpies are carnivorous creatures with the head and chest of a human female, and the rest of its body is that of a bird. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05653))_
- Harpies have two races, deela and furia. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05653))_

## Deela

- Monster Level=3 Rarity=13 Agility=16 Movement Speed=6/30 (air) Number=Several Frequency=Moderate Intellect=Human Reaction=Neutral Attack Points=Talons: 11 (4) Strike Points=6 Evasion Points=11 (4) Defense Points=6 Life Points/Resistance=9/10 (3) Mental Points/Resistance=12/11 (4) Special Abilities=Charm by singing (Resist target score=10) Habitat=Coasts Languages=Harpy, regional _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05655))_
- At this time, deelas use the ability to charm by singing. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05657))_
- Deelas live on the coast, are beautiful, and can speak. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05657))_
- If you fail, you will be charmed and must do what the deela tells you to do. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05657))_
- They are neutral toward humans. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05657))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05656))_

> Perception=Five senses

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05657))_

> Anyone who hears a deela's song must make a mental power resistance roll against target score 10.

## Deela King

- In such groups, they do not try to charm humans and avoid interaction as much as possible, because they do not need to use humans and do not want their king's existence to be known. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05668))_
- A flock blessed with a male can produce offspring without the use of a human male, so that male is made their king. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05668))_
- Usually, only female individuals are born among harpies. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05668))_
- However, very rarely a male is born. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05668))_

## [ Hippocampus ]

- Its front legs have fins instead of hooves, and it has no hind legs. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05679))_
- It's a horse that lives in the sea, the lower half of its body is that of a fish. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05679))_
- They can move around quickly underwater, but once on land they suffer a -4 penalty to attack and evasion. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05679))_
- Mermen have tamed the hippocampus and use them as riding horses. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05680))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05676))_

## [ Medusa ]

- Mirrors do not reflect a medusa's magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05683))_
- You can avoid being petrified by fighting with your eyes closed or your face turned away, but in such a state you will suffer a -4 penalty to your attack power and evasion speed. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05683))_
- Medusa is a magical beast that takes the form of a human woman, with dozens of snakes growing out of her head instead of hair, and a face with the magical power to petrify humans. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05683))_
- Anyone who encounters a medusa must succeed on a mental power resistance roll against target score 10 or they will instantly be turned into a stone statue. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05683))_
- They dwell mainly in ruins and underground labyrinths, and find wicked pleasure in turning visitors into stone statues. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05683))_
- Conversely, holding a mirror up to a medusa is completely ineffective. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05683))_
- In this case, the penalty to attack power and evasion speed is only -2. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05683))_
- Therefore, you can fight while looking at a medusa's reflection in a mirror. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05683))_
- Therefore, you can fight while looking at a medusa's reflection in a mirror. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05683))_
- In this case, the penalty to attack power and evasion speed is only -2. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05683))_
- This damage can be reduced by adventurer level. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05684))_
- If the resistance roll is successful, no poison damage is sustained. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05684))_
- The snakes are poisonous, and anyone dealt damage by the snakes' attacks must immediately make a life force resistance roll against target score 10. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05684))_
- If you fail, you immediately suffer damage resulting from a strike power 10 strike roll plus bonus damage 3. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05684))_
- A medusa uses the snakes on her head to attack. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05684))_
- A medusa has countless snakes (hair), and anyone who engages with a medusa in melee is exposed to these snakes' attacks. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05684))_
- The magical power in the head will disappear in about one week. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05685))_
- It is possible to put the severed head of a Medusa in a bag, then show it to an enemy in combat to turn them to stone, but it must be used carefully, as there is a risk of it turning your allies to stone as well. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05685))_
- Even if a medusa is killed, the magical power remains in her head for a while. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05685))_
- It is possible to put the severed head of a Medusa in a bag, then show it to an enemy in combat to turn them to stone, but it must be used carefully, as there is a risk of it turning your allies to stone as well. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05685))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05683))_

> Also, you cannot cast magic on the medusa in these states.

## [ Androscorpio ]

- Androscorpio is a mythical beast that lives in the desert, with the upper body of a handsome young man and the lower body of a brightly colored scorpion. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05693))_
- Like humans, there are good androscorpios, and there are evil androscorpios. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05693))_
- They can use spirit magic, and their shaman skill level is 3. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05693))_
- The stinger at the tip of his tail contains a hallucinogenic poison (toxicity score 11). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05694))_
- The enemy's appearance can change, or it can appear as multiple . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05694))_
- Those wounded by a tail attack and fail a life force resistance roll will experience hallucinations starting on the next round. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05694))_
- In combat, an androscorpio uses a sword in his hand, but he can also attack with his tail at the same time. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05694))_
- This symptom lasts for one hour, during which time the victim suffers a -4 penalty on all success rolls. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05694))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05690))_

> Habitat=Deserts

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05691))_

> Languages=Regional, silent spirit

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05692))_

> Perception=Five senses (infravision)

## [ Centaur ]

- Monster Level=4 Rarity=9 Agility=14 Movement Speed=30 Number=Several to around ten Frequency=Moderate Intellect=Human Reaction=Neutral Attack Points=Spear:10 (3)/Heel:10 (3) Strike Points=12/12 Attack Points=Bow:11 (4) Strike Points=12 Evasion Points=11 (4) Defense Points=7 Life Points/Resistance=19/13 (6) Mental Points/Resistance=13/12 (5) Special Abilities=4th level ancient magic (Magic Intensity/Magic Power=13/6) rarely Habitat=Meadows Languages=Centaurian _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05696))_
- Centaurs are a meadow-dwelling race that are human from the waist up and horse from the waist down. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05698))_
- They are not interested in money, but aside from that, if you bring them a suitable gift, you may be able to form a friendship. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05699))_
- They use bows and arrows or spears as weapons. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05700))_
- In melee combat, a centaur can attack a single target with the weapon in its hand and its heel at the same time. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05700))_
- It is said that there are very rare centaurs who have very advanced knowledge and can use magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05701))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05697))_

> Perception=Five senses

## [ Cockatrice ]

- Its beak has the ability to petrify living creatures, and anyone hit by a cockatrice (regardless of whether they're dealt damage or not) must make a life force resistance roll against target score 11. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05719))_
- A cockatrice is a flightless bird about the size of a human with the legs and tail of a lizard. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05719))_
- If you fail, you will instantly turn to stone. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05719))_
- Cockatrices mainly live in the wilderness and feed on an herb called henruda. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05720))_
- It's the only plant that does not turn to stone when touched by a cockatrice's beak. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05720))_
- This herb is also effective against medusa and basilisk, but its drawback is that it cannot be stored and its effect only lasts for one day. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05720))_
- It's the only plant that does not turn to stone when touched by a cockatrice's beak. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05720))_
- This herb is also effective against medusa and basilisk, but its drawback is that it cannot be stored and its effect only lasts for one day. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05720))_

## [ Scylla ] Monster Level=4 Rarity=13 Agility=12 Movement Speed=12/12 (water) Number=One Frequency=Rare Intellect=Human Reaction=Adversarial

- Their personality is extremely wicked, often luring men with only their upper bodies above the water, then dragging them underwater to kill them. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05724))_
- They are amphibious and can move freely on land, but mainly prefer to live in water. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05724))_
- Scylla is a beautiful woman from the waist up, but six serpent heads and 12 octopus tentacles grow from her lower body. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05724))_
- Their personality is extremely wicked, often luring men with only their upper bodies above the water, then dragging them underwater to kill them. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05724))_
- Her shaman skill level is 4 and her magic intensity is 13 (magic power 6). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05725))_
- However, she can only attack a single target three times in one round. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05725))_
- Scylla can also use spirit magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05725))_
- However, she can only attack a single target three times in one round. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05725))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05724))_

> Scylla is a beautiful woman from the waist up, but six serpent heads and 12 octopus tentacles grow from her lower body. They are amphibious and can move freely on land, but mainly prefer to live in water. Their personality is extremely wicked, often luring men with only their upper bodies above the water, then dragging them underwater to kill them.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05722))_

> When in combat, a scylla can attack different targets at the same time with its six heads.

## [ Chimera ]

- Its tail is a snake and a goat's head grows out of its back. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05744))_
- Fortunately, they live deep in the mountains, their fertility is weak due to their unnatural composition, and their numbers are small, so they're rarely encountered. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05744))_
- A chimera has a black lion for the front half of its body and a demonic black goat for the rear half. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05744))_
- Known to be extremely ferocious, they are impossible to defeat except by the very bravest. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05744))_
- Known to be extremely ferocious, they are impossible to defeat except by the very bravest. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05744))_
- The snake's fangs contain a neurotoxin that paralyzes the speech center, rendering those affected unable to speak or cast spells for one day. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05745))_
- It cannot attack the same target twice in one turn. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05745))_
- The black goat head on its back can also cast dark magic up to 5th level. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05745))_

## [ Twintail Cat ]

- Although extremely rare, friendships may form between humans and twintail cats. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05749))_
- However, it is a true mythical beast that has an intellect greater than humans and can also use magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05749))_
- They believe that straightforward thinking is extremely dangerous. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05749))_
- They will occasionally meddle with humans on a whim, but rarely engage beyond light teasing. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05749))_
- Twintail Cats may have rare magical items related to these kinds of magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05750))_
- Twintail cats are the rulers and protectors of the cats of Kaios Island (the Islands of Azarn). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05751))_
- However, they rarely give commands, as they value the spirit of self-reliance that is characteristic of the cat family. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05751))_
- Also, magical beasts do not follow their orders. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05751))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05749))_

> Twintailed cats look like normal black cats, except for the fact that they have two tails. However, it is a true mythical beast that has an intellect greater than humans and can also use magic. They will occasionally meddle with humans on a whim, but rarely engage beyond light teasing. They believe that straightforward thinking is extremely dangerous. Therefore, when they communicate something, they say it in a mysterious way, as if they are trying to bewilder the person they're talking to. Alth

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05748))_

> Perception=Five senses infravision)

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05749))_

> If this happens, they will never betray their friends.

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05749))_

> Twintailed cats look like normal black cats, except for the fact that they have two tails. However, it is a true mythical beast that has an intellect greater than humans and can also use magic. They will occasionally meddle with humans on a whim, but rarely engage beyond light teasing. They believe that straightforward thinking is extremely dangerous. Therefore, when they communicate something, they say it in a mysterious way, as if they are trying to bewilder the person they're talking to. Alth

> They can use ancient magic and spirit magic, but they are especially fond of illusions and magic that affects the mind.

## [ Telchines ] Monster Level=5 Rarity=14 Agility=12 Movement Speed=10/10 (water) Number=One Frequency=Very Rare Intellect=High Reaction=Neutral Attack Points=Weapon:11 (4)/Tail:12 (5) Strike Points=12/11 Evasion Points=12 (5) Defense Points=8 Life Points/Resistance=16/13 (6) Mental Points/Resistance=20/14 (7) Special Abilities=5th level ancient magic (Magic Intensity/Magic Power=15/8) Water adaptation Habitat=Secluded coasts Languages=Merman, low ancient Perception=Five senses (illumination)

- Just like humans, there are good telchines and there are evil telchines. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05753))_
- Telchines has the upper body of a human male, but his lower body has two large snake tails instead of legs. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05753))_
- They live quietly on the coast, far from human villages, and their ecology is shrouded in mystery. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05753))_
- All of them have deep knowledge of ancient magic and poisons, and can also cast ancient magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05753))_
- When fighting in its true form, it uses a trident in its hand along with its two tails. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05754))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05754))_

> When in danger, telchines will use a Shape Change spell to take on the form of a titan or an ugly beast to intimidate their opponents.

## [ Hippogriff ]

- Rarity=13 Agility=15 Movement Speed=10/40 (air) Number=One Frequency=Rare Intellect=Low Reaction=Neutral Attack Points=Talon:13 (6)/Talon:13 (6)/Beak:12 (5) Strike Points=13/13/12 Evasion Points=12 (5) Defense Points=8 Life Points/Resistance=22/14 (7) Mental Points/Resistance=10/12 (5) Special Abilities=None in particular Habitat=Meadows Languages=None _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05757))_

- Despite their appearance, they're not very ferocious and will not attack humans unless they are very hungry. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05759))_
- They live in grasslands and feed on small herbivores. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05759))_
- Despite their appearance, they're not very ferocious and will not attack humans unless they are very hungry. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05759))_
