## [ Pegasus ] Monster Level=5 Rarity=10 Agility=12 Movement Speed=30/40 (air) Number=One to several Frequency=Rare Intellect=Human Reaction=Neutral Attack Points=Heel:11 (4) Strike Points=13 Evasion Points=12 (5) Defense Points=8 Life Points/Resistance=20/14 (7) Mental Points/Resistance=15/13 (6) Special Abilities=Not affected by poison and illness Habitat=Steep mountains, meadows Languages=None

- However, if a human is recognized as a true hero, a pegasus will willingly let them ride on its back. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05762))_
- This is because pegasus are proud animals, even more so than humans, and would rather die than be enslaved. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05762))_
- Pegasus is a winged white horse that can fly. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05762))_
- In the wild, Pegasus live on steep mountains and come down to the meadows at the foot of the mountains to feed on grass. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05762))_
- This is because pegasus are proud animals, even more so than humans, and would rather die than be enslaved. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05762))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05762))_

> Pegasus is a winged white horse that can fly. In the wild, Pegasus live on steep mountains and come down to the meadows at the foot of the mountains to feed on grass. Although it's difficult to capture a pegasus alive, it's even more difficult to tame. This is because pegasus are proud animals, even more so than humans, and would rather die than be enslaved. However, if a human is recognized as a true hero, a pegasus will willingly let them ride on its back.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05761))_

> Perception=Five senses

## [ Head Displacer ]

- Monster Level=5 Rarity=15 Agility=18 Movement Speed=18 (air) Frequency=Very Rare Number=One Intellect=Human Reaction=Adversarial Attack Points=Tentacles (strangle) x 4:12 (5)/Fangs:12 (5) Strike Points=8 x 4/10 Evasion Points=15 (8) Defense Points=7 Life Points/Resistance=18 (14/7) Mental Points/Resistance=15 (13/6) Special Abilities=5th level dark magic (Magic Intensity/Magic Power=14/7) rarely Strangling Not affected by poison and illness Sleepless Habitat=Underground labyrinths, ruins Languages=Low ancient _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05764))_
- Head displacers have the ability to devour large numbers of humans without being noticed. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05766))_
- It is said among the sages that they may have been created primarily for attacking castles during war. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05766))_
- Its movements are awkward, and naturally, after several days since its prey was slain, the body will begin to decompose and a putrid odor will linger in the air. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05767))_
- The tentacles are usually about 15 cm long, but can extend up to 4 meters. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05767))_
- If the opponent becomes disabled, it'll devour their head and place itself in the head's position. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05767))_
- When it remains alone, it moves by floating in the air. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05767))_
- Its movements are awkward, and naturally, after several days since its prey was slain, the body will begin to decompose and a putrid odor will linger in the air. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05767))_
- If a character is in danger of a surprise attack by a head displacer, a character with the ranger skill may be able to notice it due to their sense danger ability. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05768))_
- Its magic intensity is 14 (magic power 7). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05770))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05765))_

> Perception=Five senses (darkvision)

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05767))_

> A head displacer itself has the ability to speak low ancient, but cannot use any of its host's (?) skills.

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05767))_

> The head displacer looks like a severed human head with four vermillion tentacles growing out of its neck. When it remains alone, it moves by floating in the air. When it finds prey (humans), it'll first attack with its tentacles. The tentacles are usually about 15 cm long, but can extend up to 4 meters. If a tentacle attack hits, resolve it as strangling (see p. 236). If all 4 tentacles entangle its opponent, it'll also attack with its fangs. If the opponent becomes disabled, it'll devour their

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05768))_

> If the tentacles are not clear, those with the sage skill cannot use the monster check ability.

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05768))_

> If a character is in danger of a surprise attack by a head displacer, a character with the ranger skill may be able to notice it due to their sense danger ability. Make a success roll against target score 15 using ranger skill level + intelligence bonus as the baseline score, and if you succeed, you'll be able to sense it, but if you fail, you'll be hit by the surprise attack. If the tentacles are not clear, those with the sage skill cannot use the monster check ability.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05770))_

> A head displacer may use dark magic on very rare occasions.

## [ Lamia ]

- Monster Level=5 Rarity=15 Agility=9 Movement Speed=12 Number=One Frequency=Rare Intellect=Human Reaction=Neutral Attack Points=Strangle:13 (6) Strike Points=11 Evasion Points=11 (4) Defense Points=8 Life Points/Resistance=20/14 (7) Mental Points/Resistance=16/13 (6) Special Abilities=4th level ancient magic (Magic Intensity/Magic Power=13/6) Needs bloodsucking to maintain life points Habitat=Human villages Languages=Regional, low ancient _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05772))_
- A lamia is a large snake with the upper body of a beautiful woman and a rainbow-colored lower body, 7 to 8 meters long. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05774))_
- Although she is well versed in ancient magic, she doesn't really like to use spells that attack her enemies directly, mainly using illusions and transformations to bewitch them. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05774))_
- There are some who have been living with lamia for years without even realizing it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05775))_
- A lamia that does not suck blood at least once per day will lose 1 life point, and if she does not suck blood for 20 days, she will starve to death. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05775))_
- With this amount of damage, a healthy young person will only feel mild fatigue and should recover quickly. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05775))_
- Those who have their blood sucked will lose life points, and the lamia will recover that same amount of life points. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05775))_
- Usually only 1 point worth of blood is needed per day. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05775))_
- Lamia cannot survive without sucking fresh blood from young humans, so they often use a Shape Change spell to disguise themselves as human girls, deceive young people into becoming their lovers, and then secretly suck their blood in the middle of the night. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05775))_
- Lamia cannot survive without sucking fresh blood from young humans, so they often use a Shape Change spell to disguise themselves as human girls, deceive young people into becoming their lovers, and then secretly suck their blood in the middle of the night. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05775))_
- With this amount of damage, a healthy young person will only feel mild fatigue and should recover quickly. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05775))_
- Usually only 1 point worth of blood is needed per day. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05775))_
- Lamia are not necessarily wicked, and some of them seem to be kindhearted. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05776))_
- Since they cannot survive without depending on humans, they usually live quietly in villages and towns, and you're unlikely to encounter them outdoors or in labyrinths. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05776))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05773))_

> Perception=Five senses

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05774))_

> A lamia is a large snake with the upper body of a beautiful woman and a rainbow-colored lower body, 7 to 8 meters long. Although she is well versed in ancient magic, she doesn't really like to use spells that attack her enemies directly, mainly using illusions and transformations to bewitch them.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05775))_

> Whenever they suck blood, they must return to their original form.

## [ Lizardman ]

- Lizardmen are broadly sorted into two types: noble and slave. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05778))_
- The overwhelming majority are slaves. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05779))_
- These communities do not have a very complex social life and are unproductive, simply catching and eating fish from nearby lakes and rivers. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05779))_
- Most lizardman villages consist of only slaves, with populations ranging from about 20 to 50. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05779))_
- The only reason they form groups is for protection from foreign enemies and for ease of reproduction. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05779))_
- The only reason they form groups is for protection from foreign enemies and for ease of reproduction. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05779))_
- Most lizardman villages consist of only slaves, with populations ranging from about 20 to 50. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05779))_
- The mixed community of noble lizardmen is rarely seen by humans, so the exact facts are unknown, but it is said to be several times the size of the slave-only community and have a great difference in function. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05780))_
- Nobles are far superior to slaves in both physique and intellect, and they can also use magic (dragon roar magic). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05780))_
- The mixed community of noble lizardmen is rarely seen by humans, so the exact facts are unknown, but it is said to be several times the size of the slave-only community and have a great difference in function. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05780))_
- Although the Witch of Orphan Laverna assumed that the lizardman family was closely related to dragons and avoided premature classification, it was precisely because of this reason that later sages classified them as a type of mythical or magical beast. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05781))_
- The magic used by noble lizardmen is said to be dragon roar magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05781))_
- Although the Witch of Orphan Laverna assumed that the lizardman family was closely related to dragons and avoided premature classification, it was precisely because of this reason that later sages classified them as a type of mythical or magical beast. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05781))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05781))_

> The magic used by noble lizardmen is said to be dragon roar magic. Although the Witch of Orphan Laverna assumed that the lizardman family was closely related to dragons and avoided premature classification, it was precisely because of this reason that later sages classified them as a type of mythical or magical beast.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05779))_

> Slaves have low intellect and cannot use magic.

## [ Griffon ]

- The griffon is a magical beast with the body of a lion, the head of an eagle, and the wings of an eagle, and it can fly. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05837))_
- They have a strange habit of collecting shiny things, and a large amount of gold, silver, and jewels are stored in a griffon's cave on the cliff. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05837))_
- They mainly feed on small animals and do not attack humans unnecessarily, but if an adventurer is ostentatiously wearing jewelry, they may attack in order to steal it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05837))_

## [ Manticore ]

- A manticore has the body of a lion, the tail of a scorpion, the wings of a bat, and the face of an old man. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05858))_
- They have an extremely long life span and accumulate a great deal of knowledge. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05858))_
- Many are followers of Phalaris, and their dark priest skill is 5th level. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05858))_
- 194) is the guardian of true knowledge, the manticore is said to be the guardian of wicked knowledge. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05858))_
- Those who fail will become paralyzed and draw their last breath after one hour. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05859))_
- The stinger at the tip of its tail is highly poisonous. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05859))_
- Those dealt damage by the tail attack must make a life force resistance roll against target score 13. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05859))_
- Those who fail will become paralyzed and draw their last breath after one hour. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05859))_

## [ Minotaur ]

- To prevent such calamities, rural villages will often hold rituals in which young girls are sacrificed to the minotaur. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05877))_
- The minotaur, with a strong human body and the head of a bull, is an extremely brutal creature. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05877))_
- They are carnivorous, especially fond of human flesh, and when they are hungry, they will sometimes come out and attack nearby villages. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05877))_
- If the minotaur is hungry, it'll eat the sacrifice immediately, but if it has other food, it'll keep her alive for a while and use her for other pleasures. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05877))_
- Minotaurs primarily use a giant ax as a weapon, but when fighting barehanded, they will attempt to strangle their opponent to death with both arms. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05878))_

## [ Unicorn ]

- However, if anyone other than the maiden tries to touch it, the unicorn will issue a warning, and if you still do not listen, it'll get angry and attack. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05898))_
- Even in the unfortunate case of a fight, a unicorn will not do anything that would harm a human maiden. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05898))_
- Unicorns have high intellect and can communicate in silent spirit, but will only trust human (or elf or half-elf) virgin girls. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05898))_
- Unicorns have high intellect and can communicate in silent spirit, but will only trust human (or elf or half-elf) virgin girls. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05898))_
- They have an unlimited life span and are never affected by illness or poison. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05899))_
- Unicorns are said to be deeply connected to the unknown spirit of life. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05899))_
- If a unicorn runs out of mental points, its horn will wear out and crumble away, leaving not a trace behind. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05900))_
- At this time, their shaman skill is 10th level. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05900))_
- A unicorn's horn has great healing abilities, allowing them to use magic related to the spirit of life, such as Healing and Restore Health . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05900))_
- A unicorn's horn has great healing abilities, allowing them to use magic related to the spirit of life, such as Healing and Restore Health . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05900))_
- A horn has a reserve of mental points equal to the unicorn's mental points when cut off x 10 , and when you use magic, the base mental power cost of each is directly subtracted from this mental point reserve. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05901))_
- A unicorn's horn can be cut off, allowing others to use magic related to the spirit of life. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05901))_
- The reserve mental points cannot be recovered, and once they are used up, the horn will wear out and crumble away. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05901))_
- The user does not have to be a shaman or a woman, and may also wear metal armor. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05901))_
- If magic power is required, calculate it as 10. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05901))_
- For this reason, unicorn horns are sometimes traded as magical items. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05901))_
- Eventually they will reach the end of their life span and die. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05902))_
- They will no longer be able to use magic at all, and will be affected by illness, poison, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05902))_
- Currently, unicorns are known to live in large numbers in the Unicorn Woods of Ramliearth, but they are almost extinct outside of that area. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05903))_
- Ramliearth has deployed a forest guard regiment and is working as an entire nation to protect these mythical beasts. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05903))_
- In addition, the group of druids who protect the forest also have great power, keeping it out of reach of potential poachers. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05903))_

> Unicorns have high intellect and can communicate in silent spirit, but will only trust human (or elf or half-elf) virgin girls. Even in the unfortunate case of a fight, a unicorn will not do anything that would harm a human maiden. However, if anyone other than the maiden tries to touch it, the unicorn will issue a warning, and if you still do not listen, it'll get angry and attack.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05900))_

> Unicorns can also use spirit magic unrelated to the spirit of life, but at this time their shaman skill is only 6th level.

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05901))_

> A unicorn's horn can be cut off, allowing others to use magic related to the spirit of life. For this reason, unicorn horns are sometimes traded as magical items. The user does not have to be a shaman or a woman, and may also wear metal armor. A horn has a reserve of mental points equal to the unicorn's mental points when cut off x 10 , and when you use magic, the base mental power cost of each is directly subtracted from this mental point reserve. If magic power is required, calculate it as 10.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05902))_

> If a unicorn loses its horn due to overuse of magic or it being cut off, it will never grow back again.

## [ Lynx ]

- Although carnivorous, they mainly feed on small animals and will not attack human-sized creatures unless they are extremely hungry. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05908))_
- A lynx is a large cat-like creature about 3 meters long that lives in mountains and forests. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05908))_
- Although carnivorous, they mainly feed on small animals and will not attack human-sized creatures unless they are extremely hungry. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05908))_
- This is because the lynx has a small amber stone called lignia stone in its body, and this stone is a cure-all for illnesses that affect the mind. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05909))_
- Rather, it is humans who hunt the lynx. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05909))_
- This is because the lynx has a small amber stone called lignia stone in its body, and this stone is a cure-all for illnesses that affect the mind. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05909))_
- Therefore, it's very difficult to approach a lynx without being noticed. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05910))_
- However, the lynx has a sharp clairvoyance ability, and if something approaches within a 100 meter radius, it can quickly spot it, even if it's lurking in the shadows. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05910))_
- Therefore, it's very difficult to approach a lynx without being noticed. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05910))_
- However, the lynx has a sharp clairvoyance ability, and if something approaches within a 100 meter radius, it can quickly spot it, even if it's lurking in the shadows. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05910))_

## [ Sphinx ] Monster Level=7 Rarity=12 Agility=14 Movement Speed=18/30 (air) Number=One Frequency=Very Rare Intellect=High Reaction=Neutral Attack Points=Claw:15 (8)/Claw:15 (8) Strike Points=16/16 Evasion Points=14 (7) Defense Points=11 Life Points/Resistance=24/17 (10) Mental Points/Resistance=20/16 (9) Special Abilities=5th level ancient magic (Magic Intensity/Magic Power=15/8) Tell riddles Not affected by poison and illness Sleepless Habitat=Ruins, underground labyrinths Languages=Regional, low ancient

- The sphinx has the body of a lion with the wings of an eagle and a beautiful human-like face. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05913))_
- They have an extremely long lifespan and have accumulated a great deal of knowledge. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05913))_
- The sphinx is said to be a mythical beast created by the sorcerers of the ancient kingdom to protect true knowledge, and to prevent lost ancient magic spell books and valuable magical items from falling into the hands of fools. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05914))_
- The sphinx will only reveal its secrets to those it deems to be truly wise and right-minded. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05914))_
- The sphinx will only reveal its secrets to those it deems to be truly wise and right-minded. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05914))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05912))_

> Perception=Five senses (darkvision)

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05913))_

> Although they can cast ancient magic, they will not use magic recklessly or challenge you to a fight unless something really bad happens.

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05913))_

> The sphinx has the body of a lion with the wings of an eagle and a beautiful human-like face. They have an extremely long lifespan and have accumulated a great deal of knowledge. Although they can cast ancient magic, they will not use magic recklessly or challenge you to a fight unless something really bad happens.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05914))_

> If approached in a friendly manner, the sphinx may play a game of riddles to determine the intelligence of their opponent.

## [ Wyvern ]

- Monster Level=7 Rarity=10 Agility=18 Movement Speed=8/35 (air) Number=One Frequency=Rare Intellect=Animal Reaction=Neutral Attack Points=Fangs:14 (7)/Talon:15 (8)/ Talon:15 (8)/Tail:14 (7) Strike Points=17/16/16/16+poison Evasion Points=13 (6) Defense Points=11 Life Points/Resistance=25/17 (10) Special Abilities=Poison (Toxicity score 14, strike power 20, bonus damage 7) Habitat=Deserts, forests, mountains, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05916))_
- They are over 10 meters long and use their large wings to fly, but they have no front legs. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05918))_
- Wyverns are said to be one of the subspecies of dragons. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05918))_
- Since they don't choose where they live, they are feared throughout Alecrast. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05918))_
- Since they don't choose where they live, they are feared throughout Alecrast. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05918))_
- If you succeed, the strike power will only be 10. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05919))_
- Wyverns have highly poisonous stingers at the tips of their tails. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05919))_
- Anyone dealt damage by a wyvern's tail attack must immediately make a life force resistance roll against target score 14. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05919))_
- This damage can be reduced by adventurer level. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05919))_
- If you succeed, the strike power will only be 10. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05919))_

> Unlike dragons, they have low intellect, so they cannot cast spells, nor can they breathe fire.

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05918))_

> Wyverns are said to be one of the subspecies of dragons. They are over 10 meters long and use their large wings to fly, but they have no front legs. Since they don't choose where they live, they are feared throughout Alecrast. Unlike dragons, they have low intellect, so they cannot cast spells, nor can they breathe fire.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05919))_

> If you fail, the poison deals damage resulting from a strike power 20 strike roll plus bonus damage 7.

## [ Basilisk ]

- A basilisk is a large lizard, about 10 meters long, with a chicken's comb on its head and eight legs. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05939))_
- Its gaze can only be used once every two rounds, cannot be used at the same time as its fangs, and can only aim at one target. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05940))_
- Those gazed at by the basilisk must succeed on a mental power resistance roll against target score 15, or they will instantly turn to stone. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05940))_
- Its gaze can only be used once every two rounds, cannot be used at the same time as its fangs, and can only aim at one target. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05940))_
- In that case, if a character attains a final score of 19 or greater on a resistance roll against petrification, they will be able to reflect it back at the basilisk. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05941))_
- If this happens, the basilisk will automatically be petrified. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05941))_
- You can attempt to use a large mirror (at least the size of a small shield) to catch the basilisk's gaze and reflect it back to turn the basilisk into stone. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05941))_
- This damage can only be reduced by adventurer level. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05942))_
- Weapons that deal damage to a basilisk will be soaked with the blood and become highly poisonous. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05942))_
- Basilisks also have a powerful poison in their blood. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05942))_
- If the resistance roll is successful, the strike force becomes 0. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05942))_
- This damage can only be reduced by adventurer level. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05942))_

In that case, if a character attains a final score of 19 or greater on a resistance roll against petrification, they will be able to reflect it back at the basilisk. If this happens, the basilisk will automatically be petrified.

## [ Sea Dragon ]

- Monster Level=8 Rarity=18 Agility=13 Movement Speed=8/14 (air) Number=One Frequency=Very Rare Intellect=Animal Reaction=Hunger-based Attack Points=Fangs:15 (8)/Tail:15 (8)/ Strangle:17 (10) Strike Points=19/18/17 Evasion Points=14 (7) Defense Points=12 Life Points/Resistance=35/19 (12) Mental Points/Resistance=12/16 (9) Special Abilities=Strangling _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05956))_
- It is said that the sea monster, the sea dragon, is a creature that evolved from a dragon to adapt to living in the water, but this is not known for sure. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05961))_
- Even a large ship can sink within minutes if it's ensnared by a sea dragon. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05962))_
- Even a large ship can sink within minutes if it's ensnared by a sea dragon. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05962))_

## [ Wyrm ]

- Monster Level=8 Rarity=18 Agility=12 Movement Speed=35 (air) Number=One Frequency=Very Rare Intellect=Human Reaction=Neutral Attack Points=Fangs:15 (8)/Tail:15 (8) Strike Points=18/17 Evasion Points=14 (7) Defense Points=11 Life Points/Resistance=25/18 (11) Mental Points/Resistance=16/16 (9) Special Abilities=None in particular Habitat=Steep mountains that humans can't pass through Languages=Lizardman _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05964))_
- Its head resembles that of a dragon or wyvern, but it has no legs at all. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05966))_
- They have human-like intellect and can speak lizardman, but they do not have the ability to use magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05966))_
- A wyrm has the appearance of a large snake, with a body over 15 meters long, and bat-like wings. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05966))_
- Wyrms are highly territorial, and when other wyrms or giant creatures enter their territory, which is a radius of about 20 kilometers, they will immediately try to drive them out or they may approach them to eat them as food. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05967))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05965))_

> Perception=Five senses (illumination)

## [ Buckbaird ]

- Not affected by poison and illness Sleepless Habitat=Underground labyrinths, ruins Languages=Low ancient Perception=Pseudo _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05982))_
- There seem to be several subspecies, and some have been seen with antennae and short limbs. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05983))_
- They are only found in underground labyrinths, but what they eat and how they reproduce is a complete mystery. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05983))_
- It's a giant eyeball about one and a half meters in diameter, covered in long black hair, and it somehow floats in the air. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05983))_
- Among the Magical Beasts created by the sorcerers of the ancient kingdom, buckbairds are especially bizarre. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05983))_
- They are only found in underground labyrinths, but what they eat and how they reproduce is a complete mystery. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05983))_
- In combat, a buckbaird uses five different types of rays. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05984))_
- Those targeted by the ray will be unaffected if they succeed on a mental power resistance roll against target score 16, but will be seriously affected if they fail. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05984))_
- The ray can only affect one target. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05984))_
- This ray cannot affect the buckbaird itself, even if it's reflected using a mirror, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05984))_
- The ray can only affect one target. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05984))_

> The game master should roll 1D to determine which ray the buckbaird fires (or if it attempts to ram).

## 1. Paralysis Ray

- You will be paralyzed for 6 rounds. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05986))_

## 2. Hypnosis Ray

- You will fall asleep. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05988))_
- This is considered natural sleep. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05988))_

## 3. Freeze Ray

- You will freeze instantly and enter a state of suspended animation. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05990))_

## 4. Brainwashing Ray

- You will think the buckbaird is your ally and attack your allies. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05992))_

## 5. Metal Destruction Ray

- Magical weapons and armor are not affected. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05994))_
- This ray cannot be resisted. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05994))_
- Destroys metal weapons and armor you are wearing. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05994))_

## 6. No firing

- It will attack without firing a ray. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-05996))_

## [ Hydra ]

- The hydra is a terrifying serpent with nine heads and a total length of 10 meters. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06009))_
- They mainly live in lakes and rivers, but can also act on land without penalty. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06009))_
- At this time, it can attack a single target 9 times, or aim at different targets. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06009))_
- Once its life points reach 0, its heads will no longer regenerate. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06010))_
- A severed head will grow back after 5 rounds, restoring the number of attacks, and also recovering 6 life points. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06010))_
- If you attack a hydra with a bladed weapon and deal 6 or more points of damage (20 or more if defense points are taken into account) in one blow, you will have cut off one head, and the hydra's number of attacks will be reduced by 1. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06010))_
- However, if a head is dealt fire or electric damage immediately after it falls off, that head will not regenerate. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06010))_
- A severed head will grow back after 5 rounds, restoring the number of attacks, and also recovering 6 life points. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06010))_
- However, if a head is dealt fire or electric damage immediately after it falls off, that head will not regenerate. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06010))_

## [ Humbaba ]

- The humbaba is a strange bizarre creature created by the sorcerers of the ancient kingdom, along with the buckbaird. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06029))_
- Even if this ray is reflected off a mirror, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06030))_
- it cannot affect the humbaba. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06030))_
- If you fail, you will instantly turn to stone. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06030))_
- A humbaba will fire a terrifying petrification ray from its one eye, once every 3 rounds. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06030))_
- The humbaba's fire deals damage and at the same time causes a terrible disease. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06031))_
- Anyone who suffers even 1 point of damage from the humbaba's fire has a chance of contracting a dreadful illness called humbaba curse . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06031))_
- This damage can only be reduced by adventurer level and magical defense. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06031))_
- However, if you succeed on a mental power resistance roll against target score 17, the strike power becomes 10. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06031))_
- The fire is large enough to cover one person, and those hit by the fire will suffer damage resulting from a strike power 20 strike roll plus bonus damage 10. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06031))_
- A humbaba can also spit fire from its large mouth, which takes up half of its face, once every 3 rounds. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06031))_
- This damage can only be reduced by adventurer level and magical defense. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06031))_
- Only one of these attacks can be performed per round. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06033))_
- Only one of these attacks can be performed per round. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06033))_

## [ Roc ]

- Once every few years, they may be swept close to the continent by the wind, and are the subject of gossip among sailors. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06039))_
- The most feared beast second only to the dragon, the roc is a gigantic bird resembling an eagle, with a wingspan of 20 meters. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06039))_
- The most feared beast second only to the dragon, the roc is a gigantic bird resembling an eagle, with a wingspan of 20 meters. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06039))_
- Besides roc infants, its nest is said to be full of treasure. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06040))_
- A roc's talons alone are over 1 meter long, and it can lift and carry humansized animals with one foot, or a cow or horse with both feet. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06040))_
- Those hit by a roc's talon attacks will be grabbed by the talons, lifted into the air, and carried to its nest. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06040))_
- Like the griffon, it may have a habit of collecting shiny objects. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06040))_
- Rock eggs can measure up to 2 meters in diameter, making even newborn infants larger than humans. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06041))_
- Here is the data of an infant for your reference. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06041))_

## [ Dragon ]

- There are three main types of dragons in Forcelia: ancient dragons (drakes), elder dragons, and lesser dragons. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06046))_
- All of these dragons are similar in appearance. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06047))_
- Their entire body is covered with hard scales, and the color of these scales varies depending on the individual. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06047))_
- Their legs are thick and sturdy, for bipedal walking on the ground. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06048))_
- They have a snake-like head and tail, with horns and spikes growing along their spine. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06048))_
- These wings are comparatively small for their body size. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06048))_
- They have bat-like wings on their backs. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06048))_
- The 30 meter long drake, feared as a god slayer monster, and also a master of a variety of magic, is nowhere to be seen in Forcelia today. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06049))_
- It is said that there is no way for a human to ever take on a drake. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06049))_
- Even the elder and lesser species, which are weaker than drakes, are far too powerful enemies for humans to face, and those who defeat these dragons are hailed as dragon slayer heroes. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06049))_

## Lesser Dragon

- They have low intellect, and do not use magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06072))_
- There is an outlook that they are like giant beasts, living according to instinct rather than thought. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06072))_
- Lesser dragons are about 15 meters long. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06072))_
- If you fail, you'll suffer damage resulting from a strike power 20 strike roll plus 10 points of bonus damage. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06073))_
- The use of fire is at the dragon's discretion, and there is no limit to the number of times it can use it, but it cannot make physical attacks with fangs or claws on the same round in which it uses fire. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06073))_
- Lesser dragons have the ability to breathe fire, and are also resistant to fire. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06073))_
- The use of fire is at the dragon's discretion, and there is no limit to the number of times it can use it, but it cannot make physical attacks with fangs or claws on the same round in which it uses fire. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06073))_
- A dragon cannot breathe fire or attack with their fangs or claws on the same round in which it roars. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06074))_

> Lesser dragons are about 15 meters long. They have low intellect, and do not use magic. There is an outlook that they are like giant beasts, living according to instinct rather than thought.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06073))_

> Those within range must make a mental power resistance roll against target score 17.

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06073))_

> Lesser dragons have the ability to breathe fire, and are also resistant to fire. The lesser dragon's flames spread out in a semicircle, with a 20 meter forward radius. Those within range must make a mental power resistance roll against target score 17. If you fail, you'll suffer damage resulting from a strike power 20 strike roll plus 10 points of bonus damage. The use of fire is at the dragon's discretion, and there is no limit to the number of times it can use it, but it cannot make physical a

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06074))_

> Anyone who hears the dragon's roar must make a mental power resistance roll against target score 17.

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06074))_

> A dragon's roar also brings intense fear to those who hear it. Anyone who hears the dragon's roar must make a mental power resistance roll against target score 17. If you fail, determine the effect using Table 5-5: Fears (see p. 89). Treat this the same as magic that belongs to mind . A dragon cannot breathe fire or attack with their fangs or claws on the same round in which it roars.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06075))_

> Dragons may take long periods of rest called dormant season , but they do not require sleep in the normal sense of the word and cannot be put to sleep by magic.

## Elder Dragon

- Monster Level=15 Rarity=10 Agility=10 Movement Speed=10/30 (air) Number=One Frequency=Very Rare Intellect=High Reaction=Neutral Attack Points=Fangs:22 (15)/Talon:23 (16)/Talon:23 (16)/Tail:22 (15) Strike Points=28/27/27/27 Evasion Points=20 (13) Defense Points=21 Life Points/Resistance=70/32 (25) Mental Points/Resistance=30/26 (19) Special Abilities=10th level ancient magic (Magic Intensity/Magic Power=20/13) 10th level dragon roar magic _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06077))_
- Unlike lesser dragons, they have high intellect and sometimes use ancient magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06083))_
- Some sages claim that this is based on the lost dragon roar, and should not be called ancient magic, although the results are the same. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06083))_
- Elder dragons are about 20 meters long. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06083))_
- Unlike lesser dragons, they have high intellect and sometimes use ancient magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06083))_
- They also have the roar ability which causes fear. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06084))_
- The target score to resist is 22. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06084))_
- Elder-species' fire spreads in a 30-meter forward radius, and those who fail a mental power resistance roll against target score 22 will suffer damage resulting from a strike power 30 strike roll plus bonus damage 15. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06084))_
- Elder dragons also have the ability to breathe fire. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06084))_
- Like lesser-species, elder-species can only use one of fire, roar, or physical attack (or magic) in one round. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06085))_
- Like lesser-species, elder-species can only use one of fire, roar, or physical attack (or magic) in one round. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06085))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06078))_

> (Magic Intensity/Magic Power=20/13)

## [ Wolf ]

- Monster Level=1 Rarity=5 Agility=16 Movement Speed=24 Number=Several to around ten Frequency=Moderate Intellect=Animal Reaction=Hunger-based Attack Points=Fangs: 8 (1) Strike Points=5 Evasion Points=9 (2) Defense Points=4 Life Points/Resistance=14/9 (2) Mental Points/Resistance=6/8 (1) Special Abilities=None in particular Habitat=Woods, meadows, near human villages Languages=None _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06088))_
- They systematically attack unsuspecting animals that are separated from their herd. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06090))_
- They are also nocturnal, which means their activity is limited to the night. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06090))_
- Wolves are carnivorous and usually act in packs of several to several dozen. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06090))_
- They are also nocturnal, which means their activity is limited to the night. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06090))_
- Such wolves have greater morals than normal ones, and will fight to the death to protect their masters. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06091))_
- Rarely, wolf cubs are captured and sometimes domesticated as hunting dogs. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06091))_

## 13.2.7 Animals

- They are omnivorous, and usually live in groups. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06097))_
- and dexterous, and thus can stand on their hind legs and use simple tools. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06097))_
- They are timid by nature and will not attack unless you seriously provoke them or invade their burrow without them knowing. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06097))_
- They are timid by nature and will not attack unless you seriously provoke them or invade their burrow without them knowing. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06097))_
- and dexterous, and thus can stand on their hind legs and use simple tools. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06097))_
- If you roll a 4 or less, you will contract rat disease . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06098))_
- Adventurers wounded by a giant rat's fangs or claws are at risk of contracting an illness. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06098))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06097))_

> Even on the rare occasion that they do attack you, they will quickly run away if you wound them, and you can easily drive them away with fire.

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06097))_

> and dexterous, and thus can stand on their hind legs and use simple tools. They are omnivorous, and usually live in groups. They are timid by nature and will not attack unless you seriously provoke them or invade their burrow without them knowing. Even on the rare occasion that they do attack you, they will quickly run away if you wound them, and you can easily drive them away with fire.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06098))_

> You must roll 2D again.

## [ Hanger Leg ] Monster Level=1 Rarity=13 Agility=18 Movement Speed=8 Number=One. However, eggs are often found in groups Frequency=Rare Intellect=Human Reaction=Neutral Attack Points=Needle: 8 (1) Strike Points=6 Evasion Points=11 (4) Defense Points=4 Life Points/Resistance=8/8 (1) Mental Points/Resistance=8/8 (1) Special Abilities=Parasitism (Resist target score=8) Habitat=Forests Languages=None Perception=Five senses

- Its body is only 20 cm long, but its supple legs, which also serve as tentacles, are equipped with countless suckers, and can stretch to over 1 meter when extended. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06100))_
- This headless octopus-like creature is a vicious parasite that lives by taking over the bodies of large animals, and has no visible distinction between male and female. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06100))_
- It can easily jump up to 3 meters, and once it attaches itself to a creature's head, it won't come off even if a giant pulls at it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06100))_
- Also, its jumping power and strangling power are not something to be underestimated. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06100))_
- Its body is only 20 cm long, but its supple legs, which also serve as tentacles, are equipped with countless suckers, and can stretch to over 1 meter when extended. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06100))_
- In addition to absorbing nourishing blood from the blood vessels, the needles also have the function of paralyzing the opponent's brain and controlling their nervous system. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06101))_
- However, once the attack hits, the hanger leg will now be lodged in the victim's head, so all subsequent attacks will automatically succeed. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06101))_
- If your armor and adventurer level prevent you from suffering substantial damage, the needles will not pass through to your head and you will not need to make a resistance roll. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06101))_
- Then, needles extended from the tips of the legs are embedded into the opponent's brain. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06101))_
- Then, needles extended from the tips of the legs are embedded into the opponent's brain. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06101))_
- A hanger leg that is lodged in a head cannot be removed by force. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06102))_
- Nevertheless, all motor functions and physiological abilities are at the will of the parasite. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06103))_
- A hanger leg can freely use the body of the victim it's taken over. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06103))_
- Of course, using magic is out of the question. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06103))_
- An unfortunate victim of a hanger leg's possession will lose all senses, unable to see or hear anything, and furthermore, will be unable to think. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06105))_
- Naturally, you cannot escape on your own, but once killed, the parasite leaves the host's body. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06105))_
- These eggs will hatch and grow inside the balls, and when they grow up, they will form a cocoon and sleep until a host creature approaches. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06106))_
- Then, when the long-awaited opportunity arrives, they are quick to pounce on such an unwary creature. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06106))_
- Also, when death is near, the hanger leg will form several balls under the flesh hardened with secretion and lay small eggs. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06106))_
- Then, when the long-awaited opportunity arrives, they are quick to pounce on such an unwary creature. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06106))_
- These eggs will hatch and grow inside the balls, and when they grow up, they will form a cocoon and sleep until a host creature approaches. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06106))_

## [ Giant Centipede ]

- If you fail, your motor nerves will be affected, and will suffer a -2 penalty on all success rolls. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06134))_
- A giant centipede's fangs are poisonous. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06134))_

## [ Giant Wasp ]

- This is a wasp about 1 meter long, with a black body and a red band on its belly. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06153))_
- However, during the autumn spawning season, the females become ferocious. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06153))_
- This is because they have to attack animals to lay their eggs. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06153))_
- They do not build hives like honeybees, and will not attack you unless you attack them. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06153))_
- This is because they have to attack animals to lay their eggs. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06153))_

- A giant wasp's stinger is poisonous (toxicity score 12). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06154))_

- This state of suspended animation lasts semipermanently. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06154))_

## Warhorse

- Monster Level=2 Rarity=5 Agility=12 Movement Speed=30 Number=Depends on the situation Frequency=Moderate Intellect=Animal Reaction=Depends on the rider Attack Points=Heel:8 (1) Strike Points=10 Evasion Points=9 (2) Defense Points=5 Life Points/Resistance=18/11 (4) Mental Points/Resistance=10/9 (2) Special Abilities=None in particular Habitat=Human villages Languages=None _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06157))_
- The rider basically holds the reins with one hand, and a weapon with the other. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06159))_
- This means you can't use shields or two-handed weapons. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06159))_
- This is a riding horse trained to follow the will of its rider, even in battle. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06159))_
- This means you can't use shields or two-handed weapons. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06159))_
- If you attempt to control your horse without using the reins, you will suffer a -4 penalty to your final score. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06160))_

> This is a riding horse trained to follow the will of its rider, even in battle. It can attack at the same time as the rider, unless the rider performs a lance charge (see page 270). The rider basically holds the reins with one hand, and a weapon with the other. This means you can't use shields or two-handed weapons.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06160))_

> To fight on horseback, you must make a success roll against target score 7 each round using adventurer level + agility bonus as the baseline score.

## [ Wardog ]

- No matter how unfavorable the situation becomes, they will not run away unless commanded to do so. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06178))_
- A wardog never barks unless commanded to do so in advance. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06178))_
- They're characterized by entirely black bodies, pointed ears and snout, almost no tail, and a slender physique. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06178))_
- A wardog is a breed of dog that has been bred through crossbreeding, specially trained for combat, and is a specialty of the kingdom of Azarnia (the Azarn Islands). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06178))_
- No matter how unfavorable the situation becomes, they will not run away unless commanded to do so. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06178))_

## [ Killer Shark ]

- Some young killer sharks have a monster level of 2. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06191))_
- They're about 5 meters long, and will attack anything that moves in the sea, chomping it to pieces with the sharp fangs in their huge mouths. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06191))_
- on Special Abilities=Water adaptation Habitat=Seas Languages=None Perception=Five senses Killer Sharks belong to the so-called man-eating shark family, but they are particularly large, ferocious, and cunning. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06191))_
- Killer sharks will continue to grow as long as they live. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06191))_
- The data listed here is for an average adult shark. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06191))_

## [ Crocodile ]

- They are ferocious by nature and will attack indiscriminately if they are hungry. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06204))_
- Attacks with their large jaws are powerful, and once they bite an opponent, they will not let go and continue to deal damage. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06204))_
- Crocodiles are large carnivorous reptiles. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06204))_
- Such giant crocodiles are also called alligators. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06204))_
- Their standard body length is 1.5 meters, but larger ones can exceed 3 meters. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06204))_

## [ Giant Scorpion ]

- The giant scorpion is a huge scorpion with a body length of over 3 meters. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06224))_
- If you fail, your whole body will become paralyzed after an hour, then you will draw your last breath. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06225))_
- The barb on the tip of its tail is a stinger that secretes a deadly poison (toxicity score 10), and those stung must make a life force resistance roll. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06225))_
- If you fail, your whole body will become paralyzed after an hour, then you will draw your last breath. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06225))_

## [ Giant Mantis

- It is also able to fly over a distance of several tens of meters. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06246))_
- This is a praying mantis about the size of a human, with quick movements, it unleashes two sickles to kill and eat animals. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06246))_
- In order to escape from a sickle that's trapped your arm, you must succeed on a resistance roll against target score 10 (or attack points from when the attack hits, if using optional rules) using adventurer level + strength bonus as the baseline score. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06247))_
- This damage can be reduced by armor and adventurer level. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06247))_
- Ancient magic cannot be used while one arm is trapped. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06247))_
- Also, on subsequent rounds, you cannot escape from the giant mantis, so your evasion points will be -4. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06247))_
- When attacking a human, a giant mantis will use its sickles to capture their arms and attempt to block their movement. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06247))_
- Anyone hit by a giant mantis's attack will have one arm trapped. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06247))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06247))_

> When attacking a human, a giant mantis will use its sickles to capture their arms and attempt to block their movement. Anyone hit by a giant mantis's attack will have one arm trapped. You must roll the dice to determine which arm is trapped. Roll 1D, and if it's 1-3, it'll be the right arm, but if it's 4-6 it'll be the left arm. Ancient magic cannot be used while one arm is trapped. Also, on subsequent rounds, you cannot escape from the giant mantis, so your evasion points will be -4. In order t

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06248))_

> On the other hand, while capturing a human's arm with one sickle, a giant mantis can only use its other sickle to attack, and since it cannot move freely, its evasion points will be reduced by -2.

## [ Scarlet Vulture ] Monster Level=3 Rarity=10 Agility=15 Movement Speed=10/30 (air) Number=One to several Frequency=Moderate Intellect=Animal Reaction=Hunger-based Attack Points=Beak:10 (3)/Talons:11 (4) Strike Points=6/6 Evasion Points=10 (3) Defense Points=6 Life Points/Resistance=15/11 (4) Mental Points/Resistance=9/10 (3) Special Abilities=Capture Opponent's attack is -2 Habitat=Mountains, meadows

- Although it is a member of the vulture family, so to speak, it regularly eats live meat, rather than dead meat. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06252))_
- It is so called because its wings and the top of its head are bright red. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06252))_
- The scarlet vulture has strong legs, and can move quite freely on the ground. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06252))_
- The scarlet vulture is a large carnivorous bird, with a wingspan of up to 4 meters while both wings are spread. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06252))_
- It can lift anything from small animals such as dogs, cats, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06252))_
- It can lift anything from small animals such as dogs, cats, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06252))_
- It is so called because its wings and the top of its head are bright red. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06252))_
- Those hit by a scarlet vulture's claw attack, if they're of a suitable size (a grassrunner is of a suitable size ), will be lifted into the air. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06253))_
- If the Scarlet Vulture's claw attack hits an object of a suitable size (the Grass Runner is a "reasonable size"), it will be lifted into the air. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06254))_
- Those who are caught, even if not lifted into the air, will suffer a -2 penalty to evasion speed against the beak attack. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06254))_
- This bird can see things even at night. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06255))_
- To attack scarlet vulture while in the air, you must suffer a -2 penalty to attack power. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06256))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06252))_

> The scarlet vulture is a large carnivorous bird, with a wingspan of up to 4 meters while both wings are spread. It is so called because its wings and the top of its head are bright red. Although it is a member of the vulture family, so to speak, it regularly eats live meat, rather than dead meat. It can lift anything from small animals such as dogs, cats, etc. to things the size of a human child into the air. It tries to kill its prey by dropping it from a high altitude, or by pecking what it ca

## [ Tiger ] Monster Level=3 Rarity=6 Agility=21 Movement Speed=25 Number=One to several Frequency=Rare Intellect=Animal Reaction=Hunger-based Attack Points=Fang:10 (3)/Claw:11 (4)/ Claw:11 (4) Strike Points=11/10/10 Evasion Points=11 (4) Defense Points=7 Life Points/Resistance=20/12 (5) Mental Points/Resistance=7/10 (3) Special Abilities=None in particular Habitat=Deep in forests Languages=None

- Tigers are fierce, carnivorous beasts that usually act alone. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06259))_
- Despite their large size, they possess the graceful and flexible movements characteristic of the cat family, and are among the strongest of all ordinary animals. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06259))_
- It is said that once a tiger learns the taste of human flesh, it becomes a maneating tiger , which aggressively attacks humans. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06260))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06258))_

> Perception=Five senses (illumination)

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06259))_

> If they're hungry, they may also attack humans.

## [ Bat ]

- There are many different types of bats in Forcelia . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06262))_
- Some of these bats are not very strong, but have characteristics that make them dangerous monsters. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06262))_

## Bat

- Monster Level=1 Rarity=5 Agility=18 Movement Speed=10 Number=Several to around ten Frequency=Moderate Intellect=Animal Reaction=Neutral Attack Points=Fangs:8 (1) Strike Points=3 Evasion Points=11 (4) Defense Points=3 Life Points/Resistance=7/8 (1) Mental Points/Resistance=6/8 (1) Special Abilities=Disease (Intensity 6) Opponent's attack is -2 Habitat=Places sunlight does not reach, such as caves, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06264))_
- Monster Level=1 Rarity=5 Agility=18 Movement Speed=10 Number=Several to around ten Frequency=Moderate Intellect=Animal Reaction=Neutral Attack Points=Fangs:8 (1) Strike Points=3 Evasion Points=11 (4) Defense Points=3 Life Points/Resistance=7/8 (1) Mental Points/Resistance=6/8 (1) Special Abilities=Disease (Intensity 6) Opponent's attack is -2 Habitat=Places sunlight does not reach, such as caves, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06264))_
- They often sleep hanging from the ceiling of their caves during the day, and are mainly active at night. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06265))_
- Those bitten by a bat-- those whose life force has been dealt damage by a bat's attack --are at risk of contracting a fever. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06267))_
- If you roll a 5 or less, you'll be infected with bat fever . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06267))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06264))_

> Monster Level=1 Rarity=5 Agility=18 Movement Speed=10 Number=Several to around ten Frequency=Moderate Intellect=Animal Reaction=Neutral Attack Points=Fangs:8 (1) Strike Points=3 Evasion Points=11 (4) Defense Points=3 Life Points/Resistance=7/8 (1) Mental Points/Resistance=6/8 (1) Special Abilities=Disease (Intensity 6) Opponent's attack is -2 Habitat=Places sunlight does not reach, such as caves, etc. Languages=None Perception=Five senses (sonar)

> They are sensitive to light, and if an adventurer with a light carelessly enters the nest, they may blindly attack in groups.

## Vampire Bat

- A vampire bat is a giant bloodsucking bat with a wingspan of about 2 meters. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06277))_
- This damage can only be reduced by adventurer level. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06277))_
- At this time, the vampire bat's attack points become the target score. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06277))_
- Therefore, in order for the possessed opponent to attack the vampire bat in question, they will need a melee weapon that can be used at close range, such as a dagger. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06277))_
- Once a fang attack hits, it will attach itself to its opponent and begin bloodsucking starting on the next round. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06277))_
- Furthermore, if you attack a vampire bat that's attached to a living creature, there is also a risk of accidentally hitting an ally. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06277))_
- This damage can only be reduced by adventurer level. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06277))_
- Therefore, in order for the possessed opponent to attack the vampire bat in question, they will need a melee weapon that can be used at close range, such as a dagger. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06277))_
- Attacks made against a vampire bat while it's in the air suffer a penalty of 2 due to the bat's keen perception plus the fact that it is flying. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06278))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06269))_

> Monster Level=2

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06270))_

> Rarity=10

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06272))_

> Special Abilities=Bloodsuck (Strike power 10, bonus damage 2)

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06274))_

> Habitat=Places sunlight does not reach, such as caves, etc.

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06274, source-range-de1806a5-06277))_

## Giant Bat

- A giant bat is a massive bat, with a wingspan of 3 meters across. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06286))_
- They are completely nocturnal creatures, flying around forests and wastelands to hunt at night. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06286))_
- Y ou can try to resist again while being carried, but you'll have to be prepared to suffer falling damage. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06287))_
- A giant bat can capture and carry away a small human. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06287))_
- If you succeed, you'll be able to escape before the giant bat flies too high, but if you fail, you'll be taken straight to its nesting hole. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06287))_
- If you succeed, you'll be able to escape before the giant bat flies too high, but if you fail, you'll be taken straight to its nesting hole. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06287))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06281))_

> Special Abilities=Capture

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06283))_

> Habitat=Places sunlight does not reach, such as caves, etc.

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06283, source-range-de1806a5-06286))_

> Habitat=Places sunlight does not reach, such as caves, etc. A giant bat is a massive bat, with a wingspan of 3 meters across. They are completely nocturnal creatures, flying around forests and wastelands to hunt at night. They're omnivorous and mainly catch and eat small animals, but when they're starving they may also attack livestock and humans. When attacking prey, they act in groups, quickly descending from above, and scratching with their sharp talons.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06284))_

> Languages=None

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06283, source-range-de1806a5-06286))_

> Habitat=Places sunlight does not reach, such as caves, etc. A giant bat is a massive bat, with a wingspan of 3 meters across. They are completely nocturnal creatures, flying around forests and wastelands to hunt at night. They're omnivorous and mainly catch and eat small animals, but when they're starving they may also attack livestock and humans. When attacking prey, they act in groups, quickly descending from above, and scratching with their sharp talons.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06285))_
