> If hit by both claws at the same time, a victim adventurer must make a resistance roll using the giant bat's attack points (or if using optional rules, the attack's final score, whichever is higher) as the target score and adventurer level + strength bonus as the baseline score, to prevent being carried away.

## [ Bear ]

## Grizzly

- Monster Level=3 Rarity=6 Agility=14 Movement Speed=21 Number=One to several Frequency=Rare Intellect=Animal Reaction=Hunger-based Attack Points=Fangs:10 (3)/Claw:11 (4)/ Claw:11 (4) Strike Points=12/11/11 Attack Points=Fangs:10 (3)/Bind:11 (4) Strike Points=12/10 Evasion Points=10 (3) Defense Points=7 Life Points/Resistance=22/12 (5) Mental Points/Resistance=7/10 (3) Special Abilities=Strangling Habitat=Forests Languages=None _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06291))_
- They're about 3 meters tall, but some giant grizzlies can reach 4 meters. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06292))_
- Moreover, they're classified as one of the most terrifying animals due to their super strength and agility that you wouldn't expect from their physique. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06292))_
- Perception=Five senses Grizzlies are generally solitary, except when a mother bear is with her cubs. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06292))_
- They are omnivores and are said to eat anything they can fit into their mouths. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06292))_
- Perception=Five senses Grizzlies are generally solitary, except when a mother bear is with her cubs. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06292))_
- Usually it tries to avoid humans on its own accord, but if it and a human bump into one another, or if it's hungry, then things are different. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06293))_
- Also, a mother bear with her cubs will do everything in her power to protect them, so travelers should avoid approaching groups of bears carelessly. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06293))_
- This is because they also eat dead meat. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06293))_
- It is also said that once a grizzly bear has learned the taste of human flesh, it'll attack humans more frequently. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06293))_
- This is because they also eat dead meat. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06293))_
- Usually it tries to avoid humans on its own accord, but if it and a human bump into one another, or if it's hungry, then things are different. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06293))_
- A bear's special attack is a bear hug . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06294))_
- If a bear hug attack hits, the adventurer will be held by the bear. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06294))_
- This is a technique in which it holds its opponent in its thick arms, squeezing them. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06294))_
- Bears use this attack depending on the situation. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06294))_
- When surrounded by multiple opponents, it'll choose to swing its arms around and try to mow down anything it happens to hit, but if there are fewer opponents, it'll approach for a bear hug. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06294))_
- During this attack, a bear gains a +4 bonus to attack points. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06295))_
- A bear that captures an opponent in a bear hug will both strangle and bite the opponent at the same time. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06295))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06294))_

> A bear's special attack is a bear hug . This is a technique in which it holds its opponent in its thick arms, squeezing them. Treat this as strangling (see p. 236). Bears use this attack depending on the situation. When surrounded by multiple opponents, it'll choose to swing its arms around and try to mow down anything it happens to hit, but if there are fewer opponents, it'll approach for a bear hug. If a bear hug attack hits, the adventurer will be held by the bear.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06295))_

> In this state, the bear cannot attack other opponents.

## [ Lion ]

- In most cases, it is the female lion who fights and hunts. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06297))_
- The lion is a carnivorous beast of prey, as its popular moniker " king of the beasts " suggests. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06297))_
- The male lion's primary role is to intimidate its prey and lead it to where the females are waiting. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06297))_
- However, lions sometimes attack humans if they're starving or if they've tasted human flesh. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06298))_

## [ Giant Slug ]

- It moves very slowly, knocking down everything in its path, and grinding it all up with its jagged belly lined with bumps. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06311))_
- Languages=None underground labyrinths, Perception=Five senses This is a slug with a body length of about 5 meters. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06311))_
- Those hit by a giant slug attack will be dealt damage and knocked down at the same time. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06312))_
- On the next round, the slug will pass over your body, dealing you 14 points of damage. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06312))_
- This damage can be reduced by armor. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06312))_
- No actions can be taken while the slug is passing over. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06312))_
- You can put a large amount of salt (at least 500 kg) on a giant slug to dehydrate it and put it into suspended animation, but salt alone will not kill it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06313))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06309))_

> Habitat=Damp

## [ Toad ]

- There are many types of frogs in Alecrast, but most are small and harmless. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06315))_
- However, there are some that are dangerous, such as the following two types. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06315))_
- However, there are some that are dangerous, such as the following two types. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06315))_

## Poison Toad

- Since they feed on fish and insects, they rarely attack humans, but if they're attacked or startled, they'll try to protect themselves by spewing venom from the secretory glands in their heads. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06332))_
- It'll recover naturally after 3 days, but it can also be cured with the holy magic Cure Poison . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06333))_
- If you fail, the poison will get into your eyes and you will lose your vision. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06333))_
- Even if you succeed on the resistance roll, your skin will be irritated and itchy for a while. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06333))_
- It'll recover naturally after 3 days, but it can also be cured with the holy magic Cure Poison . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06333))_

## Giant Toad

- Monster Level=4 Rarity=11 Agility=8 Movement Speed=10/16 (water) Number=One Frequency=Rare Intellect=Animal Reaction=Hunger-based Attack Points=Tongue: 10 (3) Strike Points=7 Evasion Points=10 (3) Defense Points=6 Life Points/Resistance=21/13 (6) Mental Points/Resistance=6/11 (4) Special Abilities=Wrap tongue around (strangling) and swallow whole Habitat=Wetlands such as lakes, riverbanks, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06335))_
- Monster Level=4 Rarity=11 Agility=8 Movement Speed=10/16 (water) Number=One Frequency=Rare Intellect=Animal Reaction=Hunger-based Attack Points=Tongue: 10 (3) Strike Points=7 Evasion Points=10 (3) Defense Points=6 Life Points/Resistance=21/13 (6) Mental Points/Resistance=6/11 (4) Special Abilities=Wrap tongue around (strangling) and swallow whole Habitat=Wetlands such as lakes, riverbanks, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06335))_
- It extends its 5 meter long tongue and entangles its prey, and if it's a human-sized animal, it will swallow it whole. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06338))_
- This is a huge toad with a body length of 3 meters. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06338))_
- If the prey can't escape within 3 rounds, the toad will pull it in on the next round and swallow it whole. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06339))_
- If the prey can't escape within 3 rounds, the toad will pull it in on the next round and swallow it whole. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06339))_
- At this time, there is a risk of hurting your ally. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06340))_
- With his tongue severed, a toad will run away. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06340))_
- A toad's tongue has 4 defense points, and can be severed if it's dealt a total of 7 or more points of damage. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06340))_
- Resistance rolls are also not possible. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06341))_
- This damage cannot be prevented by armor and can only be reduced by adventurer level. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06341))_
- Those who are swallowed whole will continue to suffer strike power 10 damage plus bonus damage 4 each round spent inside the toad's belly. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06341))_
- This damage cannot be prevented by armor and can only be reduced by adventurer level. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06341))_
- Those who are swallowed whole will continue to suffer strike power 10 damage plus bonus damage 4 each round spent inside the toad's belly. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06341))_
- Alternatively, someone else could kill the toad, then cut its belly open and rescue the victim before they're digested. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06343))_
- Alternatively, someone else could kill the toad, then cut its belly open and rescue the victim before they're digested. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06343))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06335))_

> Those who are swallowed whole will continue to suffer strike power 10 damage plus bonus damage 4 each round spent inside the toad's belly. This damage cannot be prevented by armor and can only be reduced by adventurer level. Resistance rolls are also not possible. If you have a dagger, shortsword, or similar bladed weapon, you can use it to slice through the toad's belly and attempt to escape. You must make the attack at a -4

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06342))_

> penalty, and if you hit, the damage check is made as normal, and if the toad dies, you can escape.

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06341))_

> Those who are swallowed whole will continue to suffer strike power 10 damage plus bonus damage 4 each round spent inside the toad's belly. This damage cannot be prevented by armor and can only be reduced by adventurer level. Resistance rolls are also not possible. If you have a dagger, shortsword, or similar bladed weapon, you can use it to slice through the toad's belly and attempt to escape. You must make the attack at a -4

> In that case, if you deal more damage than the toad's remaining life points, that same damage (before it's reduced by the toad's defense points) is also dealt to the victim inside its belly at the same time.

## [ Ant ]

- Ordinary ants are unlikely to pose a threat to adventurers. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06345))_
- However, Alecrast is home to giant ants, which are larger and more dangerous than humans. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06345))_

## Giant Ant

- Although they have almost no intellect, that makes them fearless and a troublesome opponent to deal with. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06362))_
- In Alecrast, it's said that not a single blade of grass remains after a giant ant has passed by. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06362))_
- Giant ants are giant omnivorous ants that are just over 2 meters long. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06362))_
- They are extremely voracious creatures, and will attack anything that moves, thinking it's food. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06362))_
- Although their bodies are gigantic, their nature is no different from that of ordinary ants. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06362))_
- Its shiny black carapace is as strong as plate armor, and its attacks with its sharp fangs are not to be underestimated. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06362))_
- In Alecrast, it's said that not a single blade of grass remains after a giant ant has passed by. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06362))_

## Giant Ant Soldier

- This damage can only be reduced by adventurer level. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06398))_
- Giant ant soldiers are soldier ants that are raised on a special diet to protect the giant ant queen. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06398))_
- Anyone hit by a giant ant soldier will have their wound burned by the acid and, in addition to normal damage, must make a life force resistance roll, which if they fail, they will suffer damage resulting from a strike power 10 strike roll plus bonus damage 4. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06398))_
- Whether the acid is capable of destroying armor, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06398))_
- It doesn't look much different from a regular giant ant, but its jaws are even more massive and strong. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06398))_
- This damage can only be reduced by adventurer level. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06398))_

## Giant Ant Queen

- Her head and chest are almost the same as those of a normal giant ant, but her white abdomen is full of eggs and bloated. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06417))_
- Therefore, her body length can reach over 10 meters. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06417))_
- The giant ant queen is the queen of all giant ants. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06417))_
- Therefore, her body length can reach over 10 meters. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06417))_
- While entangled in the mucus, attack and evasion suffer a -4 penalty, and ancient magic and spirit magic cannot be used. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06418))_
- Those hit by this mucus will be deprived of their bodily freedom. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06418))_
- If you're hit by the mucus, you won't suffer damage, but you will become more and more entangled. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06418))_
- Giant ant queens can spit out mucus from their mouths that's used to alter the food they feed to their young. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06418))_
- If the target score is 13 or more above the baseline score, the prey will be completely entangled and unable to move. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06418))_
- You can escape from the mucus by succeeding on a success roll against target score 12 using adventurer level + strength bonus as the baseline score. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06418))_
- A giant ant queen is always protected by giant ant soldiers, but she also has her own means of attack. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06418))_
- A giant ant queen is always protected by giant ant soldiers, but she also has her own means of attack. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06418))_
- A giant ant queen has some intellect. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06419))_
- Once a giant ant queen is defeated, the giant ants under its command will begin to attack everything around them indiscriminately (they will not attack each other). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06419))_
- With a certain scent (pheromone), she can command other giant ants, devise some strategy, and make them fight. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06419))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06400))_

## [ Ape ]

- Forcelia is home to many different types of monkeys, from small apes that live in groups to giant apes that grow to abnormal sizes. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06421))_

## Small Ape

- They are generally docile and do not attack humans, but in rare cases when faced with severe hunger or the need to protect their group, they may display hostile behavior. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06438))_
- Small apes are omnivorous and usually live in groups of several to around ten. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06438))_
- In large groups, the number may swell to several dozen, centered around a strong male leader (boss ape). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06438))_
- They also have high intellect for an animal, so in that sense you should not let your guard down. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06438))_
- Furthermore, once they do fight, they fight together in groups and display considerable bravery, especially while the leader is still alive. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06438))_
- There are many breeds, and although the differences in physique and body fur are too countless to mention, they generally share similar characteristics. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06439))_

## Gorilla

- Gorillas are apes larger than humans, are omnivorous, and do not form large groups. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06463))_
- Those in Alecrast have ferocious personalities and prefer to attack creatures smaller than themselves. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06463))_
- Gorillas attack by swinging their brawny arms around, but if an opponent is smaller than itself, it will grab it with both arms and try to strangle it to death. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06464))_

## [ Giant Antlion ]

## Larva

- The giant antlion is a creature about 3 meters long total, with most of the front half of its body occupied by its large jaws, a cone-shaped tail on the back half of its body, and three pairs of spatulashaped legs that bend forward at the joints, making it suitable for burrowing underground. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06498))_
- When a creature passes directly above it, the giant antlion will sense its footsteps and suddenly dive further underground (with its tail). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06498))_
- 3 meter depth opens up at the feet of the unfortunate prey, into which the prey will fall. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06499))_
- The footing inside this sand pit is extremely poor, so it's impossible to escape on your own using normal methods (climbing). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06499))_
- The footing inside this sand pit is extremely poor, so it's impossible to escape on your own using normal methods (climbing). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06499))_
- Damage due to bloodsucking is strike power 10 plus bonus damage 5, and cannot be reduced by armor. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06500))_
- The giant antlion will attempt to bite down on its fallen prey with its large jaws. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06500))_
- Escaping from a giant antlion's large jaws requires a success roll using adventurer level + strength bonus as the baseline score. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06500))_
- If it manages to bite, it'll hold its grip firmly in place then stab its mouth which is a hollow needle into the prey's body and suck out the body's fluids (this attack will hit automatically). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06500))_
- If it manages to bite, it'll hold its grip firmly in place then stab its mouth which is a hollow needle into the prey's body and suck out the body's fluids (this attack will hit automatically). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06500))_
- If you succeed, you'll be able to sense the hole just before it opens under your feet and jump to the side. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06501))_
- Those with the ranger skill may be able to sense an attack from this dangerous creature with their sense danger ability. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06501))_
- If you succeed, you'll be able to sense the hole just before it opens under your feet and jump to the side. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06501))_

## Imago

- An adult has a very short lifespan, and dies after just a few days. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06506))_
- On their back, they have dragonfly-like wings that are 3 meters across, reminiscent of a fairy. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06506))_
- They have long blond hair that reaches down to their waist, and 2 antennae growing from their head. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06506))_
- They have a slender build and don't wear any clothes, but their gender can't be known. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06506))_
- Their wings are decorated with a pattern of dazzling blue light. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06506))_
- They spend most of their lives in the sand as ugly larvae, and once every 100 years, when the desert becomes green again, they emerge above ground and become adults. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06506))_
- An adult has a very short lifespan, and dies after just a few days. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06506))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06506))_

## [ Giant Crab ] Monster Level=5 Rarity=12 Agility=10 Movement Speed=10/10 (water) Number=One Frequency=Rare Intellect=Almost none Reaction=Hunger-based Attack Points=Large pincer:13 (6)/Pincer:13 (6) Strike Points=13/12 Evasion Points=11 (4) Defense Points=10 Life Points/Resistance=20/14 (7) Mental Points/Resistance=7/12 (5) Special Abilities=Right pincer strangling Water Adaptation Habitat=Warm coastal areas Languages=None

- Its weapons are its two large pincers, but the right pincer is considerably larger than the left one, and can grasp anything the size of a human torso. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06509))_
- This is a huge crab with a shell that's about 2 meters wide. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06509))_
- While a giant crab is holding one person with its right pincer, it can attack another target with its left. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06510))_
- Anyone hit by the right pincer of a giant crab will be caught by the pincer. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06510))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06508))_

> Perception=Five senses

## [ Worm ]

- Huge and dangerous caterpillar-like creatures can sometimes be seen in Forcelia . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06512))_
- These creatures, worms, are known to exist in several subspecies over a fairly wide range. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06512))_

## Sea Worm

- Monster Level=5 Rarity=14 Agility=10 Movement Speed=5/5 (water) Number=One to several Intellect=Animal Reaction=Hunger-based, becomes ferocious when exposed to strong light Attack Points=Acid:12 (5) Strike Points=See description Evasion Points=11 (4) Defense Points=7 Life Points/Resistance=15/13 (6) Mental Points/Resistance=5/11 (4) Special Abilities=Acid (Strike power 10, bonus damage 5) Water adaptation _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06514))_
- For this reason, they have glands in their bodies that secrete powerful digestive juices, and when in combat, they spit acidic liquid from their mouths, showering it on their opponents. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06517))_
- The sea worm is a gigantic, disgusting, grub-like monster that's over 3 meters long. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06517))_
- Although they live in the deep sea, sea worms are sensitive to light, and will appear in shallow water when attracted by light. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06517))_
- Additionally, there are a large number of whip-like tentacles growing around the circular feeding mouth at the tip of its body. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06517))_
- When they sense strong light, they'll become ferocious and continue to fight blindly until the light is completely cut off. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06517))_
- Acid damage cannot be reduced by armor. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06517))_
- It is also completely omnivorous, digesting and eating anything the tentacles can catch and fit in its mouth. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06517))_
- Usually, it'll be easier to play the game if you don't let it affect you. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06517))_
- Its long, thick body is covered with a thick rubbery membrane and has many segments lined up in a row. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06517))_
- Whether acid causes damage to armor (e.g., reducing defense by 1 point per exposure) is the game master's choice. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06517))_
- A sea worm will emerge from the water and directly attack whoever is holding the light. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06518))_
- If the adventurers are quick-witted enough to turn off the light, the monster will return to the tide pool. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06518))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06515))_

> Habitat=Deep seas Languages=None

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06516))_

> Perception=Five senses

## Rock Worm

- The attack is made using digestive juices from its mouth. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06537))_
- They feed on soil like normal earthworms, but they also eat rocks without hesitation. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06537))_
- Therefore, if you come across one in an underground passage and are holding a torch or lantern, they will attack you. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06537))_
- To do this, they secrete strong acidic digestive juices from their mouths. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06537))_
- Therefore, if you come across one in an underground passage and are holding a torch or lantern, they will attack you. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06537))_
- Therefore, they do not appear near veins of precious metals. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06538))_
- They will not approach gold or silver, perhaps because they cannot digest them with their digestive juices. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06538))_
- Therefore, they do not appear near veins of precious metals. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06538))_
- They will not approach gold or silver, perhaps because they cannot digest them with their digestive juices. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06538))_

> The rock worm is a member of the worm family that lives underground and looks like a giant earthworm, 5 meters long total. They feed on soil like normal earthworms, but they also eat rocks without hesitation. To do this, they secrete strong acidic digestive juices from their mouths. Similar to its relative, the sea worm, it has an extreme dislike of light. Therefore, if you come across one in an underground passage and are holding a torch or lantern, they will attack you. ## Sand Worm

- Sand worms are giant carnivorous worms. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06543))_
- If it's a small larva, its scores will be low, and if it lives for more than 10 years and reaches a length of nearly 20 meters, it will become an even more formidable enemy. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06544))_
- Sand worms have no growth limit and will continue to grow indefinitely. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06544))_
- The data presented here is for a typical adult around 3 years old, and about 10 meters long. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06544))_
- Sand worms have no growth limit and will continue to grow indefinitely. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06544))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06540))_

> Monster Level=6 Rarity=15 Agility=10 Movement Speed=10/20 (underground)

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06542))_

> Perception=Five senses

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06543))_

> They usually burrow underground, but are always hungry, so when other creatures pass by on the ground, they leap out to attack them for food.

## [ Giant Seal ]

- They are polygamous, with one king gathering a hundred or more females to form a kingdom. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06546))_
- Giant Seals are creatures that live in the frozen seas of the north. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06546))_
- They dive under the ice to feed on fish, so they're usually found near large ice cracks. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06546))_
- Giant seal hides are ideal material for making leather armor, so fishermen in the northern seas hunt them on large icesailing ships using ballistas (extra-large crane-quin crossbows). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06547))_
- One averagesized male seal yields enough hide for around 150 people. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06547))_
- Including the price of meat, fat (used for fuel, etc.) and tusks, the average income for one animal is 10,000 gamels. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06547))_
- This means that the characters must be equipped with iceproof shoes, etc., otherwise combat actions, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06548))_
- This means that the characters must be equipped with iceproof shoes, etc., otherwise combat actions, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06548))_
- If a character falls prone due to being hit by a giant seal, they will slide about 10 meters on the ice as they are. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06549))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06546))_

> Giant seals can also use their fins to advance over ice fields, but they do not eat land animals, so they won't attack you unless you attack them or invade their territory.

## Female

- Although young females may wander alone, they usually belong to a kingdom. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06569))_
- Female giant seals are slightly smaller than males, measuring 6 to 7 meters long and do not have tusks. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06569))_

## Male

- Monster Level=6 Rarity=10 Agility=10 Movement Speed=10/16 (water) Number=One Frequency=Moderate Intellect=Animal Reaction=Neutral Attack Points=Ram:14 (7) Strike Points=15 Evasion Points=12 (5) Defense Points=10 Life Points/Resistance=24/16 (9) Mental Points/Resistance=10/13 (6) Special Abilities=Ice adaptation Water adaptation Strong to cold Habitat=Ice fields Languages=None Perception=Five senses _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06571))_
- Male giant seals are 7 to 8 meters long and have large tusks. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06572))_
- Most are defeated in combat and driven from their kingdom, leaving them to wander aimlessly across the ice fields. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06572))_
- Only the strongest of the males can win their battle, and become the new king. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06573))_
- It is said that there are several of these giant seal kingdoms in the frozen seas of the north. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06573))_
- The king has 1-2 more strike points than a regular male, and 30 more life points. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06573))_
- The king commands at least a hundred females, and fights bravely against any intruders in his kingdom. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06573))_
- Only the strongest of the males can win their battle, and become the new king. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06573))_

## Golden Wanderer

- Although these mutants are larger than normal males, they're incapable of reproduction, so they never become kings and invariably roam the ice fields. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06578))_
- A fisherman who catches a golden wanderer is highly respected by their peers. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06578))_
- Among giant seals, one in every thousand males may be born with a mutation that results in golden skin. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06578))_
- This rare seal is called the golden wanderer, and its skin can sell for tens of times more than the skin of a normal seal. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06578))_
- Among giant seals, one in every thousand males may be born with a mutation that results in golden skin. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06578))_
- This rare seal is called the golden wanderer, and its skin can sell for tens of times more than the skin of a normal seal. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06578))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06576))_

> Special Abilities=Ice adaptation Water adaptation Strong to cold Habitat=Ice fields Languages=None

## [ Snake ]

- There are many different types of snakes in Forcelia. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06580))_

## Viper

- Monster Level=2 Rarity=7 Agility=12 Movement Speed=12 Number=One Frequency=Moderate Intellect=Animal Reaction=Hunger-based Attack Points=Fangs:9 (2) Strike Points=7+poison Evasion Points=10 (3) Defense Points=5 Life Points/Resistance=12/10 (3) Mental Points/Resistance=5/8 (1) Special Abilities=Poison (Toxicity score 9, death in 1 hour) Habitat=Woods, deserts, other Languages=None _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06582))_
- A viper is a poisonous snake about 2 meters long. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06584))_
- They attack indiscriminately if they are hungry, making them the most feared among travelers in Alecrast. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06584))_
- Its fangs are poisonous, and those bitten must succeed on a life force resistance roll against target score 9 or die from the poison after one hour. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06584))_
- Its fangs are poisonous, and those bitten must succeed on a life force resistance roll against target score 9 or die from the poison after one hour. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06584))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06583))_

> Perception=Five senses

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06584))_

> A viper is a poisonous snake about 2 meters long. They attack indiscriminately if they are hungry, making them the most feared among travelers in Alecrast. Its fangs are poisonous, and those bitten must succeed on a life force resistance roll against target score 9 or die from the poison after one hour.

## Hypnopython

- Those who see a Hypnopython's dance must succeed on a mental power resistance roll against target score 11, or they will be hypnotized, unable to move or think. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06607))_
- This hypnotic state lasts as long as the hypnopython dances within your view, so if there's no one around to help you, you will be swallowed by the python without resistance. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06607))_
- This is a python with a body length of 8 meters. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06607))_
- This hypnotic state lasts as long as the hypnopython dances within your view, so if there's no one around to help you, you will be swallowed by the python without resistance. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06607))_
- However, starting on the next round, they will begin dancing again. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06608))_
- If the python takes damage, it'll stop dancing for one round, allowing those affected by the dance to return to their senses. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06608))_
- You can also stop it by blindfolding the target to prevent them from seeing the dance, or by forcing the hypnopython to stop dancing. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06608))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06593))_

## Sea Serpent

- Special Abilities=Strangling Water adaptation Habitat=Rock crevices and caves in reef areas Languages=None Perception=Five senses The sea serpent is a giant snake that often lives among reefs, and its whole body is covered with hard scales. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06611))_
- Their body length starts at 10 meters, but it's said that some can reach over 20 meters. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06611))_

## [ Spider ]

- Alecrast is home to the following dangerous spiders. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06613))_

## Giant Spider

- They do not build webs, nor are they poisonous. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06628))_
- Giant spiders are large spiders with a body length of about 50 cm. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06628))_
- The giant spider will bite the opponent with its fangs and attempt to suck out their fluids. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06629))_
- An entangled opponent suffers a -4 penalty to evasion speed (points). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06629))_

> Giant spiders are large spiders with a body length of about 50 cm. They usually feed on small animals such as rabbits, but if they can't stand their hunger they may attack larger creatures than themselves such as humans, etc. They do not build webs, nor are they poisonous.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06629))_

> If hit by the string attack, an adventurer will become entangled and lose their freedom of movement.

## Giant Tarantula

- Monster Level=4 Rarity=12 Agility=14 Movement Speed=14 Number=One Frequency=Rare Intellect=Almost none Reaction=Hunger-based Attack Points=Fangs:11 (4) Strike Points=8+poison Evasion Points=11 (4) Defense Points=6 Life Points/Resistance=17/12 (5) Mental Points/Resistance=5/10 (3) Special Abilities=Poison (Toxicity score 12, Dance=-4 to attack and evasion, 1 damage every 10 minutes, lasts for 1 hour) Mental attack immunity Habitat=Deserts, meadows Languages=None _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06631))_
- This is a hairy spider with legs up to 2 meters long, and does not build webs. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06633))_
- If the poison is not removed using the holy magic Cure Poison , etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06634))_
- the victim will continue dancing for one hour, losing 1 point of life force every 10 minutes due to fatigue. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06634))_
- Those who are dealt damage by these fangs, and fail a life force resistance roll, will begin to dance violently. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06634))_
- This damage cannot be reduced by adventurer level. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06634))_
- A giant tarantula's fangs contain a poison (toxicity score 12) that affects motor nerves. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06634))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06632))_

> Perception=Five senses

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06634))_

> While dancing, you'll suffer a 4 penalty on attack and evasion, and cannot use ancient magic or spirit magic.

## Giant Webspinner

- They usually stay in one corner of the nest, but if an intruder gets caught in their web, they will attack. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06643))_
- They will not attack anyone who has not touched their web. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06643))_
- This is a huge spider, 3 meters long with legs that are 4 meters long. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06643))_
- To safely pass through a giant webspinner's nest without touching the surrounding webs, you must succeed on a success roll against target score 13 using adventurer level + agility bonus as the baseline score. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06644))_
- The web is highly sticky, so much that it entangles the body, and anyone caught in it will suffer a -4 penalty to their attack and evasion, and will be unable to use ancient magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06644))_
- To shake free from the web, you must succeed on a success roll against target score 13 using adventurer level + strength bonus (for monsters, use monster level ). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06644))_
- Those hit by a giant webspinner's string will not suffer any damage, but they will become more and more entangled in the string. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06645))_
- Therefore, the target score of the success roll required to shake free from the web also increases by 2 points, to 15, 17…… etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06645))_
- If the target score is 13 or more above than the baseline value, the prey will be completely enwrapped and unable to move. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06645))_
- When a giant webspinner is hungry, it'll suddenly bite you with its fangs. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06645))_
- This allows a giant webspinner to hang its prey alive but deprived of freedom in its nest, then eat it whenever it wants. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06645))_
- When it's not, it'll emit a large amount of string from its abdomen and use its legs to try to entangle its prey. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06645))_
- Therefore, the target score of the success roll required to shake free from the web also increases by 2 points, to 15, 17…… etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06645))_
- This allows a giant webspinner to hang its prey alive but deprived of freedom in its nest, then eat it whenever it wants. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06645))_
- A giant web spinner's webs are not affected by fire or acid. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06646))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06636))_

## [ Octopus ]

- On rare occasions, they may come ashore, in which case they suffer a -4 penalty to hit and evasion. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06648))_
- An octopus is a sea-dwelling mollusk that uses its eight tentacles to entangle and strangle its prey to death. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06648))_
- There are many different types of octopus, but most of them are small and harmless. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06649))_

## Killer Octopus

- Monster Level=3 Rarity=13 Agility=12 Movement Speed=3/15 (water) Number=One Frequency=Moderate Intellect=Animal Reaction=Hunger-based Attack Points=Strangle:10 (3) Strike Points=8 Evasion Points=11 (4) Defense Points=5 Life Points/Resistance=17/11 (4) Mental Points/Resistance=6/10 (3) Special Abilities=Strangling Water adaptation Habitat=Sunken ships, underwater ruins Languages=None _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06651))_
- Perception=Five senses The killer octopus is an aggressive octopus with tentacles up to 2 meters long. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06652))_
- A killer octopus will use all of its tentacles to attack one target, constricting the opponent with its entire body. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06653))_

## Giant Octopus

- Its tentacles, which are up to 10 meters long, can entangle boats and sink them. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06672))_
- The giant octopus is almost legendary, feared by fishermen and sailors as the devil of the sea. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06672))_
- If you deal 5 or more points of damage (14 or more points of damage if defense points are taken into account) to a giant octopus with a bladed weapon, you'll have cut off one of its tentacles, and the octopus' number of attacks will be reduced by one. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06673))_

## 13.2.8 Plants

## Creeping Tree

- They then use their tentacle-like branches to prey on animals that approach. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06698))_
- Creeping trees do not have roots underground, but move around on the ground using their roots like imitation toes. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06698))_
- They then use their tentacle-like branches to prey on animals that approach. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06698))_
- However, they do not have human-like minds, so spells that cause mental effects have no effect at all. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06699))_

> Creeping trees do not have roots underground, but move around on the ground using their roots like imitation toes. They then use their tentacle-like branches to prey on animals that approach. Tentacle attacks are resolved the same way as strangling (see p. 236). When it stands still, it looks like an old oak tree covered in vines.

> Since it is a plant, it is weak against fire attacks, and when using spells such as Fire Weapon and Fire Bolt , you gain a +10 bonus to the usual strike power of spells.

## [ Ethnoa ]

- If an adventurer is hit by an ethnoa's tentacles, they will suffer damage and also become entangled in the tentacles. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06718))_
- If you fail, the poor adventurer is thrown into the pouch that makes up the bulk of the body. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06718))_
- An ethnoa is a plant about 3 meters tall, with six tentacles and a large, openmouthed pouch. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06718))_
- If you're unfortunate enough to be entangled by two tentacles, you must make two resistance rolls and succeed on both. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06718))_
- Each tentacle is about 4 meters long, and will wrap around anything that comes near, and throw it into the pouch. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06718))_
- The pouch contains a strong acid, which dissolves its prey. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06718))_
- On the next round, you must make a resistance roll using adventurer level + strength bonus as the baseline score and the ethnoa's attack points (or the final score from when the attack hits) as the target score. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06718))_
- Those thrown into the pouch will suffer strike power 10 damage plus bonus damage 3 each round, starting on the next round. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06719))_
- Against this acid damage, only adventurer level helps damage reduction, and armor defense power is completely ineffective. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06719))_
- Against this acid damage, only adventurer level helps damage reduction, and armor defense power is completely ineffective. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06719))_
- The victim cannot escape from inside unless the ethnoa dies. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06720))_
- However, the damage dealt is as per the normal rules. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06720))_
- The victim cannot escape from inside unless the ethnoa dies. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06720))_
- There may be cases where the property of former victims remains undigested inside the ethnoa's pouch. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06721))_
- It's a low probability for these treasures to remain, but their value is usually around 100 to 1000 gamels per creature. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06721))_
- There may be cases where the property of former victims remains undigested inside the ethnoa's pouch. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06721))_

Each tentacle is about 4 meters long, and will wrap around anything that comes near, and throw it into the pouch. The pouch contains a strong acid, which dissolves its prey. An ethnoa can attack using all six tentacles at the same time, but it can use only two against a single target. ## [ Killer Creeper ]

- it can attach itself to them and grow. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06735))_
- A single vine may grow over a radius of several tens of meters. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06735))_
- Habitat=Woods Languages=None Perception=Magic A killer creeper is a vine. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06735))_
- This vine can crawl on the ground and if there are trees, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06735))_
- The corpse is eventually returned to the soil to provide nourishment for the killer creeper. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06736))_
- steps into a killer creeper thicket, the killer creeper will attack them by entangling its vines around them. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06736))_
- If a ranger or sage succeeds on a success roll against target score 12 using ranger/sage skill level + intelligence bonus as the baseline score, they will be able to see the killer creeper's true identity before it approaches, and thus avoid the encounter (this is considered a use of plant and animal check and monster check ). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06737))_
- The adventurer's evasion will suffer a -4 penalty. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06737))_
- This is always a surprise attack, so for one round, only the killer creeper can attack. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06737))_
- If they fail, the adventurer will have stepped into the killer creeper without realizing it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06737))_
- This is always a surprise attack, so for one round, only the killer creeper can attack. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06737))_
- If a ranger or sage succeeds on a success roll against target score 12 using ranger/sage skill level + intelligence bonus as the baseline score, they will be able to see the killer creeper's true identity before it approaches, and thus avoid the encounter (this is considered a use of plant and animal check and monster check ). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06737))_
- If the killer creeper's attack hits, the vines will entangle the target. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06738))_
- There is an immeasurable number of these vines, but only three vines can attack a single target at the same time. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06738))_
- If you're entangled in one, this is -2, and if you're entangled in two or more, it's -4. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06738))_
- Also, characters who are entangled in the vines will suffer a penalty on attack and evasion from then on. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06738))_
- Also, characters who are entangled in the vines will suffer a penalty on attack and evasion from then on. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06738))_
- There is an immeasurable number of these vines, but only three vines can attack a single target at the same time. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06738))_
- However, holy magic can be used freely. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06739))_
- When you pull the vines off, 1 point of damage per vine is dealt to the killer creeper's life points. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06740))_
- If entangled in multiple vines, you must make separate checks for each. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06740))_
- A character entangled in vines can also attempt to pull the entangled vines off instead of making a normal attack. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06740))_

## [ Mandrake ]

- A Mandrake can only scream once per day. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06744))_
- When a mandrake is hurt, it makes a terrifying scream. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06744))_
- If you fail, you cannot attack or cast spells for one full round, and you suffer a -4 penalty to evasion. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06744))_
- At this time, if you roll double ones on your resistance roll, you will immediately go insane and become disabled. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06744))_
- A Mandrake can only scream once per day. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06744))_
- At this time, if you roll double ones on the resistance roll, your life force will instantly become zero. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06745))_
- If you fail, you will lose your hearing. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06745))_
- Young Mandrake root is prized as an ingredient for sedatives, stimulants, and poisons. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06746))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06743))_

> Despite being plants, they have some intellect and can use spirit magic sourced from the power of dryad and gnome.

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06743, source-range-de1806a5-06746))_

> A mandrake is a plant with humanshaped roots, and when it's young, it grows underground like a normal plant, but in the seventh year after its seeds are sown, it crawls out from the soil and begins walking around the forest. It looks like an even uglier version of a goblin, with long leaves growing out of its head instead of hair. Despite being plants, they have some intellect and can use spirit magic sourced from the power of dryad and gnome. Young Mandrake root is prized as an ingredient for s

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06744))_

> Anyone who hears this at close range without first wearing earplugs must make a mental power resistance roll against target score 12.

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06744, source-range-de1806a5-06746))_

> When a mandrake is hurt, it makes a terrifying scream. A Mandrake can only scream once per day. Anyone who hears this at close range without first wearing earplugs must make a mental power resistance roll against target score 12. If you fail, you cannot attack or cast spells for one full round, and you suffer a -4 penalty to evasion. At this time, if you roll double ones on your resistance roll, you will immediately go insane and become disabled. Young Mandrake root is prized as an ingredient fo

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06745))_

> Additionally, those who fail the resistance roll must make another one, this time a life force resistance roll against target score 12.

## [ Alraune ] Monster Level=6 Rarity=16 Agility=14 Movement Speed=14 Number=One Frequency=Very Rare Intellect=Human Reaction=Neutral Attack Points=Barehanded:13 (6) Strike Points=8 Evasion Points=14 (7) Defense Points=8 Life Points/Resistance=14/14 (7) Mental Points/Resistance=18/15 (8) magic (Magic Intensity/Magic Power=13/6, gnome,

- The target score for resisting an alraune's scream is 13. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06751))_
- They cannot grow with the blood of fae, youma, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06751))_
- Alraune are also naturally able to use spirit magic, which is sourced from the power of dryad and gnome. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06752))_
- It is said that the appearance and personality of an alraune will resemble that of the first human who gave it blood. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06753))_
- Also, they do not have a weakness to fire, which is the weakness of plant-type monsters. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06753))_
- Since alraune are an artificial variety, they have no fertility. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06753))_
- If raised with the blood of a ruthless criminal, a ruthless alraune will be born. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06753))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06748))_

## [ Bloody Petal ]

- This plant, which has huge red flowers that resemble the color of human blood, is called blood flower , but is sometimes also called man-eating flower , which more clearly describes its characteristics. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06755))_
- This plant, which has huge red flowers that resemble the color of human blood, is called blood flower , but is sometimes also called man-eating flower , which more clearly describes its characteristics. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06755))_
- This plant can grow up to about 10 meters in height. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06756))_
- The stem has 2 to 5 bud-shaped flowers about 1 meter in diameter. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06756))_
- approaches, the folded flower stalks extend out and the buds open to envelop their prey. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06756))_

## [ Fungus ]

- Monster Level=8 Rarity=15 Agility=7 Movement Speed=7 Number=One to several Frequency=Rare Intellect=Low Reaction=Adversarial Attack Points=Barehanded:15 (8) Strike Points=11 Evasion Points=15 (8) Defense Points=10 Life Points/Resistance=17/16 (9) Mental Points/Resistance=9/15 (8) Special Abilities=Toxic spores (Toxicity score 16, illusions as well as turning into a fungus) Habitat=Damp, dark places Languages=Regional _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06791))_
- They cannot survive for long in dry or sunny areas. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06793))_
- When the spell is cast, if the caster's final score is 16 or greater, it will be healed. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06794))_
- Fungus release toxic spores (toxicity score 16) when injured. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06794))_
- No matter how many you cut off, there will be no end. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06794))_
- Gradually, your sense of humanity will fade and you'll begin to suffer from hallucinations. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06794))_
- To cure this, use the holy magic Cure Poison or the spirit magic Restore Health . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06794))_
- While fighting a fungus, anyone within a 5 meter radius may inhale the spores. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06794))_
- While fighting a fungus, anyone within a 5 meter radius may inhale the spores. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06794))_
- If one week elapses without treatment, the character will turn into a fungus. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06795))_
- Those who have completely become a fungus cannot be cured with the holy magic Cure Poison nor the spirit magic Restore Health . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06795))_
- They can only be restored to their original state by using the holy magic Refresh . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06795))_
- They can only be restored to their original state by using the holy magic Refresh . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06795))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06792))_

> Perception=Pseudo

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06794))_

> After combat, they must make a life force resistance roll against target score 16, and those who fail will then have mushrooms growing all over their bodies after 24 hours.

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06795))_

> If one week elapses without treatment, the character will turn into a fungus. Those who have completely become a fungus cannot be cured with the holy magic Cure Poison nor the spirit magic Restore Health . They can only be restored to their original state by using the holy magic Refresh .

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06796))_

## [ Buau Zombie

- Mental attack immunity Not affected by poison and illness Damage from healing magic _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06813))_
- Unlike normal zombies, they possess intellect, albeit low, and can make independent decisions and follow the commands of their creator. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06817))_
- These are undead created by the lost spell Create Buau Zombie . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06817))_
- Unlike normal zombies, they possess intellect, albeit low, and can make independent decisions and follow the commands of their creator. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06817))_
- Monster level is the same as their previous adventurer level. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06819))_
- All magic and bard skill spellsong abilities cannot be used once you become a buau zombie. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06819))_
- Game masters should be aware of changes due to ability scores (reduced dexterity and agility). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06819))_
- Unlike zombies, they decay slowly and can work for decades to centuries. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06819))_
- Strength and life force are kept at their original scores, but dexterity, agility, and intelligence are reduced to half of what their scores were before death, and mental power is completely lost. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06819))_
- Unlike zombies, they decay slowly and can work for decades to centuries. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06819))_
- Strength and life force are kept at their original scores, but dexterity, agility, and intelligence are reduced to half of what their scores were before death, and mental power is completely lost. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06819))_
- Buau zombies are mindless beings, so spells that cause mental effects on them are ineffective. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06820))_

## [ Skeleton ]

- A skeleton, as the name suggests, is a moving skeleton, created by ancient magic or dark magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06841))_
- Its weapon is usually the one it used before its death. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06841))_
- Typically this is a one-handed sword with a shield. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06841))_
- In most cases, however, its armor will be worn out and unusable. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06841))_
- Also, since they have no intelligence, magic that produces mental effects will not work on them. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06841))_
- Its weapon is usually the one it used before its death. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06841))_

## [ Zombie ] Monster Level=1 Rarity=9 Agility=7 Movement Speed=7 Number=Several to dozens Frequency=Frequent Intellect=Obeys commands Reaction=Command-based Attack Points=Barehanded:8 (1) Strike Points=4

- Not affected by poison and illness Damage from healing magic Habitat=Ruins Languages=None Perception=Pseudo _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06845))_
- Zombies, along with skeletons, are representative undead, and are created from corpses by ancient magic and dark magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06846))_
- However, unlike skeletons, they do not use weapons or armor. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06846))_
- Since they have no intelligence, mental attacks have no effect at all. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06846))_
- However, unlike skeletons, they do not use weapons or armor. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06846))_

## [ Ash ] Monster Level=2 Rarity=11 Agility=9 Movement Speed=8 Number=Several Frequency=Moderate Intellect=Almost none Reaction=Violent Attack Points=- Strike Points=Evasion Points=- Defense Points=Life Points/Resistance=7/9 (2) Mental Points/Resistance=-/10 (3) Special Abilities=Wrap (Evasion target score=10, strike power 10, bonus damage 2) Mental attack immunity Weapon immunity Fire immunity Not affected by poison and illness Damage from healing magic Habitat=Ruins Languages=None Perception=Magic

- Also, since it does not have a mind, attacks that affect the mind are also ineffective. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06848))_
- Also, since it's already been burned once, fire has no effect on it at all. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06848))_
- An ash is an undead created from the ashes of a burned corpse using ancient magic and dark magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06848))_
- Every round thereafter, they must make a life force resistance roll against target score 10. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06849))_
- As long as you continue to fail, you will suffer strike power 10 damage and 2 plus bonus damage 2 every round. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06849))_
- This damage can only be reduced by adventurer level. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06849))_
- An ash's attacks also do not deal direct damage. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06849))_
- This damage can only be reduced by adventurer level. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06849))_
- If you cast Turn Undead and the result is crumble away , the ash will cease activity. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06850))_
- However, this magic will not work in time for characters who are already enwrapped by the ash. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06850))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06850))_

> If you cast the spirit magic Missile Protection , you can protect yourself from being enwrapped by the ash. However, this magic will not work in time for characters who are already enwrapped by the ash. If you cast Turn Undead and the result is crumble away , the ash will cease activity.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06848))_

> It's usually spread out on the ground like sand, but if something living approaches it, it will suddenly fly up as if blown by the wind, take the form of a human, and attack.

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06848, source-range-de1806a5-06850))_

> An ash is an undead created from the ashes of a burned corpse using ancient magic and dark magic. It's usually spread out on the ground like sand, but if something living approaches it, it will suddenly fly up as if blown by the wind, take the form of a human, and attack. Due to the ash's physical characteristics, attacks with weapons, etc. cannot be used at all. Also, since it's already been burned once, fire has no effect on it at all. It's possible to damage an ash's life points with damage m

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06849))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06849))_

> An ash's attacks also do not deal direct damage. The Ash wraps itself around the target creature and attacks it. The target of the attack must make a success roll using adventurer level + agility bonus as the baseline score, and if they fail, they will inhale a portion of the ash. Every round thereafter, they must make a life force resistance roll against target score 10. As long as you continue to fail, you will suffer strike power 10 damage and 2 plus bonus damage 2 every round. This damage ca

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06850))_

## [ Ghoul ]

- Ghouls have paralyzing poison in their claws and fangs, and a character who suffers damage must succeed on a life force resistance roll against target score 10 or they will be paralyzed at the end of the next round. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06868))_
- Ghouls are undead who scavenge and eat corpses. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06868))_
- However, perhaps because killing and eating are the same thing , they often attack living things as well. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06868))_
- However, perhaps because killing and eating are the same thing , they often attack living things as well. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06868))_

> Mental Points/Resistance=10/10 (3)

> Special Abilities=Poison (Toxicity score 10, paralysis, lasts 1 day)

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06868))_

> Ghouls are undead who scavenge and eat corpses. However, perhaps because killing and eating are the same thing , they often attack living things as well. Ghouls have paralyzing poison in their claws and fangs, and a character who suffers damage must succeed on a life force resistance roll against target score 10 or they will be paralyzed at the end of the next round. This paralysis lasts for one day.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06866))_

> Damage from healing magic Habitat=Ruins, graveyards Languages=Those previous

Ghouls have paralyzing poison in their claws and fangs, and a character who suffers damage must succeed on a life force resistance roll against target score 10 or they will be paralyzed at the end of the next round. This paralysis lasts for one day.

## [ Sin ]

- Their appearance remains the same as when they were alive, and other than their abnormally pale skin and cloudy eyes, they are no different from a normal human (however, their clothes may be tattered depending on the number of years since their death). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06887))_
- They remain in this world, trying to monopolize what they were attached to even after death. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06887))_
- Sin are a very special type of undead. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06887))_
- A soul of someone who was greatly possessive in life will become undead as a sin. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06887))_
- They remain in this world, trying to monopolize what they were attached to even after death. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06887))_
- A sin usually refuses to leave the side of whatever it's attached to, and will attack anything that tries to take it away. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06888))_
- They are driven only by an insatiable desire for possession, and are, so to speak, the dead who have fallen into madness and cannot be saved. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06888))_
- They are driven only by an insatiable desire for possession, and are, so to speak, the dead who have fallen into madness and cannot be saved. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06888))_
