## [ Wight ]

- Normal weapon immunity Not affected by poison and illness Sleepless Damage from healing magic Habitat=Ruins, graveyards Languages=Those previous Perception=Pseudo Wights are undead that possess people and feed on the energy of others. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06892))_
- A wight's weapon is its sharp claws, and those who are dealt damage will have their life energy drained at the same time. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06892))_
- If a wight's attack hits, your life force will suffer damage as well as your mental power. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06892))_
- To wound a wight, you need a silver or magical weapon. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06892))_
- The damage dealt to mental power is merely the result of a strike power 10 strike roll plus bonus damage 4. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06892))_
- Normal weapons have no effect against this monster. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06892))_
- Those whose mental power is reduced to 0 by this attack will die immediately and will then be revived as a new wight 24 hours later. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06892))_
- Those whose mental power is reduced to 0 by this attack will die immediately and will then be revived as a new wight 24 hours later. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06892))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06892))_

> For this, you can only reduce the damage with your character's adventurer level.

## [ Haunt ]

- These are broadly classified into three types: ghosts, specters, and phantoms, but they are collectively called haunts. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06894))_
- A haunt is a being such a ghost or a vengeful spirit. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06894))_
- A special case, however, is when one resents its own death itself and harbors hatred toward all living things. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06895))_
- Haunts are souls that have remained in this world because they have unfinished business, or held a strong grudge against others in life. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06895))_
- Such haunts are always hostile and attack all creatures they encounter, with intent to kill. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06895))_
- Haunts are souls that have remained in this world because they have unfinished business, or held a strong grudge against others in life. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06895))_
- Haunts have a minimum monster level of 5, but if they had a higher adventurer level in life, or if they died harboring a particularly strong grudge, their level will be higher. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06896))_
- If a body is destroyed after being possessed, the haunt will become a phantom and be bound in place. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06897))_
- If you fail, your body will be taken over. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06897))_
- If you cast this magic, you will be freed from the haunt's possession. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06897))_
- There's also 6th level holy magic called Exorcism . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06897))_
- This is the act of taking over the body of a living being and using it for one's own purposes. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06897))_
- Once you successfully resist, there is no danger of being possessed by the same haunt again. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06897))_
- The target of the possession must attempt a mental power resistance roll. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06897))_
- A special ability common to all haunts is possess . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06897))_
- When a haunt takes over your body, it can use your character's abilities in addition to its own previous skills. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06897))_
- If a body is destroyed after being possessed, the haunt will become a phantom and be bound in place. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06897))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06895))_

> If you can clear up those lingering regrets and grudges, they will cease to exist.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06897))_

> If a haunt finds that a creature it comes into contact with does not sympathize with its feelings, it may attempt to possess them.

## Ghost

- Depending on how long ago they died, they can look like zombies (rotting corpses) or skeletons (moving skeletons). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06918))_
- The scores listed here are averages. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06918))_
- All ability scores will be the same as previous, except for mental power. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06918))_
- A ghost is a moving being whose corpse still holds a lingering grudge. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06918))_
- Their strength varies considerably depending on which abilities they had in life. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06918))_
- All ability scores will be the same as previous, except for mental power. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06918))_
- However, they cannot use holy magic (but they can use dark magic). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06919))_
- Also, to use ancient magic, they will still need a magical catalyst (such as a magic wand). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06919))_
- They have all the skills they had previously. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06919))_
- Mental power is the only one that's previous + 6 . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06919))_
- Mental power is the only one that's previous + 6 . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06919))_
- Also, to use ancient magic, they will still need a magical catalyst (such as a magic wand). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06919))_
- If this fails, it'll become a phantom (see below) and be bound in place. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06920))_
- the ghost will vanish, leaving only a crumbled corpse behind. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06921))_
- the ghost will vanish, leaving only a crumbled corpse behind. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06921))_

> A ghost is a moving being whose corpse still holds a lingering grudge. Depending on how long ago they died, they can look like zombies (rotting corpses) or skeletons (moving skeletons). Their strength varies considerably depending on which abilities they had in life. The scores listed here are averages. All ability scores will be the same as previous, except for mental power.

> Those who had rune master skills can use magic of that level and magic power.

> Mental power is the only one that's previous + 6 . They have all the skills they had previously. Those who had rune master skills can use magic of that level and magic power. However, they cannot use holy magic (but they can use dark magic). Also, to use ancient magic, they will still need a magical catalyst (such as a magic wand).

## Specter

- However, holy magic cannot be used. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06942))_
- Since it does not have a physical body, attacks such as weapons and damage magic are ineffective, and the only effective countermeasure is magic that has a mental effect. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06942))_
- A magical catalyst is not required when using ancient magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06942))_
- The faint, transparent appearance it had in life takes on the form of a hazy shadow. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06942))_
- Also, after performing possession , they can freely use the skills they had previously. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06942))_
- A specter is a very troublesome entity, a grudge that has lost its physical body and remains in this world. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06942))_
- Since it does not have a physical body, attacks such as weapons and damage magic are ineffective, and the only effective countermeasure is magic that has a mental effect. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06942))_
- Also, after performing possession , they can freely use the skills they had previously. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06942))_

## Phantom

- They have almost no power to interfere with others, but it's impossible to counter them through normal means. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06961))_
- Even Turn Undead has no effect on Phantoms. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06961))_
- A phantom is a being who by now is merely a grudge bound to a specific place, object, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06961))_
- Only Exorcism and Save Soul can be expected to be effective. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06961))_
- Only Exorcism and Save Soul can be expected to be effective. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06961))_
- They have almost no power to interfere with others, but it's impossible to counter them through normal means. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06961))_
- It can also communicate its intentions while disappearing. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06962))_
- At this time, it may cause rapping sounds or poltergeist phenomena. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06962))_
- A phantom's appearance is the same as a specter. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06962))_
- A phantom has lost all of the skills it had previously. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06963))_
- After possessing , it can only use the abilities of that body. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06963))_
- After possessing , it can only use the abilities of that body. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06963))_
- If you clear up its regrets and grudges, the phantom will vanish. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06964))_

## [ Jack-O-Lantern ]

- Like ghouls, they live by scavenging dead flesh, but perhaps this does not satisfy their hunger, as they frequently attack the living. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06982))_
- There are no eyeballs, and an evil red light can be seen deep inside the eye sockets. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06982))_

> A jack-o-lantern looks like a pumpkin , the vegetable, with a yellowishorange face about 30 cm in diameter, that floats in the air. Its face has semicircular eyes and a mouth that arch downward, and a triangular nose that points upward, as if cut with a knife. There are no eyeballs, and an evil red light can be seen deep inside the eye sockets. They often float around above swamps and ponds, and if they spot prey, they'll attack straight away. Like ghouls, they live by scavenging dead flesh, but

> A jack-o-lantern looks like a pumpkin , the vegetable, with a yellowishorange face about 30 cm in diameter, that floats in the air. Its face has semicircular eyes and a mouth that arch downward, and a triangular nose that points upward, as if cut with a knife. There are no eyeballs, and an evil red light can be seen deep inside the eye sockets. They often float around above swamps and ponds, and if they spot prey, they'll attack straight away. Like ghouls, they live by scavenging dead flesh, but

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-06981))_

## [ Dullahan ]

- A dullahan carries a one-handed sword and no shield, but it's no wonder, as it carries its own head in its spare hand! _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07006))_
- A dullahan is a ghost that appears as a headless knight wearing armor. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07006))_
- A Dullahan rides a chariot pulled by a headless horse (the horse is called a headless horse and the chariot is called a chariot of dullahan) and appears late at night at the door of the house it's aiming for. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07007))_
- A Dullahan rides a chariot pulled by a headless horse (the horse is called a headless horse and the chariot is called a chariot of dullahan) and appears late at night at the door of the house it's aiming for. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07007))_
- A dullahan can summon its chariot and headless horse at any time and in any place. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07008))_
- However, one (?) dullahan has only one chariot and two headless horses, and if these are defeated, they cannot be summoned again. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07008))_
- However, one (?) dullahan has only one chariot and two headless horses, and if these are defeated, they cannot be summoned again. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07008))_
- It's no use for those who have received the prophecy of death to move away. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07009))_
- You can avoid a death prophesied by a dullahan by killing it the first or second time it appears. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07009))_
- A dullahan can only be wounded by silver or magical weapons. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07010))_
- A dullahan can only be wounded by silver or magical weapons. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07010))_

## Chariot of Dullahan

- Certain magic immunity Not affected by poison and illness Habitat=Unknown, appears with (or summoned by) dullahan Languages=None Perception=None A chariot ridden by a dullahan, which has the ability to fly. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07025))_
- A dullahan riding and controlling a chariot cannot attack on its own at the same time (because it's pulling the reins with one hand and holding its head in the other). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07025))_
- Also, it can hit-and-run different opposing characters again and again. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07025))_
- Headless horses also cannot attack while pulling a chariot. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07025))_
- A dullahan riding and controlling a chariot cannot attack on its own at the same time (because it's pulling the reins with one hand and holding its head in the other). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07025))_
- Furthermore, additional critical damage cannot be dealt by swords , spears , clubs , bows , crossbows , or barehanded (with magic cast) . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07026))_
- Criticals can occur as usual with axes , maces , fl ails , slings , rocks , and warhammers . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07026))_
- A chariot can only be dealt damage by silver or magical weapons. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07026))_
- A chariot can only be dealt damage by silver or magical weapons. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07026))_
- Turn Undead has no effect. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07027))_
- In the case of magic, cold-type and poison gas-type magic is completely ineffective, but other damage magic are effective. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07027))_
- To attack a dullahan aboard a chariot, you must suffer a -2 penalty to attack power. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07028))_
- When its master dullahan is defeated, or when any one of the headless horses pulling it are defeated, the chariot loses the ability to act. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07029))_

## Headless Horse

- Monster Level=4 Rarity=14 Agility=12 Movement Speed=30/30 (air) Number=Two horses Frequency=Rare Intellect=Animal Reaction=Adversarial Attack Points=Heel:10 (3) Strike Points=12 Evasion Points=11 (4) Defense Points=7 Life Points/Resistance=20/13 (6) Mental Points/Resistance=-/12 (5) Special Abilities=Normal weapon immunity Mental attack immunity Not affected by poison and illness Damage from healing magic Habitat=Unknown, appears with (or summoned by) dullahan Languages=None Perception=Magic Headless horses are the horses that pull the chariot with a dullahan on board, and can gallop through the air. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07031))_
- They cannot attack while pulling the chariot, but the dullahan can freely detach the chariot from the headless horses at will. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07031))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07031))_

> They act faithfully to their master's commands and may also attack enemies.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07032))_

> When a headless horse's master dullahan is defeated, it loses its ability to act.

## [ Undead Knight ]

- After defeating an undead knight, all that remains is an empty, rusty suit of armor and a sword. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07042))_
- You can touch the armor, but apart from the glowing red eyes behind the helmet, there's nothing to be found inside. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07042))_
- An undead knight is a ghost that appears in the form of a knight wearing armor, holding a large two-handed sword. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07042))_
- Both the sword and armor have red rust and no sheen. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07042))_
- You can touch the armor, but apart from the glowing red eyes behind the helmet, there's nothing to be found inside. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07042))_
- After defeating an undead knight, all that remains is an empty, rusty suit of armor and a sword. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07042))_
- Naturally, the priests of Pharis deny this, while agreeing with a different claim, which is that they're sentinels created by necromancy during the ancient kingdom period. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07043))_
- It is said that they fell on their journey to defeat evil, but their will to fight remained and they turned into ghosts. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07043))_
- Undead knights cannot be wounded by ordinary weapons. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07044))_
- You will need a silver or magical weapon to defeat them. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07044))_
- Only adventurer level and magical defense effects will work. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07044))_
- This damage is calculated as strike power 10 plus bonus damage 8, and armor defense power is useless. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07044))_
- Only adventurer level and magical defense effects will work. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07044))_
- These wights are sometimes specifically called squire wights . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07045))_
- For this reason, an undead knight may be accompanied by multiple wights. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07045))_
- An undead knight can similarly drain the mental power of its enemies with its gaze. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07045))_
- As a result, anyone struck by an undead knight's gaze (even from behind) will suffer damage to their mental power. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07045))_
- Those whose mental power is reduced to 0 due to damage from an undead knight's weapons or gaze will die instantly and will be resurrected as a wight 24 hours later. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07045))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07035))_

> An undead knight can similarly drain the mental power of its enemies with its gaze. As a result, anyone struck by an undead knight's gaze (even from behind) will suffer damage to their mental power. Those whose mental power is reduced to 0 due to damage from an undead knight's weapons or gaze will die instantly and will be resurrected as a wight 24 hours later. For this reason, an undead knight may be accompanied by multiple wights. These wights are sometimes specifically called squire wights .

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07044))_

> Also, if an undead knight's attack hits, the character will suffer damage to their mental power in addition to normal damage.

## [ Wraith ]

- A wraith is a being whose ethereal body was separated from its physical body by the ancient magic spell Wraith Form and became undead because it did not return within the spell's duration. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07064))_
- It resembles a specter, with a vaguely transparent image of when it was alive. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07064))_
- The scores given here are for an average wraith, and can vary considerably depending on its previous knowledge, mental power, sorcerer skill level, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07064))_
- A wraith is a being whose ethereal body was separated from its physical body by the ancient magic spell Wraith Form and became undead because it did not return within the spell's duration. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07064))_
- Although a wraith has lost all of its physical abilities, its knowledge-related abilities and rune master skills are still effective, and it can use magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07065))_
- Attacks using weapons or damaging spells have no effect at all on wraiths, which do not have a physical body, so the only effective countermeasure is magic that has a mental effect. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07065))_
- If its mental points become 0 due to a Mental Attack , etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07065))_
- Unlike specters, wraiths do not have the ability to possess . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07065))_
- the wraith will vanish. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07065))_
- If it's directly exposed to sunlight, it will also disappear without even attempting to resist. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07065))_
- However, holy magic cannot be used (dark magic is allowed). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07065))_
- Unlike specters, wraiths do not have the ability to possess . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07065))_
- Attacks using weapons or damaging spells have no effect at all on wraiths, which do not have a physical body, so the only effective countermeasure is magic that has a mental effect. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07065))_

## [ Mummy ]

## Servant

- Mental attack immunity Not affected by poison and illness Damage from healing magic Weak to fire _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07082))_
- To break this curse, the holy magic Remove Curse is required. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07086))_
- If they fail, they will no longer be able to recover any reductions in ability scores, including life force and mental power. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07086))_
- At this time, even if the adventurer's rope is broken, his agility will not recover from 0 and he will still be unable to take any action! _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07086))_
- A mummy is a monster transformed by a magical ritual in ancient , and is buried together in a tomb as the keeper of its master's coffin. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07086))_
- When a miscreant such as a graverobber appears, the mummy is given the mission to awaken and attack the intruder. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07086))_
- The character must make a mental power resistance roll against target score 13. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07086))_
- When a miscreant such as a graverobber appears, the mummy is given the mission to awaken and attack the intruder. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07086))_
- Since a mummy is dry, it's weak to fire, so fire attacks receive a +10 bonus to strike power. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07087))_

## Master Mummy

- A Master Mummy is an ancient member of a royal family or noble who followed a ritual in ancient and sleeps in a tomb as an undead. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07112))_
- places their hands on its coffin, the master mummy rises and begins to act. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07112))_
- The character must make a mental power resistance roll against target score 16. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07113))_
- To break this curse, the holy magic Remove Curse is required. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07113))_
- If they fail, they will not recover any reductions, including life force and mental power. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07113))_
- A master mummy can use this ability while taking other actions. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07114))_
- This regeneration or summoning can only be done once per round. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07114))_
- It is common for 10 or more mummies to be buried together in a master mummy's coffin chamber, furthermore, the master mummy has the ability to either make an individual mummy rise, or summon new mummies from nearby. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07114))_
- This regeneration or summoning can only be done once per round. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07114))_
- Any mummies, either buried with or newly summoned, will continue to be active even after the master mummy has fallen, attacking those who have harmed their master to try and get revenge. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07115))_
- Since a master mummy is dry, it's weak to fire, so fire attack checks are made at plus 10 to strike power. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07115))_
- Any mummies, either buried with or newly summoned, will continue to be active even after the master mummy has fallen, attacking those who have harmed their master to try and get revenge. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07115))_

## [ Vampire ]

- There are three types of vampires: undead king, vampire, and lesser vampire. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07117))_
- A human whose blood is sucked by these vampires will also be turned into a lesser vampire. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07117))_
- An undead king is a supreme spirit-user of the ancient kingdom, who has turned itself into an undead being, and holds great magical power. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07117))_
- Those who have their blood sucked or their mental power taken by these vampires become lesser vampires. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07117))_
- Also, even if their blood is sucked by a lesser vampire, a lesser vampire will still be created. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07117))_
- These red eyes cause intense fear in those who see them. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07118))_
- The target score varies depending on the type of vampire, but in any case, if you fail to resist, you will be paralyzed with fear and unable to act. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07118))_
- First, vampires have pale skin and a red glow in their eyes. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07118))_
- Anyone who makes eye contact with a vampire must first make a mental power resistance roll. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07118))_
- Vampires cannot be wounded by normal weapons. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07119))_
- Only adventurer level and magical defense power are effective. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07119))_
- To defeat them, you will need a silver or magical weapon. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07119))_
- Armor defense power is useless against this damage. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07119))_
- Those whose mental power is reduced to 0 by this attack will die and will be resurrected 24 hours later as a lesser vampire. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07119))_
- Only adventurer level and magical defense power are effective. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07119))_
- Vampires can also steal mental power even with normal attacks, which are directly added to the vampire's mental points (but never exceed the upper limit). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07120))_
- A vampire can suck the lifeblood of one human who cannot resist in 10 minutes, allowing them to fully recover their mental points. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07120))_
- Those who've had their blood sucked will lose their mental points and will be resurrected as a lesser vampire in 24 hours. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07120))_
- Vampires who temporarily lose their mental points due to magic, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07120))_
- Vampires can also steal mental power even with normal attacks, which are directly added to the vampire's mental points (but never exceed the upper limit). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07120))_
- A vampire's negative life force has strong regenerative power, and unless it becomes 0, it will automatically regenerate at a rate of 3 points per round. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07122))_
- A vampire's negative life force has strong regenerative power, and unless it becomes 0, it will automatically regenerate at a rate of 3 points per round. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07122))_
- Life points do not regenerate under the sun. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07123))_
- When exposed to sunlight, a vampire suffers 1 point of damage to both their life points and mental points each round. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07123))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07118))_

> Vampires share several common characteristics. First, vampires have pale skin and a red glow in their eyes. These red eyes cause intense fear in those who see them. Anyone who makes eye contact with a vampire must first make a mental power resistance roll. The target score varies depending on the type of vampire, but in any case, if you fail to resist, you will be paralyzed with fear and unable to act. Even if the vampire removes its gaze, this paralysis continues until it disappears.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07119))_

> Also, if a vampire's attack hits a character, in addition to normal damage, mental power will also be damaged.

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07118))_

> Vampires share several common characteristics. First, vampires have pale skin and a red glow in their eyes. These red eyes cause intense fear in those who see them. Anyone who makes eye contact with a vampire must first make a mental power resistance roll. The target score varies depending on the type of vampire, but in any case, if you fail to resist, you will be paralyzed with fear and unable to act. Even if the vampire removes its gaze, this paralysis continues until it disappears.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07121))_

> If they cannot steal mental power for one full day, they will automatically lose 1 mental point.

## Lesser Vampire

- They have emaciated, unhealthy pale skin, and their glowing red eyes cause intense fear in those who see them. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07135))_
- If you fail, you'll be paralyzed by fear and unable to act. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07135))_
- They will always follow the commands of the vampire that transformed them (their parents, so to speak). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07135))_
- A lesser vampire is a monster created by the transformation of a victim whose blood has been sucked by another vampire. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07135))_
- A character who makes eye contact with a lesser vampire must first resist the gaze against target score 10. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07135))_
- In addition to normal damage, a character hit by a lesser vampire's attack will also suffer damage to their mental power _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07136))_
- You will need a silver or magic weapon to defeat them. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07136))_
- A lesser vampire cannot be wounded by normal weapons. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07136))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07126))_

> Special Abilities=Steal mental power (Strike power 10, bonus damage 3)

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07127))_

> Gaze (Resist target score=10, paralysis by fear)

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07132))_

> Habitat=Various

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07133))_

> Languages=Those previous

> Perception=Pseudo

## Vampire

- The scores given here are for an average vampire and will vary depending on the ability scores it had previously. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07153))_
- They'll no longer be able to use holy magic, but if they had a holy magic skill of 9th level or greater, they'll be able to use dark magic at the same skill level. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07153))_
- Most abilities they had previously are retained. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07153))_
- Additionally, they gain the power to use dark magic up to 8th level. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07153))_
- If you take that into account, its dexterity, agility, intelligence, and strength will be previous +6 , and its life force and mental power will be previous +12 . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07153))_
- Vampires have the ability to move while floating in the air. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07153))_
- Vampires are servants of the dark gods or those who seem to be particularly favored by the dark gods, and are resurrected as undead after death. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07153))_
- Vampires are servants of the dark gods or those who seem to be particularly favored by the dark gods, and are resurrected as undead after death. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07153))_
- Even if their movement is blocked by magic such as Paralyze , etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07155))_
- they can still turn into a mist. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07155))_
- A vampire's negative power is strongly connected to the soil called unholy soil . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07155))_
- If the vampire's life points become 0, or if its body crumbles away as a result of a "Turn Undead" spell being cast on it, the vampire's form will vanish into mist, but in one day it'll completely regenerate in its soil location. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07155))_
- Vampires can also turn into mist at their own will before their life points reach 0, and regenerate in a place with soil . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07155))_
- Vampires can also turn into mist at their own will before their life points reach 0, and regenerate in a place with soil . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07155))_
- Even if their movement is blocked by magic such as Paralyze , etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07155))_
- If discovered by an adventurer, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07156))_
- while regenerating in a location with soil , a vampire will not be able to take its physical form. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07156))_
- While a vampire is a mist, it cannot be wounded by sunlight or any other attack. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07157))_
- The mist will eventually fade and the characters will no longer be able to see it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07157))_
- To do so, you must know about vampires and must also make a success roll against target score 16. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07158))_
- A sage who has knowledge of vampires can look at the soil and completely find out its true identity through their knowledge ability. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07158))_
- If you're accompanied by a sage who knows about vampires, and further find out that the soil is not normal soil, you'll be able to deduce its true identity. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07159))_
- You can defeat a vampire by reducing its mental points to 0, or by removing the soil from its original location and reducing its life points to 0. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07160))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07138))_

> A vampire's negative power is strongly connected to the soil called unholy soil . If the vampire's life points become 0, or if its body crumbles away as a result of a "Turn Undead" spell being cast on it, the vampire's form will vanish into mist, but in one day it'll completely regenerate in its soil location. Vampires can also turn into mist at their own will before their life points reach 0, and regenerate in a place with soil . Even if their movement is blocked by magic such as Paralyze , etc

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07158))_

> You cannot attempt this success roll if you do not know about vampires.

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07158))_

> Many vampires preserve this "soil" by preparing a coffin and lining it inside, while others simply keep it in a mound inside their room. A sage who has knowledge of vampires can look at the soil and completely find out its true identity through their knowledge ability. To do so, you must know about vampires and must also make a success roll against target score 16. You cannot attempt this success roll if you do not know about vampires.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07159))_

> If someone with the shaman skill looks at the soil , they can immediately tell that it's something out of the ordinary.

## Undead King

- The scores given here are for an average undead king, and will vary depending on the abilities they had previously. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07176))_
- The Undead King , is the name of the ultimate undead, the king of all without life, a powerful necromancer from the ancient kingdom that gained eternal negative power through a lost spell. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07176))_
- They are usually dressed in black robes and a hood. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07176))_
- If you take that into account, its dexterity and agility will be previous +6 , its strength, intelligence, and life will be previous +12 , and its mental power will be previous +18 . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07176))_
- An undead king uses both ancient magic and dark magic up to at least 10th level. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07177))_
- Above all, the most frightening thing about the undead king is that it has great magical power. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07177))_

## [ Simulacra ]

- Rarity=14 Agility=Based on original Movement Speed=Based on original Number=One to several Frequency=Rare Intellect=None Reaction=Violent Attack Points/Strike Points/Evasion Points/ Defense Points=Based on original Life Points/Resistance=Based on original/based on original Mental Points/Resistance=-/Based on original _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07182))_
- A simulacra is a kind of golem built during the ancient kingdom period. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07188))_
- A simulacra duplicates the appearance and abilities of an enemy human creature and makes them its own. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07188))_
- They were often used to watch over people who did not use magic, such as slaves and savages, and to guard the places where they worked. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07189))_
- If it duplicates someone who is holding a broadsword +1, it will attack with a broadsword with the same strike power, but will not receive any bonuses to attack power or bonus damage. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07189))_
- Although they look the same, they don't even have magical power. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07189))_
- However, magical weapons and armor cannot be duplicated. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07189))_
- They were often used to watch over people who did not use magic, such as slaves and savages, and to guard the places where they worked. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07189))_
- As far as is currently known, simulacra seem to be unable to speak or use any magic at all. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07190))_
- A simulacra's replication is only superficial, and is limited to weapon combat capability. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07190))_
- It cannot duplicate someone's personality or even their memories. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07190))_
- A simulacra's replication is only superficial, and is limited to weapon combat capability. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07190))_
- The only way to attack a simulacra is to attack directly with a weapon. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07191))_
- The only way to attack a simulacra is to attack directly with a weapon. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07191))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07181))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07183))_

> Special Abilities=Duplication

## 13.2.10 Magical Creatures

## [ Homunculus ]

- Among the pseudo-life forms created by ancient magic, the homunculus is the closest to human. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07195))_
- Although they're about one-tenth the size of a human, they have human-like intelligence and can speak. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07195))_
- Production of a homunculus is not always successful. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07196))_
- The monsters called blobs are these failures, which were carelessly dumped into sewers and rivers, which turned feral and have survived to the present day. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07196))_
- In addition, creating a homunculus with new characteristics will inevitably be a process of trial and error. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07196))_
- The same held true for the sorcerers of the ancient kingdom period, who produced countless failures. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07196))_

## Homunculus

- Monster Level=1 Rarity=14 Agility=14 Movement Speed=4/7 (air) Number=One Frequency=Very rare Intellect=Human Reaction=Neutral Attack Points=Barehanded:8 (1) Strike Points=1 Evasion Points=10 (3) Defense Points=3 Life Points/Resistance=6/8 (1) Mental Points/Resistance=14/9 (2) Special Abilities=None in particular Habitat=Depends on the caster Languages=Low ancient Perception=Five senses _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07198))_
- Most resemble humans, but some are ugly, resembling gargoyles, and some have wings and can fly. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07199))_
- Homunculus are often created as distractions or scouts for rune masters. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07199))_
- homunculus have their own will, and in some cases they may rebel against their creators. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07200))_
- Their life span is only a few years. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07200))_
- Their life span is only a few years. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07200))_

## Blob

- Sorcerers in the ancient kingdom often experimented with creating life, but would carelessly throw their failed creations into the sewers or rivers. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07205))_
- The blob is said to be the result of such failed artificial life turning feral. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07205))_
- A blob has a liquid inside it that corrodes iron. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07206))_
- If you attack a blob with an iron weapon or if a blob's attack hits someone wearing iron armor, that equipment will corrode and become useless after 24 hours. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07206))_
- However, magical weapons and armor, silver and mithril silver weapons and armor are not affected. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07206))_
- A blob has a liquid inside it that corrodes iron. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07206))_
- If you attack a blob with an iron weapon or if a blob's attack hits someone wearing iron armor, that equipment will corrode and become useless after 24 hours. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07206))_
- Also, attacks with any weapon cannot critical against the blob. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07207))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07202))_

> Monster Level=8 Rarity=15 Agility=8 Movement Speed=8 Number=One to several Frequency=Rare Intellect=None Reaction=Adversarial Attack Points=Ram:10 (3)

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07205))_

> Sorcerers in the ancient kingdom often experimented with creating life, but would carelessly throw their failed creations into the sewers or rivers. The blob is said to be the result of such failed artificial life turning feral. It's a black, slimy, amorphous creature with no intellect, which attacks all living things.

## [ Puppet Golem ]

- They are oak, stone servant, bone servant, and skeleton warrior. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07209))_
- A puppet golem is a small, simple version of a golem that is created by giving temporary life to a tree branch, stone, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07209))_
- Depending on the material, there are four different types of puppet golems that can be created. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07209))_

## Oak

- An oak is a puppet golem the size of a human child, made from oak wood. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07214))_
- They have no talents other than fighting. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07214))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07212))_

> Mental Points/Resistance=-/10 (3)

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07213))_

> Special Abilities=Mental attack immunity Not affected by poison and illness Habitat=Various Languages=None Perception=Pseudo

## Stone Servant

- Rarity=15 (However, a sorcerer always knows) Agility=12 Movement Speed=12 Number=One to several Frequency=Rare Intellect=Obeys commands Reaction=Command-based Attack Points=Arms:11 (4) Strike Points=13 Evasion Points=11 (4) Defense Points=8 Life Points/Resistance=16/11 (4) Mental Points/Resistance=-/11 (4) Special Abilities=Mental attack immunity Not affected by poison and illness Habitat=Various Languages=None Perception=Pseudo _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07217))_
- A stone servant is a puppet golem about 1.5 meters tall, made from stone. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07218))_
- They can perform simple tasks as well as fight. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07218))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07216))_

> Monster Level=3

## Bone Servant

- Monster Level=3 Rarity=15 Agility=12 Movement Speed=18 Number=One to several Frequency=Rare Intellect=Obeys commands Reaction=Command-based Attack Points=Arms:11 (4) Strike Points=8 Weapon:11 (4) Strike Points=9 Evasion Points=11 (4) Defense Points=5 Life Points/Resistance=15/11 (4) Mental Points/Resistance=-/11 (4) Special Abilities=Mental attack immunity Bladed weapons cannot critical Not affected by poison and illness Habitat=Various Languages=None Perception=Pseudo _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07220))_
- When armed, they're difficult to distinguish from a skeleton warrior. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07221))_
- in that they have eternal life and can carry out fairly complex commands. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07221))_
- A bone servant is a puppet golem made from the bones of living creatures. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07221))_
- They are superior to stone servants, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07221))_

## Skeleton Warrior

- Monster Level=5 Rarity=14 (However, a sorcerer knows) Agility=18 Movement Speed=14 Number=One to several Frequency=Rare Intellect=Obeys commands Reaction=Command-based Attack Points=Weapon:12 (5) Strike Points=11 Evasion Points=14 (7) Defense Points=10 Life Points/Resistance=16/13 (6) Mental Points/Resistance=-/13 (6) Special Abilities=Mental attack immunity Bladed weapons cannot critical Not affected by poison and illness Habitat=Uncertain Languages=None _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07224))_
- However, its intellect is low and it cannot accept complex or abstract commands. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07227))_
- For this reason, skeleton warriors are often used for simple tasks, such as guarding treasure vaults, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07227))_
- A skeleton warrior is a golem created from a magical dragon's tooth. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07227))_
- Its appearance is that of a fully-armed skeleton, which uses its weapon and shield with mechanical precision. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07227))_
- For this reason, skeleton warriors are often used for simple tasks, such as guarding treasure vaults, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07227))_
- It's usually not possible to control, or cancel the commands of, a skeleton warrior created by someone else. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07228))_
- A skeleton warrior will attempt to carry out any commands they're given, unless the caster who created them gives them new commands in high ancient, or cancels any previously given commands. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07228))_
- A skeleton warrior will attempt to carry out any commands they're given, unless the caster who created them gives them new commands in high ancient, or cancels any previously given commands. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07228))_
- Even if you attack a skeleton warrior with a bladed weapon, it will not cause a critical hit. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07230))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07226))_

> Perception=Pseudo

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07227))_

> A skeleton warrior is a golem created from a magical dragon's tooth. Its appearance is that of a fully-armed skeleton, which uses its weapon and shield with mechanical precision. However, its intellect is low and it cannot accept complex or abstract commands. For this reason, skeleton warriors are often used for simple tasks, such as guarding treasure vaults, etc.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07229))_

> Also, once created, a skeleton warrior will never return to its original tooth form.

## [ Imitator ]

- Normally, they're in a state of suspended animation and do not move at all, and they look like stone or metal, but as soon as they are touched by a living creature, they activate immediately and attack. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07232))_
- Since they can live for thousands of years in a state of suspended animation, many imitators are even now still awaiting intruders in old labyrinths. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07232))_
- An Imitator will not stop attacking until the intruders are repelled or wiped out, but since they're ordered to remain in a specific location, they will not pursue any enemies that run away. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07233))_
- When it finishes absorbing, the imitator will return to its original state of suspended animation. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07234))_
- The time required for absorption is several hours for a small imitator, but only a few dozen seconds for a large one. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07234))_
- An imitator can also absorb iron, but cannot dissolve gold, silver, or jewelry, so it spits those out. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07234))_
- Therefore, there will often be treasures that belonged to the victims scattered around the imitator. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07234))_
- Once combat is over, an imitator dissolves the bodies of the victims it killed in acid, completely absorbing them. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07234))_
- The time required for absorption is several hours for a small imitator, but only a few dozen seconds for a large one. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07234))_
- Therefore, there will often be treasures that belonged to the victims scattered around the imitator. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07234))_
- The only words an imitator can understand are the keywords given to it by the sorcerer at the time it was created. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07235))_
- If you say the keyword, the imitator will not attack. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07235))_
- Even in the middle of combat, hearing the keyword will instantly return it to suspended animation. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07235))_
- The only words an imitator can understand are the keywords given to it by the sorcerer at the time it was created. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07235))_
- There are also monsters called things, which are imitators that escaped after being created, and turned feral. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07236))_
- Imitators come in a variety of shapes and sizes, but the three most common ones are chest imitators, door imitators, and floor imitators. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07236))_
- There are also monsters called things, which are imitators that escaped after being created, and turned feral. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07236))_
- Imitators and things will disguise themselves as other objects, then perform a surprise attack . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07237))_
- Imitators and things will disguise themselves as other objects, then perform a surprise attack . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07237))_
- Normal combat is possible from the 2nd round onwards. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07238))_
- At this time, a -4 penalty will be imposed on the character's evasion speed. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07238))_
- If you're caught by surprise, the imitator or thing will be given the first attack. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07238))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07237))_

> To avoid being surprised, a character must make a success roll against target score 16 using ranger skill level + intelligence bonus as the baseline score.

## Chest Imitator

- This is an imitator in the shape of a treasure chest. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07257))_
- Chest imitators can actually be used as treasure chests, so you may find treasure inside after defeating them. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07257))_
- Chest imitators can actually be used as treasure chests, so you may find treasure inside after defeating them. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07257))_

## Door Imitator

- This is an imitator in the shape of a door. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07278))_
- Anyone hit by a door imitator's attack on the first round will have one arm grabbed and will suffer a -4 penalty to evasion on subsequent rounds. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07278))_

## Floor Imitator

- Anyone standing on a floor imitator that's begun to move must suffer a -2 penalty to attack and evasion due to unstable footing. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07299))_
- The entire floor of one room is an imitator which attacks anyone who enters the room. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07299))_
- This is the most dangerous type of imitator. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07299))_

## Thing

- The difference is that they have intellect and can transform into any creature so long as it's close to human size. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07318))_
- Although it is nearly impossible to see through its clever transformation, in contrast to an imitator, it's not very good at transforming into inanimate objects. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07318))_
- Although it is nearly impossible to see through its clever transformation, in contrast to an imitator, it's not very good at transforming into inanimate objects. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07318))_
- Animals have a keen sense of smell, so no matter how closely a thing resembles the real deal, they'll be able to tell by the difference in smell. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07319))_
- They approach their prey in the form of a human or elf, catch their opponent off guard, then aim to attack when they're alone. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07319))_
- They approach their prey in the form of a human or elf, catch their opponent off guard, then aim to attack when they're alone. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07319))_
- The game master must roll the dice to randomly determine how many attacks are made in a round. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07320))_

> Things often eat humans. They approach their prey in the form of a human or elf, catch their opponent off guard, then aim to attack when they're alone. They target humans because they're easier to deceive than animals. Animals have a keen sense of smell, so no matter how closely a thing resembles the real deal, they'll be able to tell by the difference in smell.

> During combat, a thing can attack up to 6 times by transforming its body so as to produce numerous arms and tentacles.

## [ Obsidian Dog ]

- Perception=Magic This is a type of golem created through ancient magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07336))_
- It's normally a harmless dog statue, but when its silver collar is removed, it becomes hostile towards all living things and attacks. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07336))_
- The inhabitants of the ancient kingdom used them as a spectacle to fight off savages. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07336))_
- Occasionally an obsidian dog can be found still wearing its silver collar. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07336))_

## [ Gargoyle ]

- A gargoyle is a species of golem, a statue brought to life through magic, but its flexible movements resemble those of a normal living creature. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07343))_
- Its appearance resembles a stone statue, and if you close your eyes, you won't be able to tell it apart unless you look very closely. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07343))_
- Its appearance resembles a stone statue, and if you close your eyes, you won't be able to tell it apart unless you look very closely. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07343))_
- These monsters still exist in the ruins of the ancient kingdom without ceasing activity, but the means to control them and the technology to create them have already been lost. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07343))_
- These monsters still exist in the ruins of the ancient kingdom without ceasing activity, but the means to control them and the technology to create them have already been lost. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07343))_
- Its grotesque appearance is said to be because it was modeled after the lesser daemon zalbard (described later). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07344))_
- The size of a gargoyle is nearly 2 meters when standing upright. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07344))_
- Their personality is very insidious, and they're willing to resort to dirty measures. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07344))_
- A gargoyle has wings on its back and can fly. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07344))_
- Its grotesque appearance is said to be because it was modeled after the lesser daemon zalbard (described later). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07344))_
- [ Sí ] Monster Level=3 Rarity=14 Agility=17 Movement Speed=17 Number=One to several Frequency=Very rare Intellect=Human Reaction=Adversarial Attack Points=Weapon:11 (4) Strike Points=4 Evasion Points=12 (5) Defense Points=5 Life Points/Resistance=4/9 (2) Mental Points/Resistance=14/11 (4) Special Abilities=3rd level ancient magic (Magic intensity/magic power=12/5) Habitat=Ruins Languages=Low ancient _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07345))_
- They are highly intelligent and can handle magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07347))_
- The sí is said to be an artificial lifeform created by the wizards of the ancient kingdom. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07347))_
- They mainly live in ancient ruins and have their own villages and small homes. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07347))_
- A sí's weapon is a thin sword that resembles a needle. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07348))_
- They also use ancient magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07348))_
- They do not willingly go outside their home (ruins). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07348))_
- This often includes lost spells among them. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07348))_

> A gargoyle has wings on its back and can fly. It also has a tail. Its grotesque appearance is said to be because it was modeled after the lesser daemon zalbard (described later). The size of a gargoyle is nearly 2 meters when standing upright. Unlike golems, etc. they act according to their own judgment without receiving commands. In other words, they may run away if they think they're at a disadvantage, or they may take advantageous tactics depending on the situation. Their personality is very

## [ Stalker ]

- Thus they can freely pass through small gaps in doors or holes in walls. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07350))_
- Stalkers are beings created through ancient magic rituals, using gas and many human souls. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07350))_
- A materialized stalker can be wounded by damage magic, silver, and magical weapons, but cannot be wounded by normal weapons. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07350))_
- When either its life or mental points reach 0, a stalker's spiritual bond will break and it'll disappear. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07350))_
- Physical attacks are completely ineffective against a stalker in ghostly form. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07350))_
- However, since they cannot use magic, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07350))_
- if they attempt to carry out their original purpose, which is to kill, they must materialize before they attack. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07350))_
- if they attempt to carry out their original purpose, which is to kill, they must materialize before they attack. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07350))_
- Thus they can freely pass through small gaps in doors or holes in walls. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07350))_
- Therefore, all stalkers adventurers will meet are survivors from the ancient kingdom. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07351))_
- In present day Forcelia, the technique used to create stalkers has been lost. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07351))_
- Therefore, all stalkers adventurers will meet are survivors from the ancient kingdom. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07351))_
- Stalkers naturally follow the commands of their casters, but now that all the casters are dead, they remember the last command they were given and faithfully try to carry it out. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07352))_
- Stalkers that were created but abandoned without being given any commands will act according to their violent tendencies, indiscriminately attacking anyone they come across. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07352))_
- However, these failed creations became gaseous creatures called gizmos, which continue to live in present day Forcelia. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07353))_
- Failures were also an inevitable part of stalker production. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07353))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07351))_

> In present day Forcelia, the technique used to create stalkers has been lost. Therefore, all stalkers adventurers will meet are survivors from the ancient kingdom.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07350))_

> Stalkers are usually ghostly beings, who can move without being blocked by physical obstacles.

## Gizmo

- Monster Level=3 Rarity=15 Agility=10 Movement Speed=13 Number=One to several Frequency=Rare Intellect=None Reaction=Violent Attack Points=- Strike Points=Evasion Points=10 (3) Defense Points=5 Life Points/Resistance=14/11 (4) Mental Points/Resistance=-/11 (4) Special Abilities=Noxious gas (Toxicity score 10, strike power 10, bonus damage 3) Mental attack immunity Weapon immunity Certain magic immunity Weak to fire Habitat=Stagnant swamps Languages=None _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07355))_
- They live by inhaling the stench of decay emitted by dead animals. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07357))_
- Gizmos are amorphous black gasses around 2 meters in diameter, which were failed attempts at stalkers. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07357))_
- If there are no animal carcasses nearby, they will also try to kill living creatures and turn them into corpses. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07357))_
- However, the body of a gizmo is poisonous gas, so those hit by it will inhale it and suffer damage resulting from a strike power 10 strike roll plus 3 points of bonus damage. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07358))_
- Armor cannot protect against gas, only adventurer level or magical protection can reduce the damage. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07358))_
- However, if their resistance roll is successful, the strike power becomes 0. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07358))_
- Armor cannot protect against gas, only adventurer level or magical protection can reduce the damage. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07358))_
- A gizmo cannot be attacked by weapons at all. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07359))_
- A gizmo's gas is highly flammable, so fire-type magic is particularly effective, and will add +10 to normal strike power during a check. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07359))_
- Since they have no mind, Sleep Cloud and other types of magic that affect the mind are ineffective Cold-type , wind cutter-type , stone-type , and poison gas-type damage magic is also ineffective. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07359))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07356))_

> Perception=Magic

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07357))_

> Gizmos are amorphous black gasses around 2 meters in diameter, which were failed attempts at stalkers. They live by inhaling the stench of decay emitted by dead animals. If there are no animal carcasses nearby, they will also try to kill living creatures and turn them into corpses.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07358))_

> Even if a gizmo's attack hits, it does not deal damage by itself.

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07358))_

> Even if a gizmo's attack hits, it does not deal damage by itself. However, the body of a gizmo is poisonous gas, so those hit by it will inhale it and suffer damage resulting from a strike power 10 strike roll plus 3 points of bonus damage. However, if their resistance roll is successful, the strike power becomes 0. Armor cannot protect against gas, only adventurer level or magical protection can reduce the damage.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07359))_

> Only fi re-type , electric-type , pure energytype , and explosion-type magic attacks can deal damage.

## Shadow Stalker

- Even when it's not materialized, the color of the black gas is clearly visible in a well-lit area, but when it's lost in darkness, it's barely recognizable. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07404))_
- It also excels at moving around while pretending to be its opponent's shadow. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07404))_
- A shadow stalker is a stalker made using an extremely heavy black gas. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07404))_
- A shadow stalker will materialize behind its opponent, holding a garrote in its hand. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07404))_
- If you can detect it, you can evade and attack as normal, but if you cannot, it will be a complete surprise attack , so you will not be able to attack, and will be attacked with no chance to respond. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07405))_
- The damage is strike power 10, plus 5 points of bonus damage. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07406))_
- If an adventurer is wearing metal armor other than ring mail, they will not suffer any damage. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07406))_
- Regardless of damage or armor, once character's life force rounds have passed, the character will suffocate and fall unconscious (life force 0). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07406))_
- Every round from then on, you'll need to make a death check when applying damage (even if it' s 0). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07406))_
- Every round from then on, you'll need to make a death check when applying damage (even if it' s 0). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07406))_
