> A shadow stalker is a stalker made using an extremely heavy black gas. Even when it's not materialized, the color of the black gas is clearly visible in a well-lit area, but when it's lost in darkness, it's barely recognizable. It also excels at moving around while pretending to be its opponent's shadow. A shadow stalker will materialize behind its opponent, holding a garrote in its hand. It'll then try to strangle the opponent to death with that garrote.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07405))_

> Those with the ranger skill can detect this attack using their sense danger ability if they succeed on a success roll against target score 16 using ranger skill level + intelligence bonus as the baseline score.

## Air Stalker

- Monster Level=6 Rarity=15 Agility=15 Movement Speed=15 Number=One, rarely multiple Frequency=Rare Intellect=Low Reaction=Adversarial Attack Points=Weapon:13 (6) Strike Points=12 Evasion Points=14 (7) Defense Points=8 Life Points/Resistance=16/14 (7) Mental Points/Resistance=20/15 (8) Special Abilities=Normal attack immunity Completely transparent Not affected by poison and illness Sleepless Physical attack immunity while in ghostly form Habitat=Ruins Languages=None Perception=Pseudo, Magic while in ghostly _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07408))_
- For this reason, attacks on an air stalker and evasion against an air stalker's attacks are always -4. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07410))_
- An air stalker is a stalker created from transparent gas. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07410))_
- Therefore, even when it materializes, it is completely invisible. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07410))_
- Therefore, even when it materializes, it is completely invisible. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07410))_
- Of course, it's not certain what form an air stalker will materialize in....... _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07411))_

## [ Mutant Monster ]

- They vary in appearance; some have four arms, some have a tail instead of legs, some have small wings, and some have scales all over their bodies. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07430))_
- Evasion points, defense points, and life points in the round during transformation use the monster's scores. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07431))_
- If you cast the holy magic Cure Poison on them, you can return them to their human form. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07432))_
- Even if struck by the poison, it does not completely turn them into a monster, and some memories of being human may remain. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07432))_
- In addition to Living Doll , it' s said that there are several other poisons that can create mutant monsters. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07433))_

> This is a human who has mutated and gone berserk due to a special poison called Living Doll (see Poison List, p. 161). They vary in appearance; some have four arms, some have a tail instead of legs, some have small wings, and some have scales all over their bodies.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07431))_

> Transformation from human to monster takes one round, during which they cannot attack, but they can still evade.

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07431))_

> Transformation from human to monster takes one round, during which they cannot attack, but they can still evade. Evasion points, defense points, and life points in the round during transformation use the monster's scores.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07432))_

> If you call out to them with all your heart, they may respond.

## [ Golem ]

- In the present day, the method of creating golems has been lost, and there are no sorcerers who can create golems. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07435))_
- All they can do is blindly follow the commands of their sorcerer master. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07435))_
- Golems are statues created by enchanters during the ancient kingdom period, and given pseudo-life. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07435))_
- Since golems have eternal life, some of them are still left in ruins, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07436))_
- Some of them were left as they were created, without any commands given. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07436))_
- Such golems can be given commands using the ancient magic Command Golem . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07436))_
- Typically, animal (or human) flesh, stone, wood, steel, and ceramics were commonly used. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07437))_
- A variety of materials were used to create golems. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07437))_
- Golems are generally humanoid, but there are many exceptions to this, and some come in special shapes that resemble animals, magical beasts, or mythical beasts such as dragons, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07438))_
- Golems are generally humanoid, but there are many exceptions to this, and some come in special shapes that resemble animals, magical beasts, or mythical beasts such as dragons, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07438))_
- This data has been created with the assumption that their shape is humanoid. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07439))_

## Flesh Golem

- Monster Level=7 Rarity=12 Agility=12 Movement Speed=13 Number=One Frequency=Rare Intellect=Obeys Commands Reaction=Command-based Attack Points=Arms:15 (8) Strike Points=16 Evasion Points=14 (7) Defense Points=9 Life Points/Resistance=30/18 (11) Mental Points/Resistance=-/15 (8) Special Abilities=Mental attack immunity Not affected by poison and illness Habitat=Ruins Languages=None Perception=Pseudo _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07441))_

- A flesh golem is a golem made from dead flesh. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07442))_
- Golems are generally slow-moving creatures, but these have relatively flexible and agile bodies among them. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07442))_
- Usually animal products were used, but perhaps because it was the ancient kingdom period, examples made from the bodies of slaves are also frequently seen. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07442))_

- Monster Level=9 Rarity=12 Agility=6 Movement Speed=8 Number=One Frequency=Rare Intellect=Obeys commands Reaction=Command-based Attack Points=Arms:17 (10) Strike Points=19 Evasion Points=14 (7) Defense Points=14 Life Points/Resistance=50/23 (16) Mental Points/Resistance=-/17 (10) Special Abilities=Weapons cannot critical Certain magic resistant Mental attack immunity Not affected by poison and illness Habitat=Ruins _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07444))_
- Languages=None Perception=Pseudo An iron golem is a golem made of iron, and is the slowest of all golems. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07445))_
- Fire-type damage magic is effective, but a critical cannot occur. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07446))_
- Also, damage spells such as cold-type , electric-type , stone-type , poison gas-type , and wind cutter-type are completely useless. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07446))_
- Earthquake-type , explosion-type , and pure energy-type damage magic is effective, and a critical can occur. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07446))_
- Also, damage spells such as cold-type , electric-type , stone-type , poison gas-type , and wind cutter-type are completely useless. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07446))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07446))_

> Against an iron golem, weapons cannot deal additional critical damage.

## Mithril Golem

- Mithril Golems are extremely rare, and only one has been confirmed to exist to date. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07468))_
- Since they're formed from mithril silver, which is hard but lightweight, they can make relatively agile movements, and they also have exceptionally hard bodies and large amounts of life force. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07468))_
- Mithril Golems are extremely rare, and only one has been confirmed to exist to date. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07468))_
- Also, damage spells such as cold-type , electric-type , stone-type , poison gas-type , and wind cutter-type are completely useless. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07469))_
- Earthquake-type , explosion-type , and pure energy-type damage magic is effective, and a critical can occur. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07469))_
- Fire-type damage magic is effective, but a critical cannot occur. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07469))_
- Also, damage spells such as cold-type , electric-type , stone-type , poison gas-type , and wind cutter-type are completely useless. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07469))_

## 13.2.11

## Daemons/Underworld Creatures

## [ Aetherbeast ]

- These are beasts of the daemon world, said to be creatures created by daemons. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07492))_
- They're rarely encountered in the material world, and details of them are not well understood. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07493))_
- Although this data is general, there are many different types of aetherbeasts. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07494))_

## [ Hellhound ]

- Armor cannot protect against this fire; only adventurer level and magical defense can reduce the damage. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07513))_
- Everyone within a 5 meter radius semicircle in front of the hellhound will suffer damage equal to a strike power 10 strike roll plus 5 points of bonus damage. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07513))_
- Hellhounds have a 1 in 6 chance (if you roll 1 on 1D) of breathing fire from their mouths. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07513))_
- Armor cannot protect against this fire; only adventurer level and magical defense can reduce the damage. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07513))_
- Everyone within a 5 meter radius semicircle in front of the hellhound will suffer damage equal to a strike power 10 strike roll plus 5 points of bonus damage. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07513))_

## [ Cerberus ]

- A cerberus is a large black dog with three heads, and is thought to be a variant of the hellhound. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07531))_
- When attacking, it uses all three of its heads to bite the same target at the same time. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07531))_
- It's slightly larger than a hellhound, about as big as a medium-sized horse. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07531))_
- Armor cannot protect against this fire; only adventurer level and magical defense can reduce the damage. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07532))_
- Everyone in a 5 meter radius surrounding the cerberus will suffer damage equal to a strike power 20 strike roll plus bonus damage 8. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07532))_
- If a 1 is rolled on 1D, all three heads will breathe fire at the same time in three different directions. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07532))_
- Armor cannot protect against this fire; only adventurer level and magical defense can reduce the damage. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07532))_
- within underground Fire attacks have no effect on a cerberus. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07533))_
- within underground Fire attacks have no effect on a cerberus. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07533))_

## [ Lesser Daemon ] Grunel

- They seem to have been especially proficient at enchanting, and often carry a magical sword. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07553))_
- A grunel is a humanoid lesser daemon with steel-blue skin. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07553))_
- They can also use dark magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07553))_
- If a grunel has a magic sword, add a bonus of 1 point to both its attack points and strike points. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07553))_
- They have the ability to use ancient magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07553))_

## Zalbard

- Its appearance is almost identical to that of a gargoyle, but its skin is fiery red. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07575))_
- Those attacked by the fire will suffer damage equal to a strike power 10 strike roll plus 5 points of bonus damage. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07575))_
- Its eyes are also bright red, and glow suspiciously. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07575))_
- The zalbard is a lesser daemon that's said to be the model for the gargoyle. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07575))_
- A zalbard's method of attack is the sharp claws on its hands, and it also has the power to breathe magical fire from its mouth. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07575))_
- If you succeed on a resistance roll, strike power becomes 0. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07575))_
- The fire breathed by a zalbard extends in a straight line, making one target within 5 meters its victim. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07575))_
- They have the ability to use dark magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07575))_
- In addition, fire and heat attacks cannot wound a zalbard. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07575))_
- The fire breathed by a zalbard extends in a straight line, making one target within 5 meters its victim. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07575))_

## Doubleburg

- A doubleburg is almost the same size as a human, and its entire body is pitch black. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07593))_
- To shapeshift or shapeshift back requires one full round. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07593))_
- It has a bright red open mouth straight across its face, but no other features. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07593))_
- This daemon has the ability to completely copy any opponent's appearance after just one look, including their clothes. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07593))_
- This daemon has the ability to completely copy any opponent's appearance after just one look, including their clothes. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07593))_
- However, it cannot copy its opponent's abilities and memories. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07594))_
- For example, even though it looks like it's wielding a weapon, it's actually a part of the doubleburg's own body that's been shapeshifted. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07594))_
- Even if it shapeshifts, a doubleburg's score data will not change at all. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07594))_
- For example, even though it looks like it's wielding a weapon, it's actually a part of the doubleburg's own body that's been shapeshifted. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07594))_

> A doubleburg is almost the same size as a human, and its entire body is pitch black. It has a bright red open mouth straight across its face, but no other features. This daemon has the ability to completely copy any opponent's appearance after just one look, including their clothes. If it spends one minute to observe them, it can imitate their tone of speech and gestures exactly. Therefore, it's not possible to discern whether it's the real thing by appearance alone. To shapeshift or shapeshift 

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07591))_

> Languages=Low ancient, languages of the person it shapeshifts into

> A ragnakang is a lesser daemon that looks like an upright dragon. It has wings reminiscent of a giant bat, can reach over 3 meters in height with its neck extended, and uses its long neck to attack by biting. It also uses its strong tail as a weapon. They perform these two attacks at the same time every round. Its sharp fangs contain a powerful poison, and those who fail to resist will immediately suffer damage equal to a strike power 20 strike roll plus 6 points of bonus damage.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07606))_

> [Figure] (p.229)

## Maligdorai

- Its arms come to sharp gimlet-shaped points, and it performs physical attacks by stabbing with them. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07622))_
- The Maligdorai is a daemon whose upper body resembles an owl and lower body the hind legs of a goat, and its entire body is covered in feathers. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07622))_
- As well as wings on its back, it has jointless tentacle-like viscera sprouting from the base of each wing. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07622))_
- The maligdorai can show illusions to surrounding creatures, dealing damage to their minds (these illusions have no effect on monsters that don't have mental points). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07623))_
- They will also be unable to take any actions. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07623))_
- A maligdorai's most frightening ability is illusion . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07623))_
- If the target succeeds, they will escape the effect and can act freely, but if the target fails to resist, they will see an illusion of what they fear as an enemy deep within their heart attacking them, and as a result will suffer strike power 10 + bonus damage 7 damage to their mental power. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07623))_
- If the target succeeds, they will escape the effect and can act freely, but if the target fails to resist, they will see an illusion of what they fear as an enemy deep within their heart attacking them, and as a result will suffer strike power 10 + bonus damage 7 damage to their mental power. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07623))_
- Those being manipulated cannot recover their mental power through sleep or through magic such as Transfer Mental Power . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07624))_
- Also, spells that affect the mind have no effect on those in this state. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07624))_
- To recover from this, you must defeat their master, the maligdorai. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07624))_
- Those who lose all their mental power due to an illusory attack will from then on be turned into a being that can be freely manipulated by the maligdorai. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07624))_
- Those being manipulated cannot recover their mental power through sleep or through magic such as Transfer Mental Power . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07624))_
- Those who lose all their mental power due to an illusory attack will from then on be turned into a being that can be freely manipulated by the maligdorai. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07624))_
- Illusions cannot be used in the round immediately after suffering damage. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07625))_
- A maligdorai can also show illusions to multiple creatures within its vision at the same time, but it must focus in order to perform the illusions. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07625))_
- If its focus is interrupted or it's unable to focus due to making physical attacks, suffering damage, etc., then it cannot maintain its illusions. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07625))_
- Illusions cannot be used in the round immediately after suffering damage. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07625))_
- If its focus is interrupted or it's unable to focus due to making physical attacks, suffering damage, etc., then it cannot maintain its illusions. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07625))_
- A maligdorai can also show illusions to multiple creatures within its vision at the same time, but it must focus in order to perform the illusions. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07625))_

> A maligdorai's most frightening ability is illusion . The maligdorai can show illusions to surrounding creatures, dealing damage to their minds (these illusions have no effect on monsters that don't have mental points). When a maligdorai uses this illusion ability, those being targeted must make a mental power resistance roll against target score 17 at the beginning of the round. If the target succeeds, they will escape the effect and can act freely, but if the target fails to resist, they will 

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07621))_

> Perception=Five senses (Darkvision)

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07623))_

> When a maligdorai uses this illusion ability, those being targeted must make a mental power resistance roll against target score 17 at the beginning of the round.

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07625))_

> A maligdorai can also show illusions to multiple creatures within its vision at the same time, but it must focus in order to perform the illusions. If its focus is interrupted or it's unable to focus due to making physical attacks, suffering damage, etc., then it cannot maintain its illusions. Illusions cannot be used in the round immediately after suffering damage.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07626))_

> Conversely, while the maligdorai is performing an illusion, the target must make a resistance roll against the illusion each round.

## [ Greater Daemons ] Doppelganger

- The doppleganger, which is in the same family as the doubleburg, albeit a greater species, has the appearance of a 3 meter tall giant with an entirely black body. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07645))_
- At a glance, all they can capture is their appearance (including their belongings). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07645))_
- To shapeshift or shapeshift back requires one full round. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07645))_
- Then, if they observe them for over one hour, they will be able to completely copy their abilities and memories. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07645))_
- A doppelganger can copy the appearance, abilities, memories, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07645))_
- Its has a bright red straight open mouth, but no other features besides that. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07645))_
- Then, if they observe them for over one hour, they will be able to completely copy their abilities and memories. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07645))_
- If they transform into a dragon, they can breathe fire, and if they transform into a 10th level fighter, they can fight with their attack power, strike power, and bonus damage. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07646))_
- In addition, a doppelganger can use its own ability, ancient magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07646))_
- However, they cannot use holy magic or dragon roar magic (they can use other magic). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07646))_
- If combat occurs without them shapeshifting, a doppelganger will fight primarily using ancient magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07647))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07628))_

## [ Bandit ]

- Bandits are those who build strongholds in the fields and hills, and make the surrounding area their territory, where they steal from passersby (mainly merchants). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07655))_

## Chief

- Every time the scale of the bandits grows 4 times larger, there will be someone stronger to command them (add +1 to each score). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07711))_
- If the bandits are large enough in scale, there will be more than one chief class with equal power. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07711))_
- This data is for a chief class, who leads about 20 followers. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07711))_
- If the scale reaches 80 people or more, there will be an even stronger boss. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07711))_
- Please consider the standard ratio of henchmen : leaders : chiefs to be 16 : 4 : 1. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07711))_
- In this case, the ratio of henchmen : leaders : chiefs : bosses should be 64 : 16 : 4 : 1. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07711))_
- This boss's scores should equal the total scores of a chief +1 . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07711))_
- For a group of bandits with 300 to 400 members, the leader's monster level should be 5, for more than 1000, it should be 6, for more than 5000, it should be 7......etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07711))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07693))_

## Senior Soldier

- These are soldiers who guard major locations or command small groups. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07749))_
- Most of these soldiers were promoted from normal soldiers and are also much older. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07749))_

## [ Dark Priest Warrior ]

- Many are also trained as warriors as part of the doctrine of Phalaris. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07784))_
- Since the teachings of the dark gods are what one would call evil , this is likely unavoidable. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07784))_
- Priests who serve the wicked gods (mainly Phalaris) will often appear as enemies of the player characters. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07784))_

## Beginner Priest

- Monster Level=1 Rarity=10 Agility=12 Movement Speed=12 Number=One to several Frequency=Rare Intellect=Human Reaction=Depends on the situation Attack Points=Weapon:8 (1) Strike Points=5 Evasion Points=9 (2) Defense Points=4 Life Points/Resistance=12/9 (2) Mental Points/Resistance=12/9 (2) Special Abilities=1st level dark magic (magic intensity/magic power=10/3) Habitat=Human villages Languages=Regional _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07786))_

## 13.2.13 Other

## [ Lycanthrope ]

- Magic and skills cannot be used. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07810))_
- A Lycanthrope is a monster with the ability to change from human to beast form. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07810))_
- When in beast form, they cannot act intelligently, but rather follow their instincts and go on killing sprees. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07810))_
- When the number of days is 16 or more, compare it with 30 - the number of days (the waxing and waning of the moon in Forcelia is one cycle every 30 days). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07811))_
- Shapeshifting is affected by the waxing and waning of the moon. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07811))_
- There may be some hiding their true identity and living among humans in towns and villages, but when their time comes, they're likely to take odd actions to hide their transformations. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07813))_
- Lycanthropes have the ability to summon and control other beasts of their kind in their surroundings (wolves for werewolves, bears for werebears, etc.). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07813))_
- Lycanthropy is a type of infectious illness, and those who are wounded by a lycanthrope in beast form are at risk of becoming a lycanthrope of the same species. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07814))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07810))_

> When in human form, they may acquire and use various skills, including magic, just like an adventurer.

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07810))_

> A Lycanthrope is a monster with the ability to change from human to beast form. When in human form, they may acquire and use various skills, including magic, just like an adventurer. When in beast form, they cannot act intelligently, but rather follow their instincts and go on killing sprees. Magic and skills cannot be used. The game master can decide on a lycanthrope's abilities while in human form (however, it should basically only have acquired skills up to its monster level), or use the fixe

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07811))_

> When the score is equal to or less than this, the lycanthrope will always enter beast form (the lycanthrope will always enter beast form on nights when the moon is full = 15 days).

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07810))_

> A Lycanthrope is a monster with the ability to change from human to beast form. When in human form, they may acquire and use various skills, including magic, just like an adventurer. When in beast form, they cannot act intelligently, but rather follow their instincts and go on killing sprees. Magic and skills cannot be used. The game master can decide on a lycanthrope's abilities while in human form (however, it should basically only have acquired skills up to its monster level), or use the fixe

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07812))_

> Even when it's not, a lycanthrope can transform into a beast at their own will.

## Converting Character Data to Monster Data

- There are two advantages to doing this. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07865))_
- Using the rules presented here, a game master can convert data created as a character into the format of a monster . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07865))_

## [ 1. The number of times the game master has to roll dice during combat will be drastically reduced ]

- The game master will be freed from the labor of rolling dice, and will be able to manage enemy data in combat more easily. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07867))_
- It'll also give you more time to provide guidance to players who are unfamiliar with the rules. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07867))_
- This is especially effective when there are many enemies. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07868))_

## [ 2. Enemy strike rolls can no longer critical ]

- This is because it's a process that cannot be dealt with by the player. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07870))_
- If you change the enemy character's data to that of a monster , the damage will be a fixed score called strike points , so this kind of frustration should be less frequent. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07870))_
- This is because it's a process that cannot be dealt with by the player. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07870))_
- Rarity seems unnecessary, so we'll omit it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07874))_
- Agility and movement speed use the character's agility ability score as it is. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07875))_
- Attack points are the character's attack power + 7 . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07876))_
- For strike points , apply strike power to Table 13-1: Key Number = Expected Equivalents , then add bonus damage to the result. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07877))_
- For strike points , apply strike power to Table 13-1: Key Number = Expected Equivalents , then add bonus damage to the result. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07877))_
- A weretiger is a lycanthrope with the power to shapeshift into a tiger. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07878))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07870))_

> If an enemy's strike roll is a critical, resulting in heavy damage or even death, the player may feel frustrated that they've been killed by a roll of the dice .

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07870))_

> If an enemy's strike roll is a critical, resulting in heavy damage or even death, the player may feel frustrated that they've been killed by a roll of the dice . This is because it's a process that cannot be dealt with by the player. If you change the enemy character's data to that of a monster , the damage will be a fixed score called strike points , so this kind of frustration should be less frequent.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07871))_

> Table 13-1: Key Number = Expected Equivalents

## 13.4

- Equivalents table (No Critical), then add adventurer level to the result. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07901))_
- Equivalents table (No Critical), then add adventurer level to the result. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07901))_
- Life points and mental points use the ability scores life force and mental power as they are. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07902))_

## Representing Special Monsters with Character Data

- Among monsters, there are some that have inherently strong individual differences. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07907))_
- Here, in order to represent monsters such as featherfolk, mermen, dark elves, noble lizardmen, and centaurs as characters, we'll show how to calculate the sub-ability scores of each monster ( Table 13-2: Determining Monster SubAbility Scores ). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07908))_
- Here, in order to represent monsters such as featherfolk, mermen, dark elves, noble lizardmen, and centaurs as characters, we'll show how to calculate the sub-ability scores of each monster ( Table 13-2: Determining Monster SubAbility Scores ). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07908))_
- These rules were not designed with the idea of playing monsters as characters in mind. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07909))_

## 13.5

## Monster Level and Adventurer Level

- A monster level's score is basically set so that if it's equal to a character's adventurer level, the character will be stronger. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07913))_
- A monster's monster level is a rough guide to its strength when it appears in a scenario. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07913))_
- If they're 1-2 levels higher, you'll be evenly matched, and if they're 3 levels higher, they'll be a formidable enemy. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07913))_
- When introducing them into a scenario, assume that enemies of the same or 1 level lower than a character's adventurer level will appear frequently, while an enemy of 2-3 levels greater will appear at the climax. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07914))_
- A noble lizardman's entire body is covered in scales which adds +5 to defense power. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07915))_
- Of course, combat balance will vary depending on the special abilities of the monsters and the composition of the Note: A dark elf can add +4 to mental power resistance due to the blessings of the dark gods. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07915))_
- between characters, if the attacker and the evader have the same final scores, the attack will fail , but between a character and a monster , the attack will hit . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07918))_
- This is the same reason why resistance score is calculated with +8. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07918))_
- In particular, monsters that use magic are, without exception, more formidable enemies than their level suggests. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07919))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07916))_

> Table 13-3: Monster Level/Event Scale Comparisons

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07917))_

> Table 13-2: Determining Monster Sub-Ability Scores

## 13.6

- The monster level of a monster can also be used as a scale to express the size of an event ( Table 13-3: Monster Level/Event Scale Comparisons ). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07921))_
- A 3rd level dark priest is a level that would be too spicy for a novice adventurer . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07922))_
- In the case of NPCs as enemies, consider them to be two levels greater. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07922))_

## Handling Monster Special Abilities

- Some monsters have numerous special abilities. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07925))_

## 13.6.1

## 《 Magic 》

- Those with this ability often have an intellect equal to or greater than that of a human, and although they have their own preferences for which magic they use, they do not use it foolishly. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07929))_
- Monsters with this ability can use magic at the indicated level and magic intensity (magic power). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07929))_

## 《 Hypnotism 》

- This is the ability to hypnotize opponents. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07931))_
- If you fail, you'll be manipulated at your opponent's will. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07931))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07931))_

> The targeted character must make a mental power resistance roll against the indicated target score.

## 《 Gaze/Ray 》

- If you fail, you'll suffer the effects as indicated. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07933))_
- In some cases, the gaze or ray can be reflected off a mirror, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07934))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07933))_

> The targeted character must make a mental power resistance roll against the indicated target score.

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07933))_

> This attacks opponents with a gaze or a ray. The targeted character must make a mental power resistance roll against the indicated target score. If you fail, you'll suffer the effects as indicated.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07934))_

> but if this is not specified, it cannot be reflected.

## 《 Possess 》

- This is an ability that is used by undead monsters collectively referred to as haunts. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07936))_
- If you fail, your body will be possessed. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07936))_
- A haunt who has possessed a body can also use that character's abilities. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07936))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07936))_

> The targeted character must make a mental power resistance roll against the indicated target score.

## 《 Curse 》

- There are various types of curses. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07938))_
- There are several processes by which a curse can be brought about (such as normal physical attacks, by gaze, etc.), but in all cases you must ultimately make a mental power resistance roll against a set target score. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07938))_
- If you fail, you will be affected by the curse. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07938))_
- This is an attack method that brings disaster to those involved. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07938))_
- There are several processes by which a curse can be brought about (such as normal physical attacks, by gaze, etc.), but in all cases you must ultimately make a mental power resistance roll against a set target score. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07938))_

## 《 Scream 》

- At this time, if you roll double ones on the resistance roll, your life force will immediately become 0. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07941))_
- Furthermore, those who fail the resistance roll must make another one, this time a life force resistance roll, and if he or she fails, he or she will lose his or her hearing. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07941))_
- At this time, if you roll double ones on the resistance roll, you will immediately go mad and become disabled. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07941))_

> In the case of mandrake and alraune, you cannot attack or cast spells for one full round, and you will suffer a -4 penalty to evasion.

## 《 Roar 》

- This is the dragon's special ability, to let out a roar that trembles the souls of those who hear it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07943))_
- It has no effect unless you hear it, but everyone who does hear it must make a mental power resistance roll. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07943))_
- It has no effect unless you hear it, but everyone who does hear it must make a mental power resistance roll. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07943))_

## 《 Fire Breath 》

- Characters exposed to the fire (the range of the fire varies by monster) will suffer damage. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07945))_
- Monsters with this ability can breathe fire. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07945))_
- This damage cannot be prevented by armor, it can only be reduced by adventurer level and magical defense. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07945))_
- This damage cannot be prevented by armor, it can only be reduced by adventurer level and magical defense. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07945))_

> You must also make a mental power resistance roll against the indicated target score, which if successful will result in a smaller amount of damage.

## 《 Stone/Wind Cutter 》

- In other words, a strike roll damage check is made, and a successful mental power resistance roll will reduce strike power and prevent a critical from occurring. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07947))_
- The spirits, gnome and sylph, have this ability, and it's treated as damage magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07947))_

## 《 Disintegrate 》

- The spirits, will-o-wisps and shade, will disintegrate upon the slightest shock (for instance, by bumping into a character, etc.). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07949))_
- At this time, the character will suffer damage to both their life force and mental power. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07949))_
- In other words, a strike roll damage check is made, and a successful mental power resistance roll will reduce strike power and prevent a critical from occurring. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07949))_
- This is treated as damage magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07949))_

## 13.6.2

## 《 Poison 》

- Among monsters, there are some that carry a variety of poisons. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07953))_
- Unless it's a poison that applies immediately (mainly damage), it can be treated with the holy magic Cure Poison or Refresh , or the spirit magic Restore Health . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07953))_
- Unless it's a poison that applies immediately (mainly damage), it can be treated with the holy magic Cure Poison or Refresh , or the spirit magic Restore Health . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07953))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07953))_

> When attacked by these monsters, you must make a life force resistance roll, using the indicated toxicity score as the target score.

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07953))_

> Among monsters, there are some that carry a variety of poisons. When attacked by these monsters, you must make a life force resistance roll, using the indicated toxicity score as the target score. If you fail, you'll suffer an effect depending on the poison. Unless it's a poison that applies immediately (mainly damage), it can be treated with the holy magic Cure Poison or Refresh , or the spirit magic Restore Health .

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07955))_

> In the case of a poison that deals damage, if the resist is successful, then unless it's specified that no damage will be dealt, the effect will not be completely removed, it will merely reduce the strike power by 10 (and prevent criticals).

## 《 Parasitism 》

- If you fail, your body will be taken over. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07957))_
- Among monsters, some can affect a character's central nervous system and take over their body. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07957))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07957))_

> If you're attacked by a monster with this ability, you must make a life force resistance roll against the indicated target score.

## 13.6.3 Special Attacks: Other

## 《 Disease 》

- The spirit power of a monster is balanced differently than that of a human, and can always cause illness. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07960))_
- However, in most cases the infection power of this information imbalance is weak, so it doesn't pose much of a problem, but if a character is bitten by a bat or rat, it's highly contagious, so there's a high chance he or she will become ill. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07960))_
- Illnesses can be treated using the holy magic Cure Disease and Refresh , and the spirit magic Restore Health . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07961))_
- If your roll is less than the progression intensity, you will be infected with the disease. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07961))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07961))_

> When you're dealt damage by a monster with this ability, roll 2D and compare it with the progression intensity of each illness.

## 《 Strangling 》

- If an attack with this ability is successful, then in subsequent rounds, the character will remain strangled, and the only thing he or she can do is try to escape. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07964))_
- This is an ability that many monsters have. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07964))_
- If an attack with this ability is successful, then in subsequent rounds, the character will remain strangled, and the only thing he or she can do is try to escape. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07964))_
- To escape, make a success roll using adventurer level + strength bonus as the baseline score. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07965))_
- The attack points of the attack is the target score (or the attack points of the hit , if using the optional rule to give monsters variance in attack points). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07965))_
- This is treated as normal damage, so it's possible to reduce it due to armor. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07965))_
- Depending on the monster, the penalty may be smaller, or it might be possible to still make sound, but if this is the case it'll be specified in the description . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07966))_
- Unless otherwise noted, the evasion penalty is 4 and magic is also considered not possible. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07966))_
- While being strangled, a character suffers a -4 penalty to evasion and is normally unable to make sound. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07966))_
- Unless otherwise noted, the evasion penalty is 4 and magic is also considered not possible. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07966))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07964))_

> This is an ability that many monsters have. If an attack with this ability is successful, then in subsequent rounds, the character will remain strangled, and the only thing he or she can do is try to escape.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07965))_

> If you succeed, you can break free, but if you fail, you'll automatically suffer damage at the end of the round.

## 《 Capture 》

- Normally you cannot move while captured, but in some special cases, this rule may be limited. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07969))_
- Normally you cannot move while captured, but in some special cases, this rule may be limited. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07969))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07969))_

> To escape, you must make the same check as for strangling .

## 《 Entangling 》

- When a thread is cut, damage will also be applied to the entangled character at the same time. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07972))_
- In the case of the giant webspinner, which is a typical monster that performs this attack, it' s almost impossible to cut the thread. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07972))_
- Each time you fail, you'll normally become more and more entangled, and the target score will increase each time. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07972))_
- If the difference between the baseline score and the target score reaches 13 or greater, the character will be unable to escape on his or her own, and will eventually suffocate to death. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07972))_
- Whether or not another can rescue them, by attacking or burning the thread, depends on the monster. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07972))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07972))_

> The character must make a success roll using adventurer level + strength bonus as the baseline score in order to escape.

## 《 Swallow Whole 》

- In this case, make a hit check with a penalty of attack power -4 , and if it hits, make a damage check as normal. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07974))_
- A swallowed character cannot escape until the monster is dead. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07974))_
- Thus, during this time he or she will continue to suffer the set amount of damage (which can only be reduced by adventurer level) each round. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07974))_
- Thus, during this time he or she will continue to suffer the set amount of damage (which can only be reduced by adventurer level) each round. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07974))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07974))_

> A swallowed character can also attack from inside, if he or she has a dagger, shortsword, or similar small bladed weapon.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07975))_

> If you make an attack from outside to rescue a character inside, and kill the monster, (the same amount of) damage will be dealt to the character inside.

## 《 Bloodsuck 》

- This damage cannot be reduced by armor, only adventurer level and magical defense can help. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07977))_
- At this time, the monster is eating the character. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07977))_

## 《 Corrosion 》

- This damage cannot be reduced by armor, only adventurer level and magical defense can help. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07981))_
- This damage cannot be reduced by armor, only adventurer level and magical defense can help. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07981))_

- This damage cannot be reduced by armor, only adventurer level and magical defense can help. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07984))_
- At the same time a normal attack hits, mental power will also be damaged. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07984))_

- This damage cannot be reduced by armor, only adventurer level and magical defense can help. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07984))_

## 《 Iron Corrosion 》

- Life force will not be damaged, but metal weapons and armor will suffer damage, and become worn out and useless after a certain amount of time. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07986))_
- Silver and magic weapons and armor are usually not affected. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07986))_

## 13.6.4

## 《 Physical Attack Immunity 》

- It's also not affected by poison and illness. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07990))_
- Since it has no substance, it has no life points, so any attack methods that deal damage to life points (weapons, damage magic, etc.) are ineffective. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07990))_
- You cannot touch this kind of monster directly, but it is possible to cast spells with a distance of touch . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07991))_

## 《 Weapon Immunity 》

- Attacks with weapons, no matter how powerful they are, or even if they're magical weapons, will have no effect at all. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07993))_

## 《 Normal Weapon Immunity 》

- A silver or magical weapon is needed to defeat them. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07995))_
- In the case of combat between monsters, if a monster can also only be wounded by silver or magical weapons, or has a greater monster level than its opponent, it can deal damage to such a monster. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07995))_
- In the case of combat between monsters, if a monster can also only be wounded by silver or magical weapons, or has a greater monster level than its opponent, it can deal damage to such a monster. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07995))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07995))_

> Normal weapons, no matter how powerful, cannot deal damage.

## 《 Complete Immunity to Certain Weapons 》

- Attacks with the indicated weapon, no matter how powerful or magical it is, will have no effect at all. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07997))_
- There are types of weapons that are completely ineffective due to their form, material, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07997))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07997))_

> Even in combat between monsters, if an opponent monster's attack method is equivalent to an ineffective weapon, it will not deal damage.

## 《 Weapons Cannot Critical 》

- Weapons do not deal additional damage from criticals. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-07999))_

## 《 Certain Weapons Cannot Critical 》

- Attacks with the indicated weapon, no matter how powerful or magical it is, will never cause a critical. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08001))_
- There are weapons that cannot deliver effective strikes due to their form, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08001))_

- you will not suffer this penalty. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08003))_

- They have keen perception and react very well to approaching weapons, etc., or can move quickly through the air. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08005))_

## 《 Water Adaptation 》

- 139), but monsters with this ability can act underwater without any penalty. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08007))_

## 《 Ice Adaptation 》

- Characters suffer a -2 penalty to attack and evasion, even if they're equipped for ice. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08010))_

## 《 Snow Adaptation 》

- Characters suffer a -2 penalty to attack and evasion, even if they're equipped for snow and cold. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08012))_

- Therefore, they can never be put to sleep by magic, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08018))_
- They do not require rest or sleep in the usual sense. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08018))_

## 《 Certain Magic Resistant 》

- Please refer to each monster's description for further details. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08022))_
- This primarily means that damage magic cannot cause criticals. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08022))_
- This primarily means that damage magic cannot cause criticals. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08022))_

## 《 Fire Immunity 》

- Fire attacks are completely ineffective. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08024))_
- Magic that deals damage with fire ( Fire Bolt and Fireball ) is completely useless, and the strike power bonus of Fire Weapon is also not added. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08024))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08024))_

> If one of these monsters also has the ability normal weapon immunity , it cannot be wounded by a weapon that had Fire Weapon cast on it.

## 《 Strong to Fire 》

- However, strike power will be 0. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08026))_
- Resistant to fire attacks, so for magic that deals damage with fire ( Fire Bolt and Fireball ), checks are made at -10 to strike power (the strike power bonus of Fire Weapon is completely ineffective). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08026))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08026))_

> Even if one of these monsters has the ability normal weapon immunity , it can still be wounded by a weapon that had Fire Weapon cast on it.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08027))_

> If you cast magic with a strike power of 10 on one of these monsters, such as Fire Bolt , and they resist it, you cannot make a strike roll and the damage dealt will only be magic power .

## 《 Cold Immunity 》

- Magic that deals damage with cold ( Ice Storm , etc.) is completely useless, Ice Coffin and Freeze are also ineffective. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08029))_
- Cold-type attacks are completely ineffective. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08029))_

## 《 Strong to Cold 》

- Resistant to cold-type attacks, so for magic that deals damage with cold ( Ice Storm , etc.), checks are made at -10 to strike power. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08031))_
- Cold-based magic that does not deal damage ( Ice Coffin and Freeze ) will still take their usual effects. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08031))_
- In addition to these, if it says XX immunity , it' s completely useless, and if it says strong to XX , damage magic checks are made at -10 to strike power. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08032))_

## 13.6.6

## 《 Life Point Regenerate 》

- The indicated number of life points will automatically regenerate each round. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08036))_
- Most die as is, but some are special, such as vampires. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08036))_
- Most die as is, but some are special, such as vampires. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08036))_

## 《 Regenerate 》

- The hydra has the ability to regenerate even if its heads are cut off. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08038))_
- At the same time its life points are recovered, its number of attacks will also be restored. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08038))_

## 《 Not Affected by Poison and Illness 》

- These monsters are not affected by poison and illness. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08040))_
- Ancient magic that alters the atmosphere ( XX Cloud ) is also ineffective. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08040))_
- Certain mythical beasts, magical beasts, undead powered by negative life, and pseudo-life forms created by magic, are free from poison and illness. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08040))_

## 《 Camouflage 》

- Monsters with this ability disguise themselves in a particular way, wait for a victim to approach, then strike when he or she is not careful. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08042))_
- From the second round onwards, it'll be normal combat. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08042))_
- To discover this, you must succeed on a resistance roll against the indicated target score using ranger skill level + intelligence bonus as the baseline score. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08042))_
- Monsters with this ability disguise themselves in a particular way, wait for a victim to approach, then strike when he or she is not careful. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08042))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08042))_

> If you fail, you'll suffer a surprise attack , with a -4 penalty to your evasion speed for one round, and you cannot counterattack or use magic.

## 《 Shapeshift 》

- It has the ability to shapeshift. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08044))_
- This completely changes its appearance, so unless something stands out, it cannot be discovered with the sage's knowledge or the ranger's plant and animal check . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08044))_
- This completely changes its appearance, so unless something stands out, it cannot be discovered with the sage's knowledge or the ranger's plant and animal check . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08044))_

## 《 Clairvoyance 》

- The mythical beast lynx has a sharp clairvoyance ability. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08046))_
- Please note that this ability does not mean it'll be able to see behind it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08046))_
- he or she will be discovered instantly. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08046))_

## 《 Summon 》

- It has the ability to summon monsters of the same or different species. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08048))_
- It can revive something that's already fallen, or summon from across space. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08048))_
- This ability can be used even while performing other attacks, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08048))_

## 《 Web 》

- Otherwise, you'll suffer a penalty based on the strength of the web. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08050))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08050))_

> If a character inadvertently steps into it, he or she must make a resistance roll using adventurer level + agility bonus as the baseline score, and if he or she fails they'll be caught in the web.

## 13.6.7 Special Defense Abilities: Weaknesses

- Different monsters have different weaknesses against certain kinds of attacks. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08052))_

## 《 Needs Bloodsucking to Maintain Life Points 》

- It' s treated as a weakness, but takes the form of an inconvenient habit. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08054))_
- In order to maintain its life points, a lamia must suck human blood. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08054))_

## 《 Needs Bloodsucking to Maintain Mental Points 》

- Otherwise, it'll gradually lose its mental points and eventually perish. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08056))_
- In order to maintain its mental points, a vampire must suck human blood. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08056))_
- It's treated as a weakness, but takes the form of an inconvenient habit. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08056))_

## 《 Damage From Healing Magic 》

- Undead that act with negative life force will suffer damage from healing magic that grants positive life force. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08058))_
- They will suffer damage from Cure Wounds , and if Healing or Refresh are cast on them and they fail to resist, their life points will immediately become 0. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08058))_

## 《 Weak to Fire 》

- This is a weakness seen in plant-type monsters, dry monsters, and monsters that live in cold regions. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08060))_
- They're weak to fire, so checks are made at +10 to strike power when using fire attacks. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08060))_
- In addition, for any other Weak to XX , checks against damage magic are made at +10 to strike power. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08061))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08060))_

> In the case of Fire Bolt , make a strike power 20 damage check (10 if the monster successfully resists), and in the case of Fire Weapon , add a +20 strike power bonus to the weapon.

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08060))_

In the case of Fire Bolt , make a strike power 20 damage check (10 if the monster successfully resists), and in the case of Fire Weapon , add a +20 strike power bonus to the weapon.
