## Chapter 14:

## 14.1

## Treasure and Rewards in Sword World

- Think of the adventurers of Alecrast as basically on an adventure to search for treasure lying untouched in the ruins of the ancient kingdom. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08069))_
- The thing to remember here is that, in reality, neither silver nor gold coins existed in the ancient kingdom. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08069))_
- Enormous amounts of riches lie in the ruins that make a profession like theirs viable. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08069))_
- Many of the treasures found in the ruins of the ancient kingdom consist of handicrafts such as gems, precious metals, wares, works of art, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08069))_
- Therefore, unless they were brought in after coins were invented, no such coins are buried in the ruins of the ancient kingdom. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08069))_
- Many of the treasures found in the ruins of the ancient kingdom consist of handicrafts such as gems, precious metals, wares, works of art, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08069))_
- Therefore, unless they were brought in after coins were invented, no such coins are buried in the ruins of the ancient kingdom. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08069))_

## 14.2

- Much of the magic from the ancient kingdom period has been lost, so these items permanently imbued with magic cannot be produced in the present day. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08072))_
- However, unlike normal treasures, it's not possible to appraise these goods unless you take them to a specialty shop, so they will likely not be purchased. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08072))_
- Typical adventurers in Alecrast use one adventurer's shop as their base for adventure, thereupon gathering information about the ruins of the ancient kingdom, then setting off after readying their equipment, making their living selling the spoils. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08072))_
- Shops like these are generally called adventurer's shops , they buy and sell equipment for adventures, and also double as taverns, used as places to exchange information regarding adventures. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08072))_
- Therefore, these goods are extremely valuable and can be traded at high prices. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08072))_
- In some larger towns, there are shops that buy and sell these treasures from the ancient kingdom. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08072))_
- However, unlike normal treasures, it's not possible to appraise these goods unless you take them to a specialty shop, so they will likely not be purchased. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08072))_
- Typical adventurers in Alecrast use one adventurer's shop as their base for adventure, thereupon gathering information about the ruins of the ancient kingdom, then setting off after readying their equipment, making their living selling the spoils. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08072))_
- Therefore, these goods are extremely valuable and can be traded at high prices. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08072))_
- It' s also fine for a reward to be a kiss from a beautiful maiden, or some sort of special knowledge or information. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08073))_
- Due to their combat power and magic, and also their familiarity with various techniques, adventurers may also be hired as handymen in towns and villages. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08073))_

## Adventure Treasure and Reward Amounts

- However, the rewards obtained from an adventure should comply with the level of risk. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08076))_
- The opposite can also result in players losing their motivation. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08076))_
- What kind of rewards should be given for an adventure is ultimately up to the game master. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08076))_
- To determine the value (upper limit) of the treasure that can be obtained in terms of silver coins, multiply the adventurer levels of all the player characters, then multiply the total by 500. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08077))_
- To determine the value (upper limit) of the treasure that can be obtained in terms of silver coins, multiply the adventurer levels of all the player characters, then multiply the total by 500. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08077))_
- Game masters should be aware of how much property and equipment the player characters have. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08078))_
- Of course, depending on the contents of the scenario and the actions of the player characters, it's fine to introduce unexpected treasure, or to even have an adventure that results in a deficit. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08078))_
- Of course, depending on the contents of the scenario and the actions of the player characters, it's fine to introduce unexpected treasure, or to even have an adventure that results in a deficit. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08078))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08076))_

> If you could obtain a large amount of treasure through an easy adventure, that would take the fun out of the game.

## 14.2.1 Negotiations With Adventurers

- Please consider the estimated reward for asking an adventurer to resolve a case to be around 50~200 times the (total of) each adventurer level. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08080))_
- For a party consisting of three 2nd level characters and two 3rd level characters, the estimated reward is around (2 x 2 x 3 + 3 x 3 x 2) x 50~200 = 1500~6000 gamels total. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08080))_
- Even if there's variation in level between the party, please make sure the rewards presented are equal per person. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08081))_
- Rune masters tend to be lower level, but that doesn't mean they're any less useful than other characters. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08081))_
- A 3rd level character would not be presented 450~1800 gamels nor would a 2nd level character be presented 200~800 gamels. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08081))_
- In the above example, the reward presented would be 300~1200 gamels per person. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08081))_
- Such behavior would result in lost trust and likely void the agreement. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08082))_
- If it's shorter, there'll be less of a reward, and if it's longer, there'll be more. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08082))_
- Of course, this does not mean that the reward will increase if the adventurer intentionally delays the resolution. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08082))_
- This reward is basically for a case that's expected to be resolved in one day, or 3~4 days at most. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08082))_
- If you fail to resolve the case, you will not be paid the remaining money. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08083))_
- In these contracts, 10~30% is given upfront as an advance payment. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08083))_

## 14.3

## Treasure Types

- Here are some easy examples regarding the types of treasure you can obtain in Sword World. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08087))_
- Artwork includes paintings, sculptures, and ornaments as well as vases and daily necessities, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08088))_

## Gems and Precious Metals

- This kind of treasure can be judged as treasure or junk by using the thief skill and sage skill's treasure appraisal ability. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08090))_
- Naturally, merchants who deal with this kind of item can also determine the price. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08090))_
- This refers to wares and handicrafts, etc., made from gems and precious metals. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08090))_
- These include crowns, rings, brooches, earrings, necklaces, bracelets, etc., and other accessories that are made with gems or precious metals. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08090))_
- This refers to wares and handicrafts, etc., made from gems and precious metals. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08090))_
- The lowest value is 10 silver coins, and the highest quality are worth around 10,000 silver coins. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08091))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08090))_

> If you spend enough time, you can determine a specific price.

## Artwork

- These are works of art created during the ancient kingdom period, and while their artistic value is great, you can say their antique value is even greater. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08093))_
- They're not appreciated among those who don't understand art, so outside adventurer's shops, the only buyers are wealthy merchants, high-status nobility, and royalty. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08093))_
- Of course, they have no practical value. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08093))_
- They're not appreciated among those who don't understand art, so outside adventurer's shops, the only buyers are wealthy merchants, high-status nobility, and royalty. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08093))_

## 14.4

- These items can be discerned as treasure and their specific value can be determined by using the thief skill and sage skill's treasure appraisal ability. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08095))_
- Their value is equivalent to at least 100 silver coins, and if they're expensive, their value will skyrocket. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08096))_

## Magical Items

- There are many different types of these. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08098))_
- It's safe to assume that these items, which have lasted to this day without rusting, were endowed with permanent magical power by the sorcerers of the ancient kingdom. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08098))_
- For example, those called Flying Carpet or Sealing Jar . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08099))_
- You can also see handicrafts that have magical power. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08099))_
- For example, those called Flying Carpet or Sealing Jar . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08099))_
- which contain magical power, and have the same effect as a spell when commanded by words (high or low ancient). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08100))_
- All you need is to remember one simple word, or two or three words at most. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08100))_
- Those activated by commands in low ancient can be handled by anyone- even those who cannot speak low ancient. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08100))_
- These things are of immeasurable value to adventurers. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08100))_
- There are also staves, rods, wands, rings, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08100))_

## Magical Item List

- When adventurers sell them to an adventurer's shop or an academy of sages , they're usually accepted at half this price. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08103))_
- Here is a list of magical items commonly seen in Alecrast. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08103))_
- Of course, these are just examples, and the game master is free to create all sorts of other magical items. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08103))_
- The base trade price is the price if an adventurer is lucky enough to be able to buy it (though such opportunities are rare). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08103))_
- It' s fine if the game master chooses to only allow adventurers to pay for these items when the setting is in these cities. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08104))_
- In Lomar , the Kingdom of Travelers , there is a huge market called the black market , where magical items are said to be traded. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08104))_
- Magical weapons and armor are also said to be similarly sold in Reide , the City of Mercenaries , also located in Lomar. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08104))_
- Magical weapons and armor are also said to be similarly sold in Reide , the City of Mercenaries , also located in Lomar. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08104))_
- It' s fine if the game master chooses to only allow adventurers to pay for these items when the setting is in these cities. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08104))_
- However, those with commands in high ancient can only be handled by those who have the sorcerer skill. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08105))_
- High ancient has complex rules and restrictions, which make it difficult (and in some cases, extremely dangerous) to speak aloud without understanding _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08105))_
- However, those with commands in high ancient can only be handled by those who have the sorcerer skill. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08105))_
- These magical treasures can be understood through spells such as Sense Magic , etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08106))_
- and their specific power can be appraised using Analyze Enchantment . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08106))_
- Even the cheapest ones cost as much as 1000 silver coins, and if they're expensive you can't even put a price on them. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08106))_
- These magical treasures can be understood through spells such as Sense Magic , etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08106))_
- If you're a sage who can read ancient, you can discover the specific value and cost of these items using the treasure appraisal ability. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08107))_
- Of course, in many cases the value of these treasures cannot be converted into a price. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08108))_
- For adventurers, magical swords and armor are not something you can give up. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08108))_
- The final value of the treasure is determined entirely by the player character (although it might not necessarily match the NPC's). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08108))_
- However, even then, you should not be able to get your hands on items that are too powerful. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08109))_
- However, even then, you should not be able to get your hands on items that are too powerful. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08109))_

> These magical treasures can be understood through spells such as Sense Magic , etc. and their specific power can be appraised using Analyze Enchantment . Even the cheapest ones cost as much as 1000 silver coins, and if they're expensive you can't even put a price on them.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08107))_

> Also, even if there's no magical power, books and scrolls may contain high ancient spellbooks or valuable information about the culture of the ancient kingdom, so don't ever treat them lightly.

## 14.4.1 How to Read Item

## Details

## Sword World RPG: Complete Edition Rulebook

- This is the rulebook for Sword World RPG: Complete Edition . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08117))_
- First, the name of the item will be introduced in large print. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08118))_
- Next, there are several game data entries, and a description at the end. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08118))_

## 《 Rarity 》

- This frequently happens with cursed items, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08120))_
- If the success roll results in a final score greater than or equal to this rarity, you will discover the true identity of the treasure. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08120))_
- This score is the target score for a success roll when using the sage skill's treasure appraisal ability. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08120))_
- In this case, the treasure appraisal may be incomplete depending on the attained final score. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08120))_
- However, some treasures may have more than one listed rarity. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08120))_
- If the success roll results in a final score greater than or equal to this rarity, you will discover the true identity of the treasure. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08120))_

## 《 Form 》

## 《 Enchanter 》

- Magical items are always endowed with magical powers. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08124))_
- The enchanter's name is written here. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08124))_

## 《 Base Trade Price 》

- This is the price at which the item is traded. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08126))_
- If an adventurer sells it, the standard price is half this amount. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08126))_
- If the item is marked as (not for sale), the item is extremely dangerous, is a family heirloom, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08127))_
- and for these reasons will never be traded. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08127))_
- You can't even sell dangerous items because there are no buyers. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08128))_
- At best, an academy of sages might take it for 1/10th the price. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08128))_
- You can't even sell dangerous items because there are no buyers. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08128))_
- If it's marked (estimated), the true abilities of the item are not clear, so the price is inferred based on generally understood abilities. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08129))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08128))_

> You can't even sell dangerous items because there are no buyers. At best, an academy of sages might take it for 1/10th the price. If it's an heirloom and not for sale, you're likely to find a similar case.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08126))_

> If it's for sale, adventurers can buy it at the price shown here.

## 《 Powers 》

## 《 Description 》

- If the description written in the Powers section is sufficient, this may be omitted. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08133))_
- After a brief introduction of game data, a detailed description of the item is written. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08133))_
- After a brief introduction of game data, a detailed description of the item is written. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08133))_
- A (supplement) is an episode related to the item that's not directly related to the game. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08134))_

## 《 Other 》

- The meaning of these special entries becomes obvious when you consider what the item is like. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08136))_
- Depending on the item, other entries may be included in the data section. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08136))_
- For example, for weapons and armor, an entry called Required Strength will appear. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08136))_
- For example, for weapons and armor, an entry called Required Strength will appear. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08136))_

## 《 Undead Ruler 》

- Rarity=18 Enchanter=Jagrilis, "The Master of Death" Form=Mage's staff engraved with ancient runes Required Strength=5 (Strike power 10) Base Trade Price=400,000 gamels (complete)/27,000 gamels (incomplete) Powers=+1 to attack power and bonus damage. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08162))_
- If the score exceeds the target undead monster's mental point resistance, they will obey. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08163))_
- This staff grants its owner the power to make undead monsters obey. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08163))_
- This staff can only be used by sorcerers. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08165))_
- This staff can only be used by sorcerers. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08165))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08163))_

> When the staff is incomplete , the undead monsters that can be made to obey are limited to those whose total monster level is less than or equal to the owner's mental power .

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08163))_

> This staff grants its owner the power to make undead monsters obey. When the staff is incomplete , the undead monsters that can be made to obey are limited to those whose total monster level is less than or equal to the owner's mental power . Make a success roll using sorcerer skill level + intelligence bonus as the baseline score, and reveal the final score. If the score exceeds the target undead monster's mental point resistance, they will obey.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08164))_

> Once the staff is complete, you can control an unlimited number of undead monsters, and you also gain a +4 bonus to your final score when attempting to make them obey.

## 《 Magic Armor (+1) 》

## Non-metal or ring mail

- This trend is particularly noticeable in non-metallic or ring mail armor preferred by thieves and rangers, where armor with high required strength tends to be avoided. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08273))_
- Here, we provide a price list of non-metallic or ring mail armor with +1 power as a guideline for game masters when rewarding characters. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08273))_
- For armor, items that exceed the required strength often see decreased demand, so higher required strength doesn't necessarily mean higher prices. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08273))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08268))_

> Rarity=12

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08269))_

## 《 Shield of the Brave 》

- Those who carry this shield, which trades higher evasion speed for drawing enemy attacks, are destined to become shields for their companions. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08335))_
- If the emerald is removed, all magical power is lost. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08335))_
- Only when the final score reaches 18 do you realize this shield has a catch. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08335))_
- Enemies that use breath attacks will especially target the shield's wielder. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08335))_
- The emerald itself is worth 1000 gamels. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08335))_

## [ Sleepless Pendant ]

- However, it cannot reduce the fatigue and other effects that come with staying awake for long periods. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08359))_

## [ Necklace of Faith ]

- If the target fails a mental power resistance roll with a target score of 16 , they become affected by the effect. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08366))_
- Once affected, the target will not change their beliefs no matter how they are persuaded or what evidence they are shown. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08366))_
- The effect cannot manifest on more than one target at a time. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08366))_
- The effect continues as long as the item is worn. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08366))_
- However, if the wearer of the necklace themselves stops believing in the truth, the necklace's effect will disappear. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08366))_
- Targets are limited to humans, fae, youma, titans, and animals. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08367))_
- Targets are limited to humans, fae, youma, titans, and animals. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08367))_

## [ Telecall Amulet ]

- This is a magical amulet that allows you to converse with someone in a distant location. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08385))_
- While this useful item has been found relatively frequently in the ruins of ancient kingdom, its communication range is limited to approximately 10 kilometers. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08385))_
- The amulet possesses magical power such that when you correctly recite the password of your intended recipient's charm and speak towards the jewel at its tip, your voice will emerge from their jewel. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08385))_
- In other words, at least two amulets are required to make a call. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08385))_
- While this useful item has been found relatively frequently in the ruins of ancient kingdom, its communication range is limited to approximately 10 kilometers. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08385))_

## [ Crystal ]

- Crystals, represented by magic stones, are items that contain magic power sealed within crystals. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08387))_
- They were produced in relatively large quantities during the Ancient Kingdom period. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08387))_
- According to one theory, they were used as currency in the Kastuul Kingdom. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08387))_
- Crystals, represented by magic stones, are items that contain magic power sealed within crystals. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08387))_

## Magic Crystal

- When referring to a magic crystal, it means a stone that concentrates magic power. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08393))_
- However, only one stone can be used at a time, and it cannot be used simultaneously with the caster's own mental power. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08393))_
- It can also be used as a substitute for mental power when using common runes. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08393))_
- When referring to a magic crystal, it means a stone that concentrates magic power. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08393))_
- However, only one stone can be used at a time, and it cannot be used simultaneously with the caster's own mental power. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08393))_
- When the stored mental points are depleted, the magic crystal shatters. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08394))_
- The method of creating magic crystals has been lost, and it is impossible to replenish mental points in magic crystals. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08394))_
- It is believed that these treasures were used as currency during the Ancient Kingdom period, and they are frequently discovered in the ruins of the Ancient Kingdom. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08395))_
- The game master may decide that these are widely traded at the academy of sages. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08395))_
- However, in most cases, the crystals being sold have few remaining mental points (meaning they have been partially used by others). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08396))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08389))_

> Rarity=13

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08390))_

> Form=A stone similar to topaz that emits a bluish-white light from inside

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08391))_

> Enchanter=Many

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08392))_

> Base Trade Price=Stored mental points x mental points x 100 gamels

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08393))_

> Normally, this stone stores 2D+10 mental points, and a rune master can use magic by consuming these mental points instead of their own mental power.

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08393))_

> When referring to a magic crystal, it means a stone that concentrates magic power. While it looks similar to topaz at first glance, upon closer inspection it emits a bluish-white light from within. Normally, this stone stores 2D+10 mental points, and a rune master can use magic by consuming these mental points instead of their own mental power. However, only one stone can be used at a time, and it cannot be used simultaneously with the caster's own mental power. It can also be used as a substitu

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08395))_

> In this case, adventurers can purchase these stones if they have enough money.

## [ Staff of Sorcery ]

- If the staff is released for more than 1 day, the target score returns to its original value. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08452))_
- When the staff controls its user, it will attempt to cunningly and ruthlessly slaughter people, targeting magic users first. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08452))_
- If they fail, they become controlled by the staff. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08452))_
- However, for each spell cast, they must make a mental power resistance roll with a target score of 16. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08452))_
- If consciousness is taken away through magic or if the staff is wrested away, those controlled by the staff will return to normal. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08453))_

## [ Staff of Fire ]

- The user does not need to be a sorcerer. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08462))_
- By waving the staff while chanting a password, you can use the magic Tinder, Fire Weapon, Fireball, and Suppress Elemental (salamander only). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08462))_
- Magic power is uniformly treated as 5 regardless of the user's own magic power. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08462))_
- The base mental power cost of the magic is then directly subtracted from the mental points stored in the staff. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08462))_

## [ Delay Staff ]

- This staff can be pre-imbued with magic that activates either when a specific password is spoken or after a predetermined time has elapsed. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08478))_
- In other words, as a sorcerer reaches higher levels, they become capable of storing more powerful spells. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08478))_
- If set to activate after a certain time instead of with a password, the spell will be centered on the staff. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08478))_
- Furthermore, the mental power used to store a spell in this staff cannot be recovered by any means until the stored magic is used. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08478))_
- To store a spell in this staff, you must expend the same amount of mental power as casting the spell normally would require. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08478))_
- In this case, if the activating magic is an area-effect damage magic like Fireball , the staff will be destroyed upon activation. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08478))_
- Anyone who knows the password can activate the magic stored in the staff. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08478))_
- The spells that can be stored in this staff are limited to ancient magic with a consumed mental power (not the base mental power cost) of 3 or less. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08478))_
- This staff can be pre-imbued with magic that activates either when a specific password is spoken or after a predetermined time has elapsed. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08478))_
- If set to activate after a certain time instead of with a password, the spell will be centered on the staff. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08478))_
- Furthermore, the mental power used to store a spell in this staff cannot be recovered by any means until the stored magic is used. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08478))_
- The spells that can be stored in this staff are limited to ancient magic with a consumed mental power (not the base mental power cost) of 3 or less. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08478))_

## [ Plant Command Wand ]

- When using this wand to cast magic, magic power is treated as 8 regardless of the user's magic power. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08490))_
- Those with this wand will be able to cast spirit magic sourced from the power of plant spirits up to 8th level, such as Binding and Charm . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08490))_
- The wand stores 100 mental points, and each time you use magic, the base mental power cost of the magic is consumed. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08490))_
- Those with this wand will be able to cast spirit magic sourced from the power of plant spirits up to 8th level, such as Binding and Charm . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08490))_

## [ Quickness Ring ]

- There's no limit to the number of times it can be used, but if the same person uses it more than once a day , he or she will suffer a -1 penalty to their agility bonus thereafter. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08517))_
- If you don't use the ring for one full day, the penalty will disappear. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08517))_
- If you use it 3 times, it becomes -2 , and if you use it 4 times, it becomes -3 . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08517))_
- This effect lasts for 18 rounds from the round in which you chanted the password. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08517))_
- There's no limit to the number of times it can be used, but if the same person uses it more than once a day , he or she will suffer a -1 penalty to their agility bonus thereafter. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08517))_

## [ Card of Power ]

- Magic intensity is 15, and the effect cannot be expanded at all. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08584))_
- To use it, a manual written in low ancient is included in its box, and if you chant a spell name in low ancient while tearing up the card, the magical power previously bestowed on the card will be released. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08584))_
- It does not consume mental power when used. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08584))_
- This item was developed so that even those without the sorcerer skill can use ancient magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08584))_
- You can tell the effect of the card by the picture drawn on it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08586))_
- There are many other types of cards besides these (each game master should create them). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08588))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08579))_

> Rarity=13

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08580))_

> Enchanter=Void, "The Immoral Summoning

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08582))_

> Form=Palm-sized card of unknown material Base Trade Price=Magic's base mental power cost x 320 gamels

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08583))_

> Powers=User can use various ancient magic

## [ Guard Glove ]

- Also, if you're holding something in your dominant hand, you cannot use spirit magic either. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08594))_

## [Candlestick of Infinite (Un)Luck]

- Misfortunes that may befall you will be prevented in some way before they happen, and business or stock speculation will definitely yield a profit. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08600))_
- Then, if the candle's fire in the candlestick goes out, that person will be struck by every conceivable misfortune as a final result. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08600))_
- If you light a candle, the fire will magically last for one week, but the candle's fire itself offers no protection and will easily go out with a slight breeze, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08600))_
- Powers=Gives good luck to the one who lights the candle If you light a candle in this candlestick (any normal candle on the market is fine), whoever lights it will be blessed with great luck. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08600))_
- Misfortunes that may befall you will be prevented in some way before they happen, and business or stock speculation will definitely yield a profit. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08600))_

## [Crystal Orb of Clairvoyance]

- The extent to which the effect reaches depends on the magical power stored in the crystal ball. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08606))_
- Particularly powerful ones are said to be able to ignore magical barriers that would completely block a normal crystal ball, or show the state of another world. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08606))_
- This is a magical crystal ball that shows the user every place around the world. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08606))_
- The commonly found Crystal Orb of Clairvoyance can project any place you've been to before , but can only use this power once per day . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08607))_

- It's said to be able to seal not only lesser spirits such as salamander and sylph, but also greater spirits such as djinn and efreet. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08621))_

## [ Seal Stone ]

- It has no effect on undead, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08630))_
- No memories will remain while the soul is sealed. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08630))_
- This stone's magical power will appear when you aim it at an opponent and chant a password in low ancient. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08630))_
- A body that's lost its soul must faithfully obey the commands of the stone's owner. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08630))_
- Only one person's soul can be sealed in at a time. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08630))_
- Those who fail to resist will have their soul sealed in the stone (resist target score is 18). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08630))_
- which do not have souls. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08630))_
- Only one person's soul can be sealed in at a time. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08630))_
- If you hold the stone and chant the password of release, or if you destroy the stone, the sealed soul will be released and return to its body. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08631))_

## [ Scape Doll ]

- If a character ties his or her hair to it and etches his or her name into it, then when he or she suffers physical damage, the scape doll's life force will be reduced instead of that character's life force. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08646))_
- The scape doll's life force will be the same as the life force of the character who etched his or her name into it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08646))_
- A scape doll will break when its life force reaches 0. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08646))_
- If a character ties his or her hair to it and etches his or her name into it, then when he or she suffers physical damage, the scape doll's life force will be reduced instead of that character's life force. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08646))_
- However, if the scape doll itself suffers damage, the character's own life force will decrease, rather than the scape doll's life force. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08647))_
- Also, if you use multiple scape dolls, all the scape dolls will break at the same time, so it's completely pointless. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08648))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08640))_

## [ Spirit Sealing Stone ]

- If spirit magic is used around the wearer (used towards the wearer, or the wearer him or herself attempts to use spirit magic), this stone will seal the spirit, and the spirit magic is nullified as a result. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08664))_
- Also, greater spirits cannot be sealed, so spirit magic used will take effect as-is, and at the same time the stone will break . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08665))_
- However, if you try to block magic that uses a spirit with an average monster level of 5 or greater, the magic itself will be blocked but the spirit will not be sealed and the stone will break . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08665))_
- If a spirit has already been sealed, the stone is of no use. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08666))_
- A shaman can release a sealed spirit. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08666))_
- Only one lesser spirit can be sealed at a time. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08666))_
- Only one lesser spirit can be sealed at a time. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08666))_

## [ Zero Gravity Disc ]

- This plate is made of a magical metal that completely negates gravity. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08678))_
- All objects placed on the plate lose their weight, and the plate itself is always floating. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08678))_

## [ Bag of Protection ]

- A bag created during the ancient kingdom period that protects objects put inside from the effects of any detectiontype magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08733))_
- In addition, not only are the things inside not affected by detection-type magic, but so is the bag itself. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08733))_
- However, the objects being protected must be completely inside the bag, if they stick out of the bag even a little, the effect will not be attained. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08733))_

- This sheath is made to fit a broadsword and can only hold a broadsword. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08748))_
- This sheath is made to fit a broadsword and can only hold a broadsword. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08748))_

- If you keep a sword in this sheath for more than one hour, then draw the sword from the sheath, it'll have +5 to strike power and will be able to harm monsters that cannot be wounded by normal weapons for 18 rounds, just like if Enchant Weapon magic were cast on it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08749))_

## [ Flying Carpet ]

- This is a magic carpet that moves with a password, carrying one person and flying freely in the air for an hour. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08756))_

## [ Potion of Power ]

- Just like when increasing with experience points, there is no maximum. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08768))_
- Which ability score is increased is determined by each potion (all six types exist). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08768))_
- Otherwise, adventurers with money could buy up this item, which could potentially have a serious impact on game balance. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08769))_
- Even if the game master approves the trade of magical items, this item should be considered in short supply, nearly impossible to find, and not for trade. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08769))_

## [ Magic Scroll ]

- However, the magic cannot be expanded. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08775))_
- A magic spell is written on this (in high ancient). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08775))_
- When you need magic power (baseline score for a success roll), use the sorcerer's. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08775))_
- It doesn't matter if the sorcerer skill level has not reached the magic level, nor does it consume mental power. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08775))_
- Scrolls with lost spells written on them are almost certainly not sold on the market. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08776))_
- In this case, the Base Trade Price will be x 1.5. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08776))_
- Some of these scrolls have lost spells written on them. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08776))_

> Form=A scroll with a spell written on it Enchanter=Many

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08775))_

> A magic spell is written on this (in high ancient). If a sorcerer reads it, he or she can use the magic written on it only once . It doesn't matter if the sorcerer skill level has not reached the magic level, nor does it consume mental power. However, the magic cannot be expanded. When you need magic power (baseline score for a success roll), use the sorcerer's.

## [ Unicorn's Horn ]

- If you need the horn's magic power, set it to 10. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08810))_
- Those who have this horn will be able to cast all spirit magic sourced from the power of the unknown spirit of life, such as Healing and Restore Health . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08810))_
- The horn stores 10~200 mental points, and each time you use magic, the base mental power cost of the magic is consumed. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08810))_
- Those who have this horn will be able to cast all spirit magic sourced from the power of the unknown spirit of life, such as Healing and Restore Health . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08810))_

## 15.1

## Four Types of Experience Points

- In Sword World RPG , there are four ways to gain experience points. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08818))_
- These are accomplishing missions , fighting monsters , success rolls , and special bonuses . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08818))_

## Accomplishing Missions

- Most experience points are earned by accomplishing missions. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08820))_
- If you're going into ruins to search for treasure, the goal is probably the treasure hidden there, and if you're rescuing a captured dignitary, it' s to bring that person back safely. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08820))_
- When you achieve a goal set by the game master, you will receive experience points for accomplishing missions . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08821))_
- At this time, the mission will only be accomplished if it's returned to its rightful owner. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08822))_
- This may be different from what it appears to be upon entering the scenario. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08822))_
- Upon closer examination, a request to transport an item may turn out to be stolen goods, and in a change of situation, must be returned to its rightful owner. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08822))_
- At this time, the mission will only be accomplished if it's returned to its rightful owner. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08822))_
- If you were to become one of the thieves' transport partners without realizing they're stolen goods, your mission would not be accomplished. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08823))_
- If each character achieves the goal (mission) set by the game master, they will each receive 1000 experience points. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08824))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08824))_

> If they cannot achieve it, they will only get 500 points.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08825))_

> If the game master deems it to be an incomplete success, but not exactly a failure, he or she may decide to award experience points somewhere in between, such as 700 or 800.

## Fighting Monsters

- You can also earn experience points by defeating monsters. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08827))_
- Monster level x 10 ÷ number of adventurers experience points will be awarded for each monster. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08827))_

## Success Rolls

- This depends on how much work the adventurers did during the adventure. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08829))_
- How assertively the adventurers acted is reflected by the number of dice rolls made by the players. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08829))_
- However, it can be difficult to remember every time the dice were rolled, so only the number of times a player rolled double ones during a success roll should be recorded. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08830))_
- Also, experience points should not be awarded for meaningless success rolls. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08830))_
- The adventurers will earn number of double ones x 10 experience points. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08830))_
- Double ones when making checks for damage dealt in combat or armor defense effects in combat should also be added to the number of times. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08830))_
- Unlike the previous two types, experience points earned in this way will vary depending on the adventurer. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08830))_
- However, double ones after a critical during damage checks are not included. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08830))_
- However, double ones after a critical during damage checks are not included. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08830))_
- However, it can be difficult to remember every time the dice were rolled, so only the number of times a player rolled double ones during a success roll should be recorded. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08830))_
- Unlike the previous two types, experience points earned in this way will vary depending on the adventurer. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08830))_

## Special Bonuses

- Giving away a large amount of experience points is harmful to the enjoyment of the game. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08832))_
- However, this should be done as sparingly as possible. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08832))_
- The game master is free to award bonus experience for particularly outstanding play. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08832))_
- It'd be most appropriate to keep it to about 1/10th of the experience points earned from accomplishing a mission. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08832))_

## 16.1

## Combat in Which Monsters Roll Dice

- This reduces the burden on the game master and allows him or her to focus on other parts. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08844))_
- In Sword World RPG , the monster side (game master) rarely rolls dice during combat. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08844))_
- However, some game masters may also want to roll the dice. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08845))_
- In an emergency, the game master can control the results of his or her own dice, making it easier to weave a story. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08846))_
- This is because these advantages exist. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08847))_
- This is because these advantages exist. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08847))_
- Here we'll introduce the procedure by which the game master also rolls the dice and performs combat. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08848))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08843, source-range-de1806a5-08847))_

> 16.1 Combat in Which Monsters Roll Dice This is because these advantages exist.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08845))_

> When both sides roll the dice, the range of numbers will expand and the enjoyment can increase.

## Attacks From Monsters Against Characters

- A score equal to a monster's attack points - 7 is written next to it in parenthesis. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08850))_
- This is the target score for a character to evade the monster's attack. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08850))_
- As you can see from the way the dice are rolled, this is the process for a success roll with monster's attack points -7 as the difficulty . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08851))_
- Also, if the game master rolls double ones or double sixes, that does not automatically result in failure/success (but for a character , it still does ). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08851))_
- Therefore, a tie would result in character's evasion success = monster's attack failure . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08851))_
- Therefore, a tie would result in character's evasion success = monster's attack failure . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08851))_
- The monster's strike points are fixed, and the difference is based on protection from the character's armor. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08852))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08851))_

## 16.2

## Weapon and Armor Modifiers

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08861))_

> In the basic rules, we did not consider the finer differences based on the shape of weapons and armor, but even though the required strength is the same, swords, axes, spears, and hammers differ in ease of use and power. This rule quantifies the finer differences between weapons and armor.

## Weapon Modifiers

- The terms used on this table are explained below. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08864))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08864))_

> The terms used on this table are explained below.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08863))_

> Here is a table of weapons commonly used by adventurers (" Table 16-1 Weapon Optional Rules ").

## Attack Power Modifier

- Attack power modifier indicates the modifier added to an adventurer's attack power when using that weapon. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08866))_
- Weapons with higher numbers are more likely to hit an opponent, while weapons with smaller numbers are less likely to hit. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08866))_

## Strike Power Modifier

- In the basic rules, a weapon's required strength is its strike power, but with this rule, a weapon's strike power equals weapon's required strength plus this strike power modifier . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08868))_
- Strike power modifier is a modifier added to a weapon's strike power . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08868))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08868))_

> In other words, even if the required strength is the same , one can say a weapon with a higher strike power modifier will deal greater damage to an opponent.

## Critical Target Variation

- This is indicated by the critical target . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08870))_
- Under the basic rules, when using the Rating Table to determine damage, a 10 or greater is considered a critical , but with this rule, the chance of a critical is different for each weapon . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08870))_
- ***The lance itself has a +5 strike power modifier, +10 during a charge, and +2 damage itself _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08876))_
- Weapons classified as swords , axes , spears , bows , and crossbows suffer +1 to this critical target against metal armor . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08877))_
- likely you are to deliver a powerful strike. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08877))_
- In other words, these sharp weapons are less likely to deliver a powerful strike due to the armor's metal. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08878))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08875))_

> - △△ Calculate using required strength x 2 + 10

## Armor Modifiers

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08886))_

> " Table 16-3 Armor Optional Rules " is a table of numerical armor modifications.

## Evasion Modifier

## 16.3

- Heavy metal armor slows down your movement and makes it more difficult to dodge your opponent's attacks. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08890))_

## Defense Modifier

- Defense power modifier is the defense power bonus you receive while wearing that armor. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08892))_
- Metal armor generally has a higher defensive effect and grants a bonus to defense. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08892))_

## Critical Target Variation

- Critical target variation indicates that the armor reduces the chance of being dealt a strong blow from some weapons while wearing it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08894))_
- If this field says yes , the opponent's critical target will be +1 when they attack you with a sword, spear, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08894))_

## Anti-Strangling Protection

- The anti-strangling protection indicates whether the armor protects you when being strangled by a garrote or arms around the neck. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08896))_

## Shield Modifiers

- If you ready a shield, it'll be easier to avoid your opponent's attacks. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08900))_
- Therefore, when using a large shield, you will suffer a -1 penalty to your attack power . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08900))_
- With this rule, if you ready a large shield, your evasion speed will be +2. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08900))_
- However, if you do use a large shield, it's inevitable that you'll have to neglect your attacks. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08900))_
- However, large shields with a magical power of +1 or greater do not have this penalty. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08900))_
- Therefore, when using a large shield, you will suffer a -1 penalty to your attack power . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08900))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08900))_

> If you ready a shield, it'll be easier to avoid your opponent's attacks. With this rule, if you ready a large shield, your evasion speed will be +2. However, if you do use a large shield, it's inevitable that you'll have to neglect your attacks. Therefore, when using a large shield, you will suffer a -1 penalty to your attack power . However, large shields with a magical power of +1 or greater do not have this penalty.

## Projectile Bonus Damage

- In the basic rules, any weapon's bonus damage equals fi ghter (or thief, ranger) skill level + strength bonus , but for projectiles , an adventurer's strength is not fully utilized as-is. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08904))_

## 16.4

## Projectile Range Extension

- In the basic rules, the range limit is 20 meters for throwing weapons and 100 meters for shooting weapons. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08909))_
- In the basic rules, the range limit is 20 meters for throwing weapons and 100 meters for shooting weapons. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08909))_

## Long Distance Modifiers

- Hitting a distant target with a weapon is a nigh-impossible task. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08911))_
- Throwing weapons have a -1 modifier to attack power for every meter beyond 20 meters , and shooting weapons have the same for every 5 meters beyond 100 . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08911))_

## Maximum Range

- Each throwing or shooting weapon has a maximum range , and they will never hit a target farther away than this ( Table 16-4: Maximum Ranges ). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08913))_

## 16.5

## Combat Options

- These optional rules allow for a variety of attack methods, rather than just simple attacks but to defend, an adventurer can put everything they have into their attack. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08917))_

## Charge

- he or she can charge an opponent and use his or her weight and speed to deal great damage. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08931))_
- When an adventurer is armed with a spear, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08931))_
- Weapons that can perform a charge are limited to spears, pole weapons (which can thrust , see below), and lances. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08932))_
- Weapons that can perform a charge are limited to spears, pole weapons (which can thrust , see below), and lances. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08932))_

- However, if the one being charged attempts to counterattack the one performing the charge, his or her action will be delayed . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08934))_
- The hit check for the charge is made at the end of the round (at action order 0). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08934))_
- There are no score modifiers to the hit check of a charge. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08935))_
- Of course, this is not possible if you're taking a different action, such as casting magic, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08936))_
- If you charged, you'll suffer a -4 penalty to your evasion when dodging this attack. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08936))_
- Regardless of whether the charge was a hit or a failure, the opponent can attack at the end of the round . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08936))_
- Of course, this is not possible if you're taking a different action, such as casting magic, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08936))_
- In this case, attack order is determined by the weapons' length . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08937))_
- A weapon's length is proportional to its required strength , so make your hit checks based on the weapon with the greater required strength. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08937))_

- From the second roll onward after a critical, the critical target will be as normal . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08941))_
- However, this critical target reduction only applies to the fi rst strike roll. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08941))_
- There's a guard standing at the entrance, but he doesn't seem to notice Ducard II. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08943))_
- Ducard II makes a strike roll. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08944))_
- He can continue to roll to increase the damage, but from here on the critical target will be determined as the normal 10 . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08944))_
- However, while aiming , there's a chance that your opponent will sense your presence. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08945))_
- You must make a success roll each round. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08945))_
- The difficulty is the opponent's monster level . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08946))_
- If you fail, your opponent will notice you, you'll no longer receive bonuses from aiming, and you'll also miss the chance for a surprise attack . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08946))_
- The target must make a success roll using ranger skill level + intelligence bonus as the baseline score, and compare his or her final score with that of the sniper's hide / camouflage . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08947))_
- If the target's final score is greater, or if they're equal, the sniper's presence will be noticed. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08947))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08939))_

> Bows and crossbows can be aimed and fired at a vital point if the target is completely unaware and not moving around much (they cannot be aimed and fired if the target is aware of the sniper's presence and is alert to their surroundings, or if they're fervently moving around).

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08940))_

> In this case, if you spend one round aiming, you can reduce the critical target by 1 if the shot hits.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08943))_

> If it hits, the critical target will be reduced by -3, making it 7.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08944))_

> If he rolls a 10 or greater, more damage will be added, but if he rolls a 7, 8 or 9 , the strike roll will end there.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08945))_

> To prevent this, you can use the thief skill's hide ability or the ranger skill's camouflage ability.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08947))_

> When your opponent is a character, he or she can notice you by using the sense danger ability.

The target must make a success roll using ranger skill level + intelligence bonus as the baseline score, and compare his or her final score with that of the sniper's hide / camouflage . If the target's final score is greater, or if they're equal, the sniper's presence will be noticed.

## Mow Down

- When there are multiple enemies in front of you, you can swing your weapon horizontally and attack them all at once . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08950))_
- If it hits, damage is determined as normal. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08951))_
- It'll be -2 if you attack two at a time, -3 if you attack three at the same time, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08951))_
- When taking on this attack, the number of enemies you target at once will equal a penalty to your attack power. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08951))_
- For example, if there are three , you cannot attack only two of them. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08952))_
- Usually there won't be more than three. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08952))_
- Mow down can only be performed against enemies in front of you. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08952))_
- For example, if there are three , you cannot attack only two of them. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08952))_
- Mow down can only be performed against enemies in front of you. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08952))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08950))_

> A character can only do this if he or she has a two-handed weapon and it's the type that cuts (sword, ax, pole weapon that can cut ).

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08952))_

> If you do decide to mow down, you must attack all enemies in front of you.

## Grapple

- This action is like wrestling, in which you attempt to fight by grappling with your opponent. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08954))_
- Then, any attempt to grapple will automatically occur at the end of the round. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08955))_
- To attempt a grapple , you must first not be holding any large weapons or shields in your hands. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08955))_
- Then, any attempt to grapple will automatically occur at the end of the round. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08955))_
- If you succeed (and your opponent fails to evade), you'll enter a grapple. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08956))_
- Large weapons must be kept out of hand. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08957))_
- When grappling, both sides automatically become prone . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08957))_
- Actions that characters in a grapple can take are limited to the following. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08958))_
- Actions that characters in a grapple can take are limited to the following. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08958))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08956))_

> Anyone who attempts to grapple will suffer a -2 penalty to his or her attack power, then must make a hit check for their attack.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08957))_

> Once you've entered a grapple, the only weapons you can use are daggers and garrotes (described below).

## 1. Normal Attack

- Attack with a dagger, barehanded (claws, talons), cestus, etc. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08960))_
- Opponents have a -2 penalty to evasion. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08960))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08960))_

> If a monster has fangs, it can also bite.

## 2. Strangle/Continue to Strangle/Escape

- Once strangling, the strangler can automatically deal damage every round. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08962))_
- Strangle your opponent barehanded or with a garrote. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08962))_
- If you're barehanded, strike power is 0 (critical target 12), and if you're using a garrote, strike power is 10 (critical target 10). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08962))_
- Opponents have a -2 penalty to evasion. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08962))_
- If the final score of the one trying to break free is greater, or if there's a tie, he or she will escape. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08963))_
- To resolve breaking free, the one being strangled must make a success roll using adventurer level + strength bonus as the baseline score, while the strangler must make one using fi ghter/thief skill level + strength bonus . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08963))_
- While being strangled, you cannot make any sound at all, so you cannot use magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08963))_
- Also, even if your character doesn't suffer damage, if or she remains strangled for a number of rounds equal to his or her life force , life force will immediately fall to 0, he or she will fall unconscious , and you'll need to make a death check . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08964))_
- Y ou cannot deal damage to these, nor can you suffocate them. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08966))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08962))_

> Only adventurer level can reduce strangling damage.

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08962))_

> Strangle your opponent barehanded or with a garrote. Opponents have a -2 penalty to evasion. Once strangling, the strangler can automatically deal damage every round. **Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08963))_

> If you're being strangled, the only thing you can do in the rounds onward is attempt to break free.

## 3. Pin Down

- If the pinner's is greater, the pin is successful. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08968))_
- However, the one being pinned can attempt to break free. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08969))_
- Once pinning, the pinner will automatically continue in that state and can perform normal attacks (of course, weapons are restricted). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08969))_
- At this time, please make the same check. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-08969))_
