## History

## Age of Mythology

- In the beginning, only a single Titan existed in the world. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09301))_
- This Titan was called "The Great One" or the "Creator of All Things," though their true nature remains completely shrouded in mystery. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09301))_
- In the beginning, only a single Titan existed in the world. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09301))_
- The Titan's heart, which grieved and raged in loneliness, became fire, bringing heat and life to the world. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09302))_
- The world began with the death of this Titan who had lived for eternity. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09302))_
- Its flesh became the earth, its final breath became the wind, and the blood that flowed from its entire body became the seas. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09302))_
- It is said that lesser gods were also born, each inheriting different parts of the Titan's body. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09303))_
- At this time, plants sprouted from the Titan's body hair, and dragons emerged from its great scales. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09303))_
- From the Titan's right foot came the war god Myrii; from the left foot, the fortune god Cha Za; from the head emerged the knowledge god Rahda; from the torso, the earth mother goddess Marfa; from the evil right arm, the dark god Phalaris; and from the virtuous left hand the supreme god Pharis. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09303))_
- From this fire, the gods were born. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09303))_
- They began by organizing the chaotic forces that overflowed into the world to create the spirit world. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09304))_
- Then, they made the material world for beings with physical forms to inhabit, and finally, they created an intermediate world called the fairy world to connect these two distinct realms. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09304))_
- They then created life forms such as spirits, fae, animals, and plants in their respective worlds and, with their help, completed each world. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09304))_
- First, the gods divided the world into three parts. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09304))_
- Then, they made the material world for beings with physical forms to inhabit, and finally, they created an intermediate world called the fairy world to connect these two distinct realms. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09304))_
- They then created life forms such as spirits, fae, animals, and plants in their respective worlds and, with their help, completed each world. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09304))_
- These beings created by the gods' hands were called the ancient races, and they are said to have possessed abilities far superior to the races that exist in Forcelia today. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09305))_
- But these differences bred small conflicts, which evolved into great wars. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09306))_
- Finally, it took the form of a final war in which all ancient races participated, divided between the forces of light and darkness. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09306))_
- It is said to have begun with minor differences among the gods. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09306))_
- As a result, the gods lost their physical forms and their means to directly intervene in the material world, becoming purely mental entities or forces. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09306))_
- As a result, the gods lost their physical forms and their means to directly intervene in the material world, becoming purely mental entities or forces. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09306))_

## The Age of Magic = The Kingdom of Kastuul

- Among the early humans, there were even some who were said to be half-divine. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09309))_
- Humans excelled in all forms of magic, reportedly because they inherited not only physical form but also a portion of the gods' power. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09309))_
- The humans were said to have been created by the gods from their own flesh, and they were especially powerful. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09309))_
- Though many ancient races died in the Final War and lost their power, some races managed to survive. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09309))_
- Humans excelled in all forms of magic, reportedly because they inherited not only physical form but also a portion of the gods' power. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09309))_
- As this kingdom has already perished, it is now known as the Ancient Kingdom. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09310))_
- This was the Kingdom of Kastuul. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09310))_
- They survived through a dark age lasting hundreds or even thousands of years, eventually establishing a kingdom. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09310))_
- The higher one's magical ability, the higher their status, and the kingdom was ruled through generations by powerful sorcerers known as wizard-kings. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09312))_
- This kingdom was ruled by great rune masters who were versed in various magical languages. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09312))_
- Humans with low magical ability, or those completely lacking it, were either treated as slaves or banished from the peaceful kingdom to become savages living in dangerous wilderness. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09312))_
- This era is known as "The Age of Magic." It is said that three systems of magic - ancient magic, spirit magic, and holy magic - created a brilliant culture, enabled cities to float in the sky, and even commanded grown dragons as servants. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09313))_
- However, this kingdom was ultimately destroyed by the very magical power that had formed the foundation of its development. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09313))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09311))_

> [Figure] (p.281)

## The Age of Sword = The New Kingdoms

- While they certainly had lower magical abilities, they were filled with a robust life force that made up for it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09315))_
- After the fall of the Ancient Kingdom, those who became the world's leaders were the segregated people who had been despised as slaves or savages during the Ancient Kingdom era. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09315))_
- The Sages believe that the two groups were likely slightly different even as species. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09315))_
- After the fall of the Ancient Kingdom, those who became the world's leaders were the segregated people who had been despised as slaves or savages during the Ancient Kingdom era. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09315))_
- Instead, matters have come to be resolved through military might. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09316))_
- Thus, the present is also called the "Age of Sword." This is also the origin of the name "Sword World." _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09316))_
- Various kingdoms with distinct characteristics have sprung up across Forcelia during this era. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09316))_
- While magic still exists, advanced spells have been lost, and the number of Rune Masters has decreased. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09316))_
- Having survived the chaotic period after the Ancient Kingdom's fall, the New Kingdom has now continued for over 500 years. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09316))_
- Having survived the chaotic period after the Ancient Kingdom's fall, the New Kingdom has now continued for over 500 years. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09316))_
- Thus, the present is also called the "Age of Sword." This is also the origin of the name "Sword World." _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09316))_
- To put it more simply, it's a world that emanates what is commonly called a "fantasy" atmosphere. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09317))_

## World View

## World

- People consider Forcelia to be the world itself. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09320))_
- The Alecrast continent is just a small part of Forcelia. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09320))_
- At these four corners, there are gates that seal off the world. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09321))_
- The world of Forcelia is believed to be flat rather than spherical. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09321))_
- There is also a theory that it is the Gate of Earth, in which case mountain ranges of infinite height seal the world. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09322))_
- It is said to be sealed by mountains of ice of infinite height. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09322))_
- In the east is the Gate of Wind, sealed by fierce storms. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09323))_
- In the south is the Gate of Fire. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09323))_
- It is said to be sealed by scorching flames. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09323))_
- The Alecrast continent is believed to be located quite far north in the world of Forcelia. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09324))_
- And in the west is the Gate of Water. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09324))_
- However, this Water Gate is said to be unsealed, falling as a waterfall into the Void. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09324))_
- The Alecrast continent is believed to be located quite far north in the world of Forcelia. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09324))_

## Sun, Moon, Stars

- The moon is controlled by Pharis's younger brother, Fenes, the god of cycles, and casts light into the night. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09326))_
- The sun is ruled by the supreme god Pharis, and some say that the sun is the lost body of Pharis himself. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09326))_
- The stars are the shining forces and substances that were left undifferentiated at the creation of the world, some say, and others claim that they are the shattered bodies of the gods. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09326))_
- In the world of Forcelia, there is one sun, one moon, and countless stars in the sky. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09326))_
- The place where the sun, stars, and moon reside is called the 'Star Realm' . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09327))_
- It is believed that the world of Forcelia floats within this Star Realm. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09327))_
- The place where the sun, stars, and moon reside is called the 'Star Realm' . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09327))_
- It is believed that the world of Forcelia floats within this Star Realm. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09327))_

## Climate

- In Forcelia, climate is inseparable from spirit power. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09329))_
- On the Alecrast continent, the north is generally cold due to its proximity to the Gate of Ice, while the south is said to be temperate due to its proximity to the Gate of Fire. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09329))_
- Then comes a hot summer when fire spiritual powers flourishes, followed by autumn with its strong, howling winds. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09330))_
- The first season of the year is a strong winter dominated by Ice Spirit power, followed by spring when Water Spirit power strengthens, bringing continuous rain. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09330))_
- The year is roughly divided into four seasons. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09330))_
- Then comes a hot summer when fire spiritual powers flourishes, followed by autumn with its strong, howling winds. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09330))_
- However, there are regions that remain locked in snow and ice yearround, and conversely, places where hot days continue endlessly. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09331))_
- All of these phenomena are explained by spirit power. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09331))_

## Calendar and Time

- The concept of time in Forcelia is explained as follows. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09333))_
- Initially, the gods intended to make the world eternal. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09334))_
- However, before the world's completion, the gods fought among themselves and lost their physical forms. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09334))_
- For this purpose, time was unnecessary. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09334))_
- As a result, of the four gates that were supposed to completely seal the world, the western gate - the Gate of Water - remained open. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09334))_
- However, before the world's completion, the gods fought among themselves and lost their physical forms. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09334))_
- It is said that seawater and the world's constituent elements continue to flow out from the still-open Water Gate. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09335))_
- In other words, Forcelia has become an enormous water clock. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09335))_
- This is what gives birth to time. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09335))_
- There is a widespread and feared apocalyptic myth that, eventually, the entire world will flow through the Gate of Water and fall into the World of Nothingness. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09336))_
- The "present" in Alecrast is considered to be the year 520 of the New Kingdom Calendar. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09337))_
- The New Kingdom Calendar marks its first year from the fall of the ancient Kingdom of Kastuul, which occurred more than 500 years ago. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09337))_
- A year is divided into 12 months, and each month has 30 days. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09338))_
- To express a specific date, the common format is Year X of the New Kingdom Calendar, Month Y, and Day Z. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09338))_
- For shorter time units, 1 day is divided into 24 hours, and 1 hour into 60 minutes. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09339))_
- These time units are almost identical to those we use in real life (that is, on Earth). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09339))_
- While seconds are used in game rules, in Alecrast, such short time units are rarely needed and therefore not used. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09339))_
- While seconds are used in game rules, in Alecrast, such short time units are rarely needed and therefore not used. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09339))_

## Politics and Class

## Kingdoms

- Forcelia consists of one continent called Alecrast and several large islands. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09342))_
- The continent and islands are further divided into dozens of countries, each with its own system of governance. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09342))_
- Many of these countries are kingdoms ruled by hereditary monarchs. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09342))_
- There are also free cities without kings and nations governed by priests in the name of their deities. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09343))_
- Each country has its own distinct character and form of government. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09343))_
- However, most nations' typical governance structure consists of a king at the top, with nobles and knights forming the ruling class and common citizens below them. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09344))_
- While some countries have a serf class below this, such cases are rather rare. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09344))_

## Kings

- The king is an absolute ruler. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09346))_
- All national policies are determined by the king, and as the head of judicial power, he also presides over trials. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09346))_
- In a nation, defying the king is not permitted. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09346))_
- Therefore, it is said that even kings have things they must protect and laws they must follow. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09347))_
- This could also create opportunities for foreign invasion. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09347))_
- However, this is only on the surface if a king were to govern poorly, movements to overthrow such a king would inevitably arise. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09347))_
- However, this is only on the surface if a king were to govern poorly, movements to overthrow such a king would inevitably arise. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09347))_
- Therefore, it is said that even kings have things they must protect and laws they must follow. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09347))_

## Nobles/Knights

- Next, regarding nobles and knights they are direct vassals of the king, with those who own their own land being called nobles, and those who don't being called knights. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09349))_
- While knights and nobles have servants under them, these servants do not have the same rights as ordinary citizens. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09349))_

## Citizens

- During times of war, they may be conscripted into military service. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09351))_
- Of course, since there are many other occupations as well, we collectively refer to all of them as citizens. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09351))_

## Slaves

- They are unfortunate people who are denied even basic human rights. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09353))_
- Slaves do not exist as a common class except in countries where the system is institutionalized. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09353))_
- Slaves do not exist as a common class except in countries where the system is institutionalized. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09353))_

## Intellectuals/Clergy/ Traveling Merchants

- While they live freely, unrestricted by national boundaries, they must protect themselves on their own. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09355))_
- Somewhat separate from the four basic classes mentioned above are the clergy, such as priests and clergy, and intellectuals, like sorcerers and sages. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09355))_
- Somewhat separate from the four basic classes mentioned above are the clergy, such as priests and clergy, and intellectuals, like sorcerers and sages. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09355))_

## Adventurers

- They primarily make their living by exploring the ruins of ancient kingdoms and discovering treasures. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09357))_
- Since they can't always count on finding treasure-laden ruins, they tend to accept such requests for relatively modest compensation. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09358))_
- These people possess various abilities, including combat skills and a strong sense of independence, unbound by power structures or social constraints, and are often employed as problemsolvers for hire. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09358))_
- These people possess various abilities, including combat skills and a strong sense of independence, unbound by power structures or social constraints, and are often employed as problemsolvers for hire. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09358))_
- In some regions and localities, they may be viewed as criminals, and indeed, many of them (whether by choice or circumstance) are no strangers to illegal activities. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09359))_
- Of course, those who break the law will face appropriate punishment, and those who consistently cause trouble for their clients will eventually find themselves without work. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09360))_
- At most, adventurers have a loose sense of camaraderie based on the principle of "helping each other in times of need," though even this can't be counted on too much. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09361))_
- However, since conditions vary between countries, don't assume things will always work exactly this way. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09362))_
- While breaking through checkpoints is considered a crime, it isn't punished too severely during peacetime. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09362))_
- Travel between countries is relatively unrestricted, requiring only a passage tax. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09362))_
- Travel between countries is relatively unrestricted, requiring only a passage tax. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09362))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09361))_

> When misfortune befalls them, these adventurers have few other people they can rely on.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09363))_

> [Figure] (p.283)

## Organizations and Groups

## Guilds

- Without membership, one cannot learn trade-specific skills, nor are they permitted to conduct business using such skills. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09367))_
- First, there are professional associations called "guilds," and anyone considered an artisan must belong to one. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09367))_
- While guilds are typically national organizations, they may sometimes be recognized in neighboring countries. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09367))_
- With the exception of some nations, guilds are sustained by the close relationship between masters and their apprentices. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09368))_
- While the relationship between a master and their apprentices is very close, interaction between different masters is not particularly active due to fears of technical knowledge being leaked. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09368))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09367))_

> Additionally, those who are guild members in one country may receive special privileges when joining guilds in other countries, such as only needing to pay a fee.

## Merchant's License

- While merchants don't have a guild, to be recognized as a merchant and conduct business, they must register with the king. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09370))_
- Without it, one cannot legally open a shop. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09370))_
- If someone conducts business in public without a license, they will be punished. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09370))_
- Those who are approved receive a permit. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09370))_

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09371))_

> Of course, a Merchant's License issued in one country isn't valid everywhere, but if you wish to trade in another country, having a license typically means you can bypass strict screening and simply pay a standard fee to proceed.

## Thieves Guild/Sorcerers' Guild (Academy)

- Though not official guilds, the Thieves Guild and Sorcerers' Guild (Academy) are essential organizations. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09373))_
- Both are global organizations that regularly exchange information between headquarters and branches. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09373))_
- The organization is tightly structured, with members having various obligations, including tribute payments, and once you join, it's extremely difficult to leave. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09374))_
- In exchange, members receive substantial protection (though if you make a bad impression on the leadership, you might be quietly eliminated). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09374))_
- The Thieves Guild's power is so vast that it's said to control the underworld of nations. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09374))_
- While the advice is readily available, it might not be particularly reliable in times of crisis. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09375))_
- The Sorcerers' Guild, on the other hand, is less restrictive and operates more as a cooperative for mutual development. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09375))_

## Religious Organizations

- However, in many countries, these organizations seem to have little influence over secular authority. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09377))_
- Nevertheless, in some theocratic states, religious organizations hold decisive power. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09377))_
- Clergy members receive a certain degree of status protection, and if they have proof of their position, they can receive protection from organizations of the same faith. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09378))_
- Due to the nature of their work, farmers typically don't travel, so having their status verified only within their own country shouldn't pose any problems. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09379))_
- These are the influential organizations in Sword World. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09379))_
- Farmers are directly governed by their lords, so they have no organizations. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09379))_
- Guild membership cards for craftsmen and merchant's licenses hold significant value as proof of identity. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09379))_
- Having these makes it relatively easy to receive status verification not only in one's own country but in other nations as well. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09379))_
- However, their social status is fundamentally the same as merchants and craftsmen. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09379))_
- Due to the nature of their work, farmers typically don't travel, so having their status verified only within their own country shouldn't pose any problems. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09379))_
- Having these makes it relatively easy to receive status verification not only in one's own country but in other nations as well. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09379))_

## Geography

## Far East Region (Language = Eastern/ Mārdan)

- At the eastern end of the Alecrast continent lie three countries: Mudeel, Milargo, and Anoth. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09382))_
- Mudeel, known as the "Farthest Kingdom," has a population of about 1.2 million. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09383))_
- These armed merchant ships frequently visit and trade with countries along the southern coast of the Alecrast continent. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09383))_
- These galleys, also known as armed merchant ships, boast strength that makes ordinary pirate ships pale in comparison. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09383))_
- Mudeel has a forest called the "Goblin Woods." It is a mystical realm inhabited by many youma and magical beasts, where humans rarely venture. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09384))_
- Important state affairs are decided by a tribal council where tribal chiefs gather. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09385))_
- In Alecrast, it would be considered a country with notably weak royal authority. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09385))_
- This kingdom is a confederation of dozens of nomadic tribes. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09385))_
- Milargo is known as the "Kingdom of Meadows." It has a population of about 1 million, with its capital city being Grad. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09385))_
- It is described as the very picture of freedom. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09385))_
- It is also the homeland of many grassrunners. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09387))_
- Besides humans, there are tribes of centaurs who hold similar status. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09387))_
- It is said to house small groups of savages and large settlements of lizardmen. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09388))_
- The eastern territory of Milargo consists of vast marshlands called the "Wetlands of Oblivion," where few dare to tread. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09388))_
- Most of its citizens are followers of Pharis, and the Pharis temple in the royal capital of Farz is said to be the largest on the continent of Alecrast. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09389))_
- Furthermore, this position of Pope (King) is not hereditary, but is passed down to successive High Priests of Pharis. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09389))_
- During peacetime, much of the governance is entrusted to the nobles (ministers), but in times of crisis, power becomes completely focused in the Pope. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09389))_
- The supreme ruler of Anoth is called the Pope, who serves both as king and holds the authority to appoint Priests. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09389))_
- Anoth, known as the "Holy Kingdom," is a strict nation that follows Pharis as its state religion. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09389))_
- The supreme ruler of Anoth is called the Pope, who serves both as king and holds the authority to appoint Priests. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09389))_
- These knights are known as crusaders. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09390))_
- The Knights of Anoth, known as the "Knights of Justice," are one of the most powerful knightly orders in Alecrast. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09390))_
- The true nature and purpose of this statue remain completely unknown. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09391))_
- To the north of Anoth lies a ruin called the "Statues of Giant." It is a massive humanoid statue with its lower half buried in the ground, but even the visible upper body above ground measures several meters in height. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09391))_
- However, there is no doubt that it possesses some form of magical power. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09391))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09385))_

> Milargo is known as the "Kingdom of Meadows." It has a population of about 1 million, with its capital city being Grad. This kingdom is a confederation of dozens of nomadic tribes. Important state affairs are decided by a tribal council where tribal chiefs gather. This tribal council also appoints the king and ministers. In Alecrast, it would be considered a country with notably weak royal authority. It is described as the very picture of freedom.

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09386))_

> [Figure] (p.285)

## Northeast Region (Language = Eastern/Mārdan)

- In the northeastern part of the Alecrast continent, there are three countries: Lodorille, Baikal, and Plysis. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09393))_
- However, when Queen June V, known as the "Iron Queen," ascended to the throne, the country underwent a rapid transformation, quickly becoming a military state with a powerful army while annexing neighboring countries. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09394))_
- The kingdom is sustained by absolute loyalty to the queen. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09394))_
- Lodorille was once a poor country that barely survived on agriculture. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09394))_
- Queen June V has banned the use of magic within the country. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09394))_
- Moreover, this beautiful and charismatic queen is also a cruel human who considers people from other nations as mere slaves, making it far from an ideal country for travelers to visit. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09394))_
- The population is 1.5 million, with 500,000 people concentrated in and around the royal capital of Chase. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09394))_
- Queen June V has banned the use of magic within the country. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09394))_
- Among the tribes, the maritime tribes scattered along the northern Azul Bay hold more power than the tribes of the southern plains. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09395))_
- Baikal is the northernmost country in Alecrast. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09395))_
- The total population is slightly over 1 million. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09395))_
- This is because the maritime tribes generate profit through trade and piracy using galley ships called free merchant vessels, wielding incomparable power to the plains people who engage in farming. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09395))_
- It is a nation formed by the union of several tribes, each creating their own small villages and towns. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09395))_
- This is because the maritime tribes generate profit through trade and piracy using galley ships called free merchant vessels, wielding incomparable power to the plains people who engage in farming. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09395))_
- While the king resides in the royal capital of Boris, he is merely a figurehead. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09396))_
- The men of Baikal are fierce and warlike, but tribal bonds are extremely strong. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09397))_
- The economy is sustained by well-developed commerce, professional guilds, and trade with neighboring villages and towns. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09398))_
- Plysis is the largest fortified city in Alecrast and has become a city-state in its own right. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09398))_
- Plysis has been under invasion from Lodorille, but has continued to repel these attacks through its sturdy fortifications, large weaponry such as catapults, and the strategic brilliance of the talented military advisor Lukial, known as "The Chess Player." However, there was an incident where military advisor Lukial accepted an invitation from the great western nation of Lomar and departed, leading to rumors that the city's survival is now in jeopardy. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09399))_
- Plysis has been under invasion from Lodorille, but has continued to repel these attacks through its sturdy fortifications, large weaponry such as catapults, and the strategic brilliance of the talented military advisor Lukial, known as "The Chess Player." However, there was an incident where military advisor Lukial accepted an invitation from the great western nation of Lomar and departed, leading to rumors that the city's survival is now in jeopardy. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09399))_
- South of Lodorille and east of Plysis lies the ruins of an ancient kingdom known as "Ancient Ruined City." This city, which still contains the ancient kingdom's treasures, is a forbidden place haunted by the undead and ghosts, and it is said that almost none who venture in ever return. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09400))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09395))_

> Baikal is the northernmost country in Alecrast. It is a nation formed by the union of several tribes, each creating their own small villages and towns. The total population is slightly over 1 million. Among the tribes, the maritime tribes scattered along the northern Azul Bay hold more power than the tribes of the southern plains. This is because the maritime tribes generate profit through trade and piracy using galley ships called free merchant vessels, wielding incomparable power to the plains

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09397))_

> If you can gain favor with the powerful tribes, Baikal can become a hospitable country for travelers.

## Oran (Language = Eastern/Mārdan)

- Oran is the largest nation on the southern coast of the Alecrast continent. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09402))_
- It has a population of 2 million, with 100,000 concentrated in the royal capital of Oran. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09402))_
- Oran is an extremely prosperous nation, and its royal capital Oran is an advanced city with streets completely paved in stone and fully equipped with water and sewage systems. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09403))_
- Research is actively conducted to enrich the nation, such as improvements to newly invented sailboats and development of agricultural tools. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09403))_
- Research is actively conducted to enrich the nation, such as improvements to newly invented sailboats and development of agricultural tools. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09403))_
- The position of Grand Master is held by Mana Rai, renowned as a Great Scholar. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09404))_
- In northern Oran, there are ruins known as the "Fallen City." These ruins were created when Rex, one of the largest aerial cities of the ancient kingdom, fell from the sky. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09404))_
- It was Mana Rai who established ancient magic as power derived from the magical element "mana," completed the currently accepted theory of magic, and developed common language magic that is activated through the common tongue. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09404))_
- Oran's Sorcerers' Guild was the first to be established in Alecrast and serves as the central hub connecting Sorcerers' Guilds across different regions. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09404))_
- It is said that in present-day Alecrast, there exists no Sorcerer or Sage who rivals him, and perhaps none will ever appear. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09404))_
- What brings the greatest prestige to Oran is its Sorcerers' Guild. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09404))_

## Central Region (Language = Mārdan/Eremire Gundar/Saine)

- The languages in this region are divided between East and West. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09407))_
- Eremire is known as the "Kingdom of Craftsmen." With a population of less than one million, craftsmen in this region have formed large guilds. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09408))_
- This has led to the sharing and development of technology, resulting in the production of consistently high-quality goods. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09408))_
- Nevertheless, the country is preparing for war. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09409))_
- It is an agricultural nation focused on farming, livestock, and forestry. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09409))_
- Having just experienced civil unrest, its national power is somewhat weakened. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09409))_
- Saine, known as the "Kingdom of Lakesides," has a population of around 700,000. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09409))_
- This is due to increased activity from their neighbor Lomar and deteriorating relations with Orphan after the nobles who led the civil war sought exile in the Kingdom of Orphan. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09409))_
- This is due to increased activity from their neighbor Lomar and deteriorating relations with Orphan after the nobles who led the civil war sought exile in the Kingdom of Orphan. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09409))_
- North of the Kingdom of Eremire lies the Khan Desert, known as the "Desert of Malice." Despite being a desert, the Khan Desert is home to creatures adapted to the dry climate and nomadic peoples. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09410))_
- These assassins, skilled in spirit magic abilities, are greatly feared. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09411))_
- They have been known to send assassins after those who try to forcefully uncover their secrets or who accidentally witness important rituals. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09411))_
- They are known for their extreme secrecy and rarely reveal their true nature or beliefs (they appear to worship their own deities). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09411))_
- They have been known to send assassins after those who try to forcefully uncover their secrets or who accidentally witness important rituals. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09411))_

## Northern Central Region (Language = Western/Gundar)

- To its east lies the northeastern region, while to the west is what's called the Northern Central Region. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09413))_
- In the central part of the northern Alecrast continent, there is a massive "Desert of Empty". _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09413))_
- The Northern Central Region contains two major nations: Orphan and Ramliearth. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09414))_
- Thus, Orphan is known as the "Kingdom of Heroes." The capital of Orphan remains in the city of Phan, continuing from its predecessor, the Kingdom of Phan. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09415))_
- After defeating Krish, the evil dragon that destroyed the Kingdom of Phan, he proved his worth through battles during the civil war in the Kingdom of Phan, won the love of former Phan Queen Melete, and eventually established a new kingdom. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09415))_
- Orphan was founded by Rijal, a hero known as the "Dragon Slayer" and acclaimed as the strongest swordsman in Alecrast. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09415))_
- Thus, Orphan is known as the "Kingdom of Heroes." The capital of Orphan remains in the city of Phan, continuing from its predecessor, the Kingdom of Phan. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09415))_
- After defeating Krish, the evil dragon that destroyed the Kingdom of Phan, he proved his worth through battles during the civil war in the Kingdom of Phan, won the love of former Phan Queen Melete, and eventually established a new kingdom. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09415))_
- This system can only exist because Rijal is both a warrior and a hero. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09416))_
- Though Orphan started as a small nation, it has continuously expanded its territory and has now become a major power with a population of 1.5 million. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09416))_
- This is unusual in Alecrast, where feudalism predominates and local nobles typically hold strong autonomous rights. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09416))_
- Orphan's aristocratic system is unique, recognizing only knights who serve the king. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09416))_
- This system can only exist because Rijal is both a warrior and a hero. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09416))_
- Orphan's aristocratic system is unique, recognizing only knights who serve the king. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09416))_
- This country has a mining city called Goudon. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09417))_
- The city of Goudon is known for its large dwarf population. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09417))_
- It has serious historical tensions with Phandria, another fragment of the former Phan Kingdom. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09418))_
- Additionally, it has earned the enmity of the Kingdom of Saine because Rijal gave protection to the nobles who had led the civil war. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09418))_
- While Orphan maintains a close alliance with its neighbor Ramliearth, this very alliance has sparked rumors of an impending large-scale war involving multiple countries in the central region. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09418))_
- Additionally, it has earned the enmity of the Kingdom of Saine because Rijal gave protection to the nobles who had led the civil war. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09418))_
- The royal family of this country possesses the Van Blade, said to be the most powerful magic sword in Alecrast. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09419))_
- This great nation, with a population of nearly 1.5 million, is called the magical kingdom not only because of its numerous Sorcerers but also due to the fact that all successive kings have been practitioners of magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09419))_
- Among the existing kingdoms in Alecrast, Ramliearth, the "Magical Kingdom," has the oldest history. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09419))_
- Furthermore, its unique character is partly due to the architectural influence of the ancient kingdom period, beginning with the royal capital of Lynas. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09419))_
- This great nation, with a population of nearly 1.5 million, is called the magical kingdom not only because of its numerous Sorcerers but also due to the fact that all successive kings have been practitioners of magic. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09419))_
- This is believed to be strongly connected to the disintegration of the ancient kingdom. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09420))_
- To the east of Ramliearth lies a vast desert called the "Desert of Empty." While normal deserts are created when the spirit powers of wind and fire among the earth, water, fire, and wind spirit powers that constitute the world become too strong, the Desert of Empty is different. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09420))_
- Ramliearth has a forest called the "Unicorn Forest." True to its name, it is known to be home to many unicorns. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09421))_
- In particular, their leader Lauras is said to be unmatched in all of Alecrast. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09421))_
- The druids are extremely powerful Shamans. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09421))_
- Additionally, this forest contains a village of nature worshippers called druids, who show no mercy to poachers. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09421))_
- Ramliearth protects these mythical beasts as a national priority and has organized and dispatched woods guardian teams. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09421))_

## Southern Central Region (Language = Western/Gundar)

- There are two powerful nations: Phandria and Lomar. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09423))_
- The southern coastal area is the Southern Central Region. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09423))_
- They emerged after the Phan Kingdom was destroyed by the evil dragon Krish. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09424))_
- Phandria, with a population exceeding 1.2 million people south of Orphan, is known as the "Kingdom of Chaos." Both Orphan and Phandria originated from the great nation of Phan. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09424))_
- They emerged after the Phan Kingdom was destroyed by the evil dragon Krish. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09424))_
- Both countries desire to reunify the former Phan Kingdom, which has led to serious conflicts. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09425))_
- While Phandria's king is Tilar II, he is merely a puppet. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09425))_
- Phandria is supported by various organizations. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09425))_
- Among them are the Thieves Guild, the Assassins' League, and cults of the Dark Gods. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09425))_
- In the capital city of Phandria, there is the only state-recognized temple of Phalaris in all of Alecrast. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09426))_
- In the capital city of Phandria, there is the only state-recognized temple of Phalaris in all of Alecrast. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09426))_
- Lomar is known as the "Kingdom of Travelers." This is because its capital city Lomar is located along the "Road of Free People" that connects east and west Alecrast, and serves as a crucial transportation hub at the starting point of roads leading to the two great nations of the Northern Central Region: Orphan and Ramliearth. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09427))_
- Lomar is known as the "Kingdom of Travelers." This is because its capital city Lomar is located along the "Road of Free People" that connects east and west Alecrast, and serves as a crucial transportation hub at the starting point of roads leading to the two great nations of the Northern Central Region: Orphan and Ramliearth. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09427))_
- When the neighboring country of Raid once invaded, Lomar's military might not only repelled them but also annexed Reide. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09428))_
- With this territorial expansion, Lomar's population has reached 1.2 million. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09428))_
- Lomar is also a powerful military nation that has assembled mercenary forces with its vast wealth. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09428))_
- When the neighboring country of Raid once invaded, Lomar's military might not only repelled them but also annexed Reide. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09428))_
- This black market is controlled by the Thieves Guild and other secret societies. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09429))_
- Sometimes, one might even spot items that should only be available through underground channels, such as unicorn horns. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09429))_
- In Lomar's downtown, there is a massive marketplace. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09429))_
- These include poisons and concealed weapons for assassination. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09429))_
- This downtown area is considered the true face of Lomar. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09429))_
- The city of Lomar is distinctly divided into northern and southern regions by the "Road of Free People." The north is a peaceful and glamorous district lined with noble mansions and merchant houses. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09429))_
- Known as "Lomar's Black Market," one can acquire various goods there. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09429))_
- The south is the downtown area where citizens live. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09429))_
- Sometimes, one might even spot items that should only be available through underground channels, such as unicorn horns. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09429))_
- Prisoners of war and criminals become gladiator slaves and fight there. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09430))_
- Powerful nobles each have their own sponsored gladiators. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09430))_
- Lomar has the largest arena in Alecrast. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09430))_
- The city of Reide within Lomar (formerly the capital of the Kingdom of Reide before its annexation by Lomar) is known as the "City of Mercenaries." This city has a mercenary guild that brokers deals between mercenaries and clients seeking their services. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09431))_
- Additionally, magical weapons and armor are traded in this city. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09431))_
- The city of Reide within Lomar (formerly the capital of the Kingdom of Reide before its annexation by Lomar) is known as the "City of Mercenaries." This city has a mercenary guild that brokers deals between mercenaries and clients seeking their services. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09431))_
- Recently, Lomar has recruited Lukial, who is renowned as a military strategist. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09432))_
- With major conflicts between Orphan and Phandria, and between Orphan and Zain, many humans are worried that Lomar's action might be a sign that they are preparing to start a new war. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09432))_
- For detailed information about the Far East region to the Central Plains, please refer to the "Sword World RPG World Guide". _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09433))_

## Western Countries (Language: Western, except Palmer Village which uses Eastern)

- In response to this clever show of force, the eastern powers mockingly bestowed upon them the unflattering name "Ten Children." _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09435))_
- To the west of the Alecrast continent, there are many small city-states. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09435))_
- These small nations alone cannot stand against the great powers of the east. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09435))_
- Therefore, they established a treaty called the "Tidel Alliance." This agreement states that if the eastern powers were to invade, all ten cities would unite in response. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09435))_
- Therefore, they established a treaty called the "Tidel Alliance." This agreement states that if the eastern powers were to invade, all ten cities would unite in response. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09435))_
- The western nations consist of Promisie, Tidel, Tarlant, Raban, Belldine, Gulgerise, Goba, Referl, Drecknoll, and Zarn. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09436))_
- This village was established as a settlement by the workers who completed the "Road of Free People," and despite being at the western edge, it is known as a village of humans who speak the eastern languages. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09437))_
- Furthermore, to the west of the western nations, at the end of the "Road of Free People," there is a village called Palmer. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09437))_
- Please refer to it for more details. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09438))_
- For more information about the western nations, detailed settings can be found in the "Ten Children World Guide". _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09438))_

## Islands of Azarn (Language = Eastern/Mārdan)

- The Islands of Azarn are an archipelago located in the southeastern part of the Alecrast continent. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09440))_
- Though once a single nation, it is now divided into three kingdoms. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09440))_
- The Islands of Azarn are an archipelago located in the southeastern part of the Alecrast continent. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09440))_
- For detailed information about the Islands of Azarn, please refer to Sword World RPG Scenario Collection #4 "The Rainbow Crystal Palace". _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09441))_

## Island of Damned (Language = Native Language)

- The island suffered an invasion by daemons, which led to it being named "Accursed Island." There appears to be limited trade with the continent. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09443))_
- This is an island floating far south of the Alecrast continent. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09443))_
- Several nations exist in a state of turmoil, and wars appear to be ongoing. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09443))_
- The island suffered an invasion by daemons, which led to it being named "Accursed Island." There appears to be limited trade with the continent. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09443))_
- For detailed information about the Accursed Island, please refer to the "Lodoss World Guide". _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09444))_

## Chaosland (Language = Native Language)

- Very little information about this place has reached the continent. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09446))_
- Please refer to the Fujimi Fantasia Bunko's Sword World RPG novels "Dawn of Chaos I-IV" and "Land of Chaos I-" (ongoing series) for more information. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09447))_
- Chaosland's lore is currently being gradually revealed. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09447))_

## Eastend (Languages = ?)

- The Island at the Edge of the East, Eastend, is an island lying east of the Alecrast continent. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09449))_
- Little is known about this mysterious isle. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09449))_
- While no official setting details have been announced for this region yet, they are planned to be revealed in the future. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09450))_

## Farland (Languages = ?)

- The Unreachable Land - no one knows what kind of place Farland is. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09452))_
- One of the joys of roleplaying games is that game masters and their gaming companions can create their own world from scratch through gameplay. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09453))_
- This will never conflict with official announcements. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09454))_
- Farland was created to address this dilemma. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09454))_
- Farland is a region for which we, the creators, will never release official settings. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09454))_
- Of course, even for the Alecrast continent, you may ignore some or all of our official announcements. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09455))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09452))_

> The Unreachable Land - no one knows what kind of place Farland is. This is because Farland is a place that is "never to be defined in lore."

**Atom:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09454))_

> Therefore, you can create your own world however you like.

## Currency

- The main currency of the Alecrast continent is a silver coin called the "gamel." This silver coin was invented by Count Gamel, who was a minister of the now-extinct Moraana Kingdom. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09457))_
- In the past, commerce relied on bartering or using precious metals like gold and silver, which were measured by weight, as intermediaries. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09457))_
- However, this method made it difficult for commerce to develop, and fraud using cheaper metals that resembled gold and silver was common. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09457))_
- Count Gamel's currency, through the invention of silver coins, brought about a simpler method of trade using a "number of silver coins." Furthermore, the intricate engravings required on the silver coins made them difficult to replicate, reducing the possibility of counterfeit currency appearing. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09458))_
- Following the Count's proposal, the purity and size of the silver coins have been standardized. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09460))_
- While production may occur in other countries, it is customary in all nations to include Count Gamel's relief on the silver coins. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09460))_
- Its weight is almost the same as a silver coin. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09461))_
- One gold coin is worth 50 silver coins, or 50 gamels. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09461))_
- This page was intentionally left blank. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09463))_
- We are finally able to deliver the Sword World RPG Complete Edition. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09467))_
- These are my honest thoughts right now. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09469))_
- When we first announced Sword World RPG, tabletop RPGs themselves were still a novel concept that hadn't really taken root, and even we weren't sure how far we could take it. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09469))_
- Everything was an adventure - from publishing it in paperback format to our policy of supporting not just scenarios and rule supplements, but also novels and other reading materials. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09469))_
- Fortunately, this adventure was successful. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09470))_
- It seems we've earned 1000 experience points for completing our mission (laughs). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09470))_
- What validates this is the writing process for this edition, which took an unexpected amount of time. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09471))_
- Sword World RPG is now recognized as the most-played RPG in Japan. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09471))_
- What surprised me during the writing process was realizing that Sword World RPG had grown into something much bigger than we expected. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09472))_
- In fact, we've even omitted some elements that were rarely used. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09473))_
- And the core system portion that forms the backbone of the game rules hasn't increased much at all. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09473))_
- However, in terms of volume, it has reached about 1.5 times that of the previous three paperback rulebooks. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09474))_
- Since we're calling it the Complete Edition, we ambitiously decided to include all the additional data that appeared in various novels and scenarios up until now, and even ideas that were submitted to Dragon Magazine's reader response pages. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09475))_
- Y es, the amount of data had greatly increased. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09475))_
- However, the task of creating this data is not straightforward. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09476))_
- At least, I would burn out (laughs). _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09476))_
- I believe this is the true asset of Sword World RPG, which has been played continuously for 8 years. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09476))_
- But as the numbers increase, it becomes exponentially more difficult. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09476))_
- Coming up with ideas, converting them into data, checking consistency with existing content - the first 10 or 20 are easy. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09476))_
- RPGs are said to be games of data. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09476))_
- We have always felt that such maturation time was necessary for a good game. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09477))_
- Because this has been achieved, we now feel a deep sense of accomplishment, thinking "we've finally made it this far." _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09477))_
- It is precisely because we have continued creating Sword World RPG for 8 years, and because there have been people who played it, that we were able to accumulate this much data. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09477))_
- Because this has been achieved, we now feel a deep sense of accomplishment, thinking "we've finally made it this far." _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09477))_
- It is precisely because we have continued creating Sword World RPG for 8 years, and because there have been people who played it, that we were able to accumulate this much data. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09477))_
- Adding to that the wealth of data accumulated over these 8 years, this game should have become even more enjoyable and interesting. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09479))_
- Please play it-that is our greatest wish. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09480))_
- We believe this work will satisfy both longtime players and newcomers alike. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09480))_
- And we hope that this will make the game even better. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09480))_
- This game will continue to receive further support through Fujimi Shobo's Dragon Magazine and RPG Dragon Magazine. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09481))_
- Please make use of these two magazines to enhance your gaming experience. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09481))_
- While the author of this book is listed as "Miyuki Kiyomatsu/Group SNE," this means that I handled the main work such as organization, editing, and final checks, while the various manuscripts were, of course, collaboratively written by Group SNE members, including Ryo Mizuno and Hiroshi Yamamoto. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09482))_
- While the author of this book is listed as "Miyuki Kiyomatsu/Group SNE," this means that I handled the main work such as organization, editing, and final checks, while the various manuscripts were, of course, collaboratively written by Group SNE members, including Ryo Mizuno and Hiroshi Yamamoto. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09482))_

**Context:** _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09460))_

> The coinage guild in Eremire primarily produces silver coins. While production may occur in other countries, it is customary in all nations to include Count Gamel's relief on the silver coins. Following the Count's proposal, the purity and size of the silver coins have been standardized. One silver coin weighs approximately 4 grams.

## Table 5-1: Area and Size Expansion

- Note) On the table, expansion rate is the multiplier for mental power consumed. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09527))_
- For spells cast on a flat surface, use the number in the area expansion length column, and for spells cast into space, use the number in the volume expansion length column. _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09528))_
- When you cast a spell by consuming that multiplied amount of mental power, multiply the number in area expansion length or volume expansion length by the number (radius, side) that represents the spell's area of effect , and the result will be the spell's area . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09528))_
- For example, when you cast the ancient magic Light , whose area is A space with a 10 meter radius , by consuming double the mental power, the resulting area will be a spherical space with a radius of 10 x 1.3 = 13 meters . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09529))_
- For example, when you cast the ancient magic Light , whose area is A space with a 10 meter radius , by consuming double the mental power, the resulting area will be a spherical space with a radius of 10 x 1.3 = 13 meters . _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-09529))_

- Target Scores
2.2 Target Scores
The baseline score is  a number that represents a character's ability. However, the  success  of  an  action  is  not  only related to the ability of the person attempting it, but also to the difficulty of the action itself. The difficulty of hitting a target with the — _partial-parse: table parsed as enumerated rows_ _(Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf (source-range-de1806a5-00501))_
